search_text: Unknown-Aware Object Detection: Learning What You Don't Know from Videos in the Wild 未知物体检测：从野外视频中学习您不知道的东西 Building reliable object detectors that can detect out-of-distribution (OOD) objects is critical yet underexplored. One of the key challenges is that models lack supervision signals from unknown data, producing overconfident predictions on OOD objects. We propose a new unknown-aware object detection framework through Spatial-Temporal Unknown Distillation (STUD), which distills unknown objects from videos in the wild and meaningfully regularizes the model's decision boundary. STUD first identifies the unknown candidate object proposals in the spatial dimension, and then aggregates the candidates across multiple video frames to form a diverse set of unknown objects near the decision boundary. Alongside, we employ an energy-based uncertainty regularization loss, which contrastively shapes the uncertainty space between the in-distribution and distilled unknown objects. STUD establishes the state-of-the-art performance on OOD detection tasks for object detection, reducing the FPR95 score by over 10% compared to the previous best method. Code is available at https://github.com/deeplearning-wisc/stud. 构建能够检测分布外 (OOD) 对象的可靠对象检测器至关重要，但尚未得到充分探索。关键挑战之一是模型缺乏来自未知数据的监督信号，从而对 OOD 对象产生过度自信的预测。我们通过时空未知蒸馏（STUD）提出了一种新的未知感知对象检测框架，该框架从野外视频中提取未知对象，并有意义地规范模型的决策边界。 STUD 首先识别空间维度中的未知候选对象建议，然后跨多个视频帧聚合候选对象，以在决策边界附近形成一组不同的未知对象。此外，我们采用基于能量的不确定性正则化损失，它对比地塑造了分布中的未知对象和提取的未知对象之间的不确定性空间。 STUD 在物体检测的 OOD 检测任务上建立了最先进的性能，与之前的最佳方法相比，FPR95 分数降低了 10% 以上。代码可在 https://github.com/deeplearning-wisc/stud 获取。 本文提出一种新的未知感知目标检测框架STUD，通过从野外视频中学习未知对象以提升检测器对分布外（OOD）对象的识别能力。 Xuefeng Du,Xin Wang,Gabriel Gozum,Yixuan Li cs.CV

authors_text: Lucas Caccia,Rahaf Aljundi,Nader Asadi,Tinne Tuytelaars,Joelle Pineau,Eugene Belilovsky
title: New Insights on Reducing Abrupt Representation Change in Online Continual Learning
title_zh: 关于减少在线持续学习中表征突变的新见解
comment: This has been withdrawn as it is a new version of arXiv:2104.05025
comments: This has been withdrawn as it is a new version of arXiv:2104.05025
abstract: In the online continual learning paradigm, agents must learn from a changing distribution while respecting memory and compute constraints. Experience Replay (ER), where a small subset of past data is stored and replayed alongside new data, has emerged as a simple and effective learning strategy. In this work, we focus on the change in representations of observed data that arises when previously unobserved classes appear in the incoming data stream, and new classes must be distinguished from previous ones. We shed new light on this question by showing that applying ER causes the newly added classes' representations to overlap significantly with the previous classes, leading to highly disruptive parameter updates. Based on this empirical analysis, we propose a new method which mitigates this issue by shielding the learned representations from drastic adaptation to accommodate new classes. We show that using an asymmetric update rule pushes new classes to adapt to the older ones (rather than the reverse), which is more effective especially at task boundaries, where much of the forgetting typically occurs. Empirical results show significant gains over strong baselines on standard continual learning benchmarks
summary: In the online continual learning paradigm, agents must learn from a changing distribution while respecting memory and compute constraints. Experience Replay (ER), where a small subset of past data is stored and replayed alongside new data, has emerged as a simple and effective learning strategy. In this work, we focus on the change in representations of observed data that arises when previously unobserved classes appear in the incoming data stream, and new classes must be distinguished from previous ones. We shed new light on this question by showing that applying ER causes the newly added classes' representations to overlap significantly with the previous classes, leading to highly disruptive parameter updates. Based on this empirical analysis, we propose a new method which mitigates this issue by shielding the learned representations from drastic adaptation to accommodate new classes. We show that using an asymmetric update rule pushes new classes to adapt to the older ones (rather than the reverse), which is more effective especially at task boundaries, where much of the forgetting typically occurs. Empirical results show significant gains over strong baselines on standard continual learning benchmarks
abstract_zh: 在在线持续学习范式中，智能体必须从不断变化的分布中学习，同时尊重内存和计算约束。体验重放（ER），其中一小部分过去的数据被存储并与新数据一起重放，已经成为一种简单而有效的学习策略。在这项工作中，我们重点关注当先前未观察到的类出现在传入数据流中时所发生的观察数据表示的变化，并且新类必须与以前的类区分开。我们通过证明应用 ER 会导致新添加的类的表示与之前的类显着重叠，从而导致高度破坏性的参数更新，为这个问题提供了新的线索。基于这一实证分析，我们提出了一种新方法，通过保护学习的表示免于剧烈适应以适应新类别，从而缓解这个问题。我们表明，使用非对称更新规则可以推动新类适应旧类（而不是相反），这尤其在任务边界更有效，因为任务边界通常会发生很多遗忘。实证结果显示，与标准持续学习基准的强基线相比，取得了显着的进步

AI.tldr: 本文研究在线持续学习中因新类出现导致的表示突然变化问题，提出新方法减少此类冲突。
AI.motivation: 传统经验回放策略在新类出现时会导致新旧类表示重叠，引发破坏性参数更新，从而加剧遗忘问题。
AI.method: 设计非对称更新规则，强制新类向旧类适应而非相反，特别在任务边界处有效抑制表示冲突。
AI.result: 在标准持续学习基准测试中，该方法显著优于现有强基线，有效缓解了表示突变带来的性能下降。
AI.conclusion: 通过定向约束表示更新方向，可有效解决在线持续学习中新旧类冲突问题，提升模型鲁棒性。

authors_text: Junchi Liang,Bowen Wen,Kostas Bekris,Abdeslam Boularias
title: Learning Sensorimotor Primitives of Sequential Manipulation Tasks from Visual Demonstrations
title_zh: 从视觉演示中学习顺序操作任务的感觉运动原语
abstract: This work aims to learn how to perform complex robot manipulation tasks that are composed of several, consecutively executed low-level sub-tasks, given as input a few visual demonstrations of the tasks performed by a person. The sub-tasks consist of moving the robot's end-effector until it reaches a sub-goal region in the task space, performing an action, and triggering the next sub-task when a pre-condition is met. Most prior work in this domain has been concerned with learning only low-level tasks, such as hitting a ball or reaching an object and grasping it. This paper describes a new neural network-based framework for learning simultaneously low-level policies as well as high-level policies, such as deciding which object to pick next or where to place it relative to other objects in the scene. A key feature of the proposed approach is that the policies are learned directly from raw videos of task demonstrations, without any manual annotation or post-processing of the data. Empirical results on object manipulation tasks with a robotic arm show that the proposed network can efficiently learn from real visual demonstrations to perform the tasks, and outperforms popular imitation learning algorithms.
summary: This work aims to learn how to perform complex robot manipulation tasks that are composed of several, consecutively executed low-level sub-tasks, given as input a few visual demonstrations of the tasks performed by a person. The sub-tasks consist of moving the robot's end-effector until it reaches a sub-goal region in the task space, performing an action, and triggering the next sub-task when a pre-condition is met. Most prior work in this domain has been concerned with learning only low-level tasks, such as hitting a ball or reaching an object and grasping it. This paper describes a new neural network-based framework for learning simultaneously low-level policies as well as high-level policies, such as deciding which object to pick next or where to place it relative to other objects in the scene. A key feature of the proposed approach is that the policies are learned directly from raw videos of task demonstrations, without any manual annotation or post-processing of the data. Empirical results on object manipulation tasks with a robotic arm show that the proposed network can efficiently learn from real visual demonstrations to perform the tasks, and outperforms popular imitation learning algorithms.
abstract_zh: 这项工作的目的是学习如何执行复杂的机器人操作任务，这些任务由几个连续执行的低级子任务组成，并给出一些由人执行的任务的视觉演示作为输入。子任务包括移动机器人的末端执行器直到到达任务空间中的子目标区域，执行动作，并在满足前提条件时触发下一个子任务。该领域的大多数先前工作只涉及学习低级任务，例如击球或到达并抓住物体。本文描述了一种新的基于神经网络的框架，用于同时学习低级策略和高级策略，例如决定接下来选择哪个对象或相对于场景中的其他对象将其放置在哪里。该方法的一个关键特征是直接从任务演示的原始视频中学习策略，无需任何手动注释或数据后处理。使用机械臂进行对象操作任务的实证结果表明，所提出的网络可以有效地从真实的视觉演示中学习来执行任务，并且优于流行的模仿学习算法。

AI.tldr: 该论文旨在通过少量人类视觉演示来学习执行复杂的机器人操作任务，这些任务由多个连续执行的低级子任务组成。
AI.motivation: 先前的工作主要集中在学习低级任务，如击球或抓取物体，而缺乏对高级策略的学习，如决定下一步抓取哪个物体或将其放置在何处。
AI.method: 该论文提出了一种基于神经网络的新框架，可以同时学习低级策略和高级策略，并且直接从任务演示的原始视频中学习，无需人工标注或数据后处理。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，该网络能够从实际视觉演示中高效学习任务，并优于流行的模仿学习算法。
AI.conclusion: 该方法提供了一种直接从视觉演示中学习复杂机器人操作任务的新途径，能够同时学习低级和高级策略，具有较高的效率和性能。

The sub-tasks consist of moving the robot's end-effector until it reaches a sub-goal region in the task space, performing an action, and triggering the next sub-task when a pre-condition is met. Most prior work in this domain has been concerned with learning only low-level tasks, such as hitting a ball or reaching an object and grasping it. This paper describes a new neural network-based framework for learning simultaneously low-level policies as well as high-level policies, such as deciding which object to pick next or where to place it relative to other objects in the scene. A key feature of the proposed approach is that the policies are learned directly from raw videos of task demonstrations, without any manual annotation or post-processing of the data. Empirical results on object manipulation tasks with a robotic arm show that the proposed network can efficiently learn from real visual demonstrations to perform the tasks, and outperforms popular imitation learning algorithms. 这项工作的目的是学习如何执行复杂的机器人操作任务，这些任务由几个连续执行的低级子任务组成，并给出一些由人执行的任务的视觉演示作为输入。子任务包括移动机器人的末端执行器直到到达任务空间中的子目标区域，执行动作，并在满足前提条件时触发下一个子任务。该领域的大多数先前工作只涉及学习低级任务，例如击球或到达并抓住物体。本文描述了一种新的基于神经网络的框架，用于同时学习低级策略和高级策略，例如决定接下来选择哪个对象或相对于场景中的其他对象将其放置在哪里。该方法的一个关键特征是直接从任务演示的原始视频中学习策略，无需任何手动注释或数据后处理。使用机械臂进行对象操作任务的实证结果表明，所提出的网络可以有效地从真实的视觉演示中学习来执行任务，并且优于流行的模仿学习算法。 该论文旨在通过少量人类视觉演示来学习执行复杂的机器人操作任务，这些任务由多个连续执行的低级子任务组成。 Junchi Liang,Bowen Wen,Kostas Bekris,Abdeslam Boularias cs.RO,cs.LG

authors_text: Yunhao Du,Zhihang Tong,Junfeng Wan,Binyu Zhang,Yanyun Zhao
title: PAMI-AD: An Activity Detector Exploiting Part-attention and Motion Information in Surveillance Videos
title_zh: PAMI-AD：利用监控视频中的部分注意力和运动信息的活动检测器
abstract: Activity detection in surveillance videos is a challenging task caused by small objects, complex activity categories, its untrimmed nature, etc. Existing methods are generally limited in performance due to inaccurate proposals, poor classifiers or inadequate post-processing method. In this work, we propose a comprehensive and effective activity detection system in untrimmed surveillance videos for person-centered and vehicle-centered activities. It consists of four modules, i.e., object localizer, proposal filter, activity classifier and activity refiner. For person-centered activities, a novel part-attention mechanism is proposed to explore detailed features in different body parts. As for vehicle-centered activities, we propose a localization masking method to jointly encode motion and foreground attention features. We conduct experiments on the large-scale activity detection datasets VIRAT, and achieve the best results for both groups of activities. Furthermore, our team won the 1st place in the TRECVID 2021 ActEV challenge.
summary: Activity detection in surveillance videos is a challenging task caused by small objects, complex activity categories, its untrimmed nature, etc. Existing methods are generally limited in performance due to inaccurate proposals, poor classifiers or inadequate post-processing method. In this work, we propose a comprehensive and effective activity detection system in untrimmed surveillance videos for person-centered and vehicle-centered activities. It consists of four modules, i.e., object localizer, proposal filter, activity classifier and activity refiner. For person-centered activities, a novel part-attention mechanism is proposed to explore detailed features in different body parts. As for vehicle-centered activities, we propose a localization masking method to jointly encode motion and foreground attention features. We conduct experiments on the large-scale activity detection datasets VIRAT, and achieve the best results for both groups of activities. Furthermore, our team won the 1st place in the TRECVID 2021 ActEV challenge.
abstract_zh: 监控视频中的活动检测是一项具有挑战性的任务，原因是目标较小、活动类别复杂、未经修剪的性质等。由于建议不准确、分类器较差或后处理方法不充分，现有方法通常在性能上受到限制。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种在未经修剪的监控视频中全面有效的活动检测系统，用于以人为中心和以车辆为中心的活动。它由四个模块组成，即对象定位器、提案过滤器、活动分类器和活动细化器。对于以人为中心的活动，提出了一种新颖的部分注意机制来探索不同身体部位的详细特征。对于以车辆为中心的活动，我们提出了一种定位掩蔽方法来联合编码运动和前景注意特征。我们在大规模活动检测数据集 VIRAT 上进行了实验，并为两组活动取得了最佳结果。此外，我们的团队在 TRECVID 2021 ActEV 挑战赛中获得了第一名。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种针对监控视频的活动检测系统PAMI-AD，通过结合部分注意力机制和运动信息，解决小物体、复杂活动类别及未剪辑视频带来的检测难题。
AI.motivation: 现有活动检测方法因提案不准确、分类器性能不足及后处理缺陷，在监控视频中难以有效处理小物体和复杂活动场景。
AI.method: 系统包含四个模块：对象定位器、提案过滤器、活动分类器和活动精炼器。针对人和车辆分别设计部分注意力机制与定位掩码方法，融合运动与前景特征。
AI.result: 在VIRAT数据集上取得最佳检测效果，并在TRECVID 2021 ActEV挑战赛中获得第一名。
AI.conclusion: PAMI-AD通过模块化设计与多模态特征融合，显著提升了监控视频中人车活动检测的准确性与鲁棒性。

authors_text: Siddharth Singh Savner,Vivek Kanhangad
title: CrowdFormer: Weakly-supervised Crowd counting with Improved Generalizability
title_zh: CrowdFormer：弱监督人群计数，具有改进的通用性
abstract: Convolutional neural networks (CNNs) have dominated the field of computer vision for nearly a decade due to their strong ability to learn local features. However, due to their limited receptive field, CNNs fail to model the global context. On the other hand, transformer, an attention-based architecture can model the global context easily. Despite this, there are limited studies that investigate the effectiveness of transformers in crowd counting. In addition, the majority of the existing crowd counting methods are based on the regression of density maps which requires point-level annotation of each person present in the scene. This annotation task is laborious and also error-prone. This has led to increased focus on weakly-supervised crowd counting methods which require only the count-level annotations. In this paper, we propose a weakly-supervised method for crowd counting using a pyramid vision transformer. We have conducted extensive evaluations to validate the effectiveness of the proposed method. Our method is comparable to the state-of-the-art on the benchmark crowd datasets. More importantly, it shows remarkable generalizability.
summary: Convolutional neural networks (CNNs) have dominated the field of computer vision for nearly a decade due to their strong ability to learn local features. However, due to their limited receptive field, CNNs fail to model the global context. On the other hand, transformer, an attention-based architecture can model the global context easily. Despite this, there are limited studies that investigate the effectiveness of transformers in crowd counting. In addition, the majority of the existing crowd counting methods are based on the regression of density maps which requires point-level annotation of each person present in the scene. This annotation task is laborious and also error-prone. This has led to increased focus on weakly-supervised crowd counting methods which require only the count-level annotations. In this paper, we propose a weakly-supervised method for crowd counting using a pyramid vision transformer. We have conducted extensive evaluations to validate the effectiveness of the proposed method. Our method is comparable to the state-of-the-art on the benchmark crowd datasets. More importantly, it shows remarkable generalizability.
abstract_zh: 卷积神经网络（CNN）凭借其强大的学习局部特征的能力，在计算机视觉领域占据了近十年的主导地位。然而，由于其感受野有限，CNN 无法对全局环境进行建模。另一方面，Transformer，一种基于注意力的架构可以轻松地对全局上下文进行建模。尽管如此，调查变压器在人群计数中的有效性的研究仍然有限。此外，大多数现有的人群计数方法都是基于密度图的回归，这需要对场景中存在的每个人进行点级注释。这个注释任务既费力又容易出错。这导致人们越来越关注仅需要计数级别注释的弱监督人群计数方法。在本文中，我们提出了一种使用金字塔视觉变换器进行人群计数的弱监督方法。我们进行了广泛的评估以验证所提出方法的有效性。我们的方法可与基准人群数据集上最先进的方法相媲美。更重要的是，它表现出显着的普遍性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于金字塔视觉变换器的弱监督人群计数方法，以提高模型的泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 传统卷积神经网络（CNN）因感受野有限难以建模全局上下文，而现有方法依赖像素级标注导致标注成本高且易出错。变换器架构虽能建模全局上下文，但其在人群计数中的应用研究较少。
AI.method: 采用金字塔视觉变换器（PVT）构建弱监督人群计数框架，通过仅使用计数级标注进行训练，并在基准数据集上进行广泛评估。
AI.result: 该方法在基准人群数据集上性能与现有最先进方法相当，且展现出显著的泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: 基于变换器的弱监督方法有效提升了人群计数任务的泛化能力，验证了全局上下文建模对减少标注依赖的重要性。

authors_text: Kenny Chen,Ryan Nemiroff,Brett T. Lopez
title: Direct LiDAR-Inertial Odometry: Lightweight LIO with Continuous-Time Motion Correction
title_zh: 直接 LiDAR 惯性里程计：具有连续时间运动校正的轻量级 LIO
comment: IEEE International Conference on Robotics and Automation (ICRA) 2023. Video: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=4-oXjG8ow10
comments: IEEE International Conference on Robotics and Automation (ICRA) 2023. Video: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=4-oXjG8ow10
abstract: Aggressive motions from agile flights or traversing irregular terrain induce motion distortion in LiDAR scans that can degrade state estimation and mapping. Some methods exist to mitigate this effect, but they are still too simplistic or computationally costly for resource-constrained mobile robots. To this end, this paper presents Direct LiDAR-Inertial Odometry (DLIO), a lightweight LiDAR-inertial odometry algorithm with a new coarse-to-fine approach in constructing continuous-time trajectories for precise motion correction. The key to our method lies in the construction of a set of analytical equations which are parameterized solely by time, enabling fast and parallelizable point-wise deskewing. This method is feasible only because of the strong convergence properties in our nonlinear geometric observer, which provides provably correct state estimates for initializing the sensitive IMU integration step. Moreover, by simultaneously performing motion correction and prior generation, and by directly registering each scan to the map and bypassing scan-to-scan, DLIO's condensed architecture is nearly 20% more computationally efficient than the current state-of-the-art with a 12% increase in accuracy. We demonstrate DLIO's superior localization accuracy, map quality, and lower computational overhead as compared to four state-of-the-art algorithms through extensive tests using multiple public benchmark and self-collected datasets.
summary: Aggressive motions from agile flights or traversing irregular terrain induce motion distortion in LiDAR scans that can degrade state estimation and mapping. Some methods exist to mitigate this effect, but they are still too simplistic or computationally costly for resource-constrained mobile robots. To this end, this paper presents Direct LiDAR-Inertial Odometry (DLIO), a lightweight LiDAR-inertial odometry algorithm with a new coarse-to-fine approach in constructing continuous-time trajectories for precise motion correction. The key to our method lies in the construction of a set of analytical equations which are parameterized solely by time, enabling fast and parallelizable point-wise deskewing. This method is feasible only because of the strong convergence properties in our nonlinear geometric observer, which provides provably correct state estimates for initializing the sensitive IMU integration step. Moreover, by simultaneously performing motion correction and prior generation, and by directly registering each scan to the map and bypassing scan-to-scan, DLIO's condensed architecture is nearly 20% more computationally efficient than the current state-of-the-art with a 12% increase in accuracy. We demonstrate DLIO's superior localization accuracy, map quality, and lower computational overhead as compared to four state-of-the-art algorithms through extensive tests using multiple public benchmark and self-collected datasets.
abstract_zh: 敏捷飞行或穿越不规则地形的攻击性运动会导致激光雷达扫描中的运动失真，从而降低状态估计和绘图质量。有一些方法可以减轻这种影响，但对于资源有限的移动机器人来说，它们仍然过于简单或计算成本高昂。为此，本文提出了直接激光雷达惯性里程计（DLIO），这是一种轻量级激光雷达惯性里程计算法，采用新的从粗到精的方法来构建连续时间轨迹以进行精确运动校正。我们方法的关键在于构造一组仅按时间参数化的解析方程，从而实现快速且可并行的逐点偏移校正。这种方法之所以可行，只是因为我们的非线性几何观测器具有强大的收敛特性，它为初始化敏感的 IMU 积分步骤提供了可证明正确的状态估计。此外，通过同时执行运动校正和前一代，以及直接将每次扫描注册到地图并绕过扫描到扫描，DLIO 的压缩架构的计算效率比当前最先进的技术高出近 20%，精度提高了 12%。通过使用多个公共基准和自行收集的数据集进行的广泛测试，我们证明了 DLIO 与四种最先进的算法相比具有卓越的定位精度、地图质量和更低的计算开销。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种轻量级的直接激光雷达惯性里程计（DLIO）算法，用于在资源受限的移动机器人中实现高精度的运动校正和地图构建。
AI.motivation: 敏捷飞行或穿越不规则地形时，激光雷达扫描会因剧烈运动而产生运动失真，影响状态估计和地图质量。现有方法或过于简单，或计算成本过高，难以适用于资源受限的移动机器人。
AI.method: 本文提出了一种新的从粗到细的方法，通过构建仅由时间参数化的分析方程，实现快速并行的点对点去偏。利用非线性几何观测器的强收敛性，确保IMU积分步骤的正确初始化，并通过同时进行运动校正和先验生成，提高计算效率。
AI.result: 实验表明，DLIO在多个公开基准数据集和自收集数据集上，相比四种最先进的算法，具有更高的定位精度和地图质量，计算开销减少了约20%，精度提高了12%。
AI.conclusion: DLIO算法通过引入连续时间轨迹构建和高效的运动校正方法，实现了在资源受限环境下的高精度定位和地图构建，为移动机器人提供了更优的解决方案。

search_text: Direct LiDAR-Inertial Odometry: Lightweight LIO with Continuous-Time Motion Correction 直接 LiDAR 惯性里程计：具有连续时间运动校正的轻量级 LIO Aggressive motions from agile flights or traversing irregular terrain induce motion distortion in LiDAR scans that can degrade state estimation and mapping. Some methods exist to mitigate this effect, but they are still too simplistic or computationally costly for resource-constrained mobile robots. To this end, this paper presents Direct LiDAR-Inertial Odometry (DLIO), a lightweight LiDAR-inertial odometry algorithm with a new coarse-to-fine approach in constructing continuous-time trajectories for precise motion correction. The key to our method lies in the construction of a set of analytical equations which are parameterized solely by time, enabling fast and parallelizable point-wise deskewing. This method is feasible only because of the strong convergence properties in our nonlinear geometric observer, which provides provably correct state estimates for initializing the sensitive IMU integration step. Moreover, by simultaneously performing motion correction and prior generation, and by directly registering each scan to the map and bypassing scan-to-scan, DLIO's condensed architecture is nearly 20% more computationally efficient than the current state-of-the-art with a 12% increase in accuracy. We demonstrate DLIO's superior localization accuracy, map quality, and lower computational overhead as compared to four state-of-the-art algorithms through extensive tests using multiple public benchmark and self-collected datasets. 敏捷飞行或穿越不规则地形的攻击性运动会导致激光雷达扫描中的运动失真，从而降低状态估计和绘图质量。有一些方法可以减轻这种影响，但对于资源有限的移动机器人来说，它们仍然过于简单或计算成本高昂。为此，本文提出了直接激光雷达惯性里程计（DLIO），这是一种轻量级激光雷达惯性里程计算法，采用新的从粗到精的方法来构建连续时间轨迹以进行精确运动校正。我们方法的关键在于构造一组仅按时间参数化的解析方程，从而实现快速且可并行的逐点偏移校正。这种方法之所以可行，只是因为我们的非线性几何观测器具有强大的收敛特性，它为初始化敏感的 IMU 积分步骤提供了可证明正确的状态估计。此外，通过同时执行运动校正和前一代，以及直接将每次扫描注册到地图并绕过扫描到扫描，DLIO 的压缩架构的计算效率比当前最先进的技术高出近 20%，精度提高了 12%。通过使用多个公共基准和自行收集的数据集进行的广泛测试，我们证明了 DLIO 与四种最先进的算法相比具有卓越的定位精度、地图质量和更低的计算开销。 本文提出了一种轻量级的直接激光雷达惯性里程计（DLIO）算法，用于在资源受限的移动机器人中实现高精度的运动校正和地图构建。 Kenny Chen,Ryan Nemiroff,Brett T. authors_text: Shubham Gupta,Sahil Manchanda,Srikanta Bedathur,Sayan Ranu
title: TIGGER: Scalable Generative Modelling for Temporal Interaction Graphs
title_zh: TIGGER：时间交互图的可扩展生成建模
comment: To be published in AAAI-2022, additionally contains technical appendices/supplementary material
comments: To be published in AAAI-2022, additionally contains technical appendices/supplementary material
abstract: There has been a recent surge in learning generative models for graphs. While impressive progress has been made on static graphs, work on generative modeling of temporal graphs is at a nascent stage with significant scope for improvement. First, existing generative models do not scale with either the time horizon or the number of nodes. Second, existing techniques are transductive in nature and thus do not facilitate knowledge transfer. Finally, due to relying on one-to-one node mapping from source to the generated graph, existing models leak node identity information and do not allow up-scaling/down-scaling the source graph size. In this paper, we bridge these gaps with a novel generative model called TIGGER. TIGGER derives its power through a combination of temporal point processes with auto-regressive modeling enabling both transductive and inductive variants. Through extensive experiments on real datasets, we establish TIGGER generates graphs of superior fidelity, while also being up to 3 orders of magnitude faster than the state-of-the-art.
summary: There has been a recent surge in learning generative models for graphs. While impressive progress has been made on static graphs, work on generative modeling of temporal graphs is at a nascent stage with significant scope for improvement. First, existing generative models do not scale with either the time horizon or the number of nodes. Second, existing techniques are transductive in nature and thus do not facilitate knowledge transfer. Finally, due to relying on one-to-one node mapping from source to the generated graph, existing models leak node identity information and do not allow up-scaling/down-scaling the source graph size. In this paper, we bridge these gaps with a novel generative model called TIGGER. TIGGER derives its power through a combination of temporal point processes with auto-regressive modeling enabling both transductive and inductive variants. Through extensive experiments on real datasets, we establish TIGGER generates graphs of superior fidelity, while also being up to 3 orders of magnitude faster than the state-of-the-art.
abstract_zh: 最近图学习生成模型的激增。虽然静态图已经取得了令人印象深刻的进展，但时间图的生成建模工作仍处于初级阶段，还有很大的改进空间。首先，现有的生成模型不随时间范围或节点数量进行扩展。其次，现有技术本质上是传导性的，因此不利于知识转移。最后，由于依赖从源到生成图的一对一节点映射，现有模型泄漏节点身份信息并且不允许放大/缩小源图大小。在本文中，我们通过一种名为 TIGGER 的新型生成模型来弥补这些差距。 TIGGER 通过时间点过程与自回归建模的结合来获得其力量，从而实现传导和归纳变量。通过对真实数据集进行大量实验，我们确定 TIGGER 生成的图表具有卓越的保真度，同时速度比最先进的技术快 3 个数量级。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为TIGGER的可扩展生成模型，用于处理时间交互图的生成问题。
AI.motivation: 现有时间图生成模型存在扩展性差、无法知识迁移及节点身份信息泄露等问题，亟需改进。
AI.method: 结合时间点过程与自回归建模，设计支持转导和归纳两种模式的生成框架。
AI.result: 在真实数据集上生成图的保真度优于现有方法，且速度提升达3个数量级。
AI.conclusion: TIGGER有效解决了时间图生成中的扩展性、迁移性及匿名性难题，具有显著优势。

authors_text: Xudong Zhang,Zan Wang,Jingke Zhao,Lanjun Wang
title: Targeted Data Poisoning Attack on News Recommendation System by Content Perturbation
title_zh: 通过内容扰动对新闻推荐系统进行定向数据投毒攻击
abstract: News Recommendation System(NRS) has become a fundamental technology to many online news services. Meanwhile, several studies show that recommendation systems(RS) are vulnerable to data poisoning attacks, and the attackers have the ability to mislead the system to perform as their desires. A widely studied attack approach, injecting fake users, can be applied on the NRS when the NRS is treated the same as the other systems whose items are fixed. However, in the NRS, as each item (i.e. news) is more informative, we propose a novel approach to poison the NRS, which is to perturb contents of some browsed news that results in the manipulation of the rank of the target news. Intuitively, an attack is useless if it is highly likely to be caught, i.e., exposed. To address this, we introduce a notion of the exposure risk and propose a novel problem of attacking a history news dataset by means of perturbations where the goal is to maximize the manipulation of the target news rank while keeping the risk of exposure under a given budget. We design a reinforcement learning framework, called TDP-CP, which contains a two-stage hierarchical model to reduce the searching space. Meanwhile, influence estimation is also applied to save the time on retraining the NRS for rewards. We test the performance of TDP-CP under three NRSs and on different target news. Our experiments show that TDP-CP can increase the rank of the target news successfully with a limited exposure budget.
summary: News Recommendation System(NRS) has become a fundamental technology to many online news services. Meanwhile, several studies show that recommendation systems(RS) are vulnerable to data poisoning attacks, and the attackers have the ability to mislead the system to perform as their desires. A widely studied attack approach, injecting fake users, can be applied on the NRS when the NRS is treated the same as the other systems whose items are fixed. However, in the NRS, as each item (i.e. news) is more informative, we propose a novel approach to poison the NRS, which is to perturb contents of some browsed news that results in the manipulation of the rank of the target news. Intuitively, an attack is useless if it is highly likely to be caught, i.e., exposed. To address this, we introduce a notion of the exposure risk and propose a novel problem of attacking a history news dataset by means of perturbations where the goal is to maximize the manipulation of the target news rank while keeping the risk of exposure under a given budget. We design a reinforcement learning framework, called TDP-CP, which contains a two-stage hierarchical model to reduce the searching space. Meanwhile, influence estimation is also applied to save the time on retraining the NRS for rewards. We test the performance of TDP-CP under three NRSs and on different target news. Our experiments show that TDP-CP can increase the rank of the target news successfully with a limited exposure budget.
abstract_zh: 新闻推荐系统（NRS）已成为许多在线新闻服务的基础技术。同时，多项研究表明推荐系统（RS）很容易受到数据中毒攻击，并且攻击者有能力误导系统按照他们的意愿执行。当 NRS 与其他项目固定的系统相同时，可以将一种广泛研究的攻击方法（注入假用户）应用于 NRS。然而，在 NRS 中，由于每个项目（即新闻）的信息量更大，我们提出了一种新颖的方法来毒害 NRS，即扰乱某些浏览新闻的内容，从而导致目标新闻排名的操纵。直观上，如果攻击很可能被捕获（即暴露），则攻击是无用的。为了解决这个问题，我们引入了曝光风险的概念，并提出了一个通过扰动攻击历史新闻数据集的新问题，其目标是最大化对目标新闻排名的操纵，同时将曝光风险保持在给定的预算下。我们设计了一个强化学习框架，称为 TDP-CP，它包含一个两阶段分层模型来减少搜索空间。同时，还应用影响力估计来节省重新训练 NRS 以获得奖励的时间。我们测试了 TDP-CP 在三个 NRS 和不同目​​标新闻上的性能。我们的实验表明，TDP-CP 可以在有限的曝光预算下成功提高目标新闻的排名。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种针对新闻推荐系统的内容扰动数据投毒攻击方法，通过操纵用户浏览新闻内容来提升目标新闻排名，同时控制暴露风险。
AI.motivation: 现有数据投毒攻击方法（如注入假用户）在新闻推荐系统中效果有限，因新闻内容信息量大且需避免攻击被发现。需设计更隐蔽且高效的攻击方式。
AI.method: 设计强化学习框架TDP-CP，包含两阶段分层模型缩小搜索空间，并结合影响估计技术减少系统重训练时间，以在限定暴露风险下最大化目标新闻排名提升。
AI.result: 实验表明，TDP-CP在三种新闻推荐系统中均能有效提升目标新闻排名，且在有限暴露预算下保持较低被发现概率。
AI.conclusion: 内容扰动攻击为新闻推荐系统引入新型安全威胁，TDP-CP方法验证了通过优化暴露风险与攻击效果平衡可实现隐蔽性攻击，需加强推荐系统对此类攻击的防御能力。

search_text: Targeted Data Poisoning Attack on News Recommendation System by Content Perturbation 通过内容扰动对新闻推荐系统进行定向数据投毒攻击 News Recommendation System(NRS) has become a fundamental technology to many online news services. Meanwhile, several studies show that recommendation systems(RS) are vulnerable to data poisoning attacks, and the attackers have the ability to mislead the system to perform as their desires. A widely studied attack approach, injecting fake users, can be applied on the NRS when the NRS is treated the same as the other systems whose items are fixed. However, in the NRS, as each item (i.e. news) is more informative, we propose a novel approach to poison the NRS, which is to perturb contents of some browsed news that results in the manipulation of the rank of the target news. Intuitively, an attack is useless if it is highly likely to be caught, i.e., exposed. To address this, we introduce a notion of the exposure risk and propose a novel problem of attacking a history news dataset by means of perturbations where the goal is to maximize the manipulation of the target news rank while keeping the risk of exposure under a given budget. We design a reinforcement learning framework, called TDP-CP, which contains a two-stage hierarchical model to reduce the searching space. Meanwhile, influence estimation is also applied to save the time on retraining the NRS for rewards. We test the performance of TDP-CP under three NRSs and on different target news. Our experiments show that TDP-CP can increase the rank of the target news successfully with a limited exposure budget. 新闻推荐系统（NRS）已成为许多在线新闻服务的基础技术。同时，多项研究表明推荐系统（RS）很容易受到数据中毒攻击，并且攻击者有能力误导系统按照他们的意愿执行。当 NRS 与其他项目固定的系统相同时，可以将一种广泛研究的攻击方法（注入假用户）应用于 NRS。然而，在 NRS 中，由于每个项目（即新闻）的信息量更大，我们提出了一种新颖的方法来毒害 NRS，即扰乱某些浏览新闻的内容，从而导致目标新闻排名的操纵。直观上，如果攻击很可能被捕获（即暴露），则攻击是无用的。为了解决这个问题，我们引入了曝光风险的概念，并提出了一个通过扰动攻击历史新闻数据集的新问题，其目标是最大化对目标新闻排名的操纵，同时将曝光风险保持在给定的预算下。我们设计了一个强化学习框架，称为 TDP-CP，它包含一个两阶段分层模型来减少搜索空间。同时，还应用影响力估计来节省重新训练 NRS 以获得奖励的时间。我们测试了 TDP-CP 在三个 NRS 和不同目​​标新闻上的性能。我们的实验表明，TDP-CP 可以在有限的曝光预算下成功提高目标新闻的排名。 本文提出一种针对新闻推荐系统的内容扰动数据投毒攻击方法，通过操纵用户浏览新闻内容来提升目标新闻排名，同时控制暴露风险。 Xudong Zhang,Zan Wang,Jingke Zhao,Lanjun Wang cs.CR,cs.AI,cs.IR,cs.LG

authors_text: Amartya Purushottam,Yeongtae Jung,Kevin Murphy,Donghoon Baek,Joao Ramos
title: Hands-free Telelocomotion of a Wheeled Humanoid toward Dynamic Mobile Manipulation via Teleoperation
title_zh: 轮式人形机器人通过远程操作实现动态移动操纵的免提远程移动
abstract: Robotic systems that can dynamically combine manipulation and locomotion could facilitate dangerous or physically demanding labor. For instance, firefighter humanoid robots could leverage their body by leaning against collapsed building rubble to push it aside. Here we introduce a teleoperation system that targets the realization of these tasks using human whole-body motor skills. We describe a new wheeled humanoid platform, SATYRR, and a novel hands-free teleoperation architecture using a whole-body Human Machine Interface (HMI). This system enables telelocomotion of the humanoid robot using the operator body motion, freeing their arms for manipulation tasks. In this study we evaluate the efficacy of the proposed system on hardware, and explore the control of SATYRR using two teleoperation mappings that map the operators body pitch and twist to the robot velocity or acceleration. Through experiments and user feedback we showcase our preliminary findings of the pilot-system response. Results suggest that the HMI is capable of effectively telelocomoting SATYRR, that pilot preferences should dictate the appropriate motion mapping and gains, and finally that the pilot can better learn to control the system over time. This study represents a fundamental step towards the realization of combined manipulation and locomotion via teleoperation.
summary: Robotic systems that can dynamically combine manipulation and locomotion could facilitate dangerous or physically demanding labor. For instance, firefighter humanoid robots could leverage their body by leaning against collapsed building rubble to push it aside. Here we introduce a teleoperation system that targets the realization of these tasks using human whole-body motor skills. We describe a new wheeled humanoid platform, SATYRR, and a novel hands-free teleoperation architecture using a whole-body Human Machine Interface (HMI). This system enables telelocomotion of the humanoid robot using the operator body motion, freeing their arms for manipulation tasks. In this study we evaluate the efficacy of the proposed system on hardware, and explore the control of SATYRR using two teleoperation mappings that map the operators body pitch and twist to the robot velocity or acceleration. Through experiments and user feedback we showcase our preliminary findings of the pilot-system response. Results suggest that the HMI is capable of effectively telelocomoting SATYRR, that pilot preferences should dictate the appropriate motion mapping and gains, and finally that the pilot can better learn to control the system over time. This study represents a fundamental step towards the realization of combined manipulation and locomotion via teleoperation.
abstract_zh: 能够动态结合操纵和运动的机器人系统可以促进危险或体力要求较高的劳动。例如，消防员人形机器人可以通过靠在倒塌的建筑废墟上来利用自己的身体，将其推到一边。在这里，我们介绍一种远程操作系统，旨在利用人类全身运动技能来实现这些任务。我们描述了一种新型轮式人形平台 SATYRR，以及一种使用全身人机界面 (HMI) 的新型免提远程操作架构。该系统可以利用操作员的身体运动来实现人形机器人的远程移动，从而释放他们的手臂来执行操作任务。在本研究中，我们评估了所提出的系统在硬件上的功效，并使用两种远程操作映射来探索 SATYRR 的控制，这两种映射将操作员的身体俯仰和扭曲映射到机器人速度或加速度。通过实验和用户反馈，我们展示了试点系统响应的初步结果。结果表明，HMI 能够有效地远程控制 SATYRR，飞行员的偏好应决定适当的运动映射和增益，最后飞行员可以随着时间的推移更好地学习控制系统。这项研究代表了通过远程操作实现组合操纵和运动的基本一步。

AI.tldr: 开发一种无手遥操作系统，实现轮式人形机器人的动态移动与操作结合。
AI.motivation: 解决危险或体力劳动场景中机器人需同时完成移动与操作的难题，提升复杂任务执行能力。
AI.method: 设计轮式人形机器人SATYRR及全身人机接口（HMI），通过操作者身体倾斜和扭转映射控制机器人速度或加速度，采用两种遥操作映射方式验证效果。
AI.result: 实验表明HMI能有效控制SATYRR，操作者偏好影响映射参数选择，且操作熟练度随时间提升。
AI.conclusion: 该研究为实现遥操作下移动与操作的协同控制提供了基础，验证了全身HMI在复杂任务中的潜力。

For instance, firefighter humanoid robots could leverage their body by leaning against collapsed building rubble to push it aside. Here we introduce a teleoperation system that targets the realization of these tasks using human whole-body motor skills. authors_text: Eduardo Pavez,Enrique Perez,Xin Xiong,Antonio Ortega,Balu Adsumilli
title: Compression of user generated content using denoised references
title_zh: 使用去噪参考压缩用户生成的内容
comment: 5 pages, 6 figures, accepted at International Conference on Image Processing (ICIP) 2022
comments: 5 pages, 6 figures, accepted at International Conference on Image Processing (ICIP) 2022
abstract: Video shared over the internet is commonly referred to as user generated content (UGC). UGC video may have low quality due to various factors including previous compression. UGC video is uploaded by users, and then it is re-encoded to be made available at various levels of quality. In a traditional video coding pipeline the encoder parameters are optimized to minimize a rate-distortion criterion, but when the input signal has low quality, this results in sub-optimal coding parameters optimized to preserve undesirable artifacts. In this paper we formulate the UGC compression problem as that of compression of a noisy/corrupted source. The noisy source coding theorem reveals that an optimal UGC compression system is comprised of optimal denoising of the UGC signal, followed by compression of the denoised signal. Since optimal denoising is unattainable and users may be against modification of their content, we propose encoding the UGC signal, and using denoised references only to compute distortion, so the encoding process can be guided towards perceptually better solutions. We demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed strategy for JPEG compression of UGC images and videos.
summary: Video shared over the internet is commonly referred to as user generated content (UGC). UGC video may have low quality due to various factors including previous compression. UGC video is uploaded by users, and then it is re-encoded to be made available at various levels of quality. In a traditional video coding pipeline the encoder parameters are optimized to minimize a rate-distortion criterion, but when the input signal has low quality, this results in sub-optimal coding parameters optimized to preserve undesirable artifacts. In this paper we formulate the UGC compression problem as that of compression of a noisy/corrupted source. The noisy source coding theorem reveals that an optimal UGC compression system is comprised of optimal denoising of the UGC signal, followed by compression of the denoised signal. Since optimal denoising is unattainable and users may be against modification of their content, we propose encoding the UGC signal, and using denoised references only to compute distortion, so the encoding process can be guided towards perceptually better solutions. We demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed strategy for JPEG compression of UGC images and videos.
abstract_zh: 通过互联网共享的视频通常称为用户生成内容 (UGC)。由于各种因素（包括先前的压缩），UGC 视频可能质量较低。 UGC 视频由用户上传，然后重新编码以提供各种质量级别。在传统的视频编码管道中，编码器参数被优化以最小化率失真标准，但是当输入信号具有低质量时，这会导致次优编码参数被优化以保留不期望的伪像。在本文中，我们将 UGC 压缩问题表述为噪声/损坏源的压缩问题。噪声源编码定理表明，最佳 UGC 压缩系统包括 UGC 信号的最佳去噪，然后是去噪信号的压缩。由于最佳去噪是无法实现的，并且用户可能反对修改其内容，因此我们建议对 UGC 信号进行编码，并仅使用去噪参考来计算失真，因此可以引导编码过程获得感知上更好的解决方案。我们证明了所提出的 UGC 图像和视频 JPEG 压缩策略的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种利用去噪参考来压缩用户生成内容（UGC）的方法，以在不直接修改原始内容的情况下提升压缩质量。
AI.motivation: 传统视频编码在处理低质量UGC时会保留不必要的压缩伪影，导致编码参数次优。直接优化率失真准则无法有效解决这一问题。
AI.method: 将UGC压缩建模为噪声源编码问题，通过使用去噪后的参考信号计算失真度量，引导编码过程生成感知质量更优的压缩结果。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法在JPEG图像和视频压缩中能有效提升压缩质量，且无需修改原始UGC内容。
AI.conclusion: 利用去噪参考指导编码过程可实现更优的UGC压缩效果，为低质量内容的压缩提供了新思路。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出了一种利用去噪参考来压缩用户生成内容（UGC）的方法，以在不直接修改原始内容的情况下提升压缩质量。

search_text: Compression of user generated content using denoised references 使用去噪参考压缩用户生成的内容 Video shared over the internet is commonly referred to as user generated content (UGC). UGC video may have low quality due to various factors including previous compression. UGC video is uploaded by users, and then it is re-encoded to be made available at various levels of quality. In a traditional video coding pipeline the encoder parameters are optimized to minimize a rate-distortion criterion, but when the input signal has low quality, this results in sub-optimal coding parameters optimized to preserve undesirable artifacts. In this paper we formulate the UGC compression problem as that of compression of a noisy/corrupted source. The noisy source coding theorem reveals that an optimal UGC compression system is comprised of optimal denoising of the UGC signal, followed by compression of the denoised signal. Since optimal denoising is unattainable and users may be against modification of their content, we propose encoding the UGC signal, and using denoised references only to compute distortion, so the encoding process can be guided towards perceptually better solutions. We demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed strategy for JPEG compression of UGC images and videos. 通过互联网共享的视频通常称为用户生成内容 (UGC)。由于各种因素（包括先前的压缩），UGC 视频可能质量较低。 UGC 视频由用户上传，然后重新编码以提供各种质量级别。在传统的视频编码管道中，编码器参数被优化以最小化率失真标准，但是当输入信号具有低质量时，这会导致次优编码参数被优化以保留不期望的伪像。在本文中，我们将 UGC 压缩问题表述为噪声/损坏源的压缩问题。噪声源编码定理表明，最佳 UGC 压缩系统包括 UGC 信号的最佳去噪，然后是去噪信号的压缩。由于最佳去噪是无法实现的，并且用户可能反对修改其内容，因此我们建议对 UGC 信号进行编码，并仅使用去噪参考来计算失真，因此可以引导编码过程获得感知上更好的解决方案。我们证明了所提出的 UGC 图像和视频 JPEG 压缩策略的有效性。 本文提出了一种利用去噪参考来压缩用户生成内容（UGC）的方法，以在不直接修改原始内容的情况下提升压缩质量。 Eduardo Pavez,Enrique Perez,Xin Xiong,Antonio Ortega,Balu Adsumilli eess.IV,cs.MM

authors_text: Chao-Han Huck Yang,Jun Qi,Samuel Yen-Chi Chen,Yu Tsao,Pin-Yu Chen
title: When BERT Meets Quantum Temporal Convolution Learning for Text Classification in Heterogeneous Computing
title_zh: 当 BERT 遇到异构计算中文本分类的量子时序卷积学习
abstract: The rapid development of quantum computing has demonstrated many unique characteristics of quantum advantages, such as richer feature representation and more secured protection on model parameters. This work proposes a vertical federated learning architecture based on variational quantum circuits to demonstrate the competitive performance of a quantum-enhanced pre-trained BERT model for text classification. In particular, our proposed hybrid classical-quantum model consists of a novel random quantum temporal convolution (QTC) learning framework replacing some layers in the BERT-based decoder. Our experiments on intent classification show that our proposed BERT-QTC model attains competitive experimental results in the Snips and ATIS spoken language datasets. Particularly, the BERT-QTC boosts the performance of the existing quantum circuit-based language model in two text classification datasets by 1.57% and 1.52% relative improvements. Furthermore, BERT-QTC can be feasibly deployed on both existing commercial-accessible quantum computation hardware and CPU-based interface for ensuring data isolation.
summary: The rapid development of quantum computing has demonstrated many unique characteristics of quantum advantages, such as richer feature representation and more secured protection on model parameters. This work proposes a vertical federated learning architecture based on variational quantum circuits to demonstrate the competitive performance of a quantum-enhanced pre-trained BERT model for text classification. In particular, our proposed hybrid classical-quantum model consists of a novel random quantum temporal convolution (QTC) learning framework replacing some layers in the BERT-based decoder. Our experiments on intent classification show that our proposed BERT-QTC model attains competitive experimental results in the Snips and ATIS spoken language datasets. Particularly, the BERT-QTC boosts the performance of the existing quantum circuit-based language model in two text classification datasets by 1.57% and 1.52% relative improvements. Furthermore, BERT-QTC can be feasibly deployed on both existing commercial-accessible quantum computation hardware and CPU-based interface for ensuring data isolation.
abstract_zh: 量子计算的快速发展展现了量子优势的许多独特特征，例如更丰富的特征表示和对模型参数更安全的保护。这项工作提出了一种基于变分量子电路的垂直联邦学习架构，以展示用于文本分类的量子增强预训练 BERT 模型的竞争性能。特别是，我们提出的混合经典量子模型由一种新颖的随机量子时间卷积（QTC）学习框架组成，取代了基于 BERT 的解码器中的一些层。我们的意图分类实验表明，我们提出的 BERT-QTC 模型在 Snips 和 ATIS 口语数据集中获得了有竞争力的实验结果。特别是，BERT-QTC 将现有基于量子电路的语言模型在两个文本分类数据集中的性能相对提高了 1.57% 和 1.52%。此外，BERT-QTC 可以切实部署在现有的商用量子计算硬件和基于 CPU 的接口上，以确保数据隔离。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合变分量子电路和BERT的混合模型，用于在异构计算环境中进行文本分类。
AI.motivation: 量子计算在特征表示和模型参数安全性方面的优势，以及联邦学习对数据隔离的需求，促使研究者探索量子增强的预训练模型以提升文本分类性能。
AI.method: 设计基于变分量子电路的垂直联邦学习架构，用随机量子时序卷积（QTC）框架替代BERT解码器部分层，实现经典-量子混合模型。
AI.result: 在Snips和ATIS数据集上，BERT-QTC模型相较现有量子电路语言模型分别提升1.57%和1.52%，且支持量子硬件与CPU接口部署。
AI.conclusion: 量子增强的BERT模型有效提升了文本分类性能，同时满足异构计算环境下的数据隔离与实际部署需求。

authors_text: Roshni G. Iyer,Thuy Vu,Alessandro Moschitti,Yizhou Sun
title: Question-Answer Sentence Graph for Joint Modeling Answer Selection
title_zh: 联合建模答案选择的问答句图
abstract: This research studies graph-based approaches for Answer Sentence Selection (AS2), an essential component for retrieval-based Question Answering (QA) systems. During offline learning, our model constructs a small-scale relevant training graph per question in an unsupervised manner, and integrates with Graph Neural Networks. Graph nodes are question sentence to answer sentence pairs. We train and integrate state-of-the-art (SOTA) models for computing scores between question-question, question-answer, and answer-answer pairs, and use thresholding on relevance scores for creating graph edges. Online inference is then performed to solve the AS2 task on unseen queries. Experiments on two well-known academic benchmarks and a real-world dataset show that our approach consistently outperforms SOTA QA baseline models.
summary: This research studies graph-based approaches for Answer Sentence Selection (AS2), an essential component for retrieval-based Question Answering (QA) systems. During offline learning, our model constructs a small-scale relevant training graph per question in an unsupervised manner, and integrates with Graph Neural Networks. Graph nodes are question sentence to answer sentence pairs. We train and integrate state-of-the-art (SOTA) models for computing scores between question-question, question-answer, and answer-answer pairs, and use thresholding on relevance scores for creating graph edges. Online inference is then performed to solve the AS2 task on unseen queries. Experiments on two well-known academic benchmarks and a real-world dataset show that our approach consistently outperforms SOTA QA baseline models.
abstract_zh: 这项研究研究了基于图的答案句子选择（AS2）方法，这是基于检索的问答（QA）系统的重要组成部分。在离线学习期间，我们的模型以无监督的方式为每个问题构建一个小规模的相关训练图，并与图神经网络集成。图节点是问题句到答案句对。我们训练和集成最先进的（SOTA）模型来计算问题-问题、问题-答案和答案-答案对之间的分数，并使用相关性分数的阈值来创建图边缘。然后执行在线推理来解决未见过的查询的 AS2 任务。对两个著名学术基准和真实世界数据集的实验表明，我们的方法始终优于 SOTA QA 基线模型。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于图模型的联合建模方法，用于检索式问答系统中的答案句子选择任务。
AI.motivation: 现有答案选择方法难以有效捕捉问题与答案间的复杂语义关系，需通过图结构整合多维度信息以提升性能。
AI.method: 构建无监督训练图，以问题-答案对为节点，利用阈值筛选相关性分数生成边，并结合图神经网络与先进模型计算多类型句子对得分。
AI.result: 在两个学术基准数据集和实际应用数据集上，该方法持续优于当前最先进的问答基线模型。
AI.conclusion: 图结构能有效整合问题与答案的多维度关系，通过联合建模显著提升答案选择准确性。

authors_text: Zhichang Wang,Qipeng Zhu
title: Toxic Comments Hunter : Score Severity of Toxic Comments
title_zh: 有毒评论猎人：对有毒评论的严重程度进行评分
abstract: The detection and identification of toxic comments are conducive to creating a civilized and harmonious Internet environment. In this experiment, we collected various data sets related to toxic comments. Because of the characteristics of comment data, we perform data cleaning and feature extraction operations on it from different angles to obtain different toxic comment training sets. In terms of model construction, we used the training set to train the models based on TFIDF and finetuned the Bert model separately. Finally, we encapsulated the code into software to score toxic comments in real-time.
summary: The detection and identification of toxic comments are conducive to creating a civilized and harmonious Internet environment. In this experiment, we collected various data sets related to toxic comments. Because of the characteristics of comment data, we perform data cleaning and feature extraction operations on it from different angles to obtain different toxic comment training sets. In terms of model construction, we used the training set to train the models based on TFIDF and finetuned the Bert model separately. Finally, we encapsulated the code into software to score toxic comments in real-time.
abstract_zh: 恶意评论的检测和识别有利于营造文明和谐的网络环境。在这个实验中，我们收集了与有毒评论相关的各种数据集。由于评论数据的特点，我们从不同的角度对其进行数据清洗和特征提取操作，以获得不同的恶意评论训练集。在模型构建方面，我们使用训练集训练基于TFIDF的模型，并分别对Bert模型进行微调。最后，我们将代码封装到软件中，对有毒评论进行实时评分。

AI.tldr: 构建实时评分有毒评论的系统，通过数据清洗、特征提取及模型训练实现毒评检测。
AI.motivation: 净化网络环境，减少有害言论，促进文明和谐的网络交流。
AI.method: 收集毒评数据集，进行数据清洗与特征提取；分别采用TFIDF模型和微调Bert模型训练，最终封装为实时评分软件。
AI.result: 成功开发出可实时对评论毒性程度打分的软件，有效识别并量化有毒评论。

search_text: Toxic Comments Hunter : Score Severity of Toxic Comments 有毒评论猎人：对有毒评论的严重程度进行评分 The detection and identification of toxic comments are conducive to creating a civilized and harmonious Internet environment. In this experiment, we collected various data sets related to toxic comments. Because of the characteristics of comment data, we perform data cleaning and feature extraction operations on it from different angles to obtain different toxic comment training sets. In terms of model construction, we used the training set to train the models based on TFIDF and finetuned the Bert model separately. Finally, we encapsulated the code into software to score toxic comments in real-time. 恶意评论的检测和识别有利于营造文明和谐的网络环境。在这个实验中，我们收集了与有毒评论相关的各种数据集。由于评论数据的特点，我们从不同的角度对其进行数据清洗和特征提取操作，以获得不同的恶意评论训练集。在模型构建方面，我们使用训练集训练基于TFIDF的模型，并分别对Bert模型进行微调。最后，我们将代码封装到软件中，对有毒评论进行实时评分。 构建实时评分有毒评论的系统，通过数据清洗、特征提取及模型训练实现毒评检测。 Zhichang Wang,Qipeng Zhu cs.CL,cs.AI

authors_text: Hagen Soltau,Izhak Shafran,Mingqiu Wang,Laurent El Shafey
title: RNN Transducers for Nested Named Entity Recognition with constraints on alignment for long sequences
title_zh: 用于嵌套命名实体识别的 RNN 转换器，具有长序列对齐约束
abstract: Popular solutions to Named Entity Recognition (NER) include conditional random fields, sequence-to-sequence models, or utilizing the question-answering framework. However, they are not suitable for nested and overlapping spans with large ontologies and for predicting the position of the entities. To fill this gap, we introduce a new model for NER task -- an RNN transducer (RNN-T). These models are trained using paired input and output sequences without explicitly specifying the alignment between them, similar to other seq-to-seq models. RNN-T models learn the alignment using a loss function that sums over all alignments. In NER tasks, however, the alignment between words and target labels are available from the human annotations. We propose a fixed alignment RNN-T model that utilizes the given alignment, while preserving the benefits of RNN-Ts such as modeling output dependencies. As a more general case, we also propose a constrained alignment model where users can specify a relaxation of the given input alignment and the model will learn an alignment within the given constraints. In other words, we propose a family of seq-to-seq models which can leverage alignments between input and target sequences when available. Through empirical experiments on a challenging real-world medical NER task with multiple nested ontologies, we demonstrate that our fixed alignment model outperforms the standard RNN-T model, improving F1-score from 0.70 to 0.74.
summary: Popular solutions to Named Entity Recognition (NER) include conditional random fields, sequence-to-sequence models, or utilizing the question-answering framework. However, they are not suitable for nested and overlapping spans with large ontologies and for predicting the position of the entities. To fill this gap, we introduce a new model for NER task -- an RNN transducer (RNN-T). These models are trained using paired input and output sequences without explicitly specifying the alignment between them, similar to other seq-to-seq models. RNN-T models learn the alignment using a loss function that sums over all alignments. In NER tasks, however, the alignment between words and target labels are available from the human annotations. We propose a fixed alignment RNN-T model that utilizes the given alignment, while preserving the benefits of RNN-Ts such as modeling output dependencies. As a more general case, we also propose a constrained alignment model where users can specify a relaxation of the given input alignment and the model will learn an alignment within the given constraints. In other words, we propose a family of seq-to-seq models which can leverage alignments between input and target sequences when available. Through empirical experiments on a challenging real-world medical NER task with multiple nested ontologies, we demonstrate that our fixed alignment model outperforms the standard RNN-T model, improving F1-score from 0.70 to 0.74.
abstract_zh: 命名实体识别 (NER) 的流行解决方案包括条件随机场、序列到序列模型或利用问答框架。然而，它们不适合具有大型本体的嵌套和重叠跨度以及预测实体的位置。为了填补这一空白，我们引入了一种新的 NER 任务模型——RNN 转换器（RNN-T）。这些模型使用成对的输入和输出序列进行训练，无需明确指定它们之间的对齐方式，类似于其他 seq-to-seq 模型。 RNN-T 模型使用对所有对齐求和的损失函数来学习对齐。然而，在 NER 任务中，单词和目标标签之间的对齐可以从人工注释中获得。我们提出了一种固定对齐 RNN-T 模型，该模型利用给定的对齐方式，同时保留 RNN-T 的优点，例如建模输出依赖性。作为更一般的情况，我们还提出了一种约束对齐模型，其中用户可以指定给定输入对齐的松弛，并且模型将学习给定约束内的对齐。换句话说，我们提出了一系列 seq-to-seq 模型，可以在可用时利用输入序列和目标序列之间的比对。通过对具有多个嵌套本体的具有挑战性的现实世界医学 NER 任务的实证实验，我们证明了我们的固定对齐模型优于标准 RNN-T 模型，将 F1 分数从 0.70 提高到 0.74。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于RNN Transducer（RNN-T）的模型，用于处理具有嵌套结构和复杂对齐约束的命名实体识别（NER）任务。
AI.motivation: 传统NER方法难以处理嵌套、重叠实体及大规模本体，且无法有效利用人工标注的对齐信息。
AI.method: 提出固定对齐RNN-T模型和约束对齐模型，前者直接利用人工对齐信息，后者允许在给定约束下学习对齐，结合RNN-T的输出依赖建模优势。
AI.result: 在医疗领域多层嵌套NER任务中，固定对齐模型F1分数从0.70提升至0.74，优于标准RNN-T模型。
AI.conclusion: 利用对齐信息的RNN-T变体能有效提升复杂NER任务性能，为嵌套结构识别提供新思路。

authors_text: Mohit Wadhwa,Mohan Bhambhani,Ashvini Jindal,Uma Sawant,Ramanujam Madhavan
title: Fairness for Text Classification Tasks with Identity Information Data Augmentation Methods
title_zh: 使用身份信息数据增强方法进行文本分类任务的公平性
abstract: Counterfactual fairness methods address the question: How would the prediction change if the sensitive identity attributes referenced in the text instance were different? These methods are entirely based on generating counterfactuals for the given training and test set instances. Counterfactual instances are commonly prepared by replacing sensitive identity terms, i.e., the identity terms present in the instance are replaced with other identity terms that fall under the same sensitive category. Therefore, the efficacy of these methods depends heavily on the quality and comprehensiveness of identity pairs. In this paper, we offer a two-step data augmentation process where (1) the former stage consists of a novel method for preparing a comprehensive list of identity pairs with word embeddings, and (2) the latter consists of leveraging prepared identity pairs list to enhance the training instances by applying three simple operations (namely identity pair replacement, identity term blindness, and identity pair swap). We empirically show that the two-stage augmentation process leads to diverse identity pairs and an enhanced training set, with an improved counterfactual token-based fairness metric score on two well-known text classification tasks.
summary: Counterfactual fairness methods address the question: How would the prediction change if the sensitive identity attributes referenced in the text instance were different? These methods are entirely based on generating counterfactuals for the given training and test set instances. Counterfactual instances are commonly prepared by replacing sensitive identity terms, i.e., the identity terms present in the instance are replaced with other identity terms that fall under the same sensitive category. Therefore, the efficacy of these methods depends heavily on the quality and comprehensiveness of identity pairs. In this paper, we offer a two-step data augmentation process where (1) the former stage consists of a novel method for preparing a comprehensive list of identity pairs with word embeddings, and (2) the latter consists of leveraging prepared identity pairs list to enhance the training instances by applying three simple operations (namely identity pair replacement, identity term blindness, and identity pair swap). We empirically show that the two-stage augmentation process leads to diverse identity pairs and an enhanced training set, with an improved counterfactual token-based fairness metric score on two well-known text classification tasks.
abstract_zh: 反事实公平方法解决了以下问题：如果文本实例中引用的敏感身份属性不同，预测将如何变化？这些方法完全基于为给定的训练和测试集实例生成反事实。反事实实例通常通过替换敏感身份术语来准备，即将实例中存在的身份术语替换为属于同一敏感类别的其他身份术语。因此，这些方法的有效性在很大程度上取决于身份对的质量和全面性。在本文中，我们提供了一个两步数据增强过程，其中（1）前一阶段包括一种用于准备带有词嵌入的身份对综合列表的新方法，（2）后者包括利用准备好的身份对列表通过应用三个简单的操作（即身份对替换、身份术语盲目性和身份对交换）来增强训练实例。我们凭经验表明，两阶段增强过程会产生不同的身份对和增强的训练集，并在两个众所周知的文本分类任务上改进基于反事实标记的公平性度量得分。

AI.tldr: 提出一种两阶段数据增强方法，通过生成身份对并应用替换等操作提升文本分类的公平性
AI.motivation: 现有反事实公平方法依赖人工构建的身份对列表，难以保证全面性与质量，影响模型公平性提升效果
AI.method: 两阶段增强：1）基于词嵌入生成全面身份对列表；2）应用身份对替换/盲化/交换三种操作增强训练数据
AI.result: 在两个文本分类任务中，该方法使反事实公平性指标显著提升
AI.conclusion: 该方法能生成更全面的身份对，增强训练集多样性，有效提升模型的反事实公平性

Therefore, the efficacy of these methods depends heavily on the quality and comprehensiveness of identity pairs. In this paper, we offer a two-step data augmentation process where (1) the former stage consists of a novel method for preparing a comprehensive list of identity pairs with word embeddings, and (2) the latter consists of leveraging prepared identity pairs list to enhance the training instances by applying three simple operations (namely identity pair replacement, identity term blindness, and identity pair swap). We empirically show that the two-stage augmentation process leads to diverse identity pairs and an enhanced training set, with an improved counterfactual token-based fairness metric score on two well-known text classification tasks. 反事实公平方法解决了以下问题：如果文本实例中引用的敏感身份属性不同，预测将如何变化？这些方法完全基于为给定的训练和测试集实例生成反事实。反事实实例通常通过替换敏感身份术语来准备，即将实例中存在的身份术语替换为属于同一敏感类别的其他身份术语。因此，这些方法的有效性在很大程度上取决于身份对的质量和全面性。在本文中，我们提供了一个两步数据增强过程，其中（1）前一阶段包括一种用于准备带有词嵌入的身份对综合列表的新方法，（2）后者包括利用准备好的身份对列表通过应用三个简单的操作（即身份对替换、身份术语盲目性和身份对交换）来增强训练实例。我们凭经验表明，两阶段增强过程会产生不同的身份对和增强的训练集，并在两个众所周知的文本分类任务上改进基于反事实标记的公平性度量得分。 提出一种两阶段数据增强方法，通过生成身份对并应用替换等操作提升文本分类的公平性 Mohit Wadhwa,Mohan Bhambhani,Ashvini Jindal,Uma Sawant,Ramanujam Madhavan cs.CL,cs.AI

authors_text: Xi Yang,Aokun Chen,Nima PourNejatian,Hoo Chang Shin,Kaleb E Smith,Christopher Parisien,Colin Compas,Cheryl Martin,Mona G Flores,Ying Zhang,Tanja Magoc,Christopher A Harle,Gloria Lipori,Duane A Mitchell,William R Hogan,Elizabeth A Shenkman,Jiang Bian,Yonghui Wu
title: GatorTron: A Large Clinical Language Model to Unlock Patient Information from Unstructured Electronic Health Records
title_zh: GatorTron：从非结构化电子健康记录中解锁患者信息的大型临床语言模型
abstract: There is an increasing interest in developing artificial intelligence (AI) systems to process and interpret electronic health records (EHRs). Natural language processing (NLP) powered by pretrained language models is the key technology for medical AI systems utilizing clinical narratives. However, there are few clinical language models, the largest of which trained in the clinical domain is comparatively small at 110 million parameters (compared with billions of parameters in the general domain). It is not clear how large clinical language models with billions of parameters can help medical AI systems utilize unstructured EHRs. In this study, we develop from scratch a large clinical language model - GatorTron - using >90 billion words of text (including >82 billion words of de-identified clinical text) and systematically evaluate it on 5 clinical NLP tasks including clinical concept extraction, medical relation extraction, semantic textual similarity, natural language inference (NLI), and medical question answering (MQA). We examine how (1) scaling up the number of parameters and (2) scaling up the size of the training data could benefit these NLP tasks. GatorTron models scale up the clinical language model from 110 million to 8.9 billion parameters and improve 5 clinical NLP tasks (e.g., 9.6% and 9.5% improvement in accuracy for NLI and MQA), which can be applied to medical AI systems to improve healthcare delivery. The GatorTron models are publicly available at: https://catalog.ngc.nvidia.com/orgs/nvidia/teams/clara/models/gatortron_og.

Natural language processing (NLP) powered by pretrained language models is the key technology for medical AI systems utilizing clinical narratives. In this study, we develop from scratch a large clinical language model - GatorTron - using >90 billion words of text (including >82 billion words of de-identified clinical text) and systematically evaluate it on 5 clinical NLP tasks including clinical concept extraction, medical relation extraction, semantic textual similarity, natural language inference (NLI), and medical question answering (MQA). We examine how (1) scaling up the number of parameters and (2) scaling up the size of the training data could benefit these NLP tasks. GatorTron models scale up the clinical language model from 110 million to 8.9 billion parameters and improve 5 clinical NLP tasks (e.g., 9.6% and 9.5% improvement in accuracy for NLI and MQA), which can be applied to medical AI systems to improve healthcare delivery. The GatorTron models are publicly available at: https://catalog.ngc.nvidia.com/orgs/nvidia/teams/clara/models/gatortron_og.
abstract_zh: 人们对开发人工智能 (AI) 系统来处理和解释电子健康记录 (EHR) 的兴趣日益浓厚。由预训练语言模型支持的自然语言处理 (NLP) 是利用临床叙述的医疗人工智能系统的关键技术。然而，临床语言模型很少，其中在临床领域训练的最大的模型相对较小，只有 1.1 亿个参数（与一般领域的数十亿个参数相比）。目前尚不清楚具有数十亿参数的大型临床语言模型如何帮助医疗人工智能系统利用非结构化电子病历。在这项研究中，我们从头开始开发了一个大型临床语言模型 - GatorTron - 使用超过 900 亿字的文本（包括超过 820 亿字的去识别化临床文本），并在 5 个临床 NLP 任务上系统地评估它，包括临床概念提取、医疗关系提取、语义文本相似性、自然语言推理 (NLI) 和医学问答 (MQA)。我们研究（1）扩大参数数量和（2）扩大训练数据的大小如何有利于这些 NLP 任务。 GatorTron 模型将临床语言模型从 1.1 亿个参数扩展至 89 亿个参数，并改进了 5 项临床 NLP 任务（例如，NLI 和 MQA 的准确性提高了 9.6% 和 9.5%），可应用于医疗 AI 系统以改善医疗保健服务。 GatorTron 模型可在以下网址公开获取：https://catalog.ngc.nvidia.com/orgs/nvidia/teams/clara/models/gatortron_og。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为GatorTron的大规模临床语言模型，旨在通过处理非结构化电子健康记录（EHR）来释放患者信息。
AI.motivation: 现有的临床语言模型参数规模较小（最大仅1.1亿），难以有效处理医疗领域的复杂任务，而通用领域模型参数可达数十亿，因此需要开发更大规模的临床语言模型以提升医疗AI系统的性能。
AI.method: 从零开始训练GatorTron模型，使用超过900亿词的文本数据（含820亿去标识化临床文本），通过扩展参数量（从1.1亿增至89亿）和训练数据规模，系统评估其在5项临床NLP任务中的表现。
AI.result: GatorTron在自然语言推理（NLI）和医疗问答（MQA）任务中分别提升了9.6%和9.5%的准确率，验证了参数扩展和数据扩展对临床NLP任务的积极影响。
AI.conclusion: 大规模临床语言模型能显著提升医疗AI系统处理非结构化EHR的能力，GatorTron模型的公开可用为医疗领域提供了重要工具。

authors_text: Valentin Roche,Jean-Philippe Robert,Hanan Salam
title: AI-based Approach for Safety Signals Detection from Social Networks: Application to the Levothyrox Scandal in 2017 on Doctissimo Forum
title_zh: 基于人工智能的社交网络安全信号检测方法：应用于 Doctissimo 论坛 2017 年 Levothyrox 丑闻
abstract: Social media can be an important source of information facilitating the detection of new safety signals in pharmacovigilance. Various approaches have investigated the analysis of social media data using AI such as NLP techniques for detecting adverse drug events. Existing approaches have focused on the extraction and identification of Adverse Drug Reactions, Drug-Drug Interactions and drug misuse. However, non of the works tackled the detection of potential safety signals by taking into account the evolution in time of relevant indicators. Moreover, despite the success of deep learning in various healthcare applications, it was not explored for this task. We propose an AI-based approach for the detection of potential pharmaceutical safety signals from patients' reviews that can be used as part of the pharmacovigilance surveillance process to flag the necessity of an in-depth pharmacovigilance investigation. We focus on the Levothyrox case in France which triggered huge attention from the media following the change of the medication formula, leading to an increase in the frequency of adverse drug reactions normally reported by patients. Our approach is two-fold. (1) We investigate various NLP-based indicators extracted from patients' reviews including words and n-grams frequency, semantic similarity, Adverse Drug Reactions mentions, and sentiment analysis. (2) We propose a deep learning architecture, named Word Cloud Convolutional Neural Network (WC-CNN) which trains a CNN on word clouds extracted from the patients comments. We study the effect of different time resolutions and different NLP pre-processing techniques on the model performance. Our results show that the proposed indicators could be used in the future to effectively detect new safety signals. The WC-CNN model trained on word clouds extracted at monthly resolution outperforms the others with an accuracy of 75%.
summary: Social media can be an important source of information facilitating the detection of new safety signals in pharmacovigilance. Various approaches have investigated the analysis of social media data using AI such as NLP techniques for detecting adverse drug events. Existing approaches have focused on the extraction and identification of Adverse Drug Reactions, Drug-Drug Interactions and drug misuse. However, non of the works tackled the detection of potential safety signals by taking into account the evolution in time of relevant indicators. Moreover, despite the success of deep learning in various healthcare applications, it was not explored for this task. We propose an AI-based approach for the detection of potential pharmaceutical safety signals from patients' reviews that can be used as part of the pharmacovigilance surveillance process to flag the necessity of an in-depth pharmacovigilance investigation. We focus on the Levothyrox case in France which triggered huge attention from the media following the change of the medication formula, leading to an increase in the frequency of adverse drug reactions normally reported by patients. Our approach is two-fold. (1) We investigate various NLP-based indicators extracted from patients' reviews including words and n-grams frequency, semantic similarity, Adverse Drug Reactions mentions, and sentiment analysis. (2) We propose a deep learning architecture, named Word Cloud Convolutional Neural Network (WC-CNN) which trains a CNN on word clouds extracted from the patients comments. We study the effect of different time resolutions and different NLP pre-processing techniques on the model performance. Our results show that the proposed indicators could be used in the future to effectively detect new safety signals. The WC-CNN model trained on word clouds extracted at monthly resolution outperforms the others with an accuracy of 75%.
abstract_zh: 社交媒体可以成为促进药物警戒中新安全信号检测的重要信息来源。各种方法已经研究了使用人工智能对社交媒体数据进行分析，例如用于检测药物不良事件的 NLP 技术。现有方法侧重于药物不良反应、药物相互作用和药物滥用的提取和识别。然而，没有一项工作通过考虑相关指标随时间的演变来解决潜在安全信号的检测。此外，尽管深度学习在各种医疗保健应用中取得了成功，但尚未针对这项任务进行探索。我们提出了一种基于人工智能的方法，用于从患者评论中检测潜在的药物安全信号，该信号可用作药物警戒监测过程的一部分，以标记深入药物警戒调查的必要性。我们重点关注法国的Levothyrox案例，该案例因药物配方的改变而引起媒体的广泛关注，导致患者通常报告的药物不良反应的频率增加。我们的方法有两个方面。 (1) 我们研究了从患者评论中提取的各种基于 NLP 的指标，包括单词和 n-gram 频率、语义相似性、药物不良反应提及和情感分析。 (2) 我们提出了一种深度学习架构，名为词云卷积神经网络（WC-CNN），它在从患者评论中提取的词云上训练 CNN。我们研究了不同时间分辨率和不同 NLP 预处理技术对模型性能的影响。我们的结果表明，所提出的指标可以在未来用于有效检测新的安全信号。在每月分辨率提取的词云上训练的 WC-CNN 模型优于其他模型，准确率为 75%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于AI的方法，结合NLP指标和深度学习模型（WC-CNN），用于从社交媒体患者评论中检测药物安全信号，并以法国Levothyrox药物事件为例验证效果。
AI.motivation: 现有研究未考虑安全信号随时间演变的动态特征，且未探索深度学习在该任务中的应用，需更有效的药物流行病学监测方法。
AI.method: 分两步：1）提取患者评论的NLP指标（词频、n-gram、语义相似度、ADR提及、情感分析）；2）构建基于词云的卷积神经网络（WC-CNN），研究时间分辨率和预处理技术对模型性能的影响。
AI.result: 提出的指标可有效检测安全信号，WC-CNN模型在月度时间分辨率下达到75%的准确率，优于其他方法。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为药物流行病学监测提供了新工具，未来可结合时间动态特征提升安全信号检测效率。

tldr: 本文提出一种基于AI的方法，结合NLP指标和深度学习模型（WC-CNN），用于从社交媒体患者评论中检测药物安全信号，并以法国Levothyrox药物事件为例验证效果。
motivation: 现有研究未考虑安全信号随时间演变的动态特征，且未探索深度学习在该任务中的应用，需更有效的药物流行病学监测方法。
method: 分两步：1）提取患者评论的NLP指标（词频、n-gram、语义相似度、ADR提及、情感分析）；2）构建基于词云的卷积神经网络（WC-CNN），研究时间分辨率和预处理技术对模型性能的影响。
result: 提出的指标可有效检测安全信号，WC-CNN模型在月度时间分辨率下达到75%的准确率，优于其他方法。
conclusion: 该方法为药物流行病学监测提供了新工具，未来可结合时间动态特征提升安全信号检测效率。
search_text: AI-based Approach for Safety Signals Detection from Social Networks: Application to the Levothyrox Scandal in 2017 on Doctissimo Forum 基于人工智能的社交网络安全信号检测方法：应用于 Doctissimo 论坛 2017 年 Levothyrox 丑闻 Social media can be an important source of information facilitating the detection of new safety signals in pharmacovigilance. Various approaches have investigated the analysis of social media data using AI such as NLP techniques for detecting adverse drug events. Existing approaches have focused on the extraction and identification of Adverse Drug Reactions, Drug-Drug Interactions and drug misuse. However, non of the works tackled the detection of potential safety signals by taking into account the evolution in time of relevant indicators. Moreover, despite the success of deep learning in various healthcare applications, it was not explored for this task. We propose an AI-based approach for the detection of potential pharmaceutical safety signals from patients' reviews that can be used as part of the pharmacovigilance surveillance process to flag the necessity of an in-depth pharmacovigilance investigation. We focus on the Levothyrox case in France which triggered huge attention from the media following the change of the medication formula, leading to an increase in the frequency of adverse drug reactions normally reported by patients. Our approach is two-fold. (1) We investigate various NLP-based indicators extracted from patients' reviews including words and n-grams frequency, semantic similarity, Adverse Drug Reactions mentions, and sentiment analysis. (2) We propose a deep learning architecture, named Word Cloud Convolutional Neural Network (WC-CNN) which trains a CNN on word clouds extracted from the patients comments. We study the effect of different time resolutions and different NLP pre-processing techniques on the model performance. Our results show that the proposed indicators could be used in the future to effectively detect new safety signals. The WC-CNN model trained on word clouds extracted at monthly resolution outperforms the others with an accuracy of 75%. 社交媒体可以成为促进药物警戒中新安全信号检测的重要信息来源。各种方法已经研究了使用人工智能对社交媒体数据进行分析，例如用于检测药物不良事件的 NLP 技术。现有方法侧重于药物不良反应、药物相互作用和药物滥用的提取和识别。然而，没有一项工作通过考虑相关指标随时间的演变来解决潜在安全信号的检测。此外，尽管深度学习在各种医疗保健应用中取得了成功，但尚未针对这项任务进行探索。我们提出了一种基于人工智能的方法，用于从患者评论中检测潜在的药物安全信号，该信号可用作药物警戒监测过程的一部分，以标记深入药物警戒调查的必要性。我们重点关注法国的Levothyrox案例，该案例因药物配方的改变而引起媒体的广泛关注，导致患者通常报告的药物不良反应的频率增加。我们的方法有两个方面。 (1) 我们研究了从患者评论中提取的各种基于 NLP 的指标，包括单词和 n-gram 频率、语义相似性、药物不良反应提及和情感分析。 (2) 我们提出了一种深度学习架构，名为词云卷积神经网络（WC-CNN），它在从患者评论中提取的词云上训练 CNN。我们研究了不同时间分辨率和不同 NLP 预处理技术对模型性能的影响。我们的结果表明，所提出的指标可以在未来用于有效检测新的安全信号。在每月分辨率提取的词云上训练的 WC-CNN 模型优于其他模型，准确率为 75%。 本文提出一种基于AI的方法，结合NLP指标和深度学习模型（WC-CNN），用于从社交媒体患者评论中检测药物安全信号，并以法国Levothyrox药物事件为例验证效果。 Valentin Roche,Jean-Philippe Robert,Hanan Salam cs.CL,cs.AI

authors_text: Dong-Ki Kim,Matthew Riemer,Miao Liu,Jakob N. Foerster,Michael Everett,Chuangchuang Sun,Gerald Tesauro,Jonathan P. How
title: Influencing Long-Term Behavior in Multiagent Reinforcement Learning
title_zh: 影响多智能体强化学习中的长期行为
comment: Accepted to NeurIPS 2022. The earlier version was presented at the Gamification and Multiagent Solutions Workshop (ICLR 2022) with a spotlight. Code at https://github.com/dkkim93/further and videos at https://sites.google.com/view/further-marl
comments: Accepted to NeurIPS 2022. The earlier version was presented at the Gamification and Multiagent Solutions Workshop (ICLR 2022) with a spotlight. Code at https://github.com/dkkim93/further and videos at https://sites.google.com/view/further-marl
abstract: The main challenge of multiagent reinforcement learning is the difficulty of learning useful policies in the presence of other simultaneously learning agents whose changing behaviors jointly affect the environment's transition and reward dynamics. An effective approach that has recently emerged for addressing this non-stationarity is for each agent to anticipate the learning of other agents and influence the evolution of future policies towards desirable behavior for its own benefit. Unfortunately, previous approaches for achieving this suffer from myopic evaluation, considering only a finite number of policy updates. As such, these methods can only influence transient future policies rather than achieving the promise of scalable equilibrium selection approaches that influence the behavior at convergence. In this paper, we propose a principled framework for considering the limiting policies of other agents as time approaches infinity. Specifically, we develop a new optimization objective that maximizes each agent's average reward by directly accounting for the impact of its behavior on the limiting set of policies that other agents will converge to. Our paper characterizes desirable solution concepts within this problem setting and provides practical approaches for optimizing over possible outcomes. As a result of our farsighted objective, we demonstrate better long-term performance than state-of-the-art baselines across a suite of diverse multiagent benchmark domains.
summary: The main challenge of multiagent reinforcement learning is the difficulty of learning useful policies in the presence of other simultaneously learning agents whose changing behaviors jointly affect the environment's transition and reward dynamics. An effective approach that has recently emerged for addressing this non-stationarity is for each agent to anticipate the learning of other agents and influence the evolution of future policies towards desirable behavior for its own benefit. Unfortunately, previous approaches for achieving this suffer from myopic evaluation, considering only a finite number of policy updates. As such, these methods can only influence transient future policies rather than achieving the promise of scalable equilibrium selection approaches that influence the behavior at convergence. In this paper, we propose a principled framework for considering the limiting policies of other agents as time approaches infinity. Specifically, we develop a new optimization objective that maximizes each agent's average reward by directly accounting for the impact of its behavior on the limiting set of policies that other agents will converge to. Our paper characterizes desirable solution concepts within this problem setting and provides practical approaches for optimizing over possible outcomes. As a result of our farsighted objective, we demonstrate better long-term performance than state-of-the-art baselines across a suite of diverse multiagent benchmark domains.
abstract_zh: 多智能体强化学习的主要挑战是，在存在其他同时学习的智能体的情况下，很难学习有用的策略，这些智能体的行为变化共同影响环境的转变和奖励动态。最近出现的解决这种非平稳性的有效方法是让每个智能体预测其他智能体的学习，并影响未来政策向期望行为的演变，以实现自身利益。不幸的是，以前实现这一目标的方法受到短视评估的影响，仅考虑有限数量的政策更新。因此，这些方法只能影响暂时的未来政策，而不能实现影响收敛行为的可扩展均衡选择方法的承诺。在本文中，我们提出了一个原则框架，用于考虑当时间接近无穷大时其他代理的限制策略。具体来说，我们开发了一个新的优化目标，通过直接考虑其行为对其他代理将收敛到的限制策略集的影响来最大化每个代理的平均奖励。我们的论文描述了该问题设置中理想的解决方案概念，并提供了优化可能结果的实用方法。由于我们的远见目标，我们在一系列不同的多智能体基准测试领域中展示了比最先进的基准更好的长期性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种多智能体强化学习框架，通过考虑其他智能体在时间趋于无穷时的极限策略，优化自身平均奖励以影响长期行为。
AI.motivation: 现有方法因仅考虑有限次策略更新导致短视评估，无法有效引导智能体在收敛状态下的行为，难以实现可扩展的均衡选择。
AI.method: 构建新的优化目标函数，直接量化自身行为对其他智能体极限策略集合的影响，并通过刻画解决方案概念实现长期策略优化。
AI.result: 在多个多智能体基准环境中，相较于最先进基线方法展现出更优的长期性能表现。
AI.conclusion: 通过前瞻性考虑智能体策略收敛特性，该框架有效解决了多智能体强化学习中的非平稳性问题，实现了更优的长期行为引导。

authors_text: Matteo Luperto,Tomasz Piotr Kucner,Andrea Tassi,Martin Magnusson,Francesco Amigoni
title: Robust Structure Identification and Room Segmentation of Cluttered Indoor Environments from Occupancy Grid Maps
title_zh: 根据占用网格地图对杂乱的室内环境进行鲁棒结构识别和房间分割
comment: Preprint submitted to IEEE RAL + IROS 2022
comments: Preprint submitted to IEEE RAL + IROS 2022
abstract: Identifying the environment's structure, i.e., to detect core components as rooms and walls, can facilitate several tasks fundamental for the successful operation of indoor autonomous mobile robots, including semantic environment understanding. These robots often rely on 2D occupancy maps for core tasks such as localisation and motion and task planning. However, reliable identification of structure and room segmentation from 2D occupancy maps is still an open problem due to clutter (e.g., furniture and movable object), occlusions, and partial coverage. We propose a method for the RObust StructurE identification and ROom SEgmentation (ROSE^2 ) of 2D occupancy maps, which may be cluttered and incomplete. ROSE^2 identifies the main directions of walls and is resilient to clutter and partial observations, allowing to extract a clean, abstract geometrical floor-plan-like description of the environment, which is used to segment, i.e., to identify rooms in, the original occupancy grid map. ROSE^2 is tested in several real-world publicly-available cluttered maps obtained in different conditions. The results show how it can robustly identify the environment structure in 2D occupancy maps suffering from clutter and partial observations, while significantly improving room segmentation accuracy. Thanks to the combination of clutter removal and robust room segmentation ROSE^2 consistently achieves higher performance than the state-of-the-art methods, against which it is compared.
summary: Identifying the environment's structure, i.e., to detect core components as rooms and walls, can facilitate several tasks fundamental for the successful operation of indoor autonomous mobile robots, including semantic environment understanding. These robots often rely on 2D occupancy maps for core tasks such as localisation and motion and task planning. However, reliable identification of structure and room segmentation from 2D occupancy maps is still an open problem due to clutter (e.g., furniture and movable object), occlusions, and partial coverage. We propose a method for the RObust StructurE identification and ROom SEgmentation (ROSE^2 ) of 2D occupancy maps, which may be cluttered and incomplete. ROSE^2 identifies the main directions of walls and is resilient to clutter and partial observations, allowing to extract a clean, abstract geometrical floor-plan-like description of the environment, which is used to segment, i.e., to identify rooms in, the original occupancy grid map. ROSE^2 is tested in several real-world publicly-available cluttered maps obtained in different conditions. The results show how it can robustly identify the environment structure in 2D occupancy maps suffering from clutter and partial observations, while significantly improving room segmentation accuracy. Thanks to the combination of clutter removal and robust room segmentation ROSE^2 consistently achieves higher performance than the state-of-the-art methods, against which it is compared.
abstract_zh: 识别环境的结构，即检测房间和墙壁等核心组件，可以促进室内自主移动机器人成功操作的多项基本任务，包括语义环境理解。这些机器人通常依靠 2D 占用地图来完成定位、运动和任务规划等核心任务。然而，由于杂乱（例如家具和可移动物体）、遮挡和部分覆盖，从 2D 占用地图中可靠地识别结构和房间分割仍然是一个悬而未决的问题。我们提出了一种用于 2D 占用图的 RObust StructurE 识别和 ROom SEgmentation (ROSE^2) 的方法，该方法可能会混乱且不完整。 ROSE^2 识别墙壁的主要方向，并且能够抵抗混乱和部分观察，从而可以提取干净、抽象的几何平面图式的环境描述，用于分割，即识别原始占用网格地图中的房间。 ROSE^2 在不同条件下获得的几张现实世界公开的杂乱地图中进行了测试。结果表明，它如何能够稳健地识别受到杂波和部分观测影响的 2D 占用图中的环境结构，同时显着提高房间分割精度。由于杂波消除和强大的房间分割的结合，ROSE^2 始终比最先进的方法获得更高的性能，与之进行比较。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为ROSE²的方法，用于从杂乱的2D占用网格地图中鲁棒地识别环境结构并进行房间分割。
AI.motivation: 室内自主移动机器人依赖2D占用地图进行定位和任务规划，但杂乱家具、遮挡和部分覆盖导致结构识别和房间分割仍存在挑战。
AI.method: ROSE²通过识别墙体主方向并抵抗杂乱和部分观测，提取环境几何结构，结合杂乱去除与鲁棒分割技术生成抽象楼层平面描述。
AI.result: 在多个真实世界杂乱地图中测试表明，ROSE²能有效识别结构并提升房间分割精度，性能优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: ROSE²通过结合杂乱去除与鲁棒分割，为室内环境结构识别和房间分割提供了可靠解决方案，显著提升机器人任务表现。
