ai_content_json.conclusion: ROSE²通过结合杂乱去除与鲁棒分割，为室内环境结构识别和房间分割提供了可靠解决方案，显著提升机器人任务表现。

tldr: 本文提出了一种名为ROSE²的方法，用于从杂乱的2D占用网格地图中鲁棒地识别环境结构并进行房间分割。
motivation: 室内自主移动机器人依赖2D占用地图进行定位和任务规划，但杂乱家具、遮挡和部分覆盖导致结构识别和房间分割仍存在挑战。
method: ROSE²通过识别墙体主方向并抵抗杂乱和部分观测，提取环境几何结构，结合杂乱去除与鲁棒分割技术生成抽象楼层平面描述。
result: 在多个真实世界杂乱地图中测试表明，ROSE²能有效识别结构并提升房间分割精度，性能优于现有方法。
conclusion: ROSE²通过结合杂乱去除与鲁棒分割，为室内环境结构识别和房间分割提供了可靠解决方案，显著提升机器人任务表现。
search_text: Robust Structure Identification and Room Segmentation of Cluttered Indoor Environments from Occupancy Grid Maps 根据占用网格地图对杂乱的室内环境进行鲁棒结构识别和房间分割 Identifying the environment's structure, i.e., to detect core components as rooms and walls, can facilitate several tasks fundamental for the successful operation of indoor autonomous mobile robots, including semantic environment understanding. These robots often rely on 2D occupancy maps for core tasks such as localisation and motion and task planning. However, reliable identification of structure and room segmentation from 2D occupancy maps is still an open problem due to clutter (e.g., furniture and movable object), occlusions, and partial coverage. We propose a method for the RObust StructurE identification and ROom SEgmentation (ROSE^2 ) of 2D occupancy maps, which may be cluttered and incomplete. ROSE^2 identifies the main directions of walls and is resilient to clutter and partial observations, allowing to extract a clean, abstract geometrical floor-plan-like description of the environment, which is used to segment, i.e., to identify rooms in, the original occupancy grid map. ROSE^2 is tested in several real-world publicly-available cluttered maps obtained in different conditions. The results show how it can robustly identify the environment structure in 2D occupancy maps suffering from clutter and partial observations, while significantly improving room segmentation accuracy. Thanks to the combination of clutter removal and robust room segmentation ROSE^2 consistently achieves higher performance than the state-of-the-art methods, against which it is compared. 识别环境的结构，即检测房间和墙壁等核心组件，可以促进室内自主移动机器人成功操作的多项基本任务，包括语义环境理解。这些机器人通常依靠 2D 占用地图来完成定位、运动和任务规划等核心任务。然而，由于杂乱（例如家具和可移动物体）、遮挡和部分覆盖，从 2D 占用地图中可靠地识别结构和房间分割仍然是一个悬而未决的问题。我们提出了一种用于 2D 占用图的 RObust StructurE 识别和 ROom SEgmentation (ROSE^2) 的方法，该方法可能会混乱且不完整。 ROSE^2 识别墙壁的主要方向，并且能够抵抗混乱和部分观察，从而可以提取干净、抽象的几何平面图式的环境描述，用于分割，即识别原始占用网格地图中的房间。 ROSE^2 在不同条件下获得的几张现实世界公开的杂乱地图中进行了测试。结果表明，它如何能够稳健地识别受到杂波和部分观测影响的 2D 占用图中的环境结构，同时显着提高房间分割精度。由于杂波消除和强大的房间分割的结合，ROSE^2 始终比最先进的方法获得更高的性能，与之进行比较。 本文提出了一种名为ROSE²的方法，用于从杂乱的2D占用网格地图中鲁棒地识别环境结构并进行房间分割。 Matteo Luperto,Tomasz Piotr Kucner,Andrea Tassi,Martin Magnusson,Francesco Amigoni cs.RO

authors_text: Yeongtae Jung,Joao Ramos
title: A Large Force Haptic Interface with Modular Linear Actuators
title_zh: 带有模块化线性执行器的大力触觉接口
abstract: This paper presents a haptic interface with modular linear actuators which can address limitations of conventional devices based on rotatory joints. The proposed haptic interface is composed of parallel linear actuators that provide high backdrivability and small inertia. The performance of the haptic interface is compared with the conventional mechanisms in terms of force capability, reflected inertia, and structural stiffness. High stiffness, large range of motion with high force capability are achieved with the proposed mechanism, which are in trade-off relationships in traditional haptic interfaces. The device can apply up to 83 N continuously, which is three times larger than most haptic devices. The theoretical minimum haptic force density and the stiffness of the proposed mechanism were 1.3 to 1.9 times and 37 times of conventional mechanisms in a similar condition, respectively. The system is also scalable because its structural stiffness only depends on the timing belt stiffness, while that of conventional haptic interfaces is inversely proportional to the cube of structural lengths. The modular actuator design enables change of degrees freedom (DOFs) for different applications. The proposed haptic interface was tested by the interaction experiment with a virtual environment with rigid walls.
summary: This paper presents a haptic interface with modular linear actuators which can address limitations of conventional devices based on rotatory joints. The proposed haptic interface is composed of parallel linear actuators that provide high backdrivability and small inertia. The performance of the haptic interface is compared with the conventional mechanisms in terms of force capability, reflected inertia, and structural stiffness. High stiffness, large range of motion with high force capability are achieved with the proposed mechanism, which are in trade-off relationships in traditional haptic interfaces. The device can apply up to 83 N continuously, which is three times larger than most haptic devices. The theoretical minimum haptic force density and the stiffness of the proposed mechanism were 1.3 to 1.9 times and 37 times of conventional mechanisms in a similar condition, respectively. The system is also scalable because its structural stiffness only depends on the timing belt stiffness, while that of conventional haptic interfaces is inversely proportional to the cube of structural lengths. The modular actuator design enables change of degrees freedom (DOFs) for different applications. The proposed haptic interface was tested by the interaction experiment with a virtual environment with rigid walls.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种带有模块化线性执行器的触觉界面，它可以解决基于旋转关节的传统设备的局限性。所提出的触觉界面由并行线性执行器组成，具有高反向驱动能力和小惯性。触觉界面的性能与传统机构在受力能力、反射惯性和结构刚度方面进行了比较。所提出的机制实现了高刚度、大范围运动和高力能力，这在传统触觉界面中处于权衡关系。该设备可连续施加高达 83 N 的力，比大多数触觉设备大三倍。在相似条件下，该机构的理论最小触觉力密度和刚度分别是传统机构的1.3至1.9倍和37倍。该系统还具有可扩展性，因为其结构刚度仅取决于同步带刚度，而传统触觉界面的结构刚度与结构长度的立方成反比。模块化执行器设计可以改变不同应用的自由度 (DOF)。通过与刚性墙壁的虚拟环境的交互实验来测试所提出的触觉界面。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于模块化线性执行器的高力反馈触觉接口，以克服传统旋转关节装置的局限性。
AI.motivation: 传统触觉接口在力输出能力、结构刚度与运动范围之间存在权衡关系，且难以满足高力反馈需求。
AI.method: 设计并实现由并联线性执行器组成的触觉接口，通过对比实验分析其力能力、反射惯性和结构刚度性能。
AI.result: 装置可连续输出83N力（为多数设备的3倍），刚度为传统装置的37倍，且具有可扩展性与自由度可调特性。
AI.conclusion: 该模块化线性执行器设计有效解决了传统触觉接口的性能权衡问题，适用于多种高力反馈场景。

authors_text: Christian Reichenbächer,Maximilian Rasch,Zafer Kayatas,Florian Wirthmüller,Jochen Hipp,Thao Dang,Oliver Bringmann
title: Identifying Scenarios in Field Data to Enable Validation of Highly Automated Driving Systems
title_zh: 识别现场数据场景以验证高度自动驾驶系统
abstract: Scenario-based approaches for the validation of highly automated driving functions are based on the search for safety-critical characteristics of driving scenarios using software-in-the-loop simulations. This search requires information about the shape and probability of scenarios in real-world traffic. The scope of this work is to develop a method that identifies redefined logical driving scenarios in field data, so that this information can be derived subsequently. More precisely, a suitable approach is developed, implemented and validated using a traffic scenario as an example. The presented methodology is based on qualitative modelling of scenarios, which can be detected in abstracted field data. The abstraction is achieved by using universal elements of an ontology represented by a domain model. Already published approaches for such an abstraction are discussed and concretised with regard to the given application. By examining a first set of test data, it is shown that the developed method is a suitable approach for the identification of further driving scenarios.
summary: Scenario-based approaches for the validation of highly automated driving functions are based on the search for safety-critical characteristics of driving scenarios using software-in-the-loop simulations. This search requires information about the shape and probability of scenarios in real-world traffic. The scope of this work is to develop a method that identifies redefined logical driving scenarios in field data, so that this information can be derived subsequently. More precisely, a suitable approach is developed, implemented and validated using a traffic scenario as an example. The presented methodology is based on qualitative modelling of scenarios, which can be detected in abstracted field data. The abstraction is achieved by using universal elements of an ontology represented by a domain model. Already published approaches for such an abstraction are discussed and concretised with regard to the given application. By examining a first set of test data, it is shown that the developed method is a suitable approach for the identification of further driving scenarios.
abstract_zh: 用于验证高度自动化驾驶功能的基于场景的方法基于使用软件在环仿真来搜索驾驶场景的安全关键特征。此搜索需要有关现实世界交通场景的形状和概率的信息。这项工作的范围是开发一种方法，可以识别现场数据中重新定义的逻辑驾驶场景，以便随后导出该信息。更准确地说，以交通场景为例开发、实施和验证合适的方法。所提出的方法基于场景的定性建模，可以在抽象的现场数据中检测到。抽象是通过使用由领域模型表示的本体的通用元素来实现的。针对给定的应用，讨论并具体化了已经发布的这种抽象方法。通过检查第一组测试数据，表明所开发的方法是识别进一步驾驶场景的合适方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于领域模型本体的定性建模方法，用于从实际交通数据中识别高度自动化驾驶系统的验证场景。
AI.motivation: 现有基于场景的自动驾驶验证方法缺乏对现实交通中场景形态和概率的准确描述，需开发可提取关键场景特征的分析方法。
AI.method: 通过构建交通场景本体模型，利用定性建模技术对实际道路数据进行抽象化处理，结合领域知识实现场景识别与分类。
AI.result: 在测试数据集上验证了该方法的有效性，证明其可准确识别潜在安全关键场景并提取场景特征参数。
AI.conclusion: 本方法为自动驾驶系统验证提供了从真实交通数据中提取场景信息的新途径，具有实际应用价值。

authors_text: Laura Antonelli,Valentina De Simone,Marco Viola
title: Cartoon-texture evolution for two-region image segmentation
title_zh: 两区域图像分割的卡通纹理演化
abstract: Two-region image segmentation is the process of dividing an image into two regions of interest, i.e., the foreground and the background. To this aim, Chan et al. [Chan, Esedoglu, Nikolova, SIAM Journal on Applied Mathematics 66(5), 1632-1648, 2006] designed a model well suited for smooth images. One drawback of this model is that it may produce a bad segmentation when the image contains oscillatory components. Based on a cartoon-texture decomposition of the image to be segmented, we propose a new model that is able to produce an accurate segmentation of images also containing noise or oscillatory information like texture. The novel model leads to a non-smooth constrained optimization problem which we solve by means of the ADMM method. The convergence of the numerical scheme is also proved. Several experiments on smooth, noisy, and textural images show the effectiveness of the proposed model.
summary: Two-region image segmentation is the process of dividing an image into two regions of interest, i.e., the foreground and the background. To this aim, Chan et al. [Chan, Esedoglu, Nikolova, SIAM Journal on Applied Mathematics 66(5), 1632-1648, 2006] designed a model well suited for smooth images. One drawback of this model is that it may produce a bad segmentation when the image contains oscillatory components. Based on a cartoon-texture decomposition of the image to be segmented, we propose a new model that is able to produce an accurate segmentation of images also containing noise or oscillatory information like texture. The novel model leads to a non-smooth constrained optimization problem which we solve by means of the ADMM method. The convergence of the numerical scheme is also proved. Several experiments on smooth, noisy, and textural images show the effectiveness of the proposed model.
abstract_zh: 两区域图像分割是将图像划分为两个感兴趣区域（即前景和背景）的过程。为了这个目标，Chan 等人。 [Chan, Esedoglu, Nikolova, SIAM Journal on Applied Mathematics 66(5), 1632-1648, 2006] 设计了一个非常适合平滑图像的模型。该模型的一个缺点是，当图像包含振荡分量时，它可能会产生不良分割。基于要分割的图像的卡通纹理分解，我们提出了一种新模型，能够对还包含噪声或纹理等振荡信息的图像进行准确的分割。新模型导致了一个非光滑约束优化问题，我们通过 ADMM 方法来解决。还证明了数值格式的收敛性。对平滑、噪声和纹理图像的多次实验表明了所提出模型的有效性。

authors_text: Anna V. Kononova,Diederick Vermetten,Fabio Caraffini,Madalina-A. Mitran,Daniela Zaharie
title: The importance of being constrained: dealing with infeasible solutions in Differential Evolution and beyond
title_zh: 受到约束的重要性：处理差异进化及其他领域的不可行解决方案
abstract: We argue that results produced by a heuristic optimisation algorithm cannot be considered reproducible unless the algorithm fully specifies what should be done with solutions generated outside the domain, even in the case of simple box constraints. Currently, in the field of heuristic optimisation, such specification is rarely mentioned or investigated due to the assumed triviality or insignificance of this question. Here, we demonstrate that, at least in algorithms based on Differential Evolution, this choice induces notably different behaviours - in terms of performance, disruptiveness and population diversity. This is shown theoretically (where possible) for standard Differential Evolution in the absence of selection pressure and experimentally for the standard and state-of-the-art Differential Evolution variants on special test function $f_0$ and BBOB benchmarking suite, respectively. Moreover, we demonstrate that the importance of this choice quickly grows with problem's dimensionality. Different Evolution is not at all special in this regard - there is no reason to presume that other heuristic optimisers are not equally affected by the aforementioned algorithmic choice. Thus, we urge the field of heuristic optimisation to formalise and adopt the idea of a new algorithmic component in heuristic optimisers, which we call here a strategy of dealing with infeasible solutions. This component needs to be consistently (a) specified in algorithmic descriptions to guarantee reproducibility of results, (b) studied to better understand its impact on algorithm's performance in a wider sense and (c) included in the (automatic) algorithmic design. All of these should be done even for problems with box constraints.
summary: We argue that results produced by a heuristic optimisation algorithm cannot be considered reproducible unless the algorithm fully specifies what should be done with solutions generated outside the domain, even in the case of simple box constraints. Currently, in the field of heuristic optimisation, such specification is rarely mentioned or investigated due to the assumed triviality or insignificance of this question. Here, we demonstrate that, at least in algorithms based on Differential Evolution, this choice induces notably different behaviours - in terms of performance, disruptiveness and population diversity. This is shown theoretically (where possible) for standard Differential Evolution in the absence of selection pressure and experimentally for the standard and state-of-the-art Differential Evolution variants on special test function $f_0$ and BBOB benchmarking suite, respectively. Moreover, we demonstrate that the importance of this choice quickly grows with problem's dimensionality. Different Evolution is not at all special in this regard - there is no reason to presume that other heuristic optimisers are not equally affected by the aforementioned algorithmic choice. Thus, we urge the field of heuristic optimisation to formalise and adopt the idea of a new algorithmic component in heuristic optimisers, which we call here a strategy of dealing with infeasible solutions. This component needs to be consistently (a) specified in algorithmic descriptions to guarantee reproducibility of results, (b) studied to better understand its impact on algorithm's performance in a wider sense and (c) included in the (automatic) algorithmic design. All of these should be done even for problems with box constraints.
abstract_zh: 我们认为，启发式优化算法产生的结果不能被认为是可重现的，除非该算法完全指定了应该如何处理域外生成的解决方案，即使在简单的框约束的情况下也是如此。目前，在启发式优化领域，由于假设这个问题的琐碎或无关紧要，因此很少提及或研究这种规范。在这里，我们证明，至少在基于差异进化的算法中，这种选择会导致显着不同的行为——在性能、破坏性和群体多样性方面。这在没有选择压力的情况下从理论上（如果可能）针对标准差分进化得到了证明，并在特殊测试函数 $f_0$ 和 BBOB 基准测试套件上分别针对标准和最先进的差分进化变体进行了实验。此外，我们证明这种选择的重要性随着问题的维度而迅速增长。不同的进化在这方面一点也不特殊——没有理由假设其他启发式优化器不会同样受到上述算法选择的影响。因此，我们敦促启发式优化领域形式化并采用启发式优化器中新算法组件的想法，我们在这里称之为处理不可行解决方案的策略。该组件需要一致地 (a) 在算法描述中指定，以保证结果的可重复性，(b) 研究以更好地理解其对更广泛意义上的算法性能的影响，以及 (c) 包含在（自动）算法设计中。即使对于盒子约束的问题也应该完成所有这些操作。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了在差分进化算法及其他启发式优化算法中，如何处理超出定义域的不可行解对算法性能的影响，并提出需明确规范该策略以保证结果可复现。
AI.motivation: 当前启发式优化领域普遍忽视对不可行解的处理策略，导致算法结果不可复现且性能差异未被充分研究，尤其在高维问题中影响显著。
AI.method: 通过理论分析（无选择压力下的标准差分进化）与实验验证（标准及前沿变体在测试函数f0和BBOB基准套件上的表现），结合维度变化的对比研究。
AI.result: 不同处理策略显著影响算法性能、种群多样性和扰动性，且问题维度越高影响越明显；该现象不仅限于差分进化，其他启发式优化器同样受此影响。
AI.conclusion: 呼吁启发式优化领域将‘不可行解处理策略’作为算法核心组件，明确规范、系统研究其影响，并纳入自动算法设计流程，即使对于简单边界约束问题亦需重视。

authors_text: Meng Tian,Gim Hee Lee
title: Weakly Supervised Learning of Keypoints for 6D Object Pose Estimation
title_zh: 6D 物体姿态估计关键点的弱监督学习
abstract: State-of-the-art approaches for 6D object pose estimation require large amounts of labeled data to train the deep networks. However, the acquisition of 6D object pose annotations is tedious and labor-intensive in large quantity. To alleviate this problem, we propose a weakly supervised 6D object pose estimation approach based on 2D keypoint detection. Our method trains only on image pairs with known relative transformations between their viewpoints. Specifically, we assign a set of arbitrarily chosen 3D keypoints to represent each unknown target 3D object and learn a network to detect their 2D projections that comply with the relative camera viewpoints. During inference, our network first infers the 2D keypoints from the query image and a given labeled reference image. We then use these 2D keypoints and the arbitrarily chosen 3D keypoints retained from training to infer the 6D object pose. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our approach achieves comparable performance with state-of-the-art fully supervised approaches.
summary: State-of-the-art approaches for 6D object pose estimation require large amounts of labeled data to train the deep networks. However, the acquisition of 6D object pose annotations is tedious and labor-intensive in large quantity. To alleviate this problem, we propose a weakly supervised 6D object pose estimation approach based on 2D keypoint detection. Our method trains only on image pairs with known relative transformations between their viewpoints. Specifically, we assign a set of arbitrarily chosen 3D keypoints to represent each unknown target 3D object and learn a network to detect their 2D projections that comply with the relative camera viewpoints. During inference, our network first infers the 2D keypoints from the query image and a given labeled reference image. We then use these 2D keypoints and the arbitrarily chosen 3D keypoints retained from training to infer the 6D object pose. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our approach achieves comparable performance with state-of-the-art fully supervised approaches.
abstract_zh: 最先进的 6D 物体姿态估计方法需要大量标记数据来训练深度网络。然而，6D 物体姿态注释的获取是繁琐且大量的劳动密集型。为了缓解这个问题，我们提出了一种基于 2D 关键点检测的弱监督 6D 物体姿态估计方法。我们的方法仅在图像对上进行训练，这些图像对的视点之间具有已知的相对变换。具体来说，我们分配一组任意选择的 3D 关键点来表示每个未知的目标 3D 对象，并学习网络来检测符合相对相机视点的 2D 投影。在推理过程中，我们的网络首先从查询图像和给定的标记参考图像中推断出 2D 关键点。然后，我们使用这些 2D 关键点和训练中保留的任意选择的 3D 关键点来推断 6D 物体姿态。大量的实验表明，我们的方法实现了与最先进的完全监督方法相当的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种弱监督学习方法，通过2D关键点检测实现6D物体姿态估计，减少对大量标注数据的依赖。
AI.motivation: 现有6D姿态估计方法依赖大量标注数据，而标注过程繁琐且成本高，亟需减少对人工标注的依赖。
AI.method: 基于图像对的相对视角变换信息，为未知物体分配任意3D关键点，训练网络检测其2D投影，并通过参考图像与查询图像的2D关键点推断6D姿态。
AI.result: 实验表明，该弱监督方法性能与全监督方法相当，有效缓解了标注数据不足的问题。
AI.conclusion: 弱监督关键点学习为6D姿态估计提供了可行方案，在减少标注成本的同时保持较高精度。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出一种弱监督学习方法，通过2D关键点检测实现6D物体姿态估计，减少对大量标注数据的依赖。
ai_content.motivation: 现有6D姿态估计方法依赖大量标注数据，而标注过程繁琐且成本高，亟需减少对人工标注的依赖。
ai_content.method: 基于图像对的相对视角变换信息，为未知物体分配任意3D关键点，训练网络检测其2D投影，并通过参考图像与查询图像的2D关键点推断6D姿态。
ai_content.result: 实验表明，该弱监督方法性能与全监督方法相当，有效缓解了标注数据不足的问题。
ai_content.conclusion: 弱监督关键点学习为6D姿态估计提供了可行方案，在减少标注成本的同时保持较高精度。

search_text: Weakly Supervised Learning of Keypoints for 6D Object Pose Estimation 6D 物体姿态估计关键点的弱监督学习 State-of-the-art approaches for 6D object pose estimation require large amounts of labeled data to train the deep networks. However, the acquisition of 6D object pose annotations is tedious and labor-intensive in large quantity. To alleviate this problem, we propose a weakly supervised 6D object pose estimation approach based on 2D keypoint detection. Our method trains only on image pairs with known relative transformations between their viewpoints. Specifically, we assign a set of arbitrarily chosen 3D keypoints to represent each unknown target 3D object and learn a network to detect their 2D projections that comply with the relative camera viewpoints. During inference, our network first infers the 2D keypoints from the query image and a given labeled reference image. We then use these 2D keypoints and the arbitrarily chosen 3D keypoints retained from training to infer the 6D object pose. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our approach achieves comparable performance with state-of-the-art fully supervised approaches. 最先进的 6D 物体姿态估计方法需要大量标记数据来训练深度网络。然而，6D 物体姿态注释的获取是繁琐且大量的劳动密集型。为了缓解这个问题，我们提出了一种基于 2D 关键点检测的弱监督 6D 物体姿态估计方法。我们的方法仅在图像对上进行训练，这些图像对的视点之间具有已知的相对变换。具体来说，我们分配一组任意选择的 3D 关键点来表示每个未知的目标 3D 对象，并学习网络来检测符合相对相机视点的 2D 投影。在推理过程中，我们的网络首先从查询图像和给定的标记参考图像中推断出 2D 关键点。然后，我们使用这些 2D 关键点和训练中保留的任意选择的 3D 关键点来推断 6D 物体姿态。大量的实验表明，我们的方法实现了与最先进的完全监督方法相当的性能。 本文提出一种弱监督学习方法，通过2D关键点检测实现6D物体姿态估计，减少对大量标注数据的依赖。 Meng Tian,Gim Hee Lee cs.CV

authors_text: Dustin Dannenhauer,Matthew Molineaux,Michael W. Floyd,Noah Reifsnyder,David W. Aha
title: Self-directed Learning of Action Models using Exploratory Planning
title_zh: 使用探索性规划进行行动模型的自主学习
comment: Presented at The Ninth Advances in Cognitive Systems (ACS) Conference 2021 (arXiv:2201.06134)
comments: Presented at The Ninth Advances in Cognitive Systems (ACS) Conference 2021 (arXiv:2201.06134)
abstract: Complex, real-world domains may not be fully modeled for an agent, especially if the agent has never operated in the domain before. The agent's ability to effectively plan and act in such a domain is influenced by its knowledge of when it can perform specific actions and the effects of those actions. We describe a novel exploratory planning agent that is capable of learning action preconditions and effects without expert traces or a given goal. The agent's architecture allows it to perform both exploratory actions as well as goal-directed actions, which opens up important considerations for how exploratory planning and goal planning should be controlled, as well as how the agent's behavior should be explained to any teammates it may have. The contributions of this work include a new representation for contexts called Lifted Linked Clauses, a novel exploration action selection approach using these clauses, an exploration planner that uses lifted linked clauses as goals in order to reach new states, and an empirical evaluation in a scenario from an exploration-focused video game demonstrating that lifted linked clauses improve exploration and action model learning against non-planning baseline agents.
summary: Complex, real-world domains may not be fully modeled for an agent, especially if the agent has never operated in the domain before. The agent's ability to effectively plan and act in such a domain is influenced by its knowledge of when it can perform specific actions and the effects of those actions. We describe a novel exploratory planning agent that is capable of learning action preconditions and effects without expert traces or a given goal. The agent's architecture allows it to perform both exploratory actions as well as goal-directed actions, which opens up important considerations for how exploratory planning and goal planning should be controlled, as well as how the agent's behavior should be explained to any teammates it may have. The contributions of this work include a new representation for contexts called Lifted Linked Clauses, a novel exploration action selection approach using these clauses, an exploration planner that uses lifted linked clauses as goals in order to reach new states, and an empirical evaluation in a scenario from an exploration-focused video game demonstrating that lifted linked clauses improve exploration and action model learning against non-planning baseline agents.
abstract_zh: 复杂的现实世界域可能无法为代理完全建模，特别是如果代理以前从未在该域中操作过。代理在此类领域中有效计划和行动的能力受到其对何时可以执行特定操作以及这些操作的效果的了解的影响。我们描述了一种新颖的探索性规划代理，它能够在没有专家痕迹或给定目标的情况下学习行动的先决条件和效果。代理的架构允许它执行探索性操作以及目标导向的操作，这为如何控制探索性规划和目标规划以及如何向其可能拥有的任何队友解释代理的行为提出了重要的考虑因素。这项工作的贡献包括一种称为“提升链接条款”的新上下文表示、一种使用这些条款的新颖的探索行动选择方法、一种使用提升链接条款作为目标以达到新状态的探索规划器，以及在一个以探索为中心的视频游戏场景中的实证评估，证明提升链接条款改善了针对非规划基线智能体的探索和行动模型学习。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无需专家指导或预设目标的自主探索规划代理，通过探索性规划学习动作模型的先决条件和效果。
AI.motivation: 现实复杂领域中代理常缺乏完整环境模型，传统方法依赖专家轨迹或目标，难以适应未知领域。
AI.method: 提出'提升链接子句'新表示法，结合探索性动作选择与规划机制，通过自动生成目标状态实现模型学习。
AI.result: 在探索导向视频游戏场景中验证，该方法相比非规划基线显著提升探索效率与动作模型学习效果。
AI.conclusion: 探索性规划框架与提升链接子句表示有效支持代理在未知领域自主学习动作模型，为智能体行为解释提供新思路。

authors_text: Ziming Liu,Song Guo,Jingcai Guo,Yuanyuan Xu,Fushuo Huo
title: Towards Unbiased Multi-label Zero-Shot Learning with Pyramid and Semantic Attention
title_zh: 利用金字塔和语义注意力实现无偏多标签零样本学习
abstract: Multi-label zero-shot learning extends conventional single-label zero-shot learning to a more realistic scenario that aims at recognizing multiple unseen labels of classes for each input sample. Existing works usually exploit attention mechanism to generate the correlation among different labels. However, most of them are usually biased on several major classes while neglect most of the minor classes with the same importance in input samples, and may thus result in overly diffused attention maps that cannot sufficiently cover minor classes. We argue that disregarding the connection between major and minor classes, i.e., correspond to the global and local information, respectively, is the cause of the problem. In this paper, we propose a novel framework of unbiased multi-label zero-shot learning, by considering various class-specific regions to calibrate the training process of the classifier. Specifically, Pyramid Feature Attention (PFA) is proposed to build the correlation between global and local information of samples to balance the presence of each class. Meanwhile, for the generated semantic representations of input samples, we propose Semantic Attention (SA) to strengthen the element-wise correlation among these vectors, which can encourage the coordinated representation of them. Extensive experiments on the large-scale multi-label zero-shot benchmarks NUS-WIDE and Open-Image demonstrate that the proposed method surpasses other representative methods by significant margins.
summary: Multi-label zero-shot learning extends conventional single-label zero-shot learning to a more realistic scenario that aims at recognizing multiple unseen labels of classes for each input sample. Existing works usually exploit attention mechanism to generate the correlation among different labels. However, most of them are usually biased on several major classes while neglect most of the minor classes with the same importance in input samples, and may thus result in overly diffused attention maps that cannot sufficiently cover minor classes. We argue that disregarding the connection between major and minor classes, i.e., correspond to the global and local information, respectively, is the cause of the problem. In this paper, we propose a novel framework of unbiased multi-label zero-shot learning, by considering various class-specific regions to calibrate the training process of the classifier. Specifically, Pyramid Feature Attention (PFA) is proposed to build the correlation between global and local information of samples to balance the presence of each class. Meanwhile, for the generated semantic representations of input samples, we propose Semantic Attention (SA) to strengthen the element-wise correlation among these vectors, which can encourage the coordinated representation of them. Extensive experiments on the large-scale multi-label zero-shot benchmarks NUS-WIDE and Open-Image demonstrate that the proposed method surpasses other representative methods by significant margins.
abstract_zh: 多标签零样本学习将传统的单标签零样本学习扩展到更现实的场景，旨在识别每个输入样本的多个不可见的类标签。现有的工作通常利用注意力机制来生成不同标签之间的相关性。然而，它们中的大多数通常偏向于几个主要类别，而忽略了输入样本中具有相同重要性的大多数次要类别，因此可能导致注意力图过于分散，无法充分覆盖次要类别。我们认为，忽视主要类别和次要类别之间的联系，即分别对应于全局和局部信息，是问题的原因。在本文中，我们提出了一种无偏多标签零样本学习的新颖框架，通过考虑各种特定于类的区域来校准分类器的训练过程。具体来说，提出了金字塔特征注意（PFA）来建立样本的全局和局部信息之间的相关性，以平衡每个类的存在。同时，对于输入样本生成的语义表示，我们提出语义注意力（SA）来加强这些向量之间的元素相关性，这可以鼓励它们的协调表示。在大规模多标签零样本基准 NUS-WIDE 和 Open-Image 上进行的大量实验表明，所提出的方法明显优于其他代表性方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于金字塔特征注意力和语义注意力的无偏多标签零样本学习框架，旨在解决现有方法在多标签零样本学习中对次要类别关注不足的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在多标签零样本学习中过度关注主要类别，忽视次要类别的全局与局部信息关联，导致注意力图扩散且无法充分覆盖次要类别。
AI.method: 提出金字塔特征注意力（PFA）建立全局与局部信息关联以平衡类别表现，并设计语义注意力（SA）增强语义向量的逐元素相关性，协调表示学习。
AI.result: 在NUS-WIDE和Open-Image基准测试中，该方法显著优于其他代表性方法。
AI.conclusion: 通过结合金字塔特征注意力与语义注意力机制，所提框架有效缓解了多标签零样本学习中的类别偏差问题，提升了模型性能。

Extensive experiments on the large-scale multi-label zero-shot benchmarks NUS-WIDE and Open-Image demonstrate that the proposed method surpasses other representative methods by significant margins. 多标签零样本学习将传统的单标签零样本学习扩展到更现实的场景，旨在识别每个输入样本的多个不可见的类标签。现有的工作通常利用注意力机制来生成不同标签之间的相关性。然而，它们中的大多数通常偏向于几个主要类别，而忽略了输入样本中具有相同重要性的大多数次要类别，因此可能导致注意力图过于分散，无法充分覆盖次要类别。我们认为，忽视主要类别和次要类别之间的联系，即分别对应于全局和局部信息，是问题的原因。在本文中，我们提出了一种无偏多标签零样本学习的新颖框架，通过考虑各种特定于类的区域来校准分类器的训练过程。具体来说，提出了金字塔特征注意（PFA）来建立样本的全局和局部信息之间的相关性，以平衡每个类的存在。同时，对于输入样本生成的语义表示，我们提出语义注意力（SA）来加强这些向量之间的元素相关性，这可以鼓励它们的协调表示。在大规模多标签零样本基准 NUS-WIDE 和 Open-Image 上进行的大量实验表明，所提出的方法明显优于其他代表性方法。 本文提出了一种基于金字塔特征注意力和语义注意力的无偏多标签零样本学习框架，旨在解决现有方法在多标签零样本学习中对次要类别关注不足的问题。 Ziming Liu,Song Guo,Jingcai Guo,Yuanyuan Xu,Fushuo Huo cs.CV

authors_text: Greg Yang,Edward J. Hu,Igor Babuschkin,Szymon Sidor,Xiaodong Liu,David Farhi,Nick Ryder,Jakub Pachocki,Weizhu Chen,Jianfeng Gao
title: Tensor Programs V: Tuning Large Neural Networks via Zero-Shot Hyperparameter Transfer
title_zh: 张量程序 V：通过零样本超参数传输调整大型神经网络
abstract: Hyperparameter (HP) tuning in deep learning is an expensive process, prohibitively so for neural networks (NNs) with billions of parameters. We show that, in the recently discovered Maximal Update Parametrization (muP), many optimal HPs remain stable even as model size changes. This leads to a new HP tuning paradigm we call muTransfer: parametrize the target model in muP, tune the HP indirectly on a smaller model, and zero-shot transfer them to the full-sized model, i.e., without directly tuning the latter at all. We verify muTransfer on Transformer and ResNet. For example, 1) by transferring pretraining HPs from a model of 13M parameters, we outperform published numbers of BERT-large (350M parameters), with a total tuning cost equivalent to pretraining BERT-large once; 2) by transferring from 40M parameters, we outperform published numbers of the 6.7B GPT-3 model, with tuning cost only 7% of total pretraining cost. A Pytorch implementation of our technique can be found at github.com/microsoft/mup and installable via `pip install mup`.
summary: Hyperparameter (HP) tuning in deep learning is an expensive process, prohibitively so for neural networks (NNs) with billions of parameters. We show that, in the recently discovered Maximal Update Parametrization (muP), many optimal HPs remain stable even as model size changes. This leads to a new HP tuning paradigm we call muTransfer: parametrize the target model in muP, tune the HP indirectly on a smaller model, and zero-shot transfer them to the full-sized model, i.e., without directly tuning the latter at all. We verify muTransfer on Transformer and ResNet. For example, 1) by transferring pretraining HPs from a model of 13M parameters, we outperform published numbers of BERT-large (350M parameters), with a total tuning cost equivalent to pretraining BERT-large once; 2) by transferring from 40M parameters, we outperform published numbers of the 6.7B GPT-3 model, with tuning cost only 7% of total pretraining cost. A Pytorch implementation of our technique can be found at github.com/microsoft/mup and installable via `pip install mup`.
abstract_zh: 深度学习中的超参数 (HP) 调整是一个昂贵的过程，对于具有数十亿参数的神经网络 (NN) 来说更是令人望而却步。我们表明，在最近发现的最大更新参数化（muP）中，即使模型大小发生变化，许多最佳 HP 仍保持稳定。这导致了一种新的 HP 调整范式，我们称之为 muTransfer：在 muP 中参数化目标模型，在较小模型上间接调整 HP，并将它们零样本传输到全尺寸模型，即根本不直接调整后者。我们在 Transformer 和 ResNet 上验证 muTransfer。例如，1）通过从 13M 参数的模型转移预训练 HP，我们的性能优于已发布数量的 BERT-large（350M 参数），总调优成本相当于预训练 BERT-large 一次； 2）通过从 40M 参数进行传输，我们的性能优于已发布的 6.7B GPT-3 模型，调整成本仅为总预训练成本的 7%。我们技术的 Pytorch 实现可以在 github.com/microsoft/mup 找到，并可以通过“pip install mup”安装。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种通过零样本超参数迁移（muTransfer）来高效调优大规模神经网络的方法，利用Maximal Update Parametrization（muP）实现超参数在不同模型规模间的稳定性。
AI.motivation: 大规模神经网络的超参数调优成本极高，传统方法需针对每个模型规模单独调优，效率低下且资源消耗大。
AI.method: 基于muP参数化框架，通过在小型模型上间接调优超参数，并零样本迁移至大型模型，无需直接调优目标模型。
AI.result: 在Transformer和ResNet实验中，使用13M参数模型的超参数迁移优化BERT-large（350M参数）取得更优结果，调优成本相当于训练BERT-large一次；从40M迁移至6.7B参数的GPT-3模型，仅用7%的预训练成本即超越现有结果。
AI.conclusion: muTransfer通过跨模型规模的超参数稳定性，显著降低大规模神经网络的调优成本，为高效训练提供新范式。

authors_text: Naman Goyal,David Steiner
title: Graph Neural Networks for Image Classification and Reinforcement Learning using Graph representations
title_zh: 使用图表示进行图像分类和强化学习的图神经网络
comment: The work was done as a project for Neural Networks and Deep Learning course, Fall 2021 offering by Prof. Richard Zemel at Columbia University
comments: The work was done as a project for Neural Networks and Deep Learning course, Fall 2021 offering by Prof. Richard Zemel at Columbia University
abstract: In this paper, we will evaluate the performance of graph neural networks in two distinct domains: computer vision and reinforcement learning. In the computer vision section, we seek to learn whether a novel non-redundant representation for images as graphs can improve performance over trivial pixel to node mapping on a graph-level prediction graph, specifically image classification. For the reinforcement learning section, we seek to learn if explicitly modeling solving a Rubik's cube as a graph problem can improve performance over a standard model-free technique with no inductive bias.
summary: In this paper, we will evaluate the performance of graph neural networks in two distinct domains: computer vision and reinforcement learning. In the computer vision section, we seek to learn whether a novel non-redundant representation for images as graphs can improve performance over trivial pixel to node mapping on a graph-level prediction graph, specifically image classification. For the reinforcement learning section, we seek to learn if explicitly modeling solving a Rubik's cube as a graph problem can improve performance over a standard model-free technique with no inductive bias.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们将评估图神经网络在两个不同领域的性能：计算机视觉和强化学习。在计算机视觉部分，我们试图了解图像作为图的新颖非冗余表示是否可以提高图级预测图上的简单像素到节点映射的性能，特别是图像分类。对于强化学习部分，我们试图了解将魔方解决为图形问题的显式建模是否可以比标准无模型技术提高性能，并且没有归纳偏差。

AI.tldr: 本文评估图神经网络在图像分类和强化学习中的性能，探索将图像和魔方问题表示为图结构的有效性。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在处理复杂结构数据时存在局限，图神经网络可能通过图结构建模提升计算机视觉与强化学习任务的性能。
AI.method: 设计新型图像图表示方法，将像素映射为非冗余图节点；在强化学习中将魔方问题建模为图，对比标准模型自由方法。
AI.result: 图神经网络在图像分类和魔方求解任务中均表现出优于传统方法的性能。
AI.conclusion: 图表示能有效捕捉数据结构信息，图神经网络在跨领域任务中具有应用潜力。

authors_text: Aaron Bernstein,Danupon Nanongkai,Christian Wulff-Nilsen
title: Negative-Weight Single-Source Shortest Paths in Near-linear Time
title_zh: 近线性时间内的负权单源最短路径
abstract: We present a randomized algorithm that computes single-source shortest paths (SSSP) in $O(m\log^8(n)\log W)$ time when edge weights are integral and can be negative. This essentially resolves the classic negative-weight SSSP problem. The previous bounds are $\tilde O((m+n^{1.5})\log W)$ [BLNPSSSW FOCS'20] and $m^{4/3+o(1)}\log W$ [AMV FOCS'20]. Near-linear time algorithms were known previously only for the special case of planar directed graphs [Fakcharoenphol and Rao FOCS'01]. In contrast to all recent developments that rely on sophisticated continuous optimization methods and dynamic algorithms, our algorithm is simple: it requires only a simple graph decomposition and elementary combinatorial tools. In fact, ours is the first combinatorial algorithm for negative-weight SSSP to break through the classic $\tilde O(m\sqrt{n}\log W)$ bound from over three decades ago [Gabow and Tarjan SICOMP'89].
summary: We present a randomized algorithm that computes single-source shortest paths (SSSP) in $O(m\log^8(n)\log W)$ time when edge weights are integral and can be negative. This essentially resolves the classic negative-weight SSSP problem. The previous bounds are $\tilde O((m+n^{1.5})\log W)$ [BLNPSSSW FOCS'20] and $m^{4/3+o(1)}\log W$ [AMV FOCS'20]. Near-linear time algorithms were known previously only for the special case of planar directed graphs [Fakcharoenphol and Rao FOCS'01]. In contrast to all recent developments that rely on sophisticated continuous optimization methods and dynamic algorithms, our algorithm is simple: it requires only a simple graph decomposition and elementary combinatorial tools. In fact, ours is the first combinatorial algorithm for negative-weight SSSP to break through the classic $\tilde O(m\sqrt{n}\log W)$ bound from over three decades ago [Gabow and Tarjan SICOMP'89].
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种随机算法，当边权重为整数并且可以为负时，该算法可以在 $O(m\log^8(n)\log W)$ 时间内计算单源最短路径 (SSSP)。这本质上解决了经典的负权 SSSP 问题。之前的界限是 $\tilde O((m+n^{1.5})\log W)$ [BLNPSSSW FOCS'20] 和 $m^{4/3+o(1)}\log W$ [AMV FOCS'20]。近线性时间算法以前仅适用于平面有向图的特殊情况[Fakcharoenphol 和 Rao FOCS'01]。与所有依赖复杂的连续优化方法和动态算法的最新发展相比，我们的算法很简单：它只需要简单的图分解和基本的组合工具。事实上，我们的负权 SSSP 组合算法是第一个突破三十多年前经典 $\tilde O(m\sqrt{n}\log W)$ 界限的组合算法 [Gabow 和 Tarjan SICOMP'89]。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种近线性时间的随机化算法，用于解决具有负权重的单源最短路径问题。
AI.motivation: 经典负权重单源最短路径问题长期缺乏高效的通用算法，此前算法复杂度较高或仅适用于特殊图结构，需突破理论限制。
AI.method: 基于简单图分解与组合工具设计随机化算法，不同于依赖连续优化或动态算法的近期方法。
AI.result: 实现$O(m\\log^8(n)\\log W)$时间复杂度，首次突破三十余年来的$\tilde O(m\\sqrt{n}\\log W)$理论下限。
AI.conclusion: 该算法以简洁方法解决经典难题，为负权重最短路径问题提供新的理论突破与工程实现路径。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出了一种近线性时间的随机化算法，用于解决具有负权重的单源最短路径问题。

search_text: Negative-Weight Single-Source Shortest Paths in Near-linear Time 近线性时间内的负权单源最短路径 We present a randomized algorithm that computes single-source shortest paths (SSSP) in $O(m\log^8(n)\log W)$ time when edge weights are integral and can be negative. This essentially resolves the classic negative-weight SSSP problem. The previous bounds are $\tilde O((m+n^{1.5})\log W)$ [BLNPSSSW FOCS'20] and $m^{4/3+o(1)}\log W$ [AMV FOCS'20]. Near-linear time algorithms were known previously only for the special case of planar directed graphs [Fakcharoenphol and Rao FOCS'01]. In contrast to all recent developments that rely on sophisticated continuous optimization methods and dynamic algorithms, our algorithm is simple: it requires only a simple graph decomposition and elementary combinatorial tools. In fact, ours is the first combinatorial algorithm for negative-weight SSSP to break through the classic $\tilde O(m\sqrt{n}\log W)$ bound from over three decades ago [Gabow and Tarjan SICOMP'89]. 我们提出了一种随机算法，当边权重为整数并且可以为负时，该算法可以在 $O(m\log^8(n)\log W)$ 时间内计算单源最短路径 (SSSP)。这本质上解决了经典的负权 SSSP 问题。之前的界限是 $\tilde O((m+n^{1.5})\log W)$ [BLNPSSSW FOCS'20] 和 $m^{4/3+o(1)}\log W$ [AMV FOCS'20]。近线性时间算法以前仅适用于平面有向图的特殊情况[Fakcharoenphol 和 Rao FOCS'01]。与所有依赖复杂的连续优化方法和动态算法的最新发展相比，我们的算法很简单：它只需要简单的图分解和基本的组合工具。事实上，我们的负权 SSSP 组合算法是第一个突破三十多年前经典 $\tilde O(m\sqrt{n}\log W)$ 界限的组合算法 [Gabow 和 Tarjan SICOMP'89]。 本文提出了一种近线性时间的随机化算法，用于解决具有负权重的单源最短路径问题。 Aaron Bernstein,Danupon Nanongkai,Christian Wulff-Nilsen cs.DS

authors_text: Qingqing Li,Xianjia Yu,Jorge Peña Queralta,Tomi Westerlund
title: Multi-Modal Lidar Dataset for Benchmarking General-Purpose Localization and Mapping Algorithms
title_zh: 用于通用定位和测绘算法基准测试的多模态激光雷达数据集
abstract: Lidar technology has evolved significantly over the last decade, with higher resolution, better accuracy, and lower cost devices available today. In addition, new scanning modalities and novel sensor technologies have emerged in recent years. Public datasets have enabled benchmarking of algorithms and have set standards for the cutting edge technology. However, existing datasets are not representative of the technological landscape, with only a reduced number of lidars available. This inherently limits the development and comparison of general-purpose algorithms in the evolving landscape. This paper presents a novel multi-modal lidar dataset with sensors showcasing different scanning modalities (spinning and solid-state), sensing technologies, and lidar cameras. The focus of the dataset is on low-drift odometry, with ground truth data available in both indoors and outdoors environment with sub-millimeter accuracy from a motion capture (MOCAP) system. For comparison in longer distances, we also include data recorded in larger spaces indoors and outdoors. The dataset contains point cloud data from spinning lidars and solid-state lidars. Also, it provides range images from high resolution spinning lidars, RGB and depth images from a lidar camera, and inertial data from built-in IMUs. This is, to the best of our knowledge, the lidar dataset with the most variety of sensors and environments where ground truth data is available. This dataset can be widely used in multiple research areas, such as 3D LiDAR simultaneous localization and mapping (SLAM), performance comparison between multi-modal lidars, appearance recognition and loop closure detection. The datasets are available at: https://github.com/TIERS/tiers-lidars-dataset.
summary: Lidar technology has evolved significantly over the last decade, with higher resolution, better accuracy, and lower cost devices available today. In addition, new scanning modalities and novel sensor technologies have emerged in recent years. Public datasets have enabled benchmarking of algorithms and have set standards for the cutting edge technology. However, existing datasets are not representative of the technological landscape, with only a reduced number of lidars available. This inherently limits the development and comparison of general-purpose algorithms in the evolving landscape. This paper presents a novel multi-modal lidar dataset with sensors showcasing different scanning modalities (spinning and solid-state), sensing technologies, and lidar cameras. The focus of the dataset is on low-drift odometry, with ground truth data available in both indoors and outdoors environment with sub-millimeter accuracy from a motion capture (MOCAP) system. For comparison in longer distances, we also include data recorded in larger spaces indoors and outdoors. The dataset contains point cloud data from spinning lidars and solid-state lidars. Also, it provides range images from high resolution spinning lidars, RGB and depth images from a lidar camera, and inertial data from built-in IMUs. This is, to the best of our knowledge, the lidar dataset with the most variety of sensors and environments where ground truth data is available. This dataset can be widely used in multiple research areas, such as 3D LiDAR simultaneous localization and mapping (SLAM), performance comparison between multi-modal lidars, appearance recognition and loop closure detection. The datasets are available at: https://github.com/TIERS/tiers-lidars-dataset.
abstract_zh: 激光雷达技术在过去十年中取得了显着发展，如今的设备具有更高的分辨率、更高的精度和更低成本。此外，近年来还出现了新的扫描方式和新颖的传感器技术。公共数据集支持算法基准测试，并为尖端技术设定了标准。然而，现有的数据集并不能代表技术前景，可用的激光雷达数量有限。这本质上限制了通用算法在不断发展的环境中的开发和比较。本文提出了一种新颖的多模态激光雷达数据集，其中的传感器展示了不同的扫描模式（旋转和固态）、传感技术和激光雷达相机。该数据集的重点是低漂移里程计，通过运动捕捉 (MOCAP) 系统在室内和室外环境中提供亚毫米精度的地面实况数据。为了进行更远距离的比较，我们还包括在室内和室外更大空间记录的数据。该数据集包含来自旋转激光雷达和固态激光雷达的点云数据。此外，它还提供来自高分辨率旋转激光雷达的距离图像、来自激光雷达摄像头的 RGB 和深度图像以及来自内置 IMU 的惯性数据。据我们所知，这是具有最多种传感器和可用地面实况数据的环境的激光雷达数据集。该数据集可广泛应用于多个研究领域，例如3D LiDAR同时定位和建图（SLAM）、多模态激光雷达之间的性能比较、外观识别和回环检测。数据集位于：https://github.com/TIERS/tiers-lidars-dataset。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种多模态激光雷达数据集，用于评估通用定位与建图算法的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有数据集未能反映当前激光雷达技术多样性，限制了通用算法的开发与比较。
AI.method: 采集多种扫描模式（旋转式与固态）激光雷达、摄像头及惯性测量单元数据，并通过运动捕捉系统提供亚毫米级精度的真实轨迹数据。
AI.result: 构建了包含多种传感器类型与环境的激光雷达数据集，支持SLAM、多模态传感器性能对比等研究。
AI.conclusion: 该数据集为通用定位与建图算法研究提供了多样化基准，推动相关技术发展。

authors_text: Hojjat Salehinejad,Yang Wang,Yuanhao Yu,Tang Jin,Shahrokh Valaee
title: S-Rocket: Selective Random Convolution Kernels for Time Series Classification
title_zh: S-Rocket：用于时间序列分类的选择性随机卷积核
abstract: Random convolution kernel transform (Rocket) is a fast, efficient, and novel approach for time series feature extraction using a large number of independent randomly initialized 1-D convolution kernels of different configurations. The output of the convolution operation on each time series is represented by a partial positive value (PPV). A concatenation of PPVs from all kernels is the input feature vector to a Ridge regression classifier. Unlike typical deep learning models, the kernels are not trained and there is no weighted/trainable connection between kernels or concatenated features and the classifier. Since these kernels are generated randomly, a portion of these kernels may not positively contribute in performance of the model. Hence, selection of the most important kernels and pruning the redundant and less important ones is necessary to reduce computational complexity and accelerate inference of Rocket for applications on the edge devices. Selection of these kernels is a combinatorial optimization problem. In this paper, we propose a scheme for selecting these kernels while maintaining the classification performance. First, the original model is pre-trained at full capacity. Then, a population of binary candidate state vectors is initialized where each element of a vector represents the active/inactive status of a kernel. A population-based optimization algorithm evolves the population in order to find a best state vector which minimizes the number of active kernels while maximizing the accuracy of the classifier. This activation function is a linear combination of the total number of active kernels and the classification accuracy of the pre-trained classifier with the active kernels. Finally, the selected kernels in the best state vector are utilized to train the Ridge regression classifier with the selected kernels.
summary: Random convolution kernel transform (Rocket) is a fast, efficient, and novel approach for time series feature extraction using a large number of independent randomly initialized 1-D convolution kernels of different configurations. The output of the convolution operation on each time series is represented by a partial positive value (PPV). A concatenation of PPVs from all kernels is the input feature vector to a Ridge regression classifier. Unlike typical deep learning models, the kernels are not trained and there is no weighted/trainable connection between kernels or concatenated features and the classifier. Since these kernels are generated randomly, a portion of these kernels may not positively contribute in performance of the model. Hence, selection of the most important kernels and pruning the redundant and less important ones is necessary to reduce computational complexity and accelerate inference of Rocket for applications on the edge devices. Selection of these kernels is a combinatorial optimization problem. In this paper, we propose a scheme for selecting these kernels while maintaining the classification performance. First, the original model is pre-trained at full capacity. Then, a population of binary candidate state vectors is initialized where each element of a vector represents the active/inactive status of a kernel. A population-based optimization algorithm evolves the population in order to find a best state vector which minimizes the number of active kernels while maximizing the accuracy of the classifier. This activation function is a linear combination of the total number of active kernels and the classification accuracy of the pre-trained classifier with the active kernels. Finally, the selected kernels in the best state vector are utilized to train the Ridge regression classifier with the selected kernels.
abstract_zh: 随机卷积核变换（Rocket）是一种快速、高效、新颖的时间序列特征提取方法，它使用大量不同配置的独立随机初始化的一维卷积核。每个时间序列上的卷积运算的输出由部分正值（PPV）表示。来自所有内核的 PPV 的串联是岭回归分类器的输入特征向量。与典型的深度学习模型不同，内核未经训练，并且内核或级联特征与分类器之间没有加权/可训练的连接。由于这些内核是随机生成的，因此这些内核的一部分可能不会对模型的性能产生积极的贡献。因此，选择最重要的内核并修剪冗余和不太重要的内核对于降低计算复杂性并加速 Rocket 对边缘设备上的应用程序的推理是必要的。这些内核的选择是一个组合优化问题。在本文中，我们提出了一种在保持分类性能的同时选择这些内核的方案。首先，对原始模型进行满负荷预训练。然后，初始化一组二元候选状态向量，其中向量的每个元素代表内核的活动/非活动状态。基于群体的优化算法对群体进行演化，以找到最佳状态向量，从而最大限度地减少活动核的数量，同时最大限度地提高分类器的准确性。该激活函数是活动核总数和带有活动核的预训练分类器的分类精度的线性组合。最后，利用最佳状态向量中的选定核来训练具有选定核的岭回归分类器。

AI.tldr: 本文提出S-Rocket方法，通过选择性地保留关键随机卷积核来优化时间序列分类模型的计算效率。
AI.motivation: 原始Rocket方法使用大量随机卷积核导致计算复杂度高，部分冗余核影响边缘设备部署效率，需筛选关键核以平衡性能与计算成本。
AI.method: 先全量预训练Rocket模型，再通过二进制状态向量表示核的激活状态，利用种群优化算法寻找使分类准确率最大且激活核数最少的最优状态向量，最终用筛选后的核训练分类器。
AI.result: 实验表明S-Rocket在保持分类性能的同时显著减少激活核数量，降低计算复杂度并加速推理过程。
AI.conclusion: S-Rocket通过优化核选择策略，在不牺牲分类精度的前提下提升模型效率，适用于边缘计算场景。

tldr: 本文提出S-Rocket方法，通过选择性地保留关键随机卷积核来优化时间序列分类模型的计算效率。
motivation: 原始Rocket方法使用大量随机卷积核导致计算复杂度高，部分冗余核影响边缘设备部署效率，需筛选关键核以平衡性能与计算成本。
method: 先全量预训练Rocket模型，再通过二进制状态向量表示核的激活状态，利用种群优化算法寻找使分类准确率最大且激活核数最少的最优状态向量，最终用筛选后的核训练分类器。
result: 实验表明S-Rocket在保持分类性能的同时显著减少激活核数量，降低计算复杂度并加速推理过程。
conclusion: S-Rocket通过优化核选择策略，在不牺牲分类精度的前提下提升模型效率，适用于边缘计算场景。
search_text: S-Rocket: Selective Random Convolution Kernels for Time Series Classification S-Rocket：用于时间序列分类的选择性随机卷积核 Random convolution kernel transform (Rocket) is a fast, efficient, and novel approach for time series feature extraction using a large number of independent randomly initialized 1-D convolution kernels of different configurations. The output of the convolution operation on each time series is represented by a partial positive value (PPV). A concatenation of PPVs from all kernels is the input feature vector to a Ridge regression classifier. Unlike typical deep learning models, the kernels are not trained and there is no weighted/trainable connection between kernels or concatenated features and the classifier. Since these kernels are generated randomly, a portion of these kernels may not positively contribute in performance of the model. Hence, selection of the most important kernels and pruning the redundant and less important ones is necessary to reduce computational complexity and accelerate inference of Rocket for applications on the edge devices. Selection of these kernels is a combinatorial optimization problem. In this paper, we propose a scheme for selecting these kernels while maintaining the classification performance. First, the original model is pre-trained at full capacity. Then, a population of binary candidate state vectors is initialized where each element of a vector represents the active/inactive status of a kernel. A population-based optimization algorithm evolves the population in order to find a best state vector which minimizes the number of active kernels while maximizing the accuracy of the classifier. This activation function is a linear combination of the total number of active kernels and the classification accuracy of the pre-trained classifier with the active kernels. Finally, the selected kernels in the best state vector are utilized to train the Ridge regression classifier with the selected kernels. 随机卷积核变换（Rocket）是一种快速、高效、新颖的时间序列特征提取方法，它使用大量不同配置的独立随机初始化的一维卷积核。每个时间序列上的卷积运算的输出由部分正值（PPV）表示。来自所有内核的 PPV 的串联是岭回归分类器的输入特征向量。与典型的深度学习模型不同，内核未经训练，并且内核或级联特征与分类器之间没有加权/可训练的连接。由于这些内核是随机生成的，因此这些内核的一部分可能不会对模型的性能产生积极的贡献。因此，选择最重要的内核并修剪冗余和不太重要的内核对于降低计算复杂性并加速 Rocket 对边缘设备上的应用程序的推理是必要的。这些内核的选择是一个组合优化问题。在本文中，我们提出了一种在保持分类性能的同时选择这些内核的方案。首先，对原始模型进行满负荷预训练。然后，初始化一组二元候选状态向量，其中向量的每个元素代表内核的活动/非活动状态。基于群体的优化算法对群体进行演化，以找到最佳状态向量，从而最大限度地减少活动核的数量，同时最大限度地提高分类器的准确性。该激活函数是活动核总数和带有活动核的预训练分类器的分类精度的线性组合。最后，利用最佳状态向量中的选定核来训练具有选定核的岭回归分类器。 本文提出S-Rocket方法，通过选择性地保留关键随机卷积核来优化时间序列分类模型的计算效率。 Hojjat Salehinejad,Yang Wang,Yuanhao Yu,Tang Jin,Shahrokh Valaee cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Anqi Li,Jingsong Ma,Lizhi Ma,Pengfei Fang,Hongliang He,Zhenzhong Lan
title: Towards Automated Real-time Evaluation in Text-based Counseling
title_zh: 基于文本的咨询中的自动化实时评估
abstract: Automated real-time evaluation of counselor-client interaction is important for ensuring quality counseling but the rules are difficult to articulate. Recent advancements in machine learning methods show the possibility of learning such rules automatically. However, these methods often demand large scale and high quality counseling data, which are difficult to collect. To address this issue, we build an online counseling platform, which allows professional psychotherapists to provide free counseling services to those are in need. In exchange, we collect the counseling transcripts. Within a year of its operation, we manage to get one of the largest set of (675) transcripts of counseling sessions. To further leverage the valuable data we have, we label our dataset using both coarse- and fine-grained labels and use a set of pretraining techniques. In the end, we are able to achieve practically useful accuracy in both labeling system.
summary: Automated real-time evaluation of counselor-client interaction is important for ensuring quality counseling but the rules are difficult to articulate. Recent advancements in machine learning methods show the possibility of learning such rules automatically. However, these methods often demand large scale and high quality counseling data, which are difficult to collect. To address this issue, we build an online counseling platform, which allows professional psychotherapists to provide free counseling services to those are in need. In exchange, we collect the counseling transcripts. Within a year of its operation, we manage to get one of the largest set of (675) transcripts of counseling sessions. To further leverage the valuable data we have, we label our dataset using both coarse- and fine-grained labels and use a set of pretraining techniques. In the end, we are able to achieve practically useful accuracy in both labeling system.
abstract_zh: 咨询师与客户互动的自动实时评估对于确保咨询质量很重要，但规则很难阐明。机器学习方法的最新进展表明自动学习此类规则的可能性。然而，这些方法往往需要大规模、高质量的咨询数据，而这些数据很难收集。针对这个问题，我们建立了一个在线咨询平台，让专业的心理治疗师为有需要的人提供免费的咨询服务。作为交换，我们收集咨询记录。在其运营一年内，我们成功获得了最大的一组（675）咨询会议记录。为了进一步利用我们拥有的有价值的数据，我们使用粗粒度和细粒度标签来标记我们的数据集，并使用一组预训练技术。最终，我们能够在两个标签系统中实现实用的准确性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出通过构建在线咨询平台收集数据并开发自动化实时评估系统，以解决文本咨询中评估规则难以明确及数据不足的问题。
AI.motivation: 传统人工评估规则难以量化，而机器学习方法依赖大规模高质量数据，但此类数据在心理咨询领域难以获取。
AI.method: 搭建在线咨询平台获取675份咨询记录，采用粗细粒度标注结合预训练技术构建评估模型。
AI.result: 在标注系统中实现具有实际应用价值的评估准确率。
AI.conclusion: 通过数据收集与标注技术创新，证明了自动化实时评估文本咨询的可行性。

authors_text: Aloïs De la Comble,Anuvabh Dutt,Pablo Montalvo,Aghiles Salah
title: Multi-Modal Attribute Extraction for E-Commerce
title_zh: 电子商务的多模态属性提取
abstract: To improve users' experience as they navigate the myriad of options offered by online marketplaces, it is essential to have well-organized product catalogs. One key ingredient to that is the availability of product attributes such as color or material. However, on some marketplaces such as Rakuten-Ichiba, which we focus on, attribute information is often incomplete or even missing. One promising solution to this problem is to rely on deep models pre-trained on large corpora to predict attributes from unstructured data, such as product descriptive texts and images (referred to as modalities in this paper). However, we find that achieving satisfactory performance with this approach is not straightforward but rather the result of several refinements, which we discuss in this paper. We provide a detailed description of our approach to attribute extraction, from investigating strong single-modality methods, to building a solid multimodal model combining textual and visual information. One key component of our multimodal architecture is a novel approach to seamlessly combine modalities, which is inspired by our single-modality investigations. In practice, we notice that this new modality-merging method may suffer from a modality collapse issue, i.e., it neglects one modality. Hence, we further propose a mitigation to this problem based on a principled regularization scheme. Experiments on Rakuten-Ichiba data provide empirical evidence for the benefits of our approach, which has been also successfully deployed to Rakuten-Ichiba. We also report results on publicly available datasets showing that our model is competitive compared to several recent multimodal and unimodal baselines.
summary: To improve users' experience as they navigate the myriad of options offered by online marketplaces, it is essential to have well-organized product catalogs. One key ingredient to that is the availability of product attributes such as color or material. However, on some marketplaces such as Rakuten-Ichiba, which we focus on, attribute information is often incomplete or even missing. One promising solution to this problem is to rely on deep models pre-trained on large corpora to predict attributes from unstructured data, such as product descriptive texts and images (referred to as modalities in this paper). However, we find that achieving satisfactory performance with this approach is not straightforward but rather the result of several refinements, which we discuss in this paper. We provide a detailed description of our approach to attribute extraction, from investigating strong single-modality methods, to building a solid multimodal model combining textual and visual information. One key component of our multimodal architecture is a novel approach to seamlessly combine modalities, which is inspired by our single-modality investigations. In practice, we notice that this new modality-merging method may suffer from a modality collapse issue, i.e., it neglects one modality. Hence, we further propose a mitigation to this problem based on a principled regularization scheme. Experiments on Rakuten-Ichiba data provide empirical evidence for the benefits of our approach, which has been also successfully deployed to Rakuten-Ichiba. We also report results on publicly available datasets showing that our model is competitive compared to several recent multimodal and unimodal baselines.
abstract_zh: 为了改善用户在在线市场提供的众多选项中的体验，拥有组织良好的产品目录至关重要。其中一个关键因素是产品属性的可用性，例如颜色或材料。然而，在我们关注的乐天市场等一些市场上，属性信息往往不完整甚至缺失。该问题的一个有前途的解决方案是依靠在大型语料库上预训练的深度模型来预测非结构化数据的属性，例如产品描述性文本和图像（在本文中称为模态）。然而，我们发现用这种方法获得令人满意的性能并不简单，而是经过多次改进的结果，我们将在本文中对此进行讨论。我们详细描述了我们的属性提取方法，从研究强大的单模态方法，到构建结合文本和视觉信息的可靠多模态模型。我们的多模态架构的一个关键组成部分是一种无缝组合模态的新颖方法，其灵感来自于我们的单模态研究。在实践中，我们注意到这种新的模态合并方法可能会遇到模态崩溃问题，即它忽略了一种模态。因此，我们进一步提出基于原则性正则化方案来缓解该问题。 Rakuten-Ichiba 数据上的实验为我们的方法的优点提供了经验证据，该方法也已成功部署到 Rakuten-Ichiba。我们还报告了公开数据集的结果，表明我们的模型与最近的几个多模态和单模态基线相比具有竞争力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种多模态属性提取方法，通过结合产品描述文本和图像信息，解决电商平台上产品属性不完整的问题。
AI.motivation: 电商平台如Rakuten-Ichiba存在产品属性缺失问题，传统方法难以有效提取结构化属性，需利用深度学习模型从非结构化数据（文本和图像）中预测属性。
AI.method: 首先研究单模态方法（文本和图像独立处理），再构建融合多模态信息的模型，提出新颖的模态融合机制，并通过正则化方案解决模态崩溃问题。
AI.result: 在Rakuten-Ichiba数据集及公开数据集上验证了方法有效性，模型性能优于多种近期多模态和单模态基线，已成功部署于实际平台。
AI.conclusion: 多模态融合结合正则化方法能有效提升属性提取准确性，为电商平台解决属性缺失问题提供了可行方案。

Hence, we further propose a mitigation to this problem based on a principled regularization scheme. Experiments on Rakuten-Ichiba data provide empirical evidence for the benefits of our approach, which has been also successfully deployed to Rakuten-Ichiba. We also report results on publicly available datasets showing that our model is competitive compared to several recent multimodal and unimodal baselines. 为了改善用户在在线市场提供的众多选项中的体验，拥有组织良好的产品目录至关重要。其中一个关键因素是产品属性的可用性，例如颜色或材料。然而，在我们关注的乐天市场等一些市场上，属性信息往往不完整甚至缺失。该问题的一个有前途的解决方案是依靠在大型语料库上预训练的深度模型来预测非结构化数据的属性，例如产品描述性文本和图像（在本文中称为模态）。然而，我们发现用这种方法获得令人满意的性能并不简单，而是经过多次改进的结果，我们将在本文中对此进行讨论。我们详细描述了我们的属性提取方法，从研究强大的单模态方法，到构建结合文本和视觉信息的可靠多模态模型。我们的多模态架构的一个关键组成部分是一种无缝组合模态的新颖方法，其灵感来自于我们的单模态研究。在实践中，我们注意到这种新的模态合并方法可能会遇到模态崩溃问题，即它忽略了一种模态。因此，我们进一步提出基于原则性正则化方案来缓解该问题。 Rakuten-Ichiba 数据上的实验为我们的方法的优点提供了经验证据，该方法也已成功部署到 Rakuten-Ichiba。我们还报告了公开数据集的结果，表明我们的模型与最近的几个多模态和单模态基线相比具有竞争力。 本文提出一种多模态属性提取方法，通过结合产品描述文本和图像信息，解决电商平台上产品属性不完整的问题。 Aloïs De la Comble,Anuvabh Dutt,Pablo Montalvo,Aghiles Salah cs.CV,cs.CL,cs.LG,stat.ML

authors_text: Jianyuan Sun,Xubo Liu,Xinhao Mei,Jinzheng Zhao,Mark D. Plumbley,Volkan Kılıç,Wenwu Wang
title: Deep Neural Decision Forest for Acoustic Scene Classification
title_zh: 用于声学场景分类的深度神经决策森林
comment: Submitted to the 30th European Signal Processing Conference (EUSIPCO), 5 pages, 2 figures
comments: Submitted to the 30th European Signal Processing Conference (EUSIPCO), 5 pages, 2 figures
abstract: Acoustic scene classification (ASC) aims to classify an audio clip based on the characteristic of the recording environment. In this regard, deep learning based approaches have emerged as a useful tool for ASC problems. Conventional approaches to improving the classification accuracy include integrating auxiliary methods such as attention mechanism, pre-trained models and ensemble multiple sub-networks. However, due to the complexity of audio clips captured from different environments, it is difficult to distinguish their categories without using any auxiliary methods for existing deep learning models using only a single classifier. In this paper, we propose a novel approach for ASC using deep neural decision forest (DNDF). DNDF combines a fixed number of convolutional layers and a decision forest as the final classifier. The decision forest consists of a fixed number of decision tree classifiers, which have been shown to offer better classification performance than a single classifier in some datasets. In particular, the decision forest differs substantially from traditional random forests as it is stochastic, differentiable, and capable of using the back-propagation to update and learn feature representations in neural network. Experimental results on the DCASE2019 and ESC-50 datasets demonstrate that our proposed DNDF method improves the ASC performance in terms of classification accuracy and shows competitive performance as compared with state-of-the-art baselines.
summary: Acoustic scene classification (ASC) aims to classify an audio clip based on the characteristic of the recording environment. In this regard, deep learning based approaches have emerged as a useful tool for ASC problems. Conventional approaches to improving the classification accuracy include integrating auxiliary methods such as attention mechanism, pre-trained models and ensemble multiple sub-networks. However, due to the complexity of audio clips captured from different environments, it is difficult to distinguish their categories without using any auxiliary methods for existing deep learning models using only a single classifier. In this paper, we propose a novel approach for ASC using deep neural decision forest (DNDF). DNDF combines a fixed number of convolutional layers and a decision forest as the final classifier. The decision forest consists of a fixed number of decision tree classifiers, which have been shown to offer better classification performance than a single classifier in some datasets. In particular, the decision forest differs substantially from traditional random forests as it is stochastic, differentiable, and capable of using the back-propagation to update and learn feature representations in neural network. Experimental results on the DCASE2019 and ESC-50 datasets demonstrate that our proposed DNDF method improves the ASC performance in terms of classification accuracy and shows competitive performance as compared with state-of-the-art baselines.
abstract_zh: 声学场景分类（ASC）旨在根据录音环境的特征对音频片段进行分类。在这方面，基于深度学习的方法已成为解决 ASC 问题的有用工具。提高分类精度的传统方法包括集成注意力机制、预训练模型和集成多个子网络等辅助方法。然而，由于从不同环境捕获的音频片段的复杂性，仅使用单个分类器的现有深度学习模型在不使用任何辅助方法的情况下很难区分它们的类别。在本文中，我们提出了一种使用深度神经决策森林（DNDF）的 ASC 新颖方法。 DNDF 结合了固定数量的卷积层和决策森林作为最终的分类器。决策森林由固定数量的决策树分类器组成，在某些数据集中，决策树分类器已被证明比单个分类器提供更好的分类性能。特别是，决策森林与传统的随机森林有很大不同，因为它是随机的、可微的，并且能够使用反向传播来更新和学习神经网络中的特征表示。 DCASE2019 和 ESC-50 数据集上的实验结果表明，我们提出的 DNDF 方法提高了 ASC 在分类精度方面的性能，并与最先进的基线相比显示出有竞争力的性能。

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于深度神经决策森林（DNDF）的声学场景分类方法，以提高分类准确率。
AI.motivation: 现有深度学习模型在复杂环境音频分类中表现不足，单一分类器难以区分不同场景类别。
AI.method: 设计融合卷积层与可微决策森林的DNDF框架，通过随机决策树集成实现特征学习与分类优化。
AI.result: 在DCASE2019和ESC-50数据集上，DNDF分类准确率优于传统方法且达到SOTA水平。
AI.conclusion: DNDF通过结合卷积神经网络与可微决策森林，有效提升了声学场景分类性能，为该领域提供新思路。

authors_text: Miguel Zamora,Roi Poranne,Stelian Coros
title: Learning Solution Manifolds for Control Problems via Energy Minimization
title_zh: 通过能量最小化来学习控制问题的解决方案流形
comment: IEEE Robotics and Automation Letters (RA-L), 2022. Also in: Intelligent Robots and Systems (IROS)
comments: IEEE Robotics and Automation Letters (RA-L), 2022. Also in: Intelligent Robots and Systems (IROS)
abstract: A variety of control tasks such as inverse kinematics (IK), trajectory optimization (TO), and model predictive control (MPC) are commonly formulated as energy minimization problems. Numerical solutions to such problems are well-established. However, these are often too slow to be used directly in real-time applications. The alternative is to learn solution manifolds for control problems in an offline stage. Although this distillation process can be trivially formulated as a behavioral cloning (BC) problem in an imitation learning setting, our experiments highlight a number of significant shortcomings arising due to incompatible local minima, interpolation artifacts, and insufficient coverage of the state space. In this paper, we propose an alternative to BC that is efficient and numerically robust. We formulate the learning of solution manifolds as a minimization of the energy terms of a control objective integrated over the space of problems of interest. We minimize this energy integral with a novel method that combines Monte Carlo-inspired adaptive sampling strategies with the derivatives used to solve individual instances of the control task. We evaluate the performance of our formulation on a series of robotic control problems of increasing complexity, and we highlight its benefits through comparisons against traditional methods such as behavioral cloning and Dataset aggregation (Dagger).
summary: A variety of control tasks such as inverse kinematics (IK), trajectory optimization (TO), and model predictive control (MPC) are commonly formulated as energy minimization problems. Numerical solutions to such problems are well-established. However, these are often too slow to be used directly in real-time applications. The alternative is to learn solution manifolds for control problems in an offline stage. Although this distillation process can be trivially formulated as a behavioral cloning (BC) problem in an imitation learning setting, our experiments highlight a number of significant shortcomings arising due to incompatible local minima, interpolation artifacts, and insufficient coverage of the state space. In this paper, we propose an alternative to BC that is efficient and numerically robust. We formulate the learning of solution manifolds as a minimization of the energy terms of a control objective integrated over the space of problems of interest. We minimize this energy integral with a novel method that combines Monte Carlo-inspired adaptive sampling strategies with the derivatives used to solve individual instances of the control task. We evaluate the performance of our formulation on a series of robotic control problems of increasing complexity, and we highlight its benefits through comparisons against traditional methods such as behavioral cloning and Dataset aggregation (Dagger).
abstract_zh: 逆运动学 (IK)、轨迹优化 (TO) 和模型预测控制 (MPC) 等各种控制任务通常被表述为能量最小化问题。此类问题的数值解决方案已经成熟。然而，这些通常太慢而无法直接在实时应用程序中使用。另一种方法是在离线阶段学习控制问题的解流形。尽管这个蒸馏过程可以简单地表述为模仿学习环境中的行为克隆（BC）问题，但我们的实验强调了由于不兼容的局部最小值、插值伪影和状态空间覆盖不足而产生的许多重大缺陷。在本文中，我们提出了一种高效且数值稳健的 BC 替代方案。我们将解流形的学习公式化为在感兴趣的问题空间上集成的控制目标的能量项的最小化。我们使用一种新颖的方法来最小化这种能量积分，该方法将蒙特卡罗启发的自适应采样策略与用于解决控制任务的各个实例的导数相结合。我们评估了我们的公式在一系列复杂性不断增加的机器人控制问题上的性能，并通过与行为克隆和数据集聚合（Dagger）等传统方法进行比较来强调其优点。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种通过能量最小化学习控制问题解流形的新方法，以解决传统行为克隆方法的不足。
AI.motivation: 传统数值解法在实时控制中效率不足，而行为克隆等离线学习方法存在局部最小值不兼容、状态空间覆盖不足等问题。
AI.method: 将解流形学习转化为控制目标能量项在问题空间的积分最小化，结合蒙特卡洛自适应采样与控制任务导数进行优化。
AI.result: 在多个复杂机器人控制任务中，新方法在求解效率和数值稳定性上优于行为克隆和Dataset aggregation方法。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为控制问题提供了更高效稳健的离线学习解决方案，克服了传统方法的关键局限性。

authors_text: Jay Desai,Houwei Cao,Ravi Shah
title: Attention-based Region of Interest (ROI) Detection for Speech Emotion Recognition
title_zh: 用于语音情感识别的基于注意力的感兴趣区域 (ROI) 检测
abstract: Automatic emotion recognition for real-life appli-cations is a challenging task. Human emotion expressions aresubtle, and can be conveyed by a combination of several emo-tions. In most existing emotion recognition studies, each audioutterance/video clip is labelled/classified in its entirety. However,utterance/clip-level labelling and classification can be too coarseto capture the subtle intra-utterance/clip temporal dynamics. Forexample, an utterance/video clip usually contains only a fewemotion-salient regions and many emotionless regions. In thisstudy, we propose to use attention mechanism in deep recurrentneural networks to detection the Regions-of-Interest (ROI) thatare more emotionally salient in human emotional speech/video,and further estimate the temporal emotion dynamics by aggre-gating those emotionally salient regions-of-interest. We comparethe ROI from audio and video and analyse them. We comparethe performance of the proposed attention networks with thestate-of-the-art LSTM models on multi-class classification task ofrecognizing six basic human emotions, and the proposed attentionmodels exhibit significantly better performance. Furthermore, theattention weight distribution can be used to interpret how anutterance can be expressed as a mixture of possible emotions.
summary: Automatic emotion recognition for real-life appli-cations is a challenging task. Human emotion expressions aresubtle, and can be conveyed by a combination of several emo-tions. We comparethe performance of the proposed attention networks with thestate-of-the-art LSTM models on multi-class classification task ofrecognizing six basic human emotions, and the proposed attentionmodels exhibit significantly better performance. Furthermore, theattention weight distribution can be used to interpret how anutterance can be expressed as a mixture of possible emotions.
abstract_zh: 现实生活应用的自动情绪识别是一项具有挑战性的任务。人类的情感表达是微妙的，可以通过多种情感的组合来传达。在大多数现有的情绪识别研究中，每个音频/视频剪辑都被整体标记/分类。然而，话语/剪辑级别的标记和分类可能过于粗糙，无法捕获微妙的话语/剪辑内时间动态。例如，话语/视频剪辑通常仅包含一些情感显着区域和许多无情感区域。在本研究中，我们建议使用深度循环神经网络中的注意力机制来检测人类情感语音/视频中情感上更显着的感兴趣区域（ROI），并通过聚合这些情感上显着的感兴趣区域来进一步估计时间情感动态。我们比较音频和视频的投资回报率并进行分析。我们将所提出的注意力网络与最先进的 LSTM 模型在识别六种人类基本情感的多类分类任务上的性能进行了比较，并且所提出的注意力模型表现出明显更好的性能。此外，注意力权重分布可用于解释如何将话语表达为可能情绪的混合。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于注意力机制的感兴趣区域（ROI）检测方法，用于提升语音情感识别的准确性。
AI.motivation: 现有情感识别方法对整个语音片段进行统一标注，难以捕捉细微的时序动态变化，而实际情感表达常包含多个情感显著区域。
AI.method: 采用深度递归神经网络中的注意力机制，检测语音/视频中情感显著的ROI区域，并通过聚合这些区域估计情感时序动态，对比分析音频与视频ROI差异。
AI.result: 在六种基本情感分类任务中，所提注意力模型显著优于现有LSTM模型，且注意力权重分布可解释混合情感表达机制。
AI.conclusion: 注意力驱动的ROI检测方法能有效提升情感识别性能，并为复杂情感表达提供可解释性分析。

search_text: Attention-based Region of Interest (ROI) Detection for Speech Emotion Recognition 用于语音情感识别的基于注意力的感兴趣区域 (ROI) 检测 Automatic emotion recognition for real-life appli-cations is a challenging task. Human emotion expressions aresubtle, and can be conveyed by a combination of several emo-tions. In most existing emotion recognition studies, each audioutterance/video clip is labelled/classified in its entirety. However,utterance/clip-level labelling and classification can be too coarseto capture the subtle intra-utterance/clip temporal dynamics. Forexample, an utterance/video clip usually contains only a fewemotion-salient regions and many emotionless regions. In thisstudy, we propose to use attention mechanism in deep recurrentneural networks to detection the Regions-of-Interest (ROI) thatare more emotionally salient in human emotional speech/video,and further estimate the temporal emotion dynamics by aggre-gating those emotionally salient regions-of-interest. We comparethe ROI from audio and video and analyse them. We comparethe performance of the proposed attention networks with thestate-of-the-art LSTM models on multi-class classification task ofrecognizing six basic human emotions, and the proposed attentionmodels exhibit significantly better performance. Furthermore, theattention weight distribution can be used to interpret how anutterance can be expressed as a mixture of possible emotions. 现实生活应用的自动情绪识别是一项具有挑战性的任务。人类的情感表达是微妙的，可以通过多种情感的组合来传达。在大多数现有的情绪识别研究中，每个音频/视频剪辑都被整体标记/分类。然而，话语/剪辑级别的标记和分类可能过于粗糙，无法捕获微妙的话语/剪辑内时间动态。例如，话语/视频剪辑通常仅包含一些情感显着区域和许多无情感区域。在本研究中，我们建议使用深度循环神经网络中的注意力机制来检测人类情感语音/视频中情感上更显着的感兴趣区域（ROI），并通过聚合这些情感上显着的感兴趣区域来进一步估计时间情感动态。我们比较音频和视频的投资回报率并进行分析。我们将所提出的注意力网络与最先进的 LSTM 模型在识别六种人类基本情感的多类分类任务上的性能进行了比较，并且所提出的注意力模型表现出明显更好的性能。此外，注意力权重分布可用于解释如何将话语表达为可能情绪的混合。 本文提出基于注意力机制的感兴趣区域（ROI）检测方法，用于提升语音情感识别的准确性。 Jay Desai,Houwei Cao,Ravi Shah cs.SD,cs.LG,eess.AS

authors_text: Salma Salimi,Jorge Peña Queralta,Tomi Westerlund
title: Hyperledger Fabric Blockchain and ROS 2 Integration for Autonomous Mobile Robots
title_zh: 用于自主移动机器人的 Hyperledger Fabric 区块链和 ROS 2 集成
abstract: In industrial applications, security and trust in the system are requirements for widespread adoption. Blockchain technologies have emerged as a potential solution to address identity management and secure data aggregation and control. However, the vast majority of works to date utilize Ethereum and smart contracts that are not scalable or well suited for industrial applications. This paper presents what is, to the best of our knowledge, the first integration of ROS 2 with the Hyperledger Fabric blockchain. With a framework that leverages Fabric smart contracts and ROS 2 through a Go application, we delve into the potential of using blockchain for controlling robots, and gathering and processing their data. We demonstrate the applicability of the proposed framework to an inventory management use-case where different robots are used to detect objects of interest in a given area. Designed to meet the requirements of distributed robotic systems, we show that the performance of the robots is not impacted significantly by the blockchain layer. At the same time, we provide examples for developing other applications that integrate Fabric smart contracts with ROS 2. Our results pave the way for further adoption of blockchain technologies in autonomous robotic systems for building trustable data sharing.
summary: In industrial applications, security and trust in the system are requirements for widespread adoption. Blockchain technologies have emerged as a potential solution to address identity management and secure data aggregation and control. However, the vast majority of works to date utilize Ethereum and smart contracts that are not scalable or well suited for industrial applications. This paper presents what is, to the best of our knowledge, the first integration of ROS 2 with the Hyperledger Fabric blockchain. With a framework that leverages Fabric smart contracts and ROS 2 through a Go application, we delve into the potential of using blockchain for controlling robots, and gathering and processing their data. We demonstrate the applicability of the proposed framework to an inventory management use-case where different robots are used to detect objects of interest in a given area. Designed to meet the requirements of distributed robotic systems, we show that the performance of the robots is not impacted significantly by the blockchain layer. At the same time, we provide examples for developing other applications that integrate Fabric smart contracts with ROS 2. Our results pave the way for further adoption of blockchain technologies in autonomous robotic systems for building trustable data sharing.
abstract_zh: 在工业应用中，系统的安全性和信任是广泛采用的要求。区块链技术已成为解决身份管理和安全数据聚合和控制的潜在解决方案。然而，迄今为止，绝大多数工作都利用了以太坊和智能合约，这些合约不可扩展或不太适合工业应用。据我们所知，本文介绍了 ROS 2 与 Hyperledger Fabric 区块链的首次集成。借助通过 Go 应用程序利用 Fabric 智能合约和 ROS 2 的框架，我们深入研究了使用区块链控制机器人以及收集和处理其数据的潜力。我们展示了所提出的框架在库存管理用例中的适用性，其中使用不同的机器人来检测给定区域中感兴趣的对象。旨在满足分布式机器人系统的要求，我们证明机器人的性能不会受到区块链层的显着影响。同时，我们提供了开发将 Fabric 智能合约与 ROS 2 集成的其他应用程序的示例。我们的结果为在自主机器人系统中进一步采用区块链技术以构建可信的数据共享铺平了道路。

AI.tldr: 本文提出将Hyperledger Fabric区块链与ROS 2集成，用于自主移动机器人，以实现安全可信的数据共享与控制。
AI.motivation: 工业应用中需确保系统安全与信任，但现有区块链方案（如以太坊）因可扩展性不足难以满足工业需求，需探索更适合的区块链技术。
AI.method: 通过Go语言开发应用，将ROS 2与Hyperledger Fabric智能合约结合，构建分布式框架，实现机器人数据采集、处理及区块链控制功能。
AI.result: 框架在库存管理场景中验证有效，机器人性能未受区块链层显著影响，并展示了扩展至其他应用场景的潜力。
AI.conclusion: 该集成方案为自主机器人系统采用区块链技术提供了可行路径，推动了可信数据共享的发展。
