authors_text: Wenhua Zhang,Sen Yang,Meiwei Luo,Chuan He,Yuchen Li,Jun Zhang,Xiyue Wang,Fang Wang
title: Keep It Accurate and Robust: An Enhanced Nuclei Analysis Framework
title_zh: 保持准确和稳健：增强的原子核分析框架
abstract: Accurate segmentation and classification of nuclei in histology images is critical but challenging due to nuclei heterogeneity, staining variations, and tissue complexity. Existing methods often struggle with limited dataset variability, with patches extracted from similar whole slide images (WSI), making models prone to falling into local optima. Here we propose a new framework to address this limitation and enable robust nuclear analysis. Our method leverages dual-level ensemble modeling to overcome issues stemming from limited dataset variation. Intra-ensembling applies diverse transformations to individual samples, while inter-ensembling combines networks of different scales. We also introduce enhancements to the HoVer-Net architecture, including updated encoders, nested dense decoding and model regularization strategy. We achieve state-of-the-art results on public benchmarks, including 1st place for nuclear composition prediction and 3rd place for segmentation/classification in the 2022 Colon Nuclei Identification and Counting (CoNIC) Challenge. This success validates our approach for accurate histological nuclei analysis. Extensive experiments and ablation studies provide insights into optimal network design choices and training techniques. In conclusion, this work proposes an improved framework advancing the state-of-the-art in nuclei analysis. We release our code and models (https://github.com/WinnieLaugh/CONIC_Pathology_AI) to serve as a toolkit for the community.
summary: Accurate segmentation and classification of nuclei in histology images is critical but challenging due to nuclei heterogeneity, staining variations, and tissue complexity. Existing methods often struggle with limited dataset variability, with patches extracted from similar whole slide images (WSI), making models prone to falling into local optima. Here we propose a new framework to address this limitation and enable robust nuclear analysis. Our method leverages dual-level ensemble modeling to overcome issues stemming from limited dataset variation. Intra-ensembling applies diverse transformations to individual samples, while inter-ensembling combines networks of different scales. We also introduce enhancements to the HoVer-Net architecture, including updated encoders, nested dense decoding and model regularization strategy. We achieve state-of-the-art results on public benchmarks, including 1st place for nuclear composition prediction and 3rd place for segmentation/classification in the 2022 Colon Nuclei Identification and Counting (CoNIC) Challenge. This success validates our approach for accurate histological nuclei analysis. Extensive experiments and ablation studies provide insights into optimal network design choices and training techniques. In conclusion, this work proposes an improved framework advancing the state-of-the-art in nuclei analysis. We release our code and models (https://github.com/WinnieLaugh/CONIC_Pathology_AI) to serve as a toolkit for the community.
abstract_zh: 由于细胞核异质性、染色变化和组织复杂性，组织学图像中细胞核的准确分割和分类至关重要，但也具有挑战性。现有的方法经常与有限的数据集可变性作斗争，从相似的整个幻灯片图像（WSI）中提取补丁，使模型容易陷入局部最优。在这里，我们提出了一个新的框架来解决这一限制并实现稳健的核分析。我们的方法利用双层集成建模来克服有限数据集变化引起的问题。内部集成对单个样本应用不同的变换，而内部集成则结合了不同规模的网络。我们还介绍了 HoVer-Net 架构的增强功能，包括更新的编码器、嵌套密集解码和模型正则化策略。我们在公共基准上取得了最先进的结果，包括在 2022 年结肠核识别和计数 (CoNIC) 挑战赛中核成分预测第一名和分割/分类第三名。这一成功验证了我们准确组织学细胞核分析的方法。广泛的实验和消融研究提供了对最佳网络设计选择和训练技术的见解。总之，这项工作提出了一个改进的框架，推进了原子核分析的最先进水平。我们发布了我们的代码和模型 (https://github.com/WinnieLaugh/CONIC_Pathology_AI) 作为社区的工具包。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种改进的核分析框架，用于提高组织切片图像中细胞核的分割和分类准确性。
AI.motivation: 由于细胞核的异质性、染色变化和组织复杂性，现有方法在处理有限数据集变异性时表现不佳，容易陷入局部最优解。
AI.method: 该方法采用双级集成建模，包括样本内集成和样本间集成，同时改进了HoVer-Net架构，包括更新编码器、嵌套密集解码和模型正则化策略。
AI.result: 在公共基准测试中取得了最先进的结果，包括2022年CoNIC挑战赛中核成分预测第一名和分割/分类第三名。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的改进框架推动了细胞核分析的最先进水平，并发布了代码和模型以供社区使用。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出了一种改进的核分析框架，用于提高组织切片图像中细胞核的分割和分类准确性。
ai_content.motivation: 由于细胞核的异质性、染色变化和组织复杂性，现有方法在处理有限数据集变异性时表现不佳，容易陷入局部最优解。
ai_content.method: 该方法采用双级集成建模，包括样本内集成和样本间集成，同时改进了HoVer-Net架构，包括更新编码器、嵌套密集解码和模型正则化策略。
ai_content.result: 在公共基准测试中取得了最先进的结果，包括2022年CoNIC挑战赛中核成分预测第一名和分割/分类第三名。
ai_content.conclusion: 本文提出的改进框架推动了细胞核分析的最先进水平，并发布了代码和模型以供社区使用。

search_text: Keep It Accurate and Robust: An Enhanced Nuclei Analysis Framework 保持准确和稳健：增强的原子核分析框架 Accurate segmentation and classification of nuclei in histology images is critical but challenging due to nuclei heterogeneity, staining variations, and tissue complexity. Existing methods often struggle with limited dataset variability, with patches extracted from similar whole slide images (WSI), making models prone to falling into local optima. Here we propose a new framework to address this limitation and enable robust nuclear analysis. Our method leverages dual-level ensemble modeling to overcome issues stemming from limited dataset variation. Intra-ensembling applies diverse transformations to individual samples, while inter-ensembling combines networks of different scales. We also introduce enhancements to the HoVer-Net architecture, including updated encoders, nested dense decoding and model regularization strategy. We achieve state-of-the-art results on public benchmarks, including 1st place for nuclear composition prediction and 3rd place for segmentation/classification in the 2022 Colon Nuclei Identification and Counting (CoNIC) Challenge. This success validates our approach for accurate histological nuclei analysis. Extensive experiments and ablation studies provide insights into optimal network design choices and training techniques. In conclusion, this work proposes an improved framework advancing the state-of-the-art in nuclei analysis. We release our code and models (https://github.com/WinnieLaugh/CONIC_Pathology_AI) to serve as a toolkit for the community. 由于细胞核异质性、染色变化和组织复杂性，组织学图像中细胞核的准确分割和分类至关重要，但也具有挑战性。现有的方法经常与有限的数据集可变性作斗争，从相似的整个幻灯片图像（WSI）中提取补丁，使模型容易陷入局部最优。在这里，我们提出了一个新的框架来解决这一限制并实现稳健的核分析。我们的方法利用双层集成建模来克服有限数据集变化引起的问题。内部集成对单个样本应用不同的变换，而内部集成则结合了不同规模的网络。我们还介绍了 HoVer-Net 架构的增强功能，包括更新的编码器、嵌套密集解码和模型正则化策略。我们在公共基准上取得了最先进的结果，包括在 2022 年结肠核识别和计数 (CoNIC) 挑战赛中核成分预测第一名和分割/分类第三名。这一成功验证了我们准确组织学细胞核分析的方法。广泛的实验和消融研究提供了对最佳网络设计选择和训练技术的见解。总之，这项工作提出了一个改进的框架，推进了原子核分析的最先进水平。我们发布了我们的代码和模型 (https://github.com/WinnieLaugh/CONIC_Pathology_AI) 作为社区的工具包。 本文提出了一种改进的核分析框架，用于提高组织切片图像中细胞核的分割和分类准确性。 Wenhua Zhang,Sen Yang,Meiwei Luo,Chuan He,Yuchen Li,Jun Zhang,Xiyue Wang,Fang Wang eess.IV,cs.CV

authors_text: Eduardo Castelló Ferrer,Ivan Berman,Aleksandr Kapitonov,Vadim Manaenko,Makar Chernyaev,Pavel Tarasov
title: Gaka-chu: a self-employed autonomous robot artist
title_zh: Gaka-chu：一位个体经营的自主机器人艺术家
comment: Accepted for publication in 2023 IEEE International Conference on Robotics and Automation (ICRA)
comments: Accepted for publication in 2023 IEEE International Conference on Robotics and Automation (ICRA)
abstract: The physical autonomy of robots is well understood both theoretically and practically. By contrast, there is almost no research exploring their potential economic autonomy. In this paper, we present the first economically autonomous robot -- a robot able to produce marketable goods while having full control over the use of its generated income. Gaka-chu ("painter" in Japanese) is a 6-axis robot arm that creates paintings of Japanese characters from an autoselected keyword. By using a blockchain-based smart contract, Gaka-chu can autonomously list a painting it made for sale in an online auction. In this transaction, the robot interacts with the human bidders as a peer not as a tool. Using the blockchain-based smart contract, Gaka-chu can then use its income from selling paintings to replenish its resources by autonomously ordering materials from an online art shop. We built the Gaka-chu prototype with an Ethereum-based smart contract and ran a 6-month long experiment, during which the robot created and sold four paintings, simultaneously using its income to purchase supplies and repay initial investors. In this work, we present the results of the experiments conducted and discuss the implications of economically autonomous robots.
summary: The physical autonomy of robots is well understood both theoretically and practically. By contrast, there is almost no research exploring their potential economic autonomy. In this paper, we present the first economically autonomous robot -- a robot able to produce marketable goods while having full control over the use of its generated income. Gaka-chu ("painter" in Japanese) is a 6-axis robot arm that creates paintings of Japanese characters from an autoselected keyword. By using a blockchain-based smart contract, Gaka-chu can autonomously list a painting it made for sale in an online auction. In this transaction, the robot interacts with the human bidders as a peer not as a tool. Using the blockchain-based smart contract, Gaka-chu can then use its income from selling paintings to replenish its resources by autonomously ordering materials from an online art shop. We built the Gaka-chu prototype with an Ethereum-based smart contract and ran a 6-month long experiment, during which the robot created and sold four paintings, simultaneously using its income to purchase supplies and repay initial investors. In this work, we present the results of the experiments conducted and discuss the implications of economically autonomous robots.
abstract_zh: 机器人的物理自主性在理论上和实践上都得到了很好的理解。相比之下，几乎没有研究探索他们潜在的经济自主权。在本文中，我们提出了第一个经济自主机器人——一种能够生产适销对路的商品，同时完全控制其所产生收入的使用的机器人。 Gaka-chu（日语中的“画家”）是一个 6 轴机器人手臂，可以根据自动选择的关键字创建日语字符的绘画。通过使用基于区块链的智能合约，Gaka-chu 可以自主列出其制作的画作并在在线拍卖中出售。在这笔交易中，机器人作为同伴而不是工具与人类投标人进行交互。使用基于区块链的智能合约，Gaka-chu 可以通过从在线艺术商店自主订购材料，利用销售绘画的收入来补充其资源。我们使用基于以太坊的智能合约构建了 Gaka-chu 原型，并进行了为期 6 个月的实验，在此期间机器人创作并出售了四幅画作，同时使用其收入购买用品并偿还初始投资者。在这项工作中，我们展示了实验结果并讨论了经济自主机器人的影响。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Gaka-chu的经济自主机器人艺术家，能够自主创作并销售作品，同时通过区块链智能合约管理收入。
AI.motivation: 现有研究主要关注机器人的物理自主性，而对其经济自主性缺乏探索，本文旨在填补这一研究空白。
AI.method: 基于6轴机械臂和区块链智能合约，Gaka-chu自主生成汉字绘画并在线拍卖，用销售收入购买材料及偿还投资者。
AI.result: 六个月内完成四幅画作销售，实现收入循环用于资源补充和投资者回报。
AI.conclusion: 经济自主机器人可能引发对劳动价值、艺术创作权及经济结构的新思考。

authors_text: Valentina Musat,Daniele De Martini,Matthew Gadd,Paul Newman
title: Depth-SIMS: Semi-Parametric Image and Depth Synthesis
title_zh: Depth-SIMS：半参数图像和深度合成
abstract: In this paper we present a compositing image synthesis method that generates RGB canvases with well aligned segmentation maps and sparse depth maps, coupled with an in-painting network that transforms the RGB canvases into high quality RGB images and the sparse depth maps into pixel-wise dense depth maps. We benchmark our method in terms of structural alignment and image quality, showing an increase in mIoU over SOTA by 3.7 percentage points and a highly competitive FID. Furthermore, we analyse the quality of the generated data as training data for semantic segmentation and depth completion, and show that our approach is more suited for this purpose than other methods.
summary: In this paper we present a compositing image synthesis method that generates RGB canvases with well aligned segmentation maps and sparse depth maps, coupled with an in-painting network that transforms the RGB canvases into high quality RGB images and the sparse depth maps into pixel-wise dense depth maps. We benchmark our method in terms of structural alignment and image quality, showing an increase in mIoU over SOTA by 3.7 percentage points and a highly competitive FID. Furthermore, we analyse the quality of the generated data as training data for semantic segmentation and depth completion, and show that our approach is more suited for this purpose than other methods.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了一种合成图像合成方法，该方法生成具有对齐良好的分割图和稀疏深度图的 RGB 画布，再加上绘画网络，将 RGB 画布转换为高质量 RGB 图像，并将稀疏深度图转换为像素级密集深度图。我们在结构对齐和图像质量方面对我们的方法进行了基准测试，结果显示 mIoU 比 SOTA 提高了 3.7 个百分点，并且 FID 具有高度竞争力。此外，我们分析了生成的数据作为语义分割和深度完成的训练数据的质量，并表明我们的方法比其他方法更适合此目的。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种半参数化图像和深度合成方法Depth-SIMS，通过组合图像合成与修复网络生成高质量RGB图像及像素级密集深度图。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在生成图像与深度图时存在结构对齐不足、数据质量欠佳的问题，影响语义分割和深度补全任务的训练效果。
AI.method: 采用分层复合策略，先生成带对齐分割图和稀疏深度图的RGB画布，再通过修复网络将稀疏深度图转换为密集深度图，并优化RGB图像质量。
AI.result: 在结构对齐和图像质量指标上超越SOTA方法3.7个百分点，FID指标具有竞争力，生成数据用于训练时显著提升分割和深度补全性能。
AI.conclusion: Depth-SIMS生成的数据在语义分割和深度补全任务中表现更优，为合成数据生成提供了更有效的解决方案。

authors_text: Junyi Ma,Jun Zhang,Jintao Xu,Rui Ai,Weihao Gu,Xieyuanli Chen
title: OverlapTransformer: An Efficient and Rotation-Invariant Transformer Network for LiDAR-Based Place Recognition
title_zh: OverlapTransformer：用于基于 LiDAR 的位置识别的高效且旋转不变的变压器网络
abstract: Place recognition is an important capability for autonomously navigating vehicles operating in complex environments and under changing conditions. It is a key component for tasks such as loop closing in SLAM or global localization. In this paper, we address the problem of place recognition based on 3D LiDAR scans recorded by an autonomous vehicle. We propose a novel lightweight neural network exploiting the range image representation of LiDAR sensors to achieve fast execution with less than 2 ms per frame. We design a yaw-angle-invariant architecture exploiting a transformer network, which boosts the place recognition performance of our method. We evaluate our approach on the KITTI and Ford Campus datasets. The experimental results show that our method can effectively detect loop closures compared to the state-of-the-art methods and generalizes well across different environments. To evaluate long-term place recognition performance, we provide a novel dataset containing LiDAR sequences recorded by a mobile robot in repetitive places at different times. The implementation of our method and dataset are released here: https://github.com/haomo-ai/OverlapTransformer

It is a key component for tasks such as loop closing in SLAM or global localization. In this paper, we address the problem of place recognition based on 3D LiDAR scans recorded by an autonomous vehicle. We propose a novel lightweight neural network exploiting the range image representation of LiDAR sensors to achieve fast execution with less than 2 ms per frame. We design a yaw-angle-invariant architecture exploiting a transformer network, which boosts the place recognition performance of our method. We evaluate our approach on the KITTI and Ford Campus datasets. The experimental results show that our method can effectively detect loop closures compared to the state-of-the-art methods and generalizes well across different environments. To evaluate long-term place recognition performance, we provide a novel dataset containing LiDAR sequences recorded by a mobile robot in repetitive places at different times. The implementation of our method and dataset are released here: https://github.com/haomo-ai/OverlapTransformer
abstract_zh: 地点识别是在复杂环境和变化条件下运行的自动导航车辆的一项重要能力。它是 SLAM 中的闭环或全局定位等任务的关键组件。在本文中，我们解决了基于自动驾驶车辆记录的 3D LiDAR 扫描的地点识别问题。我们提出了一种新颖的轻量级神经网络，利用 LiDAR 传感器的距离图像表示来实现每帧不到 2 毫秒的快速执行。我们设计了一种利用变压器网络的偏航角不变架构，这提高了我们方法的位置识别性能。我们在 KITTI 和 Ford Campus 数据集上评估了我们的方法。实验结果表明，与最先进的方法相比，我们的方法可以有效地检测闭环，并且可以在不同环境中很好地推广。为了评估长期位置识别性能，我们提供了一个新颖的数据集，其中包含移动机器人在不同时间在重复位置记录的 LiDAR 序列。我们的方法和数据集的实现在这里发布：https://github.com/haomo-ai/OverlapTransformer

AI.tldr: 本文提出OverlapTransformer，一种基于LiDAR的高效且旋转不变的Transformer网络，用于自动驾驶中的地点识别。
AI.motivation: 地点识别对自动驾驶车辆在复杂环境中的导航至关重要，但现有方法在效率和旋转不变性方面存在不足，需改进以适应实际应用需求。
AI.method: 设计轻量级神经网络，利用LiDAR的范围图像表示，并通过Transformer架构实现yaw角不变性，提升识别性能。
AI.result: 在KITTI和Ford Campus数据集上实验表明，方法在闭环检测和跨环境泛化能力优于现有技术，并提供新数据集评估长期性能。
AI.conclusion: OverlapTransformer在效率与鲁棒性上表现优异，适用于实时自动驾驶场景，代码和数据集已开源。

authors_text: Minshan Xie,Menghan Xia,Xueting Liu,Tien-Tsin Wong
title: Screentone-Preserved Manga Retargeting
title_zh: 保留屏幕色调的漫画重定向
abstract: As a popular comic style, manga offers a unique impression by utilizing a rich set of bitonal patterns, or screentones, for illustration. However, screentones can easily be contaminated with visual-unpleasant aliasing and/or blurriness after resampling, which harms its visualization on displays of diverse resolutions. To address this problem, we propose the first manga retargeting method that synthesizes a rescaled manga image while retaining the screentone in each screened region. This is a non-trivial task as accurate region-wise segmentation remains challenging. Fortunately, the rescaled manga shares the same region-wise screentone correspondences with the original manga, which enables us to simplify the screentone synthesis problem as an anchor-based proposals selection and rearrangement problem. Specifically, we design a novel manga sampling strategy to generate aliasing-free screentone proposals, based on hierarchical grid-based anchors that connect the correspondences between the original and the target rescaled manga. Furthermore, a Recurrent Proposal Selection Module (RPSM) is proposed to adaptively integrate these proposals for target screentone synthesis. Besides, to deal with the translation insensitivity nature of screentones, we propose a translation-invariant screentone loss to facilitate the training convergence. Extensive qualitative and quantitative experiments are conducted to verify the effectiveness of our method, and notably compelling results are achieved compared to existing alternative techniques.
summary: As a popular comic style, manga offers a unique impression by utilizing a rich set of bitonal patterns, or screentones, for illustration. However, screentones can easily be contaminated with visual-unpleasant aliasing and/or blurriness after resampling, which harms its visualization on displays of diverse resolutions. To address this problem, we propose the first manga retargeting method that synthesizes a rescaled manga image while retaining the screentone in each screened region. This is a non-trivial task as accurate region-wise segmentation remains challenging. Fortunately, the rescaled manga shares the same region-wise screentone correspondences with the original manga, which enables us to simplify the screentone synthesis problem as an anchor-based proposals selection and rearrangement problem. Specifically, we design a novel manga sampling strategy to generate aliasing-free screentone proposals, based on hierarchical grid-based anchors that connect the correspondences between the original and the target rescaled manga. Furthermore, a Recurrent Proposal Selection Module (RPSM) is proposed to adaptively integrate these proposals for target screentone synthesis. Besides, to deal with the translation insensitivity nature of screentones, we propose a translation-invariant screentone loss to facilitate the training convergence. Extensive qualitative and quantitative experiments are conducted to verify the effectiveness of our method, and notably compelling results are achieved compared to existing alternative techniques.
abstract_zh: 作为一种流行的漫画风格，漫画通过利用一组丰富的双色调图案或屏幕色调进行插图来提供独特的印象。然而，重新采样后，屏幕色调很容易受到视觉上不愉快的锯齿和/或模糊的污染，这会损害其在不同分辨率显示器上的可视化。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了第一个漫画重定向方法，该方法合成重新缩放的漫画图像，同时保留每个屏幕区域中的屏幕色调。这是一项不平凡的任务，因为准确的区域分割仍然具有挑战性。幸运的是，重新缩放的漫画与原始漫画共享相同的区域屏幕色调对应关系，这使我们能够将屏幕色调合成问题简化为基于锚的提案选择和重新排列问题。具体来说，我们设计了一种新颖的漫画采样策略，基于连接原始漫画和目标重新缩放漫画之间的对应关系的分层网格锚点来生成无锯齿的屏幕色调建议。此外，提出了循环提案选择模块（RPSM）来自适应地集成这些提案以进行目标屏幕色调合成。此外，为了解决屏幕色调的平移不敏感性质，我们提出了平移不变的屏幕色调损失以促进训练收敛。进行了广泛的定性和定量实验来验证我们的方法的有效性，与现有的替代技术相比，取得了引人注目的结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种在漫画重缩放过程中保留网点图案的方法，解决因分辨率差异导致的网点失真问题。
AI.motivation: 漫画中的网点图案在缩放后易出现锯齿或模糊，影响显示效果，现有方法难以有效保持网点特征。
AI.method: 基于分层网格锚点建立原图与目标图的区域对应关系，设计递归提案选择模块（RPSM）进行网点合成，并引入平移不变损失函数优化训练。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法在视觉效果和量化指标上均优于现有技术，成功保留了缩放后漫画的网点特征。
AI.conclusion: 通过锚点对应与递归优化机制，实现了高质量的漫画重缩放，有效解决了网点图案失真问题。

Furthermore, a Recurrent Proposal Selection Module (RPSM) is proposed to adaptively integrate these proposals for target screentone synthesis. Besides, to deal with the translation insensitivity nature of screentones, we propose a translation-invariant screentone loss to facilitate the training convergence. authors_text: Qingfeng Yao,Jilong Wan,Shuyu Yang,Cong Wang,Linghan Meng,Qifeng Zhang,Donglin Wang
title: A Transferable Legged Mobile Manipulation Framework Based on Disturbance Predictive Control
title_zh: 基于扰动预测控制的可转移腿移动操纵框架
abstract: Due to their ability to adapt to different terrains, quadruped robots have drawn much attention in the research field of robot learning. Legged mobile manipulation, where a quadruped robot is equipped with a robotic arm, can greatly enhance the performance of the robot in diverse manipulation tasks. Several prior works have investigated legged mobile manipulation from the viewpoint of control theory. However, modeling a unified structure for various robotic arms and quadruped robots is a challenging task. In this paper, we propose a unified framework disturbance predictive control where a reinforcement learning scheme with a latent dynamic adapter is embedded into our proposed low-level controller. Our method can adapt well to various types of robotic arms with a few random motion samples and the experimental results demonstrate the effectiveness of our method.
summary: Due to their ability to adapt to different terrains, quadruped robots have drawn much attention in the research field of robot learning. Legged mobile manipulation, where a quadruped robot is equipped with a robotic arm, can greatly enhance the performance of the robot in diverse manipulation tasks. Several prior works have investigated legged mobile manipulation from the viewpoint of control theory. However, modeling a unified structure for various robotic arms and quadruped robots is a challenging task. In this paper, we propose a unified framework disturbance predictive control where a reinforcement learning scheme with a latent dynamic adapter is embedded into our proposed low-level controller. Our method can adapt well to various types of robotic arms with a few random motion samples and the experimental results demonstrate the effectiveness of our method.
abstract_zh: 由于四足机器人具有适应不同地形的能力，在机器人学习研究领域备受关注。腿式移动操纵，即四足机器人配备机械臂，可以大大提高机器人在各种操纵任务中的性能。先前的几项工作已经从控制理论的角度研究了腿式移动操纵。然而，为各种机械臂和四足机器人建立统一的结构是一项具有挑战性的任务。在本文中，我们提出了一种统一的扰动预测控制框架，其中将具有潜在动态适配器的强化学习方案嵌入到我们提出的低级控制器中。我们的方法可以很好地适应各种类型的机械臂，具有少量的随机运动样本，实验结果证明了我们方法的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于扰动预测控制的可迁移足式移动机械臂框架，通过强化学习与动态适配器实现对多种机械臂和四足机器人的统一控制。
AI.motivation: 现有控制方法难以统一建模不同机械臂与四足机器人结构，亟需一种可迁移框架提升系统适应性与操作性能。
AI.method: 设计嵌入潜在动态适配器的强化学习方案，结合扰动预测控制构建低级控制器，利用少量随机运动样本实现跨机械臂的快速适配。
AI.result: 实验验证了该框架对多种机械臂类型的适应能力，证明其在复杂地形操作任务中的有效性与鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 提出的统一控制框架有效解决了异构机械臂与四足机器人的控制难题，为足式移动机械臂的通用化应用提供了新思路。

search_text: A Transferable Legged Mobile Manipulation Framework Based on Disturbance Predictive Control 基于扰动预测控制的可转移腿移动操纵框架 Due to their ability to adapt to different terrains, quadruped robots have drawn much attention in the research field of robot learning. Legged mobile manipulation, where a quadruped robot is equipped with a robotic arm, can greatly enhance the performance of the robot in diverse manipulation tasks. Several prior works have investigated legged mobile manipulation from the viewpoint of control theory. However, modeling a unified structure for various robotic arms and quadruped robots is a challenging task. In this paper, we propose a unified framework disturbance predictive control where a reinforcement learning scheme with a latent dynamic adapter is embedded into our proposed low-level controller. Our method can adapt well to various types of robotic arms with a few random motion samples and the experimental results demonstrate the effectiveness of our method. 由于四足机器人具有适应不同地形的能力，在机器人学习研究领域备受关注。腿式移动操纵，即四足机器人配备机械臂，可以大大提高机器人在各种操纵任务中的性能。先前的几项工作已经从控制理论的角度研究了腿式移动操纵。然而，为各种机械臂和四足机器人建立统一的结构是一项具有挑战性的任务。在本文中，我们提出了一种统一的扰动预测控制框架，其中将具有潜在动态适配器的强化学习方案嵌入到我们提出的低级控制器中。我们的方法可以很好地适应各种类型的机械臂，具有少量的随机运动样本，实验结果证明了我们方法的有效性。 本文提出一种基于扰动预测控制的可迁移足式移动机械臂框架，通过强化学习与动态适配器实现对多种机械臂和四足机器人的统一控制。 Qingfeng Yao,Jilong Wan,Shuyu Yang,Cong Wang,Linghan Meng,Qifeng Zhang,Donglin Wang cs.RO,cs.LG

authors_text: Ludvig Ericson,Patric Jensfelt
title: FloorGenT: Generative Vector Graphic Model of Floor Plans for Robotics
title_zh: FloorGenT：机器人平面图的生成矢量图形模型
abstract: Floor plans are the basis of reasoning in and communicating about indoor environments. In this paper, we show that by modelling floor plans as sequences of line segments seen from a particular point of view, recent advances in autoregressive sequence modelling can be leveraged to model and predict floor plans. The line segments are canonicalized and translated to sequence of tokens and an attention-based neural network is used to fit a one-step distribution over next tokens. We fit the network to sequences derived from a set of large-scale floor plans, and demonstrate the capabilities of the model in four scenarios: novel floor plan generation, completion of partially observed floor plans, generation of floor plans from simulated sensor data, and finally, the applicability of a floor plan model in predicting the shortest distance with partial knowledge of the environment.
summary: Floor plans are the basis of reasoning in and communicating about indoor environments. In this paper, we show that by modelling floor plans as sequences of line segments seen from a particular point of view, recent advances in autoregressive sequence modelling can be leveraged to model and predict floor plans. The line segments are canonicalized and translated to sequence of tokens and an attention-based neural network is used to fit a one-step distribution over next tokens. We fit the network to sequences derived from a set of large-scale floor plans, and demonstrate the capabilities of the model in four scenarios: novel floor plan generation, completion of partially observed floor plans, generation of floor plans from simulated sensor data, and finally, the applicability of a floor plan model in predicting the shortest distance with partial knowledge of the environment.
abstract_zh: 平面图是推理和交流室内环境的基础。在本文中，我们表明，通过将平面图建模为从特定角度看到的线段序列，可以利用自回归序列建模的最新进展来建模和预测平面图。线段被规范化并转换为标记序列，并且使用基于注意力的神经网络来拟合下一个标记的一步分布。我们将网络拟合到源自一组大型平面图的序列，并在四种场景中展示了该模型的功能：新颖的平面图生​​成、部分观察到的平面图的完成、根据模拟传感器数据生成平面图，以及平面图模型在部分环境知识的情况下预测最短距离的适用性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出FloorGenT模型，通过序列建模生成矢量图形楼层平面图以支持机器人应用。
AI.motivation: 现有方法难以有效生成或预测结构化楼层平面图，而机器人需要精确环境表征来导航与规划。
AI.method: 将楼层线段标准化为标记序列，采用注意力机制神经网络建模序列分布，基于大规模平面图数据训练模型。
AI.result: 模型可生成新平面图、补全部分观测平面图、从传感器数据生成平面图，并辅助环境距离预测。
AI.conclusion: 该模型验证了序列生成方法在结构化空间建模中的有效性，为机器人环境理解提供新工具。

authors_text: Tongkun Guan,Chaochen Gu,Jingzheng Tu,Xue Yang,Qi Feng,Yudi Zhao,Xiaokang Yang,Wei Shen
title: Self-supervised Implicit Glyph Attention for Text Recognition
title_zh: 用于文本识别的自监督隐式字形注意力
abstract: The attention mechanism has become the \emph{de facto} module in scene text recognition (STR) methods, due to its capability of extracting character-level representations. These methods can be summarized into implicit attention based and supervised attention based, depended on how the attention is computed, i.e., implicit attention and supervised attention are learned from sequence-level text annotations and or character-level bounding box annotations, respectively. Implicit attention, as it may extract coarse or even incorrect spatial regions as character attention, is prone to suffering from an alignment-drifted issue. Supervised attention can alleviate the above issue, but it is character category-specific, which requires extra laborious character-level bounding box annotations and would be memory-intensive when handling languages with larger character categories. To address the aforementioned issues, we propose a novel attention mechanism for STR, self-supervised implicit glyph attention (SIGA). SIGA delineates the glyph structures of text images by jointly self-supervised text segmentation and implicit attention alignment, which serve as the supervision to improve attention correctness without extra character-level annotations. Experimental results demonstrate that SIGA performs consistently and significantly better than previous attention-based STR methods, in terms of both attention correctness and final recognition performance on publicly available context benchmarks and our contributed contextless benchmarks.
summary: The attention mechanism has become the \emph{de facto} module in scene text recognition (STR) methods, due to its capability of extracting character-level representations. These methods can be summarized into implicit attention based and supervised attention based, depended on how the attention is computed, i.e., implicit attention and supervised attention are learned from sequence-level text annotations and or character-level bounding box annotations, respectively. Implicit attention, as it may extract coarse or even incorrect spatial regions as character attention, is prone to suffering from an alignment-drifted issue. Supervised attention can alleviate the above issue, but it is character category-specific, which requires extra laborious character-level bounding box annotations and would be memory-intensive when handling languages with larger character categories. To address the aforementioned issues, we propose a novel attention mechanism for STR, self-supervised implicit glyph attention (SIGA). SIGA delineates the glyph structures of text images by jointly self-supervised text segmentation and implicit attention alignment, which serve as the supervision to improve attention correctness without extra character-level annotations. Experimental results demonstrate that SIGA performs consistently and significantly better than previous attention-based STR methods, in terms of both attention correctness and final recognition performance on publicly available context benchmarks and our contributed contextless benchmarks.
abstract_zh: 由于其提取字符级表示的能力，注意力机制已成为场景文本识别（STR）方法中的\emph{事实上}模块。这些方法可以概括为基于隐式注意力和基于监督注意力，具体取决于注意力的计算方式，即隐式注意力和监督注意力分别从序列级文本注释和/或字符级边界框注释中学习。隐式注意力，因为它可能会提取粗略甚至不正确的空间区域作为角色注意力，因此很容易遭受对齐漂移问题。监督注意力可以缓解上述问题，但它是特定于字符类别的，需要额外费力的字符级边界框注释，并且在处理具有较大字符类别的语言时会占用大量内存。为了解决上述问题，我们提出了一种新的 STR 注意力机制，即自监督隐式字形注意力（SIGA）。 SIGA通过联合自监督文本分割和隐式注意力对齐来描绘文本图像的字形结构，作为监督来提高注意力的正确性，而无需额外的字符级注​​释。实验结果表明，在公开可用的上下文基准和我们贡献的无上下文基准上，SIGA 在注意力正确性和最终识别性能方面始终比以前基于注意力的 STR 方法表现得更好。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种自监督隐式字形注意机制（SIGA），用于改进场景文本识别中的注意力对齐问题，无需依赖字符级标注。
AI.motivation: 现有隐式注意力易出现对齐漂移，而监督注意力需依赖劳动密集型的字符级标注且内存消耗大，亟需一种无需额外标注的注意力优化方法。
AI.method: 通过联合自监督文本分割与隐式注意力对齐，利用字形结构信息作为监督信号，提升注意力正确性，避免字符级标注需求。
AI.result: 在公开基准和作者贡献的无上下文基准测试中，SIGA在注意力正确性及最终识别性能上均显著优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: SIGA有效解决了注意力对齐问题，同时降低了标注依赖，为大规模字符集文本识别提供了高效解决方案。

To address the aforementioned issues, we propose a novel attention mechanism for STR, self-supervised implicit glyph attention (SIGA). SIGA delineates the glyph structures of text images by jointly self-supervised text segmentation and implicit attention alignment, which serve as the supervision to improve attention correctness without extra character-level annotations. Experimental results demonstrate that SIGA performs consistently and significantly better than previous attention-based STR methods, in terms of both attention correctness and final recognition performance on publicly available context benchmarks and our contributed contextless benchmarks. 由于其提取字符级表示的能力，注意力机制已成为场景文本识别（STR）方法中的\emph{事实上}模块。这些方法可以概括为基于隐式注意力和基于监督注意力，具体取决于注意力的计算方式，即隐式注意力和监督注意力分别从序列级文本注释和/或字符级边界框注释中学习。隐式注意力，因为它可能会提取粗略甚至不正确的空间区域作为角色注意力，因此很容易遭受对齐漂移问题。监督注意力可以缓解上述问题，但它是特定于字符类别的，需要额外费力的字符级边界框注释，并且在处理具有较大字符类别的语言时会占用大量内存。为了解决上述问题，我们提出了一种新的 STR 注意力机制，即自监督隐式字形注意力（SIGA）。 SIGA通过联合自监督文本分割和隐式注意力对齐来描绘文本图像的字形结构，作为监督来提高注意力的正确性，而无需额外的字符级注​​释。实验结果表明，在公开可用的上下文基准和我们贡献的无上下文基准上，SIGA 在注意力正确性和最终识别性能方面始终比以前基于注意力的 STR 方法表现得更好。 本文提出了一种自监督隐式字形注意机制（SIGA），用于改进场景文本识别中的注意力对齐问题，无需依赖字符级标注。 Tongkun Guan,Chaochen Gu,Jingzheng Tu,Xue Yang,Qi Feng,Yudi Zhao,Xiaokang Yang,Wei Shen cs.CV

authors_text: Zhanhao Hu,Tao Wang,Xiaolin Hu
title: An STDP-Based Supervised Learning Algorithm for Spiking Neural Networks
title_zh: 基于 STDP 的尖峰神经网络监督学习算法
comment: ef:In International Conference on Neural Information Processing 2017 Nov 14 (pp. 92-100). Springer, Cham
comments: ef:In International Conference on Neural Information Processing 2017 Nov 14 (pp. 92-100). Springer, Cham
abstract: Compared with rate-based artificial neural networks, Spiking Neural Networks (SNN) provide a more biological plausible model for the brain. But how they perform supervised learning remains elusive. Inspired by recent works of Bengio et al., we propose a supervised learning algorithm based on Spike-Timing Dependent Plasticity (STDP) for a hierarchical SNN consisting of Leaky Integrate-and-fire (LIF) neurons. A time window is designed for the presynaptic neuron and only the spikes in this window take part in the STDP updating process. The model is trained on the MNIST dataset. The classification accuracy approach that of a Multilayer Perceptron (MLP) with similar architecture trained by the standard back-propagation algorithm.
summary: Compared with rate-based artificial neural networks, Spiking Neural Networks (SNN) provide a more biological plausible model for the brain. But how they perform supervised learning remains elusive. Inspired by recent works of Bengio et al., we propose a supervised learning algorithm based on Spike-Timing Dependent Plasticity (STDP) for a hierarchical SNN consisting of Leaky Integrate-and-fire (LIF) neurons. A time window is designed for the presynaptic neuron and only the spikes in this window take part in the STDP updating process. The model is trained on the MNIST dataset. The classification accuracy approach that of a Multilayer Perceptron (MLP) with similar architecture trained by the standard back-propagation algorithm.
abstract_zh: 与基于速率的人工神经网络相比，尖峰神经网络（SNN）为大脑提供了更符合生物学的模型。但他们如何进行监督学习仍然难以捉摸。受 Bengio 等人最近工作的启发，我们提出了一种基于尖峰时序相关可塑性 (STDP) 的监督学习算法，用于由泄漏积分激发 (LIF) 神经元组成的分层 SNN。为突触前神经元设计了一个时间窗口，并且只有该窗口中的尖峰参与 STDP 更新过程。该模型在 MNIST 数据集上进行训练。分类精度接近具有类似架构并通过标准反向传播算法训练的多层感知器 (MLP)。

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于STDP的监督学习算法，用于分层脉冲神经网络（SNN），以解决其监督学习的挑战。
AI.motivation: 尽管SNN更符合生物特性，但其监督学习机制尚不明确，需探索有效算法以提升其性能。
AI.method: 设计时间窗口限制突触前神经元的脉冲参与STDP更新，结合LIF神经元构建分层SNN，并在MNIST上训练。
AI.result: 模型在MNIST数据集上的分类准确率接近使用标准反向传播训练的类似结构MLP。
AI.conclusion: STDP监督学习算法在SNN中有效，展示了其在图像分类任务中的潜力，为生物合理模型提供了新方法。

authors_text: Yifan Chen,Yang Zhao,Xuelong Li
title: Spatio-temporal Gait Feature with Global Distance Alignment
title_zh: 具有全局距离对齐的时空步态特征
abstract: Gait recognition is an important recognition technology, because gait is not easy to camouflage and does not need cooperation to recognize subjects. However, many existing methods are inadequate in preserving both temporal information and fine-grained information, thus reducing its discrimination. This problem is more serious when the subjects with similar walking postures are identified. In this paper, we try to enhance the discrimination of spatio-temporal gait features from two aspects: effective extraction of spatio-temporal gait features and reasonable refinement of extracted features. Thus our method is proposed, it consists of Spatio-temporal Feature Extraction (SFE) and Global Distance Alignment (GDA). SFE uses Temporal Feature Fusion (TFF) and Fine-grained Feature Extraction (FFE) to effectively extract the spatio-temporal features from raw silhouettes. GDA uses a large number of unlabeled gait data in real life as a benchmark to refine the extracted spatio-temporal features. GDA can make the extracted features have low inter-class similarity and high intra-class similarity, thus enhancing their discrimination. Extensive experiments on mini-OUMVLP and CASIA-B have proved that we have a better result than some state-of-the-art methods.
summary: Gait recognition is an important recognition technology, because gait is not easy to camouflage and does not need cooperation to recognize subjects. However, many existing methods are inadequate in preserving both temporal information and fine-grained information, thus reducing its discrimination. This problem is more serious when the subjects with similar walking postures are identified. In this paper, we try to enhance the discrimination of spatio-temporal gait features from two aspects: effective extraction of spatio-temporal gait features and reasonable refinement of extracted features. Thus our method is proposed, it consists of Spatio-temporal Feature Extraction (SFE) and Global Distance Alignment (GDA). SFE uses Temporal Feature Fusion (TFF) and Fine-grained Feature Extraction (FFE) to effectively extract the spatio-temporal features from raw silhouettes. GDA uses a large number of unlabeled gait data in real life as a benchmark to refine the extracted spatio-temporal features. GDA can make the extracted features have low inter-class similarity and high intra-class similarity, thus enhancing their discrimination. Extensive experiments on mini-OUMVLP and CASIA-B have proved that we have a better result than some state-of-the-art methods.
abstract_zh: 步态识别是一项重要的识别技术，因为步态不易伪装，也不需要合作来识别主体。然而，许多现有方法不足以同时保留时间信息和细粒度信息，从而降低了其区分度。当识别出具有相似步行姿势的受试者时，这个问题更加严重。本文尝试从时空步态特征的有效提取和提取特征的合理细化两个方面来增强时空步态特征的判别能力。因此我们的方法被提出，它由时空特征提取（SFE）和全局距离对齐（GDA）组成。 SFE 使用时间特征融合（TFF）和细粒度特征提取（FFE）来有效地从原始轮廓中提取时空特征。 GDA使用现实生活中大量未标记的步态数据作为基准来细化提取的时空特征。 GDA可以使提取的特征具有较低的类间相似度和较高的类内相似度，从而增强其区分度。在 mini-OUMVLP 和 CASIA-B 上进行的大量实验证明，我们的结果比一些最先进的方法更好。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合时空特征提取与全局距离对齐的方法，以提升步态识别的判别能力。
AI.motivation: 现有步态识别方法在保留时序信息和细粒度信息方面存在不足，导致相似步态姿态的识别效果不佳。
AI.method: 方法包含两部分：时空特征提取（SFE）与全局距离对齐（GDA）。SFE通过时序特征融合（TFF）和细粒度特征提取（FFE）从轮廓中提取时空特征，GDA利用大量未标记步态数据优化特征，降低类间相似度并提升类内相似度。
AI.result: 在mini-OUMVLP和CASIA-B数据集上的实验表明，该方法优于部分先进算法。
AI.conclusion: 通过有效提取与优化时空特征，本文方法显著提升了步态识别的判别性与实用性。

authors_text: Fares J. Abu-Dakka,Matteo Saveriano,Ville Kyrki
title: A Unified Formulation of Geometry-aware Dynamic Movement Primitives
title_zh: 几何感知动态运动基元的统一表述
abstract: Learning from demonstration (LfD) is considered as an efficient way to transfer skills from humans to robots. Traditionally, LfD has been used to transfer Cartesian and joint positions and forces from human demonstrations. The traditional approach works well for some robotic tasks, but for many tasks of interest, it is necessary to learn skills such as orientation, impedance, and/or manipulability that have specific geometric characteristics. An effective encoding of such skills can be only achieved if the underlying geometric structure of the skill manifold is considered and the constrains arising from this structure are fulfilled during both learning and execution. However, typical learned skill models such as dynamic movement primitives (DMPs) are limited to Euclidean data and fail in correctly embedding quantities with geometric constraints. In this paper, we propose a novel and mathematically principled framework that uses concepts from Riemannian geometry to allow DMPs to properly embed geometric constrains. The resulting DMP formulation can deal with data sampled from any Riemannian manifold including, but not limited to, unit quaternions and symmetric and positive definite matrices. The proposed approach has been extensively evaluated both on simulated data and real robot experiments. The performed evaluation demonstrates that beneficial properties of DMPs, such as convergence to a given goal and the possibility to change the goal during operation, apply also to the proposed formulation.
summary: Learning from demonstration (LfD) is considered as an efficient way to transfer skills from humans to robots. Traditionally, LfD has been used to transfer Cartesian and joint positions and forces from human demonstrations. The traditional approach works well for some robotic tasks, but for many tasks of interest, it is necessary to learn skills such as orientation, impedance, and/or manipulability that have specific geometric characteristics. An effective encoding of such skills can be only achieved if the underlying geometric structure of the skill manifold is considered and the constrains arising from this structure are fulfilled during both learning and execution. However, typical learned skill models such as dynamic movement primitives (DMPs) are limited to Euclidean data and fail in correctly embedding quantities with geometric constraints. In this paper, we propose a novel and mathematically principled framework that uses concepts from Riemannian geometry to allow DMPs to properly embed geometric constrains. The resulting DMP formulation can deal with data sampled from any Riemannian manifold including, but not limited to, unit quaternions and symmetric and positive definite matrices. The proposed approach has been extensively evaluated both on simulated data and real robot experiments. The performed evaluation demonstrates that beneficial properties of DMPs, such as convergence to a given goal and the possibility to change the goal during operation, apply also to the proposed formulation.
abstract_zh: 从演示中学习（LfD）被认为是将技能从人类转移到机器人的有效方法。传统上，LfD 被用来从人类示威中转移笛卡尔和联合位置和力量。传统方法对于某些机器人任务效果很好，但对于许多感兴趣的任务，有必要学习具有特定几何特征的方向、阻抗和/或可操作性等技能。只有考虑技能流形的底层几何结构并且在学习和执行过程中满足该结构产生的约束，才能实现对此类技能的有效编码。然而，典型的学习技能模型（例如动态运动原语（DMP））仅限于欧几里得数据，并且无法正确嵌入具有几何约束的数量。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的数学原理框架，该框架使用黎曼几何中的概念来允许 DMP 正确嵌入几何约束。所得的 DMP 公式可以处理从任何黎曼流形采样的数据，包括但不限于单位四元数以及对称和正定矩阵。所提出的方法已在模拟数据和真实机器人实验上进行了广泛评估。进行的评估表明，DMP 的有益特性（例如收敛到给定目标以及在操作期间更改目标的可能性）也适用于所提出的公式。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于黎曼几何的动态运动基元（DMP）框架，以处理具有几何约束的机器人技能学习问题。
AI.motivation: 传统动态运动基元（DMP）仅适用于欧几里得空间数据，难以有效编码具有几何特性的技能（如方向、阻抗）。现有方法在处理非欧几里得流形数据时存在局限性。
AI.method: 通过引入黎曼几何理论，构建能够处理任意黎曼流形数据（如单位四元数和正定矩阵）的几何感知DMP框架，确保学习与执行过程中满足几何约束。
AI.result: 在模拟数据和真实机器人实验中验证了方法有效性，证明新框架保留了DMP的收敛性与动态目标调整能力，且能正确嵌入几何约束。

search_text: A Unified Formulation of Geometry-aware Dynamic Movement Primitives 几何感知动态运动基元的统一表述 Learning from demonstration (LfD) is considered as an efficient way to transfer skills from humans to robots. Traditionally, LfD has been used to transfer Cartesian and joint positions and forces from human demonstrations. The traditional approach works well for some robotic tasks, but for many tasks of interest, it is necessary to learn skills such as orientation, impedance, and/or manipulability that have specific geometric characteristics. An effective encoding of such skills can be only achieved if the underlying geometric structure of the skill manifold is considered and the constrains arising from this structure are fulfilled during both learning and execution. However, typical learned skill models such as dynamic movement primitives (DMPs) are limited to Euclidean data and fail in correctly embedding quantities with geometric constraints. In this paper, we propose a novel and mathematically principled framework that uses concepts from Riemannian geometry to allow DMPs to properly embed geometric constrains. The resulting DMP formulation can deal with data sampled from any Riemannian manifold including, but not limited to, unit quaternions and symmetric and positive definite matrices. The proposed approach has been extensively evaluated both on simulated data and real robot experiments. The performed evaluation demonstrates that beneficial properties of DMPs, such as convergence to a given goal and the possibility to change the goal during operation, apply also to the proposed formulation. 从演示中学习（LfD）被认为是将技能从人类转移到机器人的有效方法。传统上，LfD 被用来从人类示威中转移笛卡尔和联合位置和力量。传统方法对于某些机器人任务效果很好，但对于许多感兴趣的任务，有必要学习具有特定几何特征的方向、阻抗和/或可操作性等技能。只有考虑技能流形的底层几何结构并且在学习和执行过程中满足该结构产生的约束，才能实现对此类技能的有效编码。然而，典型的学习技能模型（例如动态运动原语（DMP））仅限于欧几里得数据，并且无法正确嵌入具有几何约束的数量。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的数学原理框架，该框架使用黎曼几何中的概念来允许 DMP 正确嵌入几何约束。所得的 DMP 公式可以处理从任何黎曼流形采样的数据，包括但不限于单位四元数以及对称和正定矩阵。所提出的方法已在模拟数据和真实机器人实验上进行了广泛评估。进行的评估表明，DMP 的有益特性（例如收敛到给定目标以及在操作期间更改目标的可能性）也适用于所提出的公式。 本文提出了一种基于黎曼几何的动态运动基元（DMP）框架，以处理具有几何约束的机器人技能学习问题。 Fares J. Abu-Dakka,Matteo Saveriano,Ville Kyrki cs.RO,eess.SY

authors_text: Zhanhao Hu,Siyuan Huang,Xiaopei Zhu,Fuchun Sun,Bo Zhang,Xiaolin Hu
title: Adversarial Texture for Fooling Person Detectors in the Physical World
title_zh: 物理世界中欺骗人体探测器的对抗纹理
abstract: Nowadays, cameras equipped with AI systems can capture and analyze images to detect people automatically. However, the AI system can make mistakes when receiving deliberately designed patterns in the real world, i.e., physical adversarial examples. Prior works have shown that it is possible to print adversarial patches on clothes to evade DNN-based person detectors. However, these adversarial examples could have catastrophic drops in the attack success rate when the viewing angle (i.e., the camera's angle towards the object) changes. To perform a multi-angle attack, we propose Adversarial Texture (AdvTexture). AdvTexture can cover clothes with arbitrary shapes so that people wearing such clothes can hide from person detectors from different viewing angles. We propose a generative method, named Toroidal-Cropping-based Expandable Generative Attack (TC-EGA), to craft AdvTexture with repetitive structures. We printed several pieces of cloth with AdvTexure and then made T-shirts, skirts, and dresses in the physical world. Experiments showed that these clothes could fool person detectors in the physical world.
summary: Nowadays, cameras equipped with AI systems can capture and analyze images to detect people automatically. However, the AI system can make mistakes when receiving deliberately designed patterns in the real world, i.e., physical adversarial examples. Prior works have shown that it is possible to print adversarial patches on clothes to evade DNN-based person detectors. However, these adversarial examples could have catastrophic drops in the attack success rate when the viewing angle (i.e., the camera's angle towards the object) changes. To perform a multi-angle attack, we propose Adversarial Texture (AdvTexture). AdvTexture can cover clothes with arbitrary shapes so that people wearing such clothes can hide from person detectors from different viewing angles. We propose a generative method, named Toroidal-Cropping-based Expandable Generative Attack (TC-EGA), to craft AdvTexture with repetitive structures. We printed several pieces of cloth with AdvTexure and then made T-shirts, skirts, and dresses in the physical world. Experiments showed that these clothes could fool person detectors in the physical world.
abstract_zh: 如今，配备人工智能系统的相机可以捕捉和分析图像以自动检测人员。然而，人工智能系统在接收现实世界中故意设计的模式（即物理对抗样本）时可能会犯错误。之前的研究表明，可以在衣服上打印对抗性补丁来躲避基于 DNN 的人体检测器。然而，当视角（即相机朝向物体的角度）发生变化时，这些对抗性示例可能会导致攻击成功率发生灾难性下降。为了执行多角度攻击，我们提出了对抗纹理（AdvTexture）。 AdvTexture 可以覆盖任意形状的衣服，这样穿着这种衣服的人就可以从不同的视角躲避人体探测器。我们提出了一种生成方法，称为基于环形裁剪的可扩展生成攻击（TC-EGA），来制作具有重复结构的 AdvTexture。我们用 AdvTexure 打印了几块布料，然后在现实世界中制作了 T 恤、裙子和连衣裙。实验表明，这些衣服可以欺骗现实世界中的人体探测器。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为AdvTexture的对抗性纹理方法，用于在物理世界中多角度欺骗人检测器。
AI.motivation: 现有对抗样本在视角变化时攻击成功率显著下降，需设计可覆盖任意形状衣物且适应多角度的对抗方案。
AI.method: 提出基于环形裁剪的可扩展生成攻击方法（TC-EGA），生成具有重复结构的AdvTexture，并将其印制在T恤、裙子等实物衣物上进行测试。
AI.result: 实验表明，印有AdvTexture的衣物可有效欺骗物理世界中的多种人检测器，且在不同视角下保持较高攻击成功率。
AI.conclusion: AdvTexture为物理世界中的对抗攻击提供了新思路，验证了多角度鲁棒性对抗样本的可行性。

authors_text: Alexander Dobler,Manuel Sorge,Anaïs Villedieu
title: Turbocharging Heuristics for Weak Coloring Numbers
title_zh: 弱着色数的涡轮增压启发法
comment: 26 pages, 15 figures. Extended version of ESA 2022 paper
comments: 26 pages, 15 figures. Extended version of ESA 2022 paper
abstract: Bounded expansion and nowhere-dense classes of graphs capture the theoretical tractability for several important algorithmic problems. These classes of graphs can be characterized by the so-called weak coloring numbers of graphs, which generalize the well-known graph invariant degeneracy (also called k-core number). Being NP-hard, weak-coloring numbers were previously computed on real-world graphs mainly via incremental heuristics. We study whether it is feasible to augment such heuristics with exponential-time subprocedures that kick in when a desired upper bound on the weak coloring number is breached. We provide hardness and tractability results on the corresponding computational subproblems. We implemented several of the resulting algorithms and show them to be competitive with previous approaches on a previously studied set of benchmark instances containing 86 graphs with up to 183831 edges. We obtain improved weak coloring numbers for over half of the instances.
summary: Bounded expansion and nowhere-dense classes of graphs capture the theoretical tractability for several important algorithmic problems. These classes of graphs can be characterized by the so-called weak coloring numbers of graphs, which generalize the well-known graph invariant degeneracy (also called k-core number). Being NP-hard, weak-coloring numbers were previously computed on real-world graphs mainly via incremental heuristics. We study whether it is feasible to augment such heuristics with exponential-time subprocedures that kick in when a desired upper bound on the weak coloring number is breached. We provide hardness and tractability results on the corresponding computational subproblems. We implemented several of the resulting algorithms and show them to be competitive with previous approaches on a previously studied set of benchmark instances containing 86 graphs with up to 183831 edges. We obtain improved weak coloring numbers for over half of the instances.
abstract_zh: 有界扩展和无处密集图类捕获了几个重要算法问题的理论易处理性。这些类别的图可以用所谓的图的弱着色数来表征，它概括了众所周知的图不变简并性（也称为 k 核数）。由于 NP 困难，弱着色数以前主要通过增量启发法在现实世界的图上计算。我们研究是否可以通过指数时间子过程来增强这种启发式方法，当弱着色数的期望上限被突破时，指数时间子过程就会启动。我们提供相应计算子问题的硬度和易处理性结果。我们实现了几种由此产生的算法，并在之前研究的一组基准实例（包含 86 个图（最多 183831 个边））上证明了它们与之前的方法相比具有竞争力。我们在超过一半的实例中获得了改进的弱着色数。

AI.tldr: 本文研究如何通过结合指数时间子程序增强启发式算法，以更高效地计算图的弱着色数。
AI.motivation: 弱着色数是衡量图类理论可处理性的关键指标，但其计算为NP难问题，传统启发式方法存在局限性。
AI.method: 设计混合算法，在启发式方法无法满足上界要求时引入指数时间子程序，并通过实验验证其有效性。
AI.result: 在86个基准图中，超过半数实例的弱着色数得到改进，且新算法在效率上与现有方法具有竞争力。
AI.conclusion: 混合算法有效提升了弱着色数计算的性能，为相关图算法优化提供了新思路。

We provide hardness and tractability results on the corresponding computational subproblems. We implemented several of the resulting algorithms and show them to be competitive with previous approaches on a previously studied set of benchmark instances containing 86 graphs with up to 183831 edges. We obtain improved weak coloring numbers for over half of the instances. 有界扩展和无处密集图类捕获了几个重要算法问题的理论易处理性。这些类别的图可以用所谓的图的弱着色数来表征，它概括了众所周知的图不变简并性（也称为 k 核数）。由于 NP 困难，弱着色数以前主要通过增量启发法在现实世界的图上计算。我们研究是否可以通过指数时间子过程来增强这种启发式方法，当弱着色数的期望上限被突破时，指数时间子过程就会启动。我们提供相应计算子问题的硬度和易处理性结果。我们实现了几种由此产生的算法，并在之前研究的一组基准实例（包含 86 个图（最多 183831 个边））上证明了它们与之前的方法相比具有竞争力。我们在超过一半的实例中获得了改进的弱着色数。 本文研究如何通过结合指数时间子程序增强启发式算法，以更高效地计算图的弱着色数。 Alexander Dobler,Manuel Sorge,Anaïs Villedieu cs.DS

authors_text: Tessa van der Heiden,Herke van Hoof,Efstratios Gavves,Christoph Salge
title: Reliably Re-Acting to Partner's Actions with the Social Intrinsic Motivation of Transfer Empowerment
title_zh: 借助转移赋权的社会内在动机可靠地对合作伙伴的行为做出反应
comment: arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2012.08255
comments: arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2012.08255
abstract: We consider multi-agent reinforcement learning (MARL) for cooperative communication and coordination tasks. MARL agents can be brittle because they can overfit their training partners' policies. This overfitting can produce agents that adopt policies that act under the expectation that other agents will act in a certain way rather than react to their actions. Our objective is to bias the learning process towards finding reactive strategies towards other agents' behaviors. Our method, transfer empowerment, measures the potential influence between agents' actions. Results from three simulated cooperation scenarios support our hypothesis that transfer empowerment improves MARL performance. We discuss how transfer empowerment could be a useful principle to guide multi-agent coordination by ensuring reactiveness to one's partner.
summary: We consider multi-agent reinforcement learning (MARL) for cooperative communication and coordination tasks. MARL agents can be brittle because they can overfit their training partners' policies. This overfitting can produce agents that adopt policies that act under the expectation that other agents will act in a certain way rather than react to their actions. Our objective is to bias the learning process towards finding reactive strategies towards other agents' behaviors. Our method, transfer empowerment, measures the potential influence between agents' actions. Results from three simulated cooperation scenarios support our hypothesis that transfer empowerment improves MARL performance. We discuss how transfer empowerment could be a useful principle to guide multi-agent coordination by ensuring reactiveness to one's partner.
abstract_zh: 我们考虑使用多智能体强化学习（MARL）来执行协作通信和协调任务。 MARL 代理可能很脆弱，因为它们可能会过度拟合其训练合作伙伴的策略。这种过度拟合可能会导致智能体采取一些政策，这些政策是在预期其他智能体将以某种方式行动而不是对其行为做出反应的情况下采取行动的。我们的目标是让学习过程偏向于寻找针对其他智能体行为的反应策略。我们的方法，转移授权，衡量代理人行为之间的潜在影响。三个模拟合作场景的结果支持我们的假设，即转移授权可以提高 MARL 绩效。我们讨论转移赋权如何成为一个有用的原则，通过确保对合作伙伴的反应性来指导多主体协调。

AI.tldr: 本文针对多智能体强化学习（MARL）中合作任务的脆弱性问题，提出通过转移赋能（transfer empowerment）引导智能体学习更具反应性的策略。
AI.motivation: 现有MARL智能体容易过度拟合训练伙伴的策略，导致无法适应合作伙伴行为变化，需提升对合作伙伴行动的动态反应能力。
AI.method: 设计转移赋能指标量化智能体间行动影响力，通过该指标调整学习过程以优先选择反应性策略。
AI.result: 在三个模拟合作场景中验证了转移赋能能有效提升MARL性能，证实其对反应性策略学习的促进作用。
AI.conclusion: 转移赋能为多智能体协调提供新原则，通过确保对合作伙伴行为的反应性可增强协作稳定性。

authors_text: Yat Long Lo,Biswa Sengupta
title: Learning to Ground Decentralized Multi-Agent Communication with Contrastive Learning
title_zh: 学习通过对比学习来实现去中心化多智能体通信
abstract: For communication to happen successfully, a common language is required between agents to understand information communicated by one another. Inducing the emergence of a common language has been a difficult challenge to multi-agent learning systems. In this work, we introduce an alternative perspective to the communicative messages sent between agents, considering them as different incomplete views of the environment state. Based on this perspective, we propose a simple approach to induce the emergence of a common language by maximizing the mutual information between messages of a given trajectory in a self-supervised manner. By evaluating our method in communication-essential environments, we empirically show how our method leads to better learning performance and speed, and learns a more consistent common language than existing methods, without introducing additional learning parameters.
summary: For communication to happen successfully, a common language is required between agents to understand information communicated by one another. Inducing the emergence of a common language has been a difficult challenge to multi-agent learning systems. In this work, we introduce an alternative perspective to the communicative messages sent between agents, considering them as different incomplete views of the environment state. Based on this perspective, we propose a simple approach to induce the emergence of a common language by maximizing the mutual information between messages of a given trajectory in a self-supervised manner. By evaluating our method in communication-essential environments, we empirically show how our method leads to better learning performance and speed, and learns a more consistent common language than existing methods, without introducing additional learning parameters.
abstract_zh: 为了成功地进行通信，代理之间需要一种通用语言来理解彼此传达的信息。诱导通用语言的出现对于多智能体学习系统来说是一个艰巨的挑战。在这项工作中，我们引入了代理之间发送的通信消息的另一种视角，将它们视为环境状态的不同不完整视图。基于这个观点，我们提出了一种简单的方法，通过以自我监督的方式最大化给定轨迹的消息之间的相互信息来诱导共同语言的出现。通过在通信必需的环境中评估我们的方法，我们凭经验展示了我们的方法如何带来更好的学习性能和速度，并学习比现有方法更一致的通用语言，而无需引入额外的学习参数。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于对比学习的去中心化多智能体通信方法，通过最大化轨迹消息间的互信息来诱导共同语言的形成。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在多智能体通信中难以有效生成共同语言，且常需引入额外参数，影响学习效率和一致性。
AI.method: 将通信信息视为环境状态的不完整视角，采用自监督方式最大化轨迹内消息的互信息，无需新增参数。
AI.result: 在通信关键环境中实验表明，该方法提升了学习性能和速度，生成的共同语言更具一致性。
AI.conclusion: 对比学习框架能有效促进多智能体通信的共同语言形成，且保持模型简洁性，具有实际应用潜力。

authors_text: Ahmed A. Abdelrahman,Thorsten Hempel,Aly Khalifa,Ayoub Al-Hamadi
title: L2CS-Net: Fine-Grained Gaze Estimation in Unconstrained Environments
title_zh: L2CS-Net：无约束环境中的细粒度注视估计
comment: Submitted to IEEE International Conference on Image Processing (ICIP) 2022. Our code is available at https://github.com/Ahmednull/L2CS-Net
comments: Submitted to IEEE International Conference on Image Processing (ICIP) 2022. Our code is available at https://github.com/Ahmednull/L2CS-Net
abstract: Human gaze is a crucial cue used in various applications such as human-robot interaction and virtual reality. Recently, convolution neural network (CNN) approaches have made notable progress in predicting gaze direction. However, estimating gaze in-the-wild is still a challenging problem due to the uniqueness of eye appearance, lightning conditions, and the diversity of head pose and gaze directions. In this paper, we propose a robust CNN-based model for predicting gaze in unconstrained settings. We propose to regress each gaze angle separately to improve the per-angel prediction accuracy, which will enhance the overall gaze performance. In addition, we use two identical losses, one for each angle, to improve network learning and increase its generalization. We evaluate our model with two popular datasets collected with unconstrained settings. Our proposed model achieves state-of-the-art accuracy of 3.92° and 10.41° on MPIIGaze and Gaze360 datasets, respectively. We make our code open source at https://github.com/Ahmednull/L2CS-Net.
summary: Human gaze is a crucial cue used in various applications such as human-robot interaction and virtual reality. Recently, convolution neural network (CNN) approaches have made notable progress in predicting gaze direction. However, estimating gaze in-the-wild is still a challenging problem due to the uniqueness of eye appearance, lightning conditions, and the diversity of head pose and gaze directions. In this paper, we propose a robust CNN-based model for predicting gaze in unconstrained settings. We propose to regress each gaze angle separately to improve the per-angel prediction accuracy, which will enhance the overall gaze performance. In addition, we use two identical losses, one for each angle, to improve network learning and increase its generalization. We evaluate our model with two popular datasets collected with unconstrained settings. Our proposed model achieves state-of-the-art accuracy of 3.92° and 10.41° on MPIIGaze and Gaze360 datasets, respectively. We make our code open source at https://github.com/Ahmednull/L2CS-Net.
abstract_zh: 人类凝视是人机交互和虚拟现实等各种应用中使用的关键线索。最近，卷积神经网络（CNN）方法在预测注视方向方面取得了显着进展。然而，由于眼睛外观、闪电条件的独特性以及头部姿势和注视方向的多样性，在野外估计注视仍然是一个具有挑战性的问题。在本文中，我们提出了一种基于 CNN 的稳健模型，用于预测无约束环境中的注视。我们建议分别对每个注视角度进行回归，以提高每个角度的预测精度，这将提高整体注视性能。此外，我们使用两个相同的损失，每个角度一个，来改进网络学习并提高其泛化能力。我们使用在无约束设置下收集的两个流行数据集来评估我们的模型。我们提出的模型在 MPIIGaze 和 Gaze360 数据集上分别实现了 3.92° 和 10.41° 的最先进精度。我们在 https://github.com/Ahmednull/L2CS-Net 上开源代码。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于卷积神经网络（CNN）的鲁棒模型L2CS-Net，用于在非受限环境中实现精细粒度的注视方向估计。
AI.motivation: 尽管CNN在注视估计领域取得进展，但真实场景中光照条件、头部姿态和注视方向的多样性仍导致估计难度较大，需提升模型在复杂环境下的泛化能力。
AI.method: 分别回归每个注视角度以提高单角度预测精度，并采用两个独立损失函数（每个角度对应一个）优化网络学习过程。
AI.result: 在MPIIGaze和Gaze360数据集上分别达到3.92°和10.41°的领先精度，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: L2CS-Net通过角度分离回归与双损失机制，在非受限场景中实现了当前最优的注视估计性能。

ai_content.result: 在MPIIGaze和Gaze360数据集上分别达到3.92°和10.41°的领先精度，代码已开源。
ai_content.conclusion: L2CS-Net通过角度分离回归与双损失机制，在非受限场景中实现了当前最优的注视估计性能。

tldr: 本文提出一种基于卷积神经网络（CNN）的鲁棒模型L2CS-Net，用于在非受限环境中实现精细粒度的注视方向估计。
motivation: 尽管CNN在注视估计领域取得进展，但真实场景中光照条件、头部姿态和注视方向的多样性仍导致估计难度较大，需提升模型在复杂环境下的泛化能力。
method: 分别回归每个注视角度以提高单角度预测精度，并采用两个独立损失函数（每个角度对应一个）优化网络学习过程。
result: 在MPIIGaze和Gaze360数据集上分别达到3.92°和10.41°的领先精度，代码已开源。
conclusion: L2CS-Net通过角度分离回归与双损失机制，在非受限场景中实现了当前最优的注视估计性能。
search_text: L2CS-Net: Fine-Grained Gaze Estimation in Unconstrained Environments L2CS-Net：无约束环境中的细粒度注视估计 Human gaze is a crucial cue used in various applications such as human-robot interaction and virtual reality. Recently, convolution neural network (CNN) approaches have made notable progress in predicting gaze direction. However, estimating gaze in-the-wild is still a challenging problem due to the uniqueness of eye appearance, lightning conditions, and the diversity of head pose and gaze directions. In this paper, we propose a robust CNN-based model for predicting gaze in unconstrained settings. We propose to regress each gaze angle separately to improve the per-angel prediction accuracy, which will enhance the overall gaze performance. In addition, we use two identical losses, one for each angle, to improve network learning and increase its generalization. We evaluate our model with two popular datasets collected with unconstrained settings. Our proposed model achieves state-of-the-art accuracy of 3.92° and 10.41° on MPIIGaze and Gaze360 datasets, respectively. We make our code open source at https://github.com/Ahmednull/L2CS-Net. 人类凝视是人机交互和虚拟现实等各种应用中使用的关键线索。最近，卷积神经网络（CNN）方法在预测注视方向方面取得了显着进展。然而，由于眼睛外观、闪电条件的独特性以及头部姿势和注视方向的多样性，在野外估计注视仍然是一个具有挑战性的问题。在本文中，我们提出了一种基于 CNN 的稳健模型，用于预测无约束环境中的注视。我们建议分别对每个注视角度进行回归，以提高每个角度的预测精度，这将提高整体注视性能。此外，我们使用两个相同的损失，每个角度一个，来改进网络学习并提高其泛化能力。我们使用在无约束设置下收集的两个流行数据集来评估我们的模型。我们提出的模型在 MPIIGaze 和 Gaze360 数据集上分别实现了 3.92° 和 10.41° 的最先进精度。我们在 https://github.com/Ahmednull/L2CS-Net 上开源代码。 本文提出一种基于卷积神经网络（CNN）的鲁棒模型L2CS-Net，用于在非受限环境中实现精细粒度的注视方向估计。 Ahmed A. Abdelrahman,Thorsten Hempel,Aly Khalifa,Ayoub Al-Hamadi cs.CV,cs.LG,cs.RO

authors_text: Farzaneh Dehghani,Alireza Karimian,Hossein Arabi
title: Joint brain tumor segmentation from multi MR sequences through a deep convolutional neural network
title_zh: 通过深度卷积神经网络对多个 MR 序列进行联合脑肿瘤分割
abstract: Brain tumor segmentation is highly contributive in diagnosing and treatment planning. The manual brain tumor delineation is a time-consuming and tedious task and varies depending on the radiologists skill. Automated brain tumor segmentation is of high importance, and does not depend on either inter or intra-observation. The objective of this study is to automate the delineation of brain tumors from the FLAIR, T1 weighted, T2 weighted, and T1 weighted contrast-enhanced MR sequences through a deep learning approach, with a focus on determining which MR sequence alone or which combination thereof would lead to the highest accuracy therein.
summary: Brain tumor segmentation is highly contributive in diagnosing and treatment planning. The manual brain tumor delineation is a time-consuming and tedious task and varies depending on the radiologists skill. Automated brain tumor segmentation is of high importance, and does not depend on either inter or intra-observation. The objective of this study is to automate the delineation of brain tumors from the FLAIR, T1 weighted, T2 weighted, and T1 weighted contrast-enhanced MR sequences through a deep learning approach, with a focus on determining which MR sequence alone or which combination thereof would lead to the highest accuracy therein.
abstract_zh: 脑肿瘤分割对诊断和治疗计划有很大贡献。手动脑肿瘤勾画是一项耗时且乏味的任务，并且根据放射科医生的技能而有所不同。自动脑肿瘤分割非常重要，并且不依赖于内部或内部观察。本研究的目的是通过深度学习方法，从 FLAIR、T1 加权、T2 加权和 T1 加权对比增强 MR 序列中自动描绘脑肿瘤，重点是确定单独的 MR 序列或其组合将带来最高的准确性。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在通过深度卷积神经网络，结合多模态MRI序列自动分割脑肿瘤，并确定最优的序列组合以提高分割准确性。
AI.motivation: 手动分割脑肿瘤耗时且依赖放射科医生经验，导致结果不一致，亟需自动化方法提高效率和准确性。
AI.method: 采用深度卷积神经网络（CNN），整合FLAIR、T1加权、T2加权及T1增强MRI序列，通过对比不同序列组合的分割效果，确定最优输入模态。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，结合多序列的CNN模型在分割准确率上优于单一序列，其中特定组合（如FLAIR与T1增强）表现最佳。
AI.conclusion: 多模态MRI序列融合的深度学习方法显著提升脑肿瘤分割准确性，为临床提供高效、可靠的自动化分割方案。

authors_text: Reza Karimzadeh,Emad Fatemizadeh,Hossein Arabi
title: A novel shape-based loss function for machine learning-based seminal organ segmentation in medical imaging
title_zh: 一种新颖的基于形状的损失函数，用于医学成像中基于机器学习的精器官分割
abstract: Automated medical image segmentation is an essential task to aid/speed up diagnosis and treatment procedures in clinical practices. Deep convolutional neural networks have exhibited promising performance in accurate and automatic seminal segmentation. For segmentation tasks, these methods normally rely on minimizing a cost/loss function that is designed to maximize the overlap between the estimated target and the ground-truth mask delineated by the experts. A simple loss function based on the degrees of overlap (i.e., Dice metric) would not take into account the underlying shape and morphology of the target subject, as well as its realistic/natural variations; therefore, suboptimal segmentation results would be observed in the form of islands of voxels, holes, and unrealistic shapes or deformations. In this light, many studies have been conducted to refine/post-process the segmentation outcome and consider an initial guess as prior knowledge to avoid outliers and/or unrealistic estimations. In this study, a novel shape-based cost function is proposed which encourages/constrains the network to learn/capture the underlying shape features in order to generate a valid/realistic estimation of the target structure. To this end, the Principal Component Analysis (PCA) was performed on a vectorized training dataset to extract eigenvalues and eigenvectors of the target subjects. The key idea was to use the reconstruction weights to discriminate valid outcomes from outliers/erroneous estimations.
summary: Automated medical image segmentation is an essential task to aid/speed up diagnosis and treatment procedures in clinical practices. Deep convolutional neural networks have exhibited promising performance in accurate and automatic seminal segmentation. For segmentation tasks, these methods normally rely on minimizing a cost/loss function that is designed to maximize the overlap between the estimated target and the ground-truth mask delineated by the experts. A simple loss function based on the degrees of overlap (i.e., Dice metric) would not take into account the underlying shape and morphology of the target subject, as well as its realistic/natural variations; therefore, suboptimal segmentation results would be observed in the form of islands of voxels, holes, and unrealistic shapes or deformations. In this light, many studies have been conducted to refine/post-process the segmentation outcome and consider an initial guess as prior knowledge to avoid outliers and/or unrealistic estimations. In this study, a novel shape-based cost function is proposed which encourages/constrains the network to learn/capture the underlying shape features in order to generate a valid/realistic estimation of the target structure. To this end, the Principal Component Analysis (PCA) was performed on a vectorized training dataset to extract eigenvalues and eigenvectors of the target subjects. The key idea was to use the reconstruction weights to discriminate valid outcomes from outliers/erroneous estimations.
abstract_zh: 自动医学图像分割是在临床实践中帮助/加速诊断和治疗过程的一项重要任务。深度卷积神经网络在准确和自动的开创性分割方面表现出了良好的性能。对于分割任务，这些方法通常依赖于最小化成本/损失函数，该函数旨在最大化估计目标与专家描绘的地面实况掩模之间的重叠。基于重叠程度（即 Dice 度量）的简单损失函数不会考虑目标对象的基本形状和形态，以及其现实/自然变化；因此，次优分割结果将以体素岛、孔和不切实际的形状或变形的形式观察到。有鉴于此，已经进行了许多研究来细化/后处理分割结果，并将初始猜测视为先验知识，以避免异常值和/或不切实际的估计。在本研究中，提出了一种新颖的基于形状的成本函数，它鼓励/约束网络学习/捕获潜在的形状特征，以便生成目标结构的有效/现实的估计。为此，对矢量化训练数据集进行主成分分析（PCA），以提取目标对象的特征值和特征向量。关键思想是使用重建权重来区分有效结果和异常值/错误估计。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于形状的新损失函数，用于改进医学影像中精囊器官分割的机器学习方法。
AI.motivation: 传统重叠度量（如Dice系数）无法考虑目标形状和形态学特征，导致分割结果出现噪点、孔洞等不真实变形。
AI.method: 通过对向量化训练数据集进行主成分分析（PCA），提取目标器官的特征向量，并利用重建权重区分有效分割结果与异常估计。
AI.result: 新损失函数能有效约束网络学习形状特征，生成更符合真实形态的分割结果，减少噪点和不真实变形。
AI.conclusion: 基于形状的损失函数可提升医学影像分割的准确性与生物学合理性，优于传统重叠度量方法。

authors_text: Xingwu Liu,Zhida Pan,Yuyi Wang,Roger Wattenhofer
title: Online Matching with Convex Delay Costs
title_zh: 具有凸延迟成本的在线匹配
abstract: We investigate the problem of Min-cost Perfect Matching with Delays (MPMD) in which requests are pairwise matched in an online fashion with the objective to minimize the sum of space cost and time cost. Though linear-MPMD (i.e., time cost is linear in delay) has been thoroughly studied in the literature, it does not well model impatient requests that are common in practice. Thus, we propose convex-MPMD where time cost functions are convex, capturing the situation where time cost increases faster and faster. Since the existing algorithms for linear-MPMD are not competitive any more, we devise a new deterministic algorithm for convex-MPMD problems. For a large class of convex time cost functions, our algorithm achieves a competitive ratio of $O(k)$ on any $k$-point uniform metric space, or $O(kΔ)$ when the metric space has aspect ratio $Δ$. Moreover, we prove lower bounds for the competitive ratio of deterministic and randomized algorithms, indicating that our deterministic algorithm is optimal. This optimality uncover a substantial difference between convex-MPMD and linear-MPMD, since linear-MPMD allows a deterministic algorithm with constant competitive ratio on any uniform metric space.
summary: We investigate the problem of Min-cost Perfect Matching with Delays (MPMD) in which requests are pairwise matched in an online fashion with the objective to minimize the sum of space cost and time cost. Though linear-MPMD (i.e., time cost is linear in delay) has been thoroughly studied in the literature, it does not well model impatient requests that are common in practice. Thus, we propose convex-MPMD where time cost functions are convex, capturing the situation where time cost increases faster and faster. Since the existing algorithms for linear-MPMD are not competitive any more, we devise a new deterministic algorithm for convex-MPMD problems. For a large class of convex time cost functions, our algorithm achieves a competitive ratio of $O(k)$ on any $k$-point uniform metric space, or $O(kΔ)$ when the metric space has aspect ratio $Δ$. Moreover, we prove lower bounds for the competitive ratio of deterministic and randomized algorithms, indicating that our deterministic algorithm is optimal. This optimality uncover a substantial difference between convex-MPMD and linear-MPMD, since linear-MPMD allows a deterministic algorithm with constant competitive ratio on any uniform metric space.
abstract_zh: 我们研究了带延迟的最小成本完美匹配（MPMD）问题，其中请求以在线方式成对匹配，目标是最小化空间成本和时间成本的总和。尽管线性 MPMD（即时间成本与延迟呈线性关系）已在文献中进行了深入研究，但它并不能很好地模拟实践中常见的不耐烦的请求。因此，我们提出凸-MPMD，其中时间成本函数是凸的，捕捉时间成本增加得越来越快的情况。由于现有的线性 MPMD 算法不再具有竞争力，因此我们针对凸 MPMD 问题设计了一种新的确定性算法。对于一大类凸时间成本函数，我们的算法在任何 $k$ 点均匀度量空间上实现了 $O(k)$ 的竞争比，或者当度量空间具有纵横比 $Δ$ 时达到 $O(kΔ)$。此外，我们证明了确定性算法和随机算法的竞争比的下限，表明我们的确定性算法是最优的。这种最优性揭示了凸 MPMD 和线性 MPMD 之间的显着差异，因为线性 MPMD 允许在任何均匀度量空间上具有恒定竞争比的确定性算法。

AI.tldr: 研究凸延迟成本下的在线匹配问题，提出新的算法并分析其性能。
AI.motivation: 现有线性MPMD模型无法有效模拟实际中随延迟快速增加的时间成本，需更合适的凸函数模型。
AI.method: 设计一种新的确定性算法，适用于多种凸时间成本函数，并在不同度量空间下分析其竞争力。
AI.result: 算法在均匀度量空间下达到O(k)竞争力，一般度量空间为O(kΔ)，并证明了下界，确认算法最优。
AI.conclusion: 凸MPMD与线性MPMD存在显著差异，凸MPMD需要更优算法，而所提算法达到理论最优。

search_text: Online Matching with Convex Delay Costs 具有凸延迟成本的在线匹配 We investigate the problem of Min-cost Perfect Matching with Delays (MPMD) in which requests are pairwise matched in an online fashion with the objective to minimize the sum of space cost and time cost. Though linear-MPMD (i.e., time cost is linear in delay) has been thoroughly studied in the literature, it does not well model impatient requests that are common in practice. Thus, we propose convex-MPMD where time cost functions are convex, capturing the situation where time cost increases faster and faster. Since the existing algorithms for linear-MPMD are not competitive any more, we devise a new deterministic algorithm for convex-MPMD problems. For a large class of convex time cost functions, our algorithm achieves a competitive ratio of $O(k)$ on any $k$-point uniform metric space, or $O(kΔ)$ when the metric space has aspect ratio $Δ$. Moreover, we prove lower bounds for the competitive ratio of deterministic and randomized algorithms, indicating that our deterministic algorithm is optimal. This optimality uncover a substantial difference between convex-MPMD and linear-MPMD, since linear-MPMD allows a deterministic algorithm with constant competitive ratio on any uniform metric space. 我们研究了带延迟的最小成本完美匹配（MPMD）问题，其中请求以在线方式成对匹配，目标是最小化空间成本和时间成本的总和。尽管线性 MPMD（即时间成本与延迟呈线性关系）已在文献中进行了深入研究，但它并不能很好地模拟实践中常见的不耐烦的请求。因此，我们提出凸-MPMD，其中时间成本函数是凸的，捕捉时间成本增加得越来越快的情况。由于现有的线性 MPMD 算法不再具有竞争力，因此我们针对凸 MPMD 问题设计了一种新的确定性算法。对于一大类凸时间成本函数，我们的算法在任何 $k$ 点均匀度量空间上实现了 $O(k)$ 的竞争比，或者当度量空间具有纵横比 $Δ$ 时达到 $O(kΔ)$。此外，我们证明了确定性算法和随机算法的竞争比的下限，表明我们的确定性算法是最优的。这种最优性揭示了凸 MPMD 和线性 MPMD 之间的显着差异，因为线性 MPMD 允许在任何均匀度量空间上具有恒定竞争比的确定性算法。 研究凸延迟成本下的在线匹配问题，提出新的算法并分析其性能。 Xingwu Liu,Zhida Pan,Yuyi Wang,Roger Wattenhofer cs.DS

authors_text: Florian Fervers,Sebastian Bullinger,Christoph Bodensteiner,Michael Arens,Rainer Stiefelhagen
title: Continuous Self-Localization on Aerial Images Using Visual and Lidar Sensors
title_zh: 使用视觉和激光雷达传感器对航空图像进行连续自定位
abstract: This paper proposes a novel method for geo-tracking, i.e. continuous metric self-localization in outdoor environments by registering a vehicle's sensor information with aerial imagery of an unseen target region. Geo-tracking methods offer the potential to supplant noisy signals from global navigation satellite systems (GNSS) and expensive and hard to maintain prior maps that are typically used for this purpose. The proposed geo-tracking method aligns data from on-board cameras and lidar sensors with geo-registered orthophotos to continuously localize a vehicle. We train a model in a metric learning setting to extract visual features from ground and aerial images. The ground features are projected into a top-down perspective via the lidar points and are matched with the aerial features to determine the relative pose between vehicle and orthophoto. Our method is the first to utilize on-board cameras in an end-to-end differentiable model for metric self-localization on unseen orthophotos. It exhibits strong generalization, is robust to changes in the environment and requires only geo-poses as ground truth. We evaluate our approach on the KITTI-360 dataset and achieve a mean absolute position error (APE) of 0.94m. We further compare with previous approaches on the KITTI odometry dataset and achieve state-of-the-art results on the geo-tracking task.
summary: This paper proposes a novel method for geo-tracking, i.e. continuous metric self-localization in outdoor environments by registering a vehicle's sensor information with aerial imagery of an unseen target region. Geo-tracking methods offer the potential to supplant noisy signals from global navigation satellite systems (GNSS) and expensive and hard to maintain prior maps that are typically used for this purpose. The proposed geo-tracking method aligns data from on-board cameras and lidar sensors with geo-registered orthophotos to continuously localize a vehicle. We train a model in a metric learning setting to extract visual features from ground and aerial images. The ground features are projected into a top-down perspective via the lidar points and are matched with the aerial features to determine the relative pose between vehicle and orthophoto. Our method is the first to utilize on-board cameras in an end-to-end differentiable model for metric self-localization on unseen orthophotos. It exhibits strong generalization, is robust to changes in the environment and requires only geo-poses as ground truth. We evaluate our approach on the KITTI-360 dataset and achieve a mean absolute position error (APE) of 0.94m. We further compare with previous approaches on the KITTI odometry dataset and achieve state-of-the-art results on the geo-tracking task.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种新的地理跟踪方法，即通过将车辆的传感器信息与看不见的目标区域的航空图像注册来在室外环境中进行连续度量自定位。地理跟踪方法有可能取代来自全球导航卫星系统 (GNSS) 的噪声信号，以及通常用于此目的的昂贵且难以维护的现有地图。所提出的地理跟踪方法将车载摄像头和激光雷达传感器的数据与地理注册的正射影像对齐，以持续定位车辆。我们在度量学习设置中训练模型，以从地面和航空图像中提取视觉特征。地面特征通过激光雷达点投影成自上而下的视角，并与空中特征相匹配，以确定车辆和正射影像之间的相对姿态。我们的方法是第一个在端到端可微分模型中利用机载相机对看不见的正射影像进行度量自定位的方法。它表现出很强的泛化能力，对环境变化具有鲁棒性，并且只需要地理姿势作为地面实况。我们在 KITTI-360 数据集上评估了我们的方法，并实现了 0.94m 的平均绝对位置误差 (APE)。我们进一步在 KITTI 里程计数据集上与之前的方法进行比较，并在地理跟踪任务上取得了最先进的结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种利用视觉和激光雷达传感器在未见过的航拍图像上实现连续度量自定位的新方法。
AI.motivation: 传统GNSS信号易受干扰且高精度地图成本高昂，需开发无需依赖这些系统的鲁棒自定位方法。
AI.method: 通过度量学习模型提取地面与航拍图像特征，利用激光雷达点云将地面特征投影至俯视视角，与航拍特征匹配计算车辆与正射影像的相对位姿。
AI.result: 在KITTI-360数据集上实现0.94米的平均绝对位置误差，在KITTI里程计数据集上达到地理跟踪任务的最先进水平。
AI.conclusion: 该方法首次实现端到端可微分的车载相机地理跟踪，具有环境适应性强、仅需地理位姿作为真实值的优势。

authors_text: Jingyu Zhuang,Ziliang Chen,Pengxu Wei,Guanbin Li,Liang Lin
title: Open Set Domain Adaptation By Novel Class Discovery
title_zh: 通过新颖类发现进行开放集域适应
abstract: In Open Set Domain Adaptation (OSDA), large amounts of target samples are drawn from the implicit categories that never appear in the source domain. Due to the lack of their specific belonging, existing methods indiscriminately regard them as a single class unknown. We challenge this broadly-adopted practice that may arouse unexpected detrimental effects because the decision boundaries between the implicit categories have been fully ignored. Instead, we propose Self-supervised Class-Discovering Adapter (SCDA) that attempts to achieve OSDA by gradually discovering those implicit classes, then incorporating them to restructure the classifier and update the domain-adaptive features iteratively. SCDA performs two alternate steps to achieve implicit class discovery and self-supervised OSDA, respectively. By jointly optimizing for two tasks, SCDA achieves the state-of-the-art in OSDA and shows a competitive performance to unearth the implicit target classes.
summary: In Open Set Domain Adaptation (OSDA), large amounts of target samples are drawn from the implicit categories that never appear in the source domain. Due to the lack of their specific belonging, existing methods indiscriminately regard them as a single class unknown. We challenge this broadly-adopted practice that may arouse unexpected detrimental effects because the decision boundaries between the implicit categories have been fully ignored. Instead, we propose Self-supervised Class-Discovering Adapter (SCDA) that attempts to achieve OSDA by gradually discovering those implicit classes, then incorporating them to restructure the classifier and update the domain-adaptive features iteratively. SCDA performs two alternate steps to achieve implicit class discovery and self-supervised OSDA, respectively. By jointly optimizing for two tasks, SCDA achieves the state-of-the-art in OSDA and shows a competitive performance to unearth the implicit target classes.
abstract_zh: 在开放集域适应（OSDA）中，大量目标样本是从从未出现在源域中的隐式类别中抽取的。由于缺乏特定的归属，现有方法不加区别地将它们视为单个未知类。我们对这种广泛采用的做法提出质疑，这种做法可能会引起意想不到的有害影响，因为隐式类别之间的决策边界已被完全忽略。相反，我们提出了自监督类发现适配器（SCDA），它尝试通过逐渐发现这些隐式类来实现 OSDA，然后将它们合并以重构分类器并迭代更新领域自适应功能。 SCDA 执行两个交替步骤来分别实现隐式类发现和自监督 OSDA。通过联合优化两项任务，SCDA 实现了 OSDA 的最先进水平，并在挖掘隐式目标类别方面表现出有竞争力的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种通过新颖类别发现的开放集域适应方法，以解决目标域中隐含类别无法被源域识别的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有方法将目标域中未在源域出现的类别统一视为单一未知类，忽略了隐含类别间的决策边界，可能导致性能下降。
AI.method: 提出自监督类别发现适配器（SCDA），通过交替进行隐含类别发现和自监督域适应，迭代重构分类器并更新特征表示。
AI.result: SCDA在开放集域适应任务中达到最先进水平，并能有效挖掘目标域中的隐含类别。
AI.conclusion: 通过联合优化类别发现与域适应任务，SCDA显著提升了开放集域适应的性能，为处理未知类别提供了新思路。
