motivation: 现有方法将目标域中未在源域出现的类别统一视为单一未知类，忽略了隐含类别间的决策边界，可能导致性能下降。
method: 提出自监督类别发现适配器（SCDA），通过交替进行隐含类别发现和自监督域适应，迭代重构分类器并更新特征表示。
result: SCDA在开放集域适应任务中达到最先进水平，并能有效挖掘目标域中的隐含类别。
conclusion: 通过联合优化类别发现与域适应任务，SCDA显著提升了开放集域适应的性能，为处理未知类别提供了新思路。
search_text: Open Set Domain Adaptation By Novel Class Discovery 通过新颖类发现进行开放集域适应 In Open Set Domain Adaptation (OSDA), large amounts of target samples are drawn from the implicit categories that never appear in the source domain. Due to the lack of their specific belonging, existing methods indiscriminately regard them as a single class unknown. We challenge this broadly-adopted practice that may arouse unexpected detrimental effects because the decision boundaries between the implicit categories have been fully ignored. Instead, we propose Self-supervised Class-Discovering Adapter (SCDA) that attempts to achieve OSDA by gradually discovering those implicit classes, then incorporating them to restructure the classifier and update the domain-adaptive features iteratively. SCDA performs two alternate steps to achieve implicit class discovery and self-supervised OSDA, respectively. By jointly optimizing for two tasks, SCDA achieves the state-of-the-art in OSDA and shows a competitive performance to unearth the implicit target classes. 在开放集域适应（OSDA）中，大量目标样本是从从未出现在源域中的隐式类别中抽取的。由于缺乏特定的归属，现有方法不加区别地将它们视为单个未知类。我们对这种广泛采用的做法提出质疑，这种做法可能会引起意想不到的有害影响，因为隐式类别之间的决策边界已被完全忽略。相反，我们提出了自监督类发现适配器（SCDA），它尝试通过逐渐发现这些隐式类来实现 OSDA，然后将它们合并以重构分类器并迭代更新领域自适应功能。 SCDA 执行两个交替步骤来分别实现隐式类发现和自监督 OSDA。通过联合优化两项任务，SCDA 实现了 OSDA 的最先进水平，并在挖掘隐式目标类别方面表现出有竞争力的性能。 本文提出了一种通过新颖类别发现的开放集域适应方法，以解决目标域中隐含类别无法被源域识别的问题。 Jingyu Zhuang,Ziliang Chen,Pengxu Wei,Guanbin Li,Liang Lin cs.CV

authors_text: Jiangjiao Xu,Ke Li
title: Automated Few-Shot Time Series Forecasting based on Bi-level Programming
title_zh: 基于双层规划的自动少样本时间序列预测
abstract: New micro-grid design with renewable energy sources and battery storage systems can help improve greenhouse gas emissions and reduce the operational cost. To provide an effective short-/long-term forecasting of both energy generation and load demand, time series predictive modeling has been one of the key tools to guide the optimal decision-making for planning and operation. One of the critical challenges of time series renewable energy forecasting is the lack of historical data to train an adequate predictive model. Moreover, the performance of a machine learning model is sensitive to the choice of its corresponding hyperparameters. Bearing these considerations in mind, this paper develops a BiLO-Auto-TSF/ML framework that automates the optimal design of a few-shot learning pipeline from a bi-level programming perspective. Specifically, the lower-level meta-learning helps boost the base-learner to mitigate the small data challenge while the hyperparameter optimization at the upper level proactively searches for the optimal hyperparameter configurations for both base- and meta-learners. Note that the proposed framework is so general that any off-the-shelf machine learning method can be used in a plug-in manner. Comprehensive experiments fully demonstrate the effectiveness of our proposed BiLO-Auto-TSF/ML framework to search for a high-performance few-shot learning pipeline for various energy sources.
summary: New micro-grid design with renewable energy sources and battery storage systems can help improve greenhouse gas emissions and reduce the operational cost. To provide an effective short-/long-term forecasting of both energy generation and load demand, time series predictive modeling has been one of the key tools to guide the optimal decision-making for planning and operation. One of the critical challenges of time series renewable energy forecasting is the lack of historical data to train an adequate predictive model. Moreover, the performance of a machine learning model is sensitive to the choice of its corresponding hyperparameters. Bearing these considerations in mind, this paper develops a BiLO-Auto-TSF/ML framework that automates the optimal design of a few-shot learning pipeline from a bi-level programming perspective. Specifically, the lower-level meta-learning helps boost the base-learner to mitigate the small data challenge while the hyperparameter optimization at the upper level proactively searches for the optimal hyperparameter configurations for both base- and meta-learners. Note that the proposed framework is so general that any off-the-shelf machine learning method can be used in a plug-in manner. Comprehensive experiments fully demonstrate the effectiveness of our proposed BiLO-Auto-TSF/ML framework to search for a high-performance few-shot learning pipeline for various energy sources.
abstract_zh: 采用可再生能源和电池存储系统的新型微电网设计有助于改善温室气体排放并降低运营成本。为了对发电和负荷需求提供有效的短期/长期预测，时间序列预测建模已成为指导规划和运营最佳决策的关键工具之一。时间序列可再生能源预测的关键挑战之一是缺乏历史数据来训练适当的预测模型。此外，机器学习模型的性能对其相应超参数的选择很敏感。考虑到这些因素，本文开发了一个 BiLO-Auto-TSF/ML 框架，该框架从双层编程的角度自动执行几次学习管道的优化设计。具体来说，较低级别的元学习有助于增强基础学习器以减轻小数据挑战，而上层的超参数优化则主动为基础学习器和元学习器搜索最佳超参数配置。请注意，所提出的框架非常通用，任何现成的机器学习方法都可以以插件方式使用。综合实验充分证明了我们提出的 BiLO-Auto-TSF/ML 框架在寻找各种能源的高性能小样本学习管道方面的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于双层规划的BiLO-Auto-TSF/ML框架，用于自动化解决微电网中可再生能源时间序列的少样本预测问题。
AI.motivation: 微电网中可再生能源预测面临历史数据不足和机器学习模型超参数敏感性的挑战，需开发自动化少样本学习框架以提升预测性能。
AI.method: 通过双层规划视角设计框架：下层元学习缓解小样本问题，上层超参数优化搜索最佳配置，支持任意机器学习方法的即插即用。
AI.result: 实验验证该框架在多种能源数据源上均能有效搜索出高性能的少样本预测管道。
AI.conclusion: BiLO-Auto-TSF/ML框架通过双层自动化设计，显著提升了有限数据下能源时间序列预测的准确性与鲁棒性。

authors_text: Barnaby Martin,Daniël Paulusma,Siani Smith,Erik Jan van Leeuwen
title: Few Induced Disjoint Paths for $H$-Free Graphs
title_zh: $H$-Free 图几乎没有诱导不相交路径
abstract: Paths $P^1,\ldots,P^k$ in a graph $G=(V,E)$ are mutually induced if any two distinct $P^i$ and $P^j$ have neither common vertices nor adjacent vertices. For a fixed integer $k$, the $k$-Induced Disjoint Paths problem is to decide if a graph $G$ with $k$ pairs of specified vertices $(s_i,t_i)$ contains $k$ mutually induced paths $P^i$ such that each $P^i$ starts from $s_i$ and ends at $t_i$. Whereas the non-induced version is well-known to be polynomial-time solvable for every fixed integer $k$, a classical result from the literature states that even $2$-Induced Disjoint Paths is NP-complete. We prove new complexity results for $k$-Induced Disjoint Paths if the input is restricted to $H$-free graphs, that is, graphs without a fixed graph $H$ as an induced subgraph. We compare our results with a complexity dichotomy for Induced Disjoint Paths, the variant where $k$ is part of the input.
summary: Paths $P^1,\ldots,P^k$ in a graph $G=(V,E)$ are mutually induced if any two distinct $P^i$ and $P^j$ have neither common vertices nor adjacent vertices. For a fixed integer $k$, the $k$-Induced Disjoint Paths problem is to decide if a graph $G$ with $k$ pairs of specified vertices $(s_i,t_i)$ contains $k$ mutually induced paths $P^i$ such that each $P^i$ starts from $s_i$ and ends at $t_i$. Whereas the non-induced version is well-known to be polynomial-time solvable for every fixed integer $k$, a classical result from the literature states that even $2$-Induced Disjoint Paths is NP-complete. We prove new complexity results for $k$-Induced Disjoint Paths if the input is restricted to $H$-free graphs, that is, graphs without a fixed graph $H$ as an induced subgraph. We compare our results with a complexity dichotomy for Induced Disjoint Paths, the variant where $k$ is part of the input.
abstract_zh: 如果任意两个不同的 $P^i$ 和 $P^j$ 既没有公共顶点也没有相邻顶点，则图 $G=(V,E)$ 中的路径 $P^1,\ldots,P^k$ 是互导的。对于固定整数 $k$，$k$ 诱发不相交路径问题是确定具有 $k$ 对指定顶点 $(s_i,t_i)$ 的图 $G$ 是否包含 $k$ 个相互诱发的路径 $P^i$，使得每个 $P^i$ 从 $s_i$ 开始并以 $t_i$ 结束。尽管众所周知，非诱导版本对于每个固定整数 $k$ 都是多项式时间可解的，但文献中的经典结果表明，即使 $2$ 诱导的不相交路径也是 NP 完全的。如果输入仅限于无 $H$ 图，即没有固定图 $H$ 作为诱导子图的图，我们证明 $k$ 诱导不相交路径的新复杂性结果。我们将我们的结果与诱导不相交路径的复杂性二分法进行比较，其中 $k$ 是输入的一部分。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在H-自由图中求解k-诱导不相交路径问题的复杂性，探讨了当输入图被限制为H-自由图时该问题的计算难度。
AI.motivation: 尽管非诱导版本的k-不相交路径问题在固定k时可在多项式时间内求解，但诱导版本即使在k=2时也是NP难的。本文旨在通过限制输入图为H-自由图，分析该问题的复杂性变化。
AI.method: 通过图论分析和复杂性理论，结合H-自由图的结构特性，比较不同H的限制条件对问题复杂性的影响，并与已知的复杂性二分法结果进行对比。
AI.result: 证明了在H-自由图中，k-诱导不相交路径问题的复杂性存在新的分类结果，部分情况下问题可被多项式时间求解，而其他情况仍保持NP难。
AI.conclusion: 该研究为诱导不相交路径问题在受限图类中的复杂性提供了新见解，明确了H的结构对问题可解性的影响，为后续算法设计提供了理论依据。

authors_text: Xianze Fang,Yunkai Wang,Zexi Chen,Yue Wang,Rong Xiong
title: Depth-Independent Depth Completion via Least Square Estimation
title_zh: 通过最小二乘估计实现与深度无关的深度补全
abstract: The depth completion task aims to complete a per-pixel dense depth map from a sparse depth map. In this paper, we propose an efficient least square based depth-independent method to complete the sparse depth map utilizing the RGB image and the sparse depth map in two independent stages. In this way can we decouple the neural network and the sparse depth input, so that when some features of the sparse depth map change, such as the sparsity, our method can still produce a promising result. Moreover, due to the positional encoding and linear procession in our pipeline, we can easily produce a super-resolution dense depth map of high quality. We also test the generalization of our method on different datasets compared to some state-of-the-art algorithms. Experiments on the benchmark show that our method produces competitive performance.
summary: The depth completion task aims to complete a per-pixel dense depth map from a sparse depth map. In this paper, we propose an efficient least square based depth-independent method to complete the sparse depth map utilizing the RGB image and the sparse depth map in two independent stages. In this way can we decouple the neural network and the sparse depth input, so that when some features of the sparse depth map change, such as the sparsity, our method can still produce a promising result. Moreover, due to the positional encoding and linear procession in our pipeline, we can easily produce a super-resolution dense depth map of high quality. We also test the generalization of our method on different datasets compared to some state-of-the-art algorithms. Experiments on the benchmark show that our method produces competitive performance.
abstract_zh: 深度完成任务旨在从稀疏深度图完成每像素密集深度图。在本文中，我们提出了一种有效的基于最小二乘的深度无关方法，利用 RGB 图像和稀疏深度图在两个独立的阶段完成稀疏深度图。通过这种方式，我们可以将神经网络和稀疏深度输入解耦，这样当稀疏深度图的某些特征发生变化时，例如稀疏性，我们的方法仍然可以产生有希望的结果。此外，由于我们的管道中的位置编码和线性处理，我们可以轻松地生成高质量的超分辨率密集深度图。与一些最先进的算法相比，我们还测试了我们的方法在不同数据集上的泛化能力。基准实验表明我们的方法产生了有竞争力的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于最小二乘估计的深度补全方法，旨在从稀疏深度图和RGB图像生成高质量的密集深度图。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在稀疏深度图特征变化时表现不稳定，需一种解耦神经网络与稀疏输入的高效方法以提升鲁棒性和泛化能力。
AI.method: 采用两阶段独立处理RGB图像和稀疏深度图，结合最小二乘估计与位置编码实现线性处理，生成高分辨率深度图。
AI.result: 在多个数据集上的实验表明，该方法在深度补全任务中达到与现有先进算法相当的性能。
AI.conclusion: 提出的方法通过解耦设计和线性处理有效提升了深度补全的鲁棒性与泛化能力，适用于多种实际场景。

authors_text: Lingbing Guo,Yuqiang Han,Qiang Zhang,Huajun Chen
title: Deep Reinforcement Learning for Entity Alignment
title_zh: 用于实体对齐的深度强化学习
abstract: Embedding-based methods have attracted increasing attention in recent entity alignment (EA) studies. Although great promise they can offer, there are still several limitations. The most notable is that they identify the aligned entities based on cosine similarity, ignoring the semantics underlying the embeddings themselves. Furthermore, these methods are shortsighted, heuristically selecting the closest entity as the target and allowing multiple entities to match the same candidate. To address these limitations, we model entity alignment as a sequential decision-making task, in which an agent sequentially decides whether two entities are matched or mismatched based on their representation vectors. The proposed reinforcement learning (RL)-based entity alignment framework can be flexibly adapted to most embedding-based EA methods. The experimental results demonstrate that it consistently advances the performance of several state-of-the-art methods, with a maximum improvement of 31.1% on Hits@1.
summary: Embedding-based methods have attracted increasing attention in recent entity alignment (EA) studies. Although great promise they can offer, there are still several limitations. The most notable is that they identify the aligned entities based on cosine similarity, ignoring the semantics underlying the embeddings themselves. Furthermore, these methods are shortsighted, heuristically selecting the closest entity as the target and allowing multiple entities to match the same candidate. To address these limitations, we model entity alignment as a sequential decision-making task, in which an agent sequentially decides whether two entities are matched or mismatched based on their representation vectors. The proposed reinforcement learning (RL)-based entity alignment framework can be flexibly adapted to most embedding-based EA methods. The experimental results demonstrate that it consistently advances the performance of several state-of-the-art methods, with a maximum improvement of 31.1% on Hits@1.
abstract_zh: 基于嵌入的方法在最近的实体对齐（EA）研究中引起了越来越多的关注。尽管它们可以提供巨大的希望，但仍然存在一些限制。最值得注意的是，它们根据余弦相似度来识别对齐的实体，而忽略了嵌入本身背后的语义。此外，这些方法是短视的，启发式地选择最接近的实体作为目标，并允许多个实体匹配相同的候选者。为了解决这些限制，我们将实体对齐建模为顺序决策任务，其中代理根据两个实体的表示向量顺序决定两个实体是否匹配或不匹配。所提出的基于强化学习（RL）的实体对齐框架可以灵活地适应大多数基于嵌入的 EA 方法。实验结果表明，它持续提高了几种最先进方法的性能，在 Hits@1 上最大提高了 31.1%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于深度强化学习的实体对齐方法，通过建模为顺序决策任务解决现有嵌入方法的局限性。
AI.motivation: 现有嵌入方法依赖余弦相似度忽略语义信息，且短视地选择最近实体导致多对一匹配问题。
AI.method: 将实体对齐建模为顺序决策任务，使用强化学习框架让智能体根据嵌入向量判断实体匹配关系，并适配多数嵌入方法。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法在多个先进模型上性能提升显著，Hits@1指标最高提升31.1%。
AI.conclusion: 强化学习框架有效解决了实体对齐中的语义理解与多对一匹配问题，验证了其在该领域的应用潜力。

authors_text: Fan Zhang,Duyu Tang,Yong Dai,Cong Zhou,Shuangzhi Wu,Shuming Shi
title: SkillNet-NLU: A Sparsely Activated Model for General-Purpose Natural Language Understanding
title_zh: SkillNet-NLU：通用自然语言理解的稀疏激活模型
abstract: Prevailing deep models are single-purpose and overspecialize at individual tasks. However, when being extended to new tasks, they typically forget previously learned skills and learn from scratch. We address this issue by introducing SkillNet-NLU, a general-purpose model that stitches together existing skills to learn new tasks more effectively. The key feature of our approach is that it is sparsely activated guided by predefined skills. Different from traditional dense models that always activate all the model parameters, SkillNet-NLU only activates parts of the model parameters whose skills are relevant to the target task. When learning for a new task, our approach precisely activates required skills and also provides an option to add new skills. We evaluate on natural language understandings tasks and have the following findings. First, with only one model checkpoint, SkillNet-NLU performs better than task-specific fine-tuning and two multi-task learning baselines (i.e., dense model and Mixture-of-Experts model) on six tasks. Second, sparsely activated pre-training further improves the overall performance. Third, SkillNet-NLU significantly outperforms baseline systems when being extended to new tasks.
summary: Prevailing deep models are single-purpose and overspecialize at individual tasks. However, when being extended to new tasks, they typically forget previously learned skills and learn from scratch. We address this issue by introducing SkillNet-NLU, a general-purpose model that stitches together existing skills to learn new tasks more effectively. The key feature of our approach is that it is sparsely activated guided by predefined skills. Different from traditional dense models that always activate all the model parameters, SkillNet-NLU only activates parts of the model parameters whose skills are relevant to the target task. When learning for a new task, our approach precisely activates required skills and also provides an option to add new skills. We evaluate on natural language understandings tasks and have the following findings. First, with only one model checkpoint, SkillNet-NLU performs better than task-specific fine-tuning and two multi-task learning baselines (i.e., dense model and Mixture-of-Experts model) on six tasks. Second, sparsely activated pre-training further improves the overall performance. Third, SkillNet-NLU significantly outperforms baseline systems when being extended to new tasks.
abstract_zh: 流行的深度模型目的单一，并且过度专注于单个任务。然而，当扩展到新任务时，他们通常会忘记以前学到的技能并从头开始学习。我们通过引入 SkillNet-NLU 来解决这个问题，这是一种通用模型，可以将现有技能拼接在一起以更有效地学习新任务。我们方法的关键特征是它是在预定义技能的指导下稀疏激活的。与总是激活所有模型参数的传统稠密模型不同，SkillNet-NLU 仅激活与目标任务相关的部分模型参数。当学习新任务时，我们的方法可以精确激活所需的技能，并提供添加新技能的选项。我们评估自然语言理解任务并得出以下发现。首先，在只有一个模型检查点的情况下，SkillNet-NLU 在六项任务上的表现优于特定于任务的微调和两个多任务学习基线（即密集模型和专家混合模型）。其次，稀疏激活的预训练进一步提高了整体性能。第三，当扩展到新任务时，SkillNet-NLU 的性能显着优于基线系统。

AI.tldr: 提出SkillNet-NLU模型，通过稀疏激活机制解决通用自然语言理解中模型扩展性问题。
AI.motivation: 现有深度模型单任务专用，扩展新任务时易遗忘旧技能且需从头学习，需更高效的多任务学习方法。
AI.method: 基于预定义技能稀疏激活模型参数，仅激活与目标任务相关的模块，并支持新增技能。
AI.result: 在六个NLU任务中，单模型检查点性能优于任务微调及两种多任务基线；稀疏预训练进一步提升效果，扩展新任务时显著超越基线系统。
AI.conclusion: SkillNet-NLU通过稀疏激活机制有效提升通用自然语言理解任务的模型扩展性与性能。

motivation: 现有深度模型单任务专用，扩展新任务时易遗忘旧技能且需从头学习，需更高效的多任务学习方法。
method: 基于预定义技能稀疏激活模型参数，仅激活与目标任务相关的模块，并支持新增技能。
result: 在六个NLU任务中，单模型检查点性能优于任务微调及两种多任务基线；稀疏预训练进一步提升效果，扩展新任务时显著超越基线系统。
conclusion: SkillNet-NLU通过稀疏激活机制有效提升通用自然语言理解任务的模型扩展性与性能。
search_text: SkillNet-NLU: A Sparsely Activated Model for General-Purpose Natural Language Understanding SkillNet-NLU：通用自然语言理解的稀疏激活模型 Prevailing deep models are single-purpose and overspecialize at individual tasks. However, when being extended to new tasks, they typically forget previously learned skills and learn from scratch. We address this issue by introducing SkillNet-NLU, a general-purpose model that stitches together existing skills to learn new tasks more effectively. The key feature of our approach is that it is sparsely activated guided by predefined skills. Different from traditional dense models that always activate all the model parameters, SkillNet-NLU only activates parts of the model parameters whose skills are relevant to the target task. When learning for a new task, our approach precisely activates required skills and also provides an option to add new skills. We evaluate on natural language understandings tasks and have the following findings. First, with only one model checkpoint, SkillNet-NLU performs better than task-specific fine-tuning and two multi-task learning baselines (i.e., dense model and Mixture-of-Experts model) on six tasks. Second, sparsely activated pre-training further improves the overall performance. Third, SkillNet-NLU significantly outperforms baseline systems when being extended to new tasks. 流行的深度模型目的单一，并且过度专注于单个任务。然而，当扩展到新任务时，他们通常会忘记以前学到的技能并从头开始学习。我们通过引入 SkillNet-NLU 来解决这个问题，这是一种通用模型，可以将现有技能拼接在一起以更有效地学习新任务。我们方法的关键特征是它是在预定义技能的指导下稀疏激活的。与总是激活所有模型参数的传统稠密模型不同，SkillNet-NLU 仅激活与目标任务相关的部分模型参数。当学习新任务时，我们的方法可以精确激活所需的技能，并提供添加新技能的选项。我们评估自然语言理解任务并得出以下发现。首先，在只有一个模型检查点的情况下，SkillNet-NLU 在六项任务上的表现优于特定于任务的微调和两个多任务学习基线（即密集模型和专家混合模型）。其次，稀疏激活的预训练进一步提高了整体性能。第三，当扩展到新任务时，SkillNet-NLU 的性能显着优于基线系统。 提出SkillNet-NLU模型，通过稀疏激活机制解决通用自然语言理解中模型扩展性问题。 Fan Zhang,Duyu Tang,Yong Dai,Cong Zhou,Shuangzhi Wu,Shuming Shi cs.CL,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Ben Fei,Weidong Yang,Wenming Chen,Zhijun Li,Yikang Li,Tao Ma,Xing Hu,Lipeng Ma
title: Comprehensive Review of Deep Learning-Based 3D Point Cloud Completion Processing and Analysis
title_zh: 基于深度学习的3D点云补全处理与分析综述
comment: ef:IEEE Transactions on Intelligent Transportation Systems 23 (2022) 22862-22883
comments: ef:IEEE Transactions on Intelligent Transportation Systems 23 (2022) 22862-22883
abstract: Point cloud completion is a generation and estimation issue derived from the partial point clouds, which plays a vital role in the applications in 3D computer vision. The progress of deep learning (DL) has impressively improved the capability and robustness of point cloud completion. However, the quality of completed point clouds is still needed to be further enhanced to meet the practical utilization. Therefore, this work aims to conduct a comprehensive survey on various methods, including point-based, convolution-based, graph-based, and generative model-based approaches, etc. And this survey summarizes the comparisons among these methods to provoke further research insights. Besides, this review sums up the commonly used datasets and illustrates the applications of point cloud completion. Eventually, we also discussed possible research trends in this promptly expanding field.
summary: Point cloud completion is a generation and estimation issue derived from the partial point clouds, which plays a vital role in the applications in 3D computer vision. Therefore, this work aims to conduct a comprehensive survey on various methods, including point-based, convolution-based, graph-based, and generative model-based approaches, etc. And this survey summarizes the comparisons among these methods to provoke further research insights. Besides, this review sums up the commonly used datasets and illustrates the applications of point cloud completion. Eventually, we also discussed possible research trends in this promptly expanding field.
abstract_zh: 点云补全是由部分点云衍生的生成和估计问题，在3D计算机视觉的应用中起着至关重要的作用。深度学习（DL）的进步显着提高了点云补全的能力和鲁棒性。但完成的点云质量仍需进一步提高以满足实际使用。因此，本工作旨在对各种方法进行全面的调查，包括基于点、基于卷积、基于图和基于生成模型的方法等。并且本调查总结了这些方法之间的比较，以激发进一步的研究见解。此外，本综述总结了常用的数据集并说明了点云补全的应用。最后，我们还讨论了这个迅速扩展的领域可能的研究趋势。

AI.tldr: 本文对基于深度学习的3D点云补全方法进行全面综述，比较不同技术并总结应用与趋势。
AI.motivation: 尽管深度学习提升了点云补全的效果，但其质量仍有待提升，需系统总结现有方法以指导未来研究。
AI.method: 通过分类和比较不同技术路线（如点基、卷积基、图基和生成模型），总结常用数据集及应用场景。
AI.result: 系统比较了各类方法的优缺点，总结了主流数据集和实际应用场景，并指出现有挑战。
AI.conclusion: 未来研究需关注方法优化、跨领域应用及高效算法设计，以提升点云补全质量与实用性。

authors_text: Zhangjie Tu,Tianwei Zhang,Lei Yan,Tin lun Lam
title: Whole-Body Control for Velocity-Controlled Mobile Collaborative Robots Using Coupling Dynamic Movement Primitives
title_zh: 使用耦合动态运动基元的速度控制移动协作机器人的全身控制
abstract: In this paper, we propose a unified whole-body control framework for velocity-controlled mobile collaborative robots which can distribute task motion into the arm and mobile base according to specific task requirements by adjusting weighting factors. Our framework focuses on addressing two challenging issues in whole-body coordination: 1) different dynamic characteristics of the mobile base and the arm; 2) avoidance of violating both safety and configuration constraints. In addition, our controller involves Coupling Dynamic Movement Primitives to enable the essential capabilities for collaboration and interaction applications, such as obstacle avoidance, human teaching, and compliance control. Based on these, we design an adaptive motion mode for intuitive physical human-robot interaction through adjusting the weighting factors. The proposed controller is in closed-form and thus quite computationally efficient. Several typical experiments carried out on a real mobile collaborative robot validate the effectiveness of the proposed controller.
summary: In this paper, we propose a unified whole-body control framework for velocity-controlled mobile collaborative robots which can distribute task motion into the arm and mobile base according to specific task requirements by adjusting weighting factors. Our framework focuses on addressing two challenging issues in whole-body coordination: 1) different dynamic characteristics of the mobile base and the arm; 2) avoidance of violating both safety and configuration constraints. In addition, our controller involves Coupling Dynamic Movement Primitives to enable the essential capabilities for collaboration and interaction applications, such as obstacle avoidance, human teaching, and compliance control. Based on these, we design an adaptive motion mode for intuitive physical human-robot interaction through adjusting the weighting factors. The proposed controller is in closed-form and thus quite computationally efficient. Several typical experiments carried out on a real mobile collaborative robot validate the effectiveness of the proposed controller.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了一种速度控制移动协作机器人的统一全身控制框架，该框架可以根据特定任务要求通过调整权重因子将任务运动分配到手臂和移动底座上。我们的框架重点解决全身协调中的两个具有挑战性的问题：1）移动底座和手臂的不同动态特性； 2) 避免违反安全和配置限制。此外，我们的控制器还涉及耦合动态运动基元，以实现协作和交互应用程序的基本功能，例如避障、人类教学和合规控制。在此基础上，我们通过调整权重因子设计了一种自适应运动模式，用于直观的物理人机交互。所提出的控制器是封闭形式的，因此计算效率很高。在真实的移动协作机器人上进行的几个典型实验验证了所提出的控制器的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种用于速度控制移动协作机器人的全身控制框架，通过调整权重因子分配任务运动至机械臂和移动底座，并解决动态特性差异及约束问题。
AI.motivation: 现有全身协调控制难以应对移动底座与机械臂的动力学差异，且易违反安全与配置约束，需提升协作机器人在复杂环境中的交互能力。
AI.method: 设计耦合动态运动基元（CDMP）控制器，通过调整权重因子分配运动任务，结合闭式解计算保证计算效率，并集成避障与合规控制功能。
AI.result: 在真实移动协作机器人上进行的实验验证了控制器在动态任务分配、约束满足及人机交互中的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该框架通过统一控制策略解决了移动协作机器人的动力学差异与约束问题，为复杂场景下的物理交互应用提供了高效解决方案。

authors_text: Joery A. de Vries,Thomas M. Moerland,Aske Plaat
title: On Credit Assignment in Hierarchical Reinforcement Learning
title_zh: 分层强化学习中的学分分配
comment: Code and Data available at: https://github.com/joeryjoery/HierQ
comments: Code and Data available at: https://github.com/joeryjoery/HierQ
abstract: Hierarchical Reinforcement Learning (HRL) has held longstanding promise to advance reinforcement learning. Yet, it has remained a considerable challenge to develop practical algorithms that exhibit some of these promises. To improve our fundamental understanding of HRL, we investigate hierarchical credit assignment from the perspective of conventional multistep reinforcement learning. We show how e.g., a 1-step `hierarchical backup' can be seen as a conventional multistep backup with $n$ skip connections over time connecting each subsequent state to the first independent of actions inbetween. Furthermore, we find that generalizing hierarchy to multistep return estimation methods requires us to consider how to partition the environment trace, in order to construct backup paths. We leverage these insight to develop a new hierarchical algorithm Hier$Q_k(λ)$, for which we demonstrate that hierarchical credit assignment alone can already boost agent performance (i.e., when eliminating generalization or exploration). Altogether, our work yields fundamental insight into the nature of hierarchical backups and distinguishes this as an additional basis for reinforcement learning research.
summary: Hierarchical Reinforcement Learning (HRL) has held longstanding promise to advance reinforcement learning. Yet, it has remained a considerable challenge to develop practical algorithms that exhibit some of these promises. To improve our fundamental understanding of HRL, we investigate hierarchical credit assignment from the perspective of conventional multistep reinforcement learning. We show how e.g., a 1-step `hierarchical backup' can be seen as a conventional multistep backup with $n$ skip connections over time connecting each subsequent state to the first independent of actions inbetween. Furthermore, we find that generalizing hierarchy to multistep return estimation methods requires us to consider how to partition the environment trace, in order to construct backup paths. We leverage these insight to develop a new hierarchical algorithm Hier$Q_k(λ)$, for which we demonstrate that hierarchical credit assignment alone can already boost agent performance (i.e., when eliminating generalization or exploration). Altogether, our work yields fundamental insight into the nature of hierarchical backups and distinguishes this as an additional basis for reinforcement learning research.
abstract_zh: 分层强化学习 (HRL) 长期以来一直致力于推进强化学习。然而，开发能够展现其中一些前景的实用算法仍然是一个相当大的挑战。为了提高我们对 HRL 的基本理解，我们从传统的多步强化学习的角度研究了分层信用分配。我们展示了如何将单步“分层备份”视为传统的多步备份，随着时间的推移，$n$ 跳过连接将每个后续状态连接到第一个独立于其间动作的状态。此外，我们发现将层次结构推广到多步返回估计方法需要我们考虑如何划分环境跟踪，以便构建备份路径。我们利用这些见解开发了一种新的分层算法 Hier$Q_k(λ)$，为此我们证明仅分层信用分配就已经可以提高代理性能（即消除泛化或探索时）。总而言之，我们的工作对分层备份的本质产生了基本的洞察，并将其区分为强化学习研究的额外基础。

AI.tldr: 本文研究分层强化学习中的信用分配机制，提出一种新的分层算法Hier$Q_k(λ)$，并通过理论分析和实验验证其有效性。
AI.motivation: 尽管分层强化学习（HRL）具有潜力，但实际算法开发面临挑战，需深入理解分层备份机制以推动算法进展。
AI.method: 从传统多步强化学习视角分析分层备份，将一步分层备份视为多步备份的扩展，并设计环境轨迹划分方法，构建Hier$Q_k(λ)$算法。
AI.result: 实验表明，仅通过分层信用分配即可提升智能体性能，尤其在消除泛化或探索因素时效果显著。
AI.conclusion: 研究揭示了分层备份的本质，为强化学习提供了新的理论基础和算法设计方向。

search_text: On Credit Assignment in Hierarchical Reinforcement Learning 分层强化学习中的学分分配 Hierarchical Reinforcement Learning (HRL) has held longstanding promise to advance reinforcement learning. Yet, it has remained a considerable challenge to develop practical algorithms that exhibit some of these promises. To improve our fundamental understanding of HRL, we investigate hierarchical credit assignment from the perspective of conventional multistep reinforcement learning. We show how e.g., a 1-step `hierarchical backup' can be seen as a conventional multistep backup with $n$ skip connections over time connecting each subsequent state to the first independent of actions inbetween. Furthermore, we find that generalizing hierarchy to multistep return estimation methods requires us to consider how to partition the environment trace, in order to construct backup paths. We leverage these insight to develop a new hierarchical algorithm Hier$Q_k(λ)$, for which we demonstrate that hierarchical credit assignment alone can already boost agent performance (i.e., when eliminating generalization or exploration). Altogether, our work yields fundamental insight into the nature of hierarchical backups and distinguishes this as an additional basis for reinforcement learning research. 分层强化学习 (HRL) 长期以来一直致力于推进强化学习。然而，开发能够展现其中一些前景的实用算法仍然是一个相当大的挑战。为了提高我们对 HRL 的基本理解，我们从传统的多步强化学习的角度研究了分层信用分配。我们展示了如何将单步“分层备份”视为传统的多步备份，随着时间的推移，$n$ 跳过连接将每个后续状态连接到第一个独立于其间动作的状态。此外，我们发现将层次结构推广到多步返回估计方法需要我们考虑如何划分环境跟踪，以便构建备份路径。我们利用这些见解开发了一种新的分层算法 Hier$Q_k(λ)$，为此我们证明仅分层信用分配就已经可以提高代理性能（即消除泛化或探索时）。总而言之，我们的工作对分层备份的本质产生了基本的洞察，并将其区分为强化学习研究的额外基础。 本文研究分层强化学习中的信用分配机制，提出一种新的分层算法Hier$Q_k(λ)$，并通过理论分析和实验验证其有效性。 Joery A. de Vries,Thomas M. Moerland,Aske Plaat cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Davide Berghi,Adrian Hilton,Philip J. B. Jackson
title: Visually Supervised Speaker Detection and Localization via Microphone Array
title_zh: 通过麦克风阵列进行视觉监督的说话人检测和定位
comment: Erratum: Due to a bug in the evaluation script, the correct average distance (aD) metric is here reported in yellow. The analysis remains unchanged from the original paper as the trend between the old and new measures are perfectly monotonic. The bug was caused by an incorrect normalization factor
comments: Erratum: Due to a bug in the evaluation script, the correct average distance (aD) metric is here reported in yellow. The analysis remains unchanged from the original paper as the trend between the old and new measures are perfectly monotonic. The bug was caused by an incorrect normalization factor
abstract: Active speaker detection (ASD) is a multi-modal task that aims to identify who, if anyone, is speaking from a set of candidates. Current audio-visual approaches for ASD typically rely on visually pre-extracted face tracks (sequences of consecutive face crops) and the respective monaural audio. However, their recall rate is often low as only the visible faces are included in the set of candidates. Monaural audio may successfully detect the presence of speech activity but fails in localizing the speaker due to the lack of spatial cues. Our solution extends the audio front-end using a microphone array. We train an audio convolutional neural network (CNN) in combination with beamforming techniques to regress the speaker's horizontal position directly in the video frames. We propose to generate weak labels using a pre-trained active speaker detector on pre-extracted face tracks. Our pipeline embraces the "student-teacher" paradigm, where a trained "teacher" network is used to produce pseudo-labels visually. The "student" network is an audio network trained to generate the same results. At inference, the student network can independently localize the speaker in the visual frames directly from the audio input. Experimental results on newly collected data prove that our approach significantly outperforms a variety of other baselines as well as the teacher network itself. It results in an excellent speech activity detector too.
summary: Active speaker detection (ASD) is a multi-modal task that aims to identify who, if anyone, is speaking from a set of candidates. Current audio-visual approaches for ASD typically rely on visually pre-extracted face tracks (sequences of consecutive face crops) and the respective monaural audio. However, their recall rate is often low as only the visible faces are included in the set of candidates. Monaural audio may successfully detect the presence of speech activity but fails in localizing the speaker due to the lack of spatial cues. Our solution extends the audio front-end using a microphone array. We train an audio convolutional neural network (CNN) in combination with beamforming techniques to regress the speaker's horizontal position directly in the video frames. We propose to generate weak labels using a pre-trained active speaker detector on pre-extracted face tracks. Our pipeline embraces the "student-teacher" paradigm, where a trained "teacher" network is used to produce pseudo-labels visually. The "student" network is an audio network trained to generate the same results. At inference, the student network can independently localize the speaker in the visual frames directly from the audio input. Experimental results on newly collected data prove that our approach significantly outperforms a variety of other baselines as well as the teacher network itself. It results in an excellent speech activity detector too.
abstract_zh: 主动说话人检测 (ASD) 是一项多模态任务，旨在识别一组候选者中谁（如果有的话）正在说话。当前 ASD 的视听方法通常依赖于视觉上预先提取的面部轨迹（连续面部裁剪的序列）和相应的单声道音频。然而，它们的召回率通常很低，因为候选集中仅包含可见的面孔。单声道音频可以成功检测语音活动的存在，但由于缺乏空间线索而无法定位说话者。我们的解决方案使用麦克风阵列扩展音频前端。我们结合波束成形技术训练音频卷积神经网络 (CNN)，以直接在视频帧中回归说话者的水平位置。我们建议使用预先训练的主动说话人检测器在预先提取的面部轨迹上生成弱标签。我们的管道采用“学生-教师”范式，其中训练有素的“教师”网络用于直观地生成伪标签。 “学生”网络是经过训练可生成相同结果的音频网络。由此推断，学生网络可以直接根据音频输入独立地在视觉帧中定位说话者。新收集的数据的实验结果证明，我们的方法显着优于各种其他基线以及教师网络本身。它也产生了出色的语音活动检测器。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于麦克风阵列和视觉监督的说话者检测与定位方法，通过音频前端扩展和'学生-教师'范式提升检测性能。
AI.motivation: 现有视听方法因仅依赖可见人脸候选集和单声道音频缺乏空间线索，导致召回率低且无法精确定位说话者。
AI.method: 结合麦克风阵列的音频CNN与波束成形技术回归水平位置，利用预训练检测器生成弱标签，采用'学生-教师'范式训练音频网络直接定位。
AI.result: 在新数据集上显著优于多种基线方法及教师网络本身，同时实现优秀语音活动检测效果。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过融合麦克风阵列与视觉监督，有效解决了说话者定位难题，为多模态ASD任务提供了新思路。

authors_text: Nicola Garau,Niccolò Bisagno,Zeno Sambugaro,Nicola Conci
title: Interpretable part-whole hierarchies and conceptual-semantic relationships in neural networks
title_zh: 神经网络中可解释的部分整体层次结构和概念语义关系
abstract: Deep neural networks achieve outstanding results in a large variety of tasks, often outperforming human experts. However, a known limitation of current neural architectures is the poor accessibility to understand and interpret the network response to a given input. This is directly related to the huge number of variables and the associated non-linearities of neural models, which are often used as black boxes. When it comes to critical applications as autonomous driving, security and safety, medicine and health, the lack of interpretability of the network behavior tends to induce skepticism and limited trustworthiness, despite the accurate performance of such systems in the given task. Furthermore, a single metric, such as the classification accuracy, provides a non-exhaustive evaluation of most real-world scenarios. In this paper, we want to make a step forward towards interpretability in neural networks, providing new tools to interpret their behavior. We present Agglomerator, a framework capable of providing a representation of part-whole hierarchies from visual cues and organizing the input distribution matching the conceptual-semantic hierarchical structure between classes. We evaluate our method on common datasets, such as SmallNORB, MNIST, FashionMNIST, CIFAR-10, and CIFAR-100, providing a more interpretable model than other state-of-the-art approaches.
summary: Deep neural networks achieve outstanding results in a large variety of tasks, often outperforming human experts. However, a known limitation of current neural architectures is the poor accessibility to understand and interpret the network response to a given input. This is directly related to the huge number of variables and the associated non-linearities of neural models, which are often used as black boxes. When it comes to critical applications as autonomous driving, security and safety, medicine and health, the lack of interpretability of the network behavior tends to induce skepticism and limited trustworthiness, despite the accurate performance of such systems in the given task. Furthermore, a single metric, such as the classification accuracy, provides a non-exhaustive evaluation of most real-world scenarios. In this paper, we want to make a step forward towards interpretability in neural networks, providing new tools to interpret their behavior. We present Agglomerator, a framework capable of providing a representation of part-whole hierarchies from visual cues and organizing the input distribution matching the conceptual-semantic hierarchical structure between classes. We evaluate our method on common datasets, such as SmallNORB, MNIST, FashionMNIST, CIFAR-10, and CIFAR-100, providing a more interpretable model than other state-of-the-art approaches.
abstract_zh: 深度神经网络在多种任务中取得了出色的成果，通常优于人类专家。然而，当前神经架构的一个已知限制是理解和解释网络对给定输入的响应的可访问性较差。这与神经模型的大量变量和相关的非线性直接相关，神经模型通常被用作黑匣子。当涉及自动驾驶、安保和安全、医学和健康等关键应用时，尽管此类系统在给定任务中表现准确，但网络行为缺乏可解释性往往会引起怀疑和可信度有限。此外，单个指标（例如分类准确性）可以对大多数现实场景进行非详尽的评估。在本文中，我们希望在神经网络的可解释性方面向前迈出一步，提供新的工具来解释其行为。我们提出了 Agglomerator，一个框架，能够根据视觉线索提供部分-整体层次结构的表示，并组织与类之间的概念语义层次结构相匹配的输入分布。我们在 SmallNORB、MNIST、FashionMNIST、CIFAR-10 和 CIFAR-100 等常见数据集上评估我们的方法，提供比其他最先进的方法更可解释的模型。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在通过提出Agglomerator框架，提升神经网络的可解释性，生成可解释的部分-整体层次结构和概念-语义关系。
AI.motivation: 当前神经网络因黑箱特性导致可解释性不足，在安全关键领域引发信任危机，且单一性能指标无法全面评估实际应用效果。
AI.method: 开发Agglomerator框架，通过视觉线索构建部分-整体层次结构，并对齐输入分布与类间概念-语义层级关系。
AI.result: 在SmallNORB、MNIST、CIFAR-10等数据集验证中，该方法较现有技术展现出更优的模型可解释性。
AI.conclusion: Agglomerator为神经网络可解释性研究提供了新工具，证明结构化语义建模可有效提升模型透明度与可信度。

search_text: Interpretable part-whole hierarchies and conceptual-semantic relationships in neural networks 神经网络中可解释的部分整体层次结构和概念语义关系 Deep neural networks achieve outstanding results in a large variety of tasks, often outperforming human experts. However, a known limitation of current neural architectures is the poor accessibility to understand and interpret the network response to a given input. This is directly related to the huge number of variables and the associated non-linearities of neural models, which are often used as black boxes. When it comes to critical applications as autonomous driving, security and safety, medicine and health, the lack of interpretability of the network behavior tends to induce skepticism and limited trustworthiness, despite the accurate performance of such systems in the given task. Furthermore, a single metric, such as the classification accuracy, provides a non-exhaustive evaluation of most real-world scenarios. In this paper, we want to make a step forward towards interpretability in neural networks, providing new tools to interpret their behavior. We present Agglomerator, a framework capable of providing a representation of part-whole hierarchies from visual cues and organizing the input distribution matching the conceptual-semantic hierarchical structure between classes. We evaluate our method on common datasets, such as SmallNORB, MNIST, FashionMNIST, CIFAR-10, and CIFAR-100, providing a more interpretable model than other state-of-the-art approaches. 深度神经网络在多种任务中取得了出色的成果，通常优于人类专家。然而，当前神经架构的一个已知限制是理解和解释网络对给定输入的响应的可访问性较差。这与神经模型的大量变量和相关的非线性直接相关，神经模型通常被用作黑匣子。当涉及自动驾驶、安保和安全、医学和健康等关键应用时，尽管此类系统在给定任务中表现准确，但网络行为缺乏可解释性往往会引起怀疑和可信度有限。此外，单个指标（例如分类准确性）可以对大多数现实场景进行非详尽的评估。在本文中，我们希望在神经网络的可解释性方面向前迈出一步，提供新的工具来解释其行为。我们提出了 Agglomerator，一个框架，能够根据视觉线索提供部分-整体层次结构的表示，并组织与类之间的概念语义层次结构相匹配的输入分布。我们在 SmallNORB、MNIST、FashionMNIST、CIFAR-10 和 CIFAR-100 等常见数据集上评估我们的方法，提供比其他最先进的方法更可解释的模型。 本文旨在通过提出Agglomerator框架，提升神经网络的可解释性，生成可解释的部分-整体层次结构和概念-语义关系。 Nicola Garau,Niccolò Bisagno,Zeno Sambugaro,Nicola Conci cs.CV

authors_text: Pieter Cawood,Terence van Zyl
title: Evaluating State of the Art, Forecasting Ensembles- and Meta-learning Strategies for Model Fusion
title_zh: 评估模型融合的最新技术、预测集成和元学习策略
abstract: Techniques of hybridisation and ensemble learning are popular model fusion techniques for improving the predictive power of forecasting methods. With limited research that instigates combining these two promising approaches, this paper focuses on the utility of the Exponential-Smoothing-Recurrent Neural Network (ES-RNN) in the pool of base models for different ensembles. We compare against some state of the art ensembling techniques and arithmetic model averaging as a benchmark. We experiment with the M4 forecasting data set of 100,000 time-series, and the results show that the Feature-based Forecast Model Averaging (FFORMA), on average, is the best technique for late data fusion with the ES-RNN. However, considering the M4's Daily subset of data, stacking was the only successful ensemble at dealing with the case where all base model performances are similar. Our experimental results indicate that we attain state of the art forecasting results compared to N-BEATS as a benchmark. We conclude that model averaging is a more robust ensemble than model selection and stacking strategies. Further, the results show that gradient boosting is superior for implementing ensemble learning strategies.
summary: Techniques of hybridisation and ensemble learning are popular model fusion techniques for improving the predictive power of forecasting methods. With limited research that instigates combining these two promising approaches, this paper focuses on the utility of the Exponential-Smoothing-Recurrent Neural Network (ES-RNN) in the pool of base models for different ensembles. We compare against some state of the art ensembling techniques and arithmetic model averaging as a benchmark. We experiment with the M4 forecasting data set of 100,000 time-series, and the results show that the Feature-based Forecast Model Averaging (FFORMA), on average, is the best technique for late data fusion with the ES-RNN. However, considering the M4's Daily subset of data, stacking was the only successful ensemble at dealing with the case where all base model performances are similar. Our experimental results indicate that we attain state of the art forecasting results compared to N-BEATS as a benchmark. We conclude that model averaging is a more robust ensemble than model selection and stacking strategies. Further, the results show that gradient boosting is superior for implementing ensemble learning strategies.
abstract_zh: 混合和集成学习技术是流行的模型融合技术，用于提高预测方法的预测能力。由于将这两种有前途的方法结合起来的研究有限，本文重点关注指数平滑递归神经网络（ES-RNN）在不同集成的基础模型池中的效用。我们将一些最先进的集成技术和算术模型平均作为基准进行比较。我们用 100,000 个时间序列的 M4 预测数据集进行实验，结果表明，平均而言，基于特征的预测模型平均（FFORMA）是与 ES-RNN 进行后期数据融合的最佳技术。然而，考虑到 M4 的每日数据子集，堆叠是处理所有基本模型性能相似的情况的唯一成功的集成。我们的实验结果表明，与作为基准的 N-BEATS 相比，我们获得了最先进的预测结果。我们的结论是，模型平均是比模型选择和堆叠策略更稳健的集成。此外，结果表明梯度提升对于实施集成学习策略更为优越。

AI.tldr: 本文评估了结合指数平滑循环神经网络（ES-RNN）的集成学习与元学习策略在时间序列预测中的效果，并与先进方法进行比较。
AI.motivation: 现有研究缺乏对混合模型与集成学习结合的有效性探索，需验证ES-RNN在不同集成策略中的表现并优化预测性能。
AI.method: 基于M4数据集（含10万时间序列），对比实验包括特征级模型平均（FFORMA）、堆叠（Stacking）等集成方法，以N-BEATS为基准模型。
AI.result: FFORMA在ES-RNN晚融合中表现最佳；当基模型性能相近时，堆叠更有效；模型平均优于模型选择与堆叠，梯度提升在集成策略中更具优势。
AI.conclusion: 模型平均策略比模型选择和堆叠更稳健，梯度提升是实现集成学习的更优方法，ES-RNN在融合框架中具有竞争力。

authors_text: Bin Zhang,Yunpeng Bai,Zhiwei Xu,Dapeng Li,Guoliang Fan
title: Efficient Policy Generation in Multi-Agent Systems via Hypergraph Neural Network
title_zh: 通过超图神经网络在多代理系统中高效生成策略
abstract: The application of deep reinforcement learning in multi-agent systems introduces extra challenges. In a scenario with numerous agents, one of the most important concerns currently being addressed is how to develop sufficient collaboration between diverse agents. To address this problem, we consider the form of agent interaction based on neighborhood and propose a multi-agent reinforcement learning (MARL) algorithm based on the actor-critic method, which can adaptively construct the hypergraph structure representing the agent interaction and further implement effective information extraction and representation learning through hypergraph convolution networks, leading to effective cooperation. Based on different hypergraph generation methods, we present two variants: Actor Hypergraph Convolutional Critic Network (HGAC) and Actor Attention Hypergraph Critic Network (ATT-HGAC). Experiments with different settings demonstrate the advantages of our approach over other existing methods.
summary: The application of deep reinforcement learning in multi-agent systems introduces extra challenges. In a scenario with numerous agents, one of the most important concerns currently being addressed is how to develop sufficient collaboration between diverse agents. To address this problem, we consider the form of agent interaction based on neighborhood and propose a multi-agent reinforcement learning (MARL) algorithm based on the actor-critic method, which can adaptively construct the hypergraph structure representing the agent interaction and further implement effective information extraction and representation learning through hypergraph convolution networks, leading to effective cooperation. Based on different hypergraph generation methods, we present two variants: Actor Hypergraph Convolutional Critic Network (HGAC) and Actor Attention Hypergraph Critic Network (ATT-HGAC). Experiments with different settings demonstrate the advantages of our approach over other existing methods.
abstract_zh: 深度强化学习在多智能体系统中的应用带来了额外的挑战。在拥有众多智能体的场景中，当前需要解决的最重要问题之一是如何在不同智能体之间建立充分的协作。为了解决这个问题，我们考虑基于邻域的智能体交互形式，提出一种基于行动者批评家方法的多智能体强化学习（MARL）算法，该算法可以自适应地构造代表智能体交互的超图结构，并进一步通过超图卷积网络实现有效的信息提取和表示学习，从而实现有效的合作。基于不同的超图生成方法，我们提出了两种变体：Actor Hypergraph Convolutional Critic Network (HGAC) 和 Actor Attention Hypergraph Critic Network (ATT-HGAC)。不同设置的实验证明了我们的方法相对于其他现有方法的优势。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于超图神经网络的多智能体强化学习算法，解决多智能体系统中协作效率问题。
AI.motivation: 现有深度强化学习在多智能体场景下难以有效建模复杂交互关系，尤其当智能体数量增加时协作效率显著下降。
AI.method: 设计结合超图卷积网络的actor-critic框架，通过自适应构建超图结构捕捉智能体交互特征，提出HGAC和ATT-HGAC两种变体算法。
AI.result: 实验验证表明该方法在多个基准场景中优于现有MARL算法，显著提升协作效率和任务完成质量。
AI.conclusion: 超图结构能有效表征多智能体复杂交互关系，所提方法为高效策略生成提供了新思路，未来可探索动态超图生成机制。

To address this problem, we consider the form of agent interaction based on neighborhood and propose a multi-agent reinforcement learning (MARL) algorithm based on the actor-critic method, which can adaptively construct the hypergraph structure representing the agent interaction and further implement effective information extraction and representation learning through hypergraph convolution networks, leading to effective cooperation. Experiments with different settings demonstrate the advantages of our approach over other existing methods. 深度强化学习在多智能体系统中的应用带来了额外的挑战。在拥有众多智能体的场景中，当前需要解决的最重要问题之一是如何在不同智能体之间建立充分的协作。为了解决这个问题，我们考虑基于邻域的智能体交互形式，提出一种基于行动者批评家方法的多智能体强化学习（MARL）算法，该算法可以自适应地构造代表智能体交互的超图结构，并进一步通过超图卷积网络实现有效的信息提取和表示学习，从而实现有效的合作。基于不同的超图生成方法，我们提出了两种变体：Actor Hypergraph Convolutional Critic Network (HGAC) 和 Actor Attention Hypergraph Critic Network (ATT-HGAC)。不同设置的实验证明了我们的方法相对于其他现有方法的优势。 本文提出基于超图神经网络的多智能体强化学习算法，解决多智能体系统中协作效率问题。 Bin Zhang,Yunpeng Bai,Zhiwei Xu,Dapeng Li,Guoliang Fan cs.AI,cs.MA

authors_text: Dovile Juodelyte,Veronika Cheplygina,Therese Graversen,Philippe Bonnet
title: Predicting Bearings' Degradation Stages for Predictive Maintenance in the Pharmaceutical Industry
title_zh: 预测轴承的退化阶段以实现制药行业的预测性维护
comment: Submitted to the KDD Applied Data Science track
comments: Submitted to the KDD Applied Data Science track
abstract: In the pharmaceutical industry, the maintenance of production machines must be audited by the regulator. In this context, the problem of predictive maintenance is not when to maintain a machine, but what parts to maintain at a given point in time. The focus shifts from the entire machine to its component parts and prediction becomes a classification problem. In this paper, we focus on rolling-elements bearings and we propose a framework for predicting their degradation stages automatically. Our main contribution is a k-means bearing lifetime segmentation method based on high-frequency bearing vibration signal embedded in a latent low-dimensional subspace using an AutoEncoder. Given high-frequency vibration data, our framework generates a labeled dataset that is used to train a supervised model for bearing degradation stage detection. Our experimental results, based on the FEMTO Bearing dataset, show that our framework is scalable and that it provides reliable and actionable predictions for a range of different bearings.
summary: In the pharmaceutical industry, the maintenance of production machines must be audited by the regulator. In this context, the problem of predictive maintenance is not when to maintain a machine, but what parts to maintain at a given point in time. The focus shifts from the entire machine to its component parts and prediction becomes a classification problem. In this paper, we focus on rolling-elements bearings and we propose a framework for predicting their degradation stages automatically. Our main contribution is a k-means bearing lifetime segmentation method based on high-frequency bearing vibration signal embedded in a latent low-dimensional subspace using an AutoEncoder. Given high-frequency vibration data, our framework generates a labeled dataset that is used to train a supervised model for bearing degradation stage detection. Our experimental results, based on the FEMTO Bearing dataset, show that our framework is scalable and that it provides reliable and actionable predictions for a range of different bearings.
abstract_zh: 在制药行业，生产机器的维护必须经过监管机构的审核。在这种情况下，预测性维护的问题不在于何时维护机器，而在于在给定时间点维护哪些部件。焦点从整个机器转移到其组成部分，预测变成了分类问题。在本文中，我们重点关注滚动轴承，并提出了一个自动预测其退化阶段的框架。我们的主要贡献是基于使用自动编码器嵌入潜在低维子空间的高频轴承振动信号的 k 均值轴承寿命分割方法。给定高频振动数据，我们的框架生成一个标记数据集，用于训练轴承退化阶段检测的监督模型。我们基于 FEMTO 轴承数据集的实验结果表明，我们的框架是可扩展的，并且它为一系列不同的轴承提供了可靠且可操作的预测。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于高频率振动信号和自编码器的框架，用于制药行业中滚动轴承退化阶段的自动预测。
AI.motivation: 制药行业设备维护需监管审核，传统预测性维护需明确维护部件而非时间，需针对组件进行分类预测以提高维护效率。
AI.method: 采用自编码器对高频率振动信号进行低维嵌入，结合k-means聚类划分轴承寿命阶段，生成标记数据训练监督模型。
AI.result: 基于FEMTO轴承数据集的实验表明，该框架可扩展且能提供可靠、可操作的轴承退化阶段预测结果。
AI.conclusion: 提出的框架有效实现了滚动轴承退化阶段的自动预测，为制药行业预测性维护提供了可行解决方案。

authors_text: Ryo Suzuki,Adnan Karim,Tian Xia,Hooman Hedayati,Nicolai Marquardt
title: Augmented Reality and Robotics: A Survey and Taxonomy for AR-enhanced Human-Robot Interaction and Robotic Interfaces
title_zh: 增强现实和机器人技术：AR 增强型人机交互和机器人接口的调查和分类
abstract: This paper contributes to a taxonomy of augmented reality and robotics based on a survey of 460 research papers. Augmented and mixed reality (AR/MR) have emerged as a new way to enhance human-robot interaction (HRI) and robotic interfaces (e.g., actuated and shape-changing interfaces). Recently, an increasing number of studies in HCI, HRI, and robotics have demonstrated how AR enables better interactions between people and robots. However, often research remains focused on individual explorations and key design strategies, and research questions are rarely analyzed systematically. In this paper, we synthesize and categorize this research field in the following dimensions: 1) approaches to augmenting reality; 2) characteristics of robots; 3) purposes and benefits; 4) classification of presented information; 5) design components and strategies for visual augmentation; 6) interaction techniques and modalities; 7) application domains; and 8) evaluation strategies. We formulate key challenges and opportunities to guide and inform future research in AR and robotics.
summary: This paper contributes to a taxonomy of augmented reality and robotics based on a survey of 460 research papers. Augmented and mixed reality (AR/MR) have emerged as a new way to enhance human-robot interaction (HRI) and robotic interfaces (e.g., actuated and shape-changing interfaces). Recently, an increasing number of studies in HCI, HRI, and robotics have demonstrated how AR enables better interactions between people and robots. However, often research remains focused on individual explorations and key design strategies, and research questions are rarely analyzed systematically. In this paper, we synthesize and categorize this research field in the following dimensions: 1) approaches to augmenting reality; 2) characteristics of robots; 3) purposes and benefits; 4) classification of presented information; 5) design components and strategies for visual augmentation; 6) interaction techniques and modalities; 7) application domains; and 8) evaluation strategies. We formulate key challenges and opportunities to guide and inform future research in AR and robotics.
abstract_zh: 本文基于对 460 篇研究论文的调查，对增强现实和机器人技术进行了分类。增强现实和混合现实 (AR/MR) 已成为增强人机交互 (HRI) 和机器人界面（例如驱动和变形界面）的新方式。最近，越来越多的 HCI、HRI 和机器人技术研究表明 AR 如何实现人与机器人之间更好的交互。然而，研究往往仍集中在个体探索和关键设计策略上，很少对研究问题进行系统分析。在本文中，我们从以下几个方面对该研究领域进行综合和分类：1）增强现实的方法； 2）机器人的特点； 3）目的和利益； 4）呈现信息的分类； 5）设计视觉增强的组件和策略； 6）互动技巧和方式； 7）应用领域； 8）评估策略。我们制定了关键的挑战和机遇，以指导和指导 AR 和机器人技术的未来研究。

AI.tldr: 本文通过调研460篇研究论文，构建了增强现实（AR）与机器人技术的分类体系，系统梳理了AR增强的人机交互（HRI）与机器人界面的研究现状。
AI.motivation: 尽管AR技术已被证明能提升人机交互效果，但现有研究多聚焦于局部探索，缺乏对设计策略和研究问题的系统性分析。
AI.method: 通过文献调研，从八个维度（如现实增强方法、机器人特性、信息分类、交互技术等）对AR与机器人交互研究进行分类与综合。
AI.result: 提出涵盖八个维度的分类体系，总结关键挑战与机遇，为未来AR与机器人领域研究提供指导框架。
AI.conclusion: 该分类体系为AR与机器人交互研究提供了系统性视角，有助于推动该领域的进一步发展与创新。

authors_text: Lingfeng Yang,Xiang Li,Renjie Song,Borui Zhao,Juntian Tao,Shihao Zhou,Jiajun Liang,Jian Yang
title: Dynamic MLP for Fine-Grained Image Classification by Leveraging Geographical and Temporal Information
title_zh: 利用地理和时间信息进行细粒度图像分类的动态 MLP
abstract: Fine-grained image classification is a challenging computer vision task where various species share similar visual appearances, resulting in misclassification if merely based on visual clues. Therefore, it is helpful to leverage additional information, e.g., the locations and dates for data shooting, which can be easily accessible but rarely exploited. In this paper, we first demonstrate that existing multimodal methods fuse multiple features only on a single dimension, which essentially has insufficient help in feature discrimination. To fully explore the potential of multimodal information, we propose a dynamic MLP on top of the image representation, which interacts with multimodal features at a higher and broader dimension. The dynamic MLP is an efficient structure parameterized by the learned embeddings of variable locations and dates. It can be regarded as an adaptive nonlinear projection for generating more discriminative image representations in visual tasks. To our best knowledge, it is the first attempt to explore the idea of dynamic networks to exploit multimodal information in fine-grained image classification tasks. Extensive experiments demonstrate the effectiveness of our method. The t-SNE algorithm visually indicates that our technique improves the recognizability of image representations that are visually similar but with different categories. Furthermore, among published works across multiple fine-grained datasets, dynamic MLP consistently achieves SOTA results https://paperswithcode.com/dataset/inaturalist and takes third place in the iNaturalist challenge at FGVC8 https://www.kaggle.com/c/inaturalist-2021/leaderboard. Code is available at https://github.com/ylingfeng/DynamicMLP.git

Furthermore, among published works across multiple fine-grained datasets, dynamic MLP consistently achieves SOTA results https://paperswithcode.com/dataset/inaturalist and takes third place in the iNaturalist challenge at FGVC8 https://www.kaggle.com/c/inaturalist-2021/leaderboard. Code is available at https://github.com/ylingfeng/DynamicMLP.git
abstract_zh: 细粒度图像分类是一项具有挑战性的计算机视觉任务，其中不同物种具有相似的视觉外观，如果仅基于视觉线索，则会导致错误分类。因此，利用附加信息是有帮助的，例如数据拍摄的位置和日期，这些信息很容易获取但很少被利用。在本文中，我们首先证明现有的多模态方法仅在单个维度上融合多个特征，这本质上对特征判别没有足够的帮助。为了充分探索多模态信息的潜力，我们在图像表示之上提出了动态 MLP，它在更高、更宽的维度上与多模态特征交互。动态 MLP 是一种有效的结构，通过学习到的变量位置和日期的嵌入进行参数化。它可以被视为一种自适应非线性投影，用于在视觉任务中生成更具辨别力的图像表示。据我们所知，这是探索动态网络在细粒度图像分类任务中利用多模态信息的想法的首次尝试。大量的实验证明了我们方法的有效性。 t-SNE 算法直观地表明我们的技术提高了视觉上相似但类别不同的​​图像表示的可识别性。此外，在跨多个细粒度数据集的已发表作品中，动态 MLP 始终取得了 SOTA 结果 https://paperswithcode.com/dataset/inaturalist，并在 FGVC8 的 iNaturalist 挑战赛中获得第三名 https://www.kaggle.com/c/inaturalist-2021/leaderboard。代码可在 https://github.com/ylingfeng/DynamicMLP.git 获取

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种动态MLP方法，通过利用地理和时间信息提升细粒度图像分类的准确性。
AI.motivation: 现有方法仅在单一维度融合多模态特征，无法有效区分视觉相似但类别不同的样本，导致分类误差。
AI.method: 设计动态MLP结构，通过可学习的地理位置和日期嵌入参数，实现多模态特征在更高维度的交互与自适应非线性投影。
AI.result: 在iNaturalist等数据集上取得SOTA结果，在FGVC8挑战赛中位列第三，t-SNE可视化显示类别可区分性显著提升。
AI.conclusion: 动态网络有效挖掘多模态信息潜力，为细粒度分类任务提供新思路。

search_text: Dynamic MLP for Fine-Grained Image Classification by Leveraging Geographical and Temporal Information 利用地理和时间信息进行细粒度图像分类的动态 MLP Fine-grained image classification is a challenging computer vision task where various species share similar visual appearances, resulting in misclassification if merely based on visual clues. Therefore, it is helpful to leverage additional information, e.g., the locations and dates for data shooting, which can be easily accessible but rarely exploited. In this paper, we first demonstrate that existing multimodal methods fuse multiple features only on a single dimension, which essentially has insufficient help in feature discrimination. To fully explore the potential of multimodal information, we propose a dynamic MLP on top of the image representation, which interacts with multimodal features at a higher and broader dimension. The dynamic MLP is an efficient structure parameterized by the learned embeddings of variable locations and dates. It can be regarded as an adaptive nonlinear projection for generating more discriminative image representations in visual tasks. To our best knowledge, it is the first attempt to explore the idea of dynamic networks to exploit multimodal information in fine-grained image classification tasks. Extensive experiments demonstrate the effectiveness of our method. The t-SNE algorithm visually indicates that our technique improves the recognizability of image representations that are visually similar but with different categories. Furthermore, among published works across multiple fine-grained datasets, dynamic MLP consistently achieves SOTA results https://paperswithcode.com/dataset/inaturalist and takes third place in the iNaturalist challenge at FGVC8 https://www.kaggle.com/c/inaturalist-2021/leaderboard. Code is available at https://github.com/ylingfeng/DynamicMLP.git 细粒度图像分类是一项具有挑战性的计算机视觉任务，其中不同物种具有相似的视觉外观，如果仅基于视觉线索，则会导致错误分类。因此，利用附加信息是有帮助的，例如数据拍摄的位置和日期，这些信息很容易获取但很少被利用。在本文中，我们首先证明现有的多模态方法仅在单个维度上融合多个特征，这本质上对特征判别没有足够的帮助。为了充分探索多模态信息的潜力，我们在图像表示之上提出了动态 MLP，它在更高、更宽的维度上与多模态特征交互。动态 MLP 是一种有效的结构，通过学习到的变量位置和日期的嵌入进行参数化。它可以被视为一种自适应非线性投影，用于在视觉任务中生成更具辨别力的图像表示。据我们所知，这是探索动态网络在细粒度图像分类任务中利用多模态信息的想法的首次尝试。大量的实验证明了我们方法的有效性。 t-SNE 算法直观地表明我们的技术提高了视觉上相似但类别不同的​​图像表示的可识别性。此外，在跨多个细粒度数据集的已发表作品中，动态 MLP 始终取得了 SOTA 结果 https://paperswithcode.com/dataset/inaturalist，并在 FGVC8 的 iNaturalist 挑战赛中获得第三名 https://www.kaggle.com/c/inaturalist-2021/leaderboard。代码可在 https://github.com/ylingfeng/DynamicMLP.git 获取 本文提出一种动态MLP方法，通过利用地理和时间信息提升细粒度图像分类的准确性。 Lingfeng Yang,Xiang Li,Renjie Song,Borui Zhao,Juntian Tao,Shihao Zhou,Jiajun Liang,Jian Yang cs.CV

authors_text: German Barquero,Johnny Núñez,Zhen Xu,Sergio Escalera,Wei-Wei Tu,Isabelle Guyon,Cristina Palmero
title: Comparison of Spatio-Temporal Models for Human Motion and Pose Forecasting in Face-to-Face Interaction Scenarios
title_zh: 面对面交互场景中人体运动和姿势预测的时空模型比较
abstract: Human behavior forecasting during human-human interactions is of utmost importance to provide robotic or virtual agents with social intelligence. This problem is especially challenging for scenarios that are highly driven by interpersonal dynamics. In this work, we present the first systematic comparison of state-of-the-art approaches for behavior forecasting. To do so, we leverage whole-body annotations (face, body, and hands) from the very recently released UDIVA v0.5, which features face-to-face dyadic interactions. Our best attention-based approaches achieve state-of-the-art performance in UDIVA v0.5. We show that by autoregressively predicting the future with methods trained for the short-term future (<400ms), we outperform the baselines even for a considerably longer-term future (up to 2s). We also show that this finding holds when highly noisy annotations are used, which opens new horizons towards the use of weakly-supervised learning. Combined with large-scale datasets, this may help boost the advances in this field.
summary: Human behavior forecasting during human-human interactions is of utmost importance to provide robotic or virtual agents with social intelligence. This problem is especially challenging for scenarios that are highly driven by interpersonal dynamics. In this work, we present the first systematic comparison of state-of-the-art approaches for behavior forecasting. To do so, we leverage whole-body annotations (face, body, and hands) from the very recently released UDIVA v0.5, which features face-to-face dyadic interactions. Our best attention-based approaches achieve state-of-the-art performance in UDIVA v0.5. We show that by autoregressively predicting the future with methods trained for the short-term future (<400ms), we outperform the baselines even for a considerably longer-term future (up to 2s). We also show that this finding holds when highly noisy annotations are used, which opens new horizons towards the use of weakly-supervised learning. Combined with large-scale datasets, this may help boost the advances in this field.
abstract_zh: 人与人交互过程中的人类行为预测对于为机器人或虚拟代理提供社交智能至关重要。对于人际动态高度驱动的场景来说，这个问题尤其具有挑战性。在这项工作中，我们首次对最先进的行为预测方法进行了系统比较。为此，我们利用最近发布的 UDIVA v0.5 中的全身注释（脸部、身体和手），该版本具有面对面的二元交互功能。我们最好的基于注意力的方法在 UDIVA v0.5 中实现了最先进的性能。我们表明，通过使用针对短期未来（<400ms）训练的方法来自回归预测未来，即使对于相当长期的未来（长达 2 秒），我们也优于基线。我们还表明，当使用高噪声注释时，这一发现成立，这为弱监督学习的使用开辟了新的视野。与大规模数据集相结合，这可能有助于推动该领域的进步。

AI.tldr: 该论文比较了多种时空模型在面对面交互场景中的人体运动和姿态预测效果。
AI.motivation: 在人与人交互的场景中，预测人类行为对赋予机器人或虚拟代理社交智能至关重要，但此类场景因人际动态复杂而极具挑战性。
AI.method: 利用UDIVA v0.5数据集的全身标注（面部、身体和手部），系统比较了最先进的行为预测方法，重点采用基于注意力机制的模型，并通过自回归方法预测短期未来（<400ms）以验证长期预测（长达2秒）效果。
AI.result: 基于注意力的模型在UDIVA v0.5数据集上达到最先进水平，即使在高噪声标注下仍优于基线方法，为弱监督学习提供了新方向。
AI.conclusion: 注意力机制在交互场景预测中表现优异，结合大规模数据和弱监督学习可进一步推动该领域发展。

authors_text: Nadav Cohen,Yael Newman,Ariel Shamir
title: Semantic Segmentation in Art Paintings
title_zh: 艺术绘画中的语义分割
comment: Published as a conference paper at EuroGraphics 2022
comments: Published as a conference paper at EuroGraphics 2022
abstract: Semantic segmentation is a difficult task even when trained in a supervised manner on photographs. In this paper, we tackle the problem of semantic segmentation of artistic paintings, an even more challenging task because of a much larger diversity in colors, textures, and shapes and because there are no ground truth annotations available for segmentation. We propose an unsupervised method for semantic segmentation of paintings using domain adaptation. Our approach creates a training set of pseudo-paintings in specific artistic styles by using style-transfer on the PASCAL VOC 2012 dataset, and then applies domain confusion between PASCAL VOC 2012 and real paintings. These two steps build on a new dataset we gathered called DRAM (Diverse Realism in Art Movements) composed of figurative art paintings from four movements, which are highly diverse in pattern, color, and geometry. To segment new paintings, we present a composite multi-domain adaptation method that trains on each sub-domain separately and composes their solutions during inference time. Our method provides better segmentation results not only on the specific artistic movements of DRAM, but also on other, unseen ones. We compare our approach to alternative methods and show applications of semantic segmentation in art paintings. The code and models for our approach are publicly available at: https://github.com/Nadavc220/SemanticSegmentationInArtPaintings.
summary: Semantic segmentation is a difficult task even when trained in a supervised manner on photographs. In this paper, we tackle the problem of semantic segmentation of artistic paintings, an even more challenging task because of a much larger diversity in colors, textures, and shapes and because there are no ground truth annotations available for segmentation. We propose an unsupervised method for semantic segmentation of paintings using domain adaptation. Our approach creates a training set of pseudo-paintings in specific artistic styles by using style-transfer on the PASCAL VOC 2012 dataset, and then applies domain confusion between PASCAL VOC 2012 and real paintings. These two steps build on a new dataset we gathered called DRAM (Diverse Realism in Art Movements) composed of figurative art paintings from four movements, which are highly diverse in pattern, color, and geometry. To segment new paintings, we present a composite multi-domain adaptation method that trains on each sub-domain separately and composes their solutions during inference time. Our method provides better segmentation results not only on the specific artistic movements of DRAM, but also on other, unseen ones. We compare our approach to alternative methods and show applications of semantic segmentation in art paintings. The code and models for our approach are publicly available at: https://github.com/Nadavc220/SemanticSegmentationInArtPaintings.
abstract_zh: 即使在照片上以监督方式进行训练，语义分割也是一项艰巨的任务。在本文中，我们解决了艺术绘画的语义分割问题，这是一项更具挑战性的任务，因为颜色、纹理和形状的多样性要大得多，而且没有可用于分割的地面实况注释。我们提出了一种使用领域适应对绘画进行语义分割的无监督方法。我们的方法通过在 PASCAL VOC 2012 数据集上使用风格迁移来创建特定艺术风格的伪绘画训练集，然后在 PASCAL VOC 2012 和真实绘画之间应用域混淆。这两个步骤建立在我们收集的称为 DRAM（艺术运动中的多样化现实主义）的新数据集上，该数据集由四个运动中的具象艺术绘画组成，它们在图案、颜色和几何形状上高度多样化。为了分割新的绘画，我们提出了一种复合的多域适应方法，该方法单独训练每个子域并在推理时间内组成它们的解决方案。我们的方法不仅针对 DRAM 的特定艺术运动，而且还针对其他看不见的艺术运动提供了更好的分割结果。我们将我们的方法与替代方法进行比较，并展示语义分割在艺术绘画中的应用。我们方法的代码和模型可在以下网址公开获取：https://github.com/Nadavc220/SemanticSegmentationInArtPaintings。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种无监督的语义分割方法，用于处理艺术绘画中的挑战性任务，通过领域自适应技术解决缺乏标注数据和高多样性的问题。
AI.motivation: 艺术绘画的语义分割因颜色、纹理和形状的多样性以及缺乏真实标注数据而极具挑战性，现有方法难以有效处理此类任务。
AI.method: 通过风格迁移生成特定艺术风格的伪绘画数据，结合领域混淆技术，利用新收集的DRAM数据集进行多领域自适应训练，并在推理时组合各子领域的分割结果。
AI.result: 在DRAM数据集及未见过的艺术流派中均取得优于其他方法的分割效果，代码和模型已开源。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效解决了艺术绘画语义分割的难题，为无标注数据下的跨领域分割提供了可行方案。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出了一种无监督的语义分割方法，用于处理艺术绘画中的挑战性任务，通过领域自适应技术解决缺乏标注数据和高多样性的问题。
ai_content.motivation: 艺术绘画的语义分割因颜色、纹理和形状的多样性以及缺乏真实标注数据而极具挑战性，现有方法难以有效处理此类任务。
ai_content.method: 通过风格迁移生成特定艺术风格的伪绘画数据，结合领域混淆技术，利用新收集的DRAM数据集进行多领域自适应训练，并在推理时组合各子领域的分割结果。
ai_content.result: 在DRAM数据集及未见过的艺术流派中均取得优于其他方法的分割效果，代码和模型已开源。
ai_content.conclusion: 该方法有效解决了艺术绘画语义分割的难题，为无标注数据下的跨领域分割提供了可行方案。

search_text: Semantic Segmentation in Art Paintings 艺术绘画中的语义分割 Semantic segmentation is a difficult task even when trained in a supervised manner on photographs. In this paper, we tackle the problem of semantic segmentation of artistic paintings, an even more challenging task because of a much larger diversity in colors, textures, and shapes and because there are no ground truth annotations available for segmentation. We propose an unsupervised method for semantic segmentation of paintings using domain adaptation. Our approach creates a training set of pseudo-paintings in specific artistic styles by using style-transfer on the PASCAL VOC 2012 dataset, and then applies domain confusion between PASCAL VOC 2012 and real paintings. These two steps build on a new dataset we gathered called DRAM (Diverse Realism in Art Movements) composed of figurative art paintings from four movements, which are highly diverse in pattern, color, and geometry. To segment new paintings, we present a composite multi-domain adaptation method that trains on each sub-domain separately and composes their solutions during inference time. Our method provides better segmentation results not only on the specific artistic movements of DRAM, but also on other, unseen ones. We compare our approach to alternative methods and show applications of semantic segmentation in art paintings. The code and models for our approach are publicly available at: https://github.com/Nadavc220/SemanticSegmentationInArtPaintings. 即使在照片上以监督方式进行训练，语义分割也是一项艰巨的任务。在本文中，我们解决了艺术绘画的语义分割问题，这是一项更具挑战性的任务，因为颜色、纹理和形状的多样性要大得多，而且没有可用于分割的地面实况注释。我们提出了一种使用领域适应对绘画进行语义分割的无监督方法。我们的方法通过在 PASCAL VOC 2012 数据集上使用风格迁移来创建特定艺术风格的伪绘画训练集，然后在 PASCAL VOC 2012 和真实绘画之间应用域混淆。这两个步骤建立在我们收集的称为 DRAM（艺术运动中的多样化现实主义）的新数据集上，该数据集由四个运动中的具象艺术绘画组成，它们在图案、颜色和几何形状上高度多样化。为了分割新的绘画，我们提出了一种复合的多域适应方法，该方法单独训练每个子域并在推理时间内组成它们的解决方案。我们的方法不仅针对 DRAM 的特定艺术运动，而且还针对其他看不见的艺术运动提供了更好的分割结果。我们将我们的方法与替代方法进行比较，并展示语义分割在艺术绘画中的应用。我们方法的代码和模型可在以下网址公开获取：https://github.com/Nadavc220/SemanticSegmentationInArtPaintings。 本文提出了一种无监督的语义分割方法，用于处理艺术绘画中的挑战性任务，通过领域自适应技术解决缺乏标注数据和高多样性的问题。 Nadav Cohen,Yael Newman,Ariel Shamir cs.CV,cs.GR,cs.LG

authors_text: Zicheng Li,Shoushan Li,Guodong Zhou
title: Pre-trained Token-replaced Detection Model as Few-shot Learner
title_zh: 作为少样本学习器的预训练令牌替换检测模型
comment: Accepted to COLING 2022. The code is publicly available at https://github.com/cjfarmer/TRD_FSL
comments: Accepted to COLING 2022. The code is publicly available at https://github.com/cjfarmer/TRD_FSL
abstract: Pre-trained masked language models have demonstrated remarkable ability as few-shot learners. In this paper, as an alternative, we propose a novel approach to few-shot learning with pre-trained token-replaced detection models like ELECTRA. In this approach, we reformulate a classification or a regression task as a token-replaced detection problem. Specifically, we first define a template and label description words for each task and put them into the input to form a natural language prompt. Then, we employ the pre-trained token-replaced detection model to predict which label description word is the most original (i.e., least replaced) among all label description words in the prompt. A systematic evaluation on 16 datasets demonstrates that our approach outperforms few-shot learners with pre-trained masked language models in both one-sentence and two-sentence learning tasks.
summary: Pre-trained masked language models have demonstrated remarkable ability as few-shot learners. In this paper, as an alternative, we propose a novel approach to few-shot learning with pre-trained token-replaced detection models like ELECTRA. In this approach, we reformulate a classification or a regression task as a token-replaced detection problem. Specifically, we first define a template and label description words for each task and put them into the input to form a natural language prompt. Then, we employ the pre-trained token-replaced detection model to predict which label description word is the most original (i.e., least replaced) among all label description words in the prompt. A systematic evaluation on 16 datasets demonstrates that our approach outperforms few-shot learners with pre-trained masked language models in both one-sentence and two-sentence learning tasks.
abstract_zh: 预训练的蒙蔽语言模型已经表现出了作为小样本学习者的非凡能力。在本文中，作为替代方案，我们提出了一种新颖的方法，使用 ELECTRA 等预训练的标记替换检测模型进行少样本学习。在这种方法中，我们将分类或回归任务重新表述为标记替换的检测问题。具体来说，我们首先为每个任务定义一个模板并标记描述词，并将其放入输入中形成自然语言提示。然后，我们使用预先训练的标记替换检测模型来预测提示中所有标签描述词中哪个标签描述词是最原始的（即，替换最少的）。对 16 个数据集的系统评估表明，我们的方法在单句和两句学习任务中均优于使用预训练掩码语言模型的小样本学习器。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于预训练token替换检测模型的少样本学习方法，将分类或回归任务转化为token替换检测问题。
AI.motivation: 尽管预训练掩码语言模型在少样本学习中表现优异，但作者寻求通过token替换检测模型（如ELECTRA）提供替代方案以提升性能。
AI.method: 通过定义任务模板和标签描述词生成自然语言提示，利用预训练token替换检测模型预测提示中最原始的标签描述词。
AI.result: 在16个数据集上的系统评估表明，该方法在单句和双句学习任务中均优于基于预训练掩码语言模型的少样本学习方法。
AI.conclusion: 将任务转化为token替换检测问题能有效提升少样本学习性能，验证了该方法的可行性与优越性。

authors_text: Andrzej Czygrinow,Michał Hanćkowiak,Marcin Witkowski
title: Distributed distance domination in graphs with no $K_{2,t}$-minor
title_zh: 图中没有 $K_{2,t}$-minor 的分布式距离支配
abstract: We prove that a simple distributed algorithm finds a constant approximation of an optimal distance-$k$ dominating set in graphs with no $K_{2,t}$-minor. The algorithm runs in a constant number of rounds. We further show how this procedure can be used to give a distributed algorithm which given $ε>0$ and $k,t\in \mathbb{Z}^+$ finds in a graph $G=(V,E)$ with no $K_{2,t}$-minor a distance-$k$ dominating set of size at most $(1+ε)$ of the optimum. The algorithm runs in $O(\log^*{|V|})$ rounds in the Local model. In particular, both algorithms work in outerplanar graphs.
summary: We prove that a simple distributed algorithm finds a constant approximation of an optimal distance-$k$ dominating set in graphs with no $K_{2,t}$-minor. The algorithm runs in a constant number of rounds. We further show how this procedure can be used to give a distributed algorithm which given $ε>0$ and $k,t\in \mathbb{Z}^+$ finds in a graph $G=(V,E)$ with no $K_{2,t}$-minor a distance-$k$ dominating set of size at most $(1+ε)$ of the optimum. The algorithm runs in $O(\log^*{|V|})$ rounds in the Local model. In particular, both algorithms work in outerplanar graphs.
abstract_zh: 我们证明，一个简单的分布式算法可以在没有 $K_{2,t}$-次要的图中找到最佳距离 -$k$ 支配集的常数近似。该算法以恒定的轮数运行。我们进一步展示了如何使用这个过程来给出一个分布式算法，该算法给定 $ε>0$ 和 $k,t\in \mathbb{Z}^+$ 在图 $G=(V,E)$ 中找到没有 $K_{2,t}$-次要距离 -$k$ 大小最多为 $(1+ε)$ 的主导集。该算法在局部模型中运行 $O(\log^*{|V|})$ 轮。特别是，这两种算法都适用于外平面图。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在无$K_{2,t}$-minor图中寻找近似最优距离-$k$支配集的分布式算法问题。
AI.motivation: 在无$K_{2,t}$-minor图（包括外平面图）中，设计高效的分布式算法以常数近似比和常数轮数找到距离-$k$支配集，并进一步给出可达到$(1+\epsilon)$近似比的算法。
AI.method: 提出一种简单的分布式算法，能够在常数轮内得到距离-$k$支配集的常数近似解；然后利用该过程作为子程序，结合局部模型（Local model）设计出运行$O(\log^*|V|)$轮、达到$(1+\epsilon)$近似比的分布式算法。
AI.result: 第一种算法在常数轮内实现常数近似；第二种算法在$O(\log^*|V|)$轮内实现$(1+\epsilon)$近似比。两种算法均适用于无$K_{2,t}$-minor图，包括外平面图。
AI.conclusion: 本文证明在无$K_{2,t}$-minor图中，存在高效的分布式算法能够以极少的通信轮数获得近似最优的距离-$k$支配集，拓展了该类图上的分布式计算能力。

authors_text: Qi Liao,Tianlun Hu,Dan Wellington
title: Knowledge Transfer in Deep Reinforcement Learning for Slice-Aware Mobility Robustness Optimization
title_zh: 用于切片感知移动鲁棒性优化的深度强化学习中的知识转移
abstract: The legacy mobility robustness optimization (MRO) in self-organizing networks aims at improving handover performance by optimizing cell-specific handover parameters. However, such solutions cannot satisfy the needs of next-generation network with network slicing, because it only guarantees the received signal strength but not the per-slice service quality. To provide the truly seamless mobility service, we propose a deep reinforcement learning-based slice-aware mobility robustness optimization (SAMRO) approach, which improves handover performance with per-slice service assurance by optimizing slice-specific handover parameters. Moreover, to allow safe and sample efficient online training, we develop a two-step transfer learning scheme: 1) regularized offline reinforcement learning, and 2) effective online fine-tuning with mixed experience replay. System-level simulations show that compared against the legacy MRO algorithms, SAMRO significantly improves slice-aware service continuation while optimizing the handover performance.
summary: The legacy mobility robustness optimization (MRO) in self-organizing networks aims at improving handover performance by optimizing cell-specific handover parameters. However, such solutions cannot satisfy the needs of next-generation network with network slicing, because it only guarantees the received signal strength but not the per-slice service quality. To provide the truly seamless mobility service, we propose a deep reinforcement learning-based slice-aware mobility robustness optimization (SAMRO) approach, which improves handover performance with per-slice service assurance by optimizing slice-specific handover parameters. Moreover, to allow safe and sample efficient online training, we develop a two-step transfer learning scheme: 1) regularized offline reinforcement learning, and 2) effective online fine-tuning with mixed experience replay. System-level simulations show that compared against the legacy MRO algorithms, SAMRO significantly improves slice-aware service continuation while optimizing the handover performance.
abstract_zh: 自组织网络中的传统移动鲁棒性优化（MRO）旨在通过优化特定于小区的切换参数来提高切换性能。然而，此类解决方案无法满足下一代网络切片的需求，因为它只能保证接收信号强度，而不能保证每切片的服务质量。为了提供真正的无缝移动服务，我们提出了一种基于深度强化学习的切片感知移动鲁棒性优化（SAMRO）方法，该方法通过优化特定于切片的切换参数来提高每切片服务保证的切换性能。此外，为了实现安全、高效的在线训练，我们开发了一种两步迁移学习方案：1）正则化离线强化学习，2）具有混合经验回放的有效在线微调。系统级仿真表明，与传统的MRO算法相比，SAMRO在优化切换性能的同时显着提高了切片感知的服务连续性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于深度强化学习的面向网络切片的移动性鲁棒性优化方法SAMRO，通过知识迁移技术解决传统MRO无法保障切片服务质量的问题。
AI.motivation: 传统MRO仅优化信号强度而忽视网络切片的差异化服务需求，无法满足下一代网络对切片级服务质量保障的要求。
AI.method: 设计SAMRO框架，结合正则化离线强化学习与混合经验回放的在线微调两阶段知识迁移方案，实现切片特定参数的优化。
AI.result: 系统仿真表明SAMRO在保持切换性能优化的同时，显著提升了网络切片的服务连续性指标。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法通过深度强化学习与知识迁移有效解决了网络切片场景下的移动性鲁棒性优化难题。

authors_text: Joaquim de Curtò,Irene de Zarzà,Hong Yan,Carlos T. Calafate
title: Signature and Log-signature for the Study of Empirical Distributions Generated with GANs
title_zh: 用于研究 GAN 生成的经验分布的签名和对数签名
abstract: In this paper, we bring forward the use of the recently developed Signature Transform as a way to measure the similarity between image distributions and provide detailed acquaintance and extensive evaluations. We are the first to pioneer RMSE and MAE Signature, along with log-signature as an alternative to measure GAN convergence, a problem that has been extensively studied. We are also forerunners to introduce analytical measures based on statistics to study the goodness of fit of the GAN sample distribution that are both efficient and effective. Current GAN measures involve lots of computation normally done at the GPU and are very time consuming. In contrast, we diminish the computation time to the order of seconds and computation is done at the CPU achieving the same level of goodness. Lastly, a PCA adaptive t-SNE approach, which is novel in this context, is also proposed for data visualization.
summary: In this paper, we bring forward the use of the recently developed Signature Transform as a way to measure the similarity between image distributions and provide detailed acquaintance and extensive evaluations. We are the first to pioneer RMSE and MAE Signature, along with log-signature as an alternative to measure GAN convergence, a problem that has been extensively studied. We are also forerunners to introduce analytical measures based on statistics to study the goodness of fit of the GAN sample distribution that are both efficient and effective. Current GAN measures involve lots of computation normally done at the GPU and are very time consuming. In contrast, we diminish the computation time to the order of seconds and computation is done at the CPU achieving the same level of goodness. Lastly, a PCA adaptive t-SNE approach, which is novel in this context, is also proposed for data visualization.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出使用最近开发的签名变换作为测量图像分布之间相似性的方法，并提供详细的了解和广泛的评估。我们是第一个开创 RMSE 和 MAE 签名以及对数签名作为衡量 GAN 收敛性的替代方案的人，这个问题已被广泛研究。我们也是引入基于统计的分析方法来研究 GAN 样本分布拟合优度的先行者，既高效又有效。当前的 GAN 测量涉及大量计算，通常在 GPU 上完成，并且非常耗时。相比之下，我们将计算时间减少到秒级，并且计算是在 CPU 上完成的，达到了相同的性能水平。最后，还提出了一种新颖的 PCA 自适应 t-SNE 方法用于数据可视化。

AI.tldr: 本文提出使用Signature和Log-signature方法评估GAN生成图像分布的相似性，并开发高效计算方法以替代传统耗时的GAN收敛评估手段。
AI.motivation: 现有GAN评估方法依赖GPU计算且耗时较长，缺乏高效且精确的分布拟合度测量手段。
AI.method: 引入Signature Transform及基于RMSE/MAE的Signature与Log-signature作为分布相似性度量，结合PCA自适应t-SNE实现数据可视化。
AI.result: 实现CPU端秒级计算且保持评估精度，提出新型可视化方法，显著降低传统GPU计算需求。
AI.conclusion: 新方法为GAN分布评估提供高效替代方案，在计算效率与拟合度测量上取得平衡，推动生成模型分析技术发展。
