authors_text: Salman Bari,Xiagong Wang,Ahmad Schoha Haidari,Dirk Wollherr
title: Factor Graph-Based Planning as Inference for Autonomous Vehicle Racing
title_zh: 基于因子图的规划作为自动驾驶赛车的推理
abstract: Factor graph, as a bipartite graphical model, offers a structured representation by revealing local connections among graph nodes. This study explores the utilization of factor graphs in modeling the autonomous racecar planning problem, presenting an alternate perspective to the traditional optimization-based formulation. We model the planning problem as a probabilistic inference over a factor graph, with factor nodes capturing the joint distribution of motion objectives. By leveraging the duality between optimization and inference, a fast solution to the maximum a posteriori estimation of the factor graph is obtained via least-squares optimization. The localized design thinking inherent in this formulation ensures that motion objectives depend on a small subset of variables. We exploit the locality feature of the factor graph structure to integrate the minimum curvature path and local planning computations into a unified algorithm. This diverges from the conventional separation of global and local planning modules, where curvature minimization occurs at the global level. The evaluation of the proposed framework demonstrated superior performance for cumulative curvature and average speed across the racetrack. Furthermore, the results highlight the computational efficiency of our approach. While acknowledging the structural design advantages and computational efficiency of the proposed methodology, we also address its limitations and outline potential directions for future research.
summary: Factor graph, as a bipartite graphical model, offers a structured representation by revealing local connections among graph nodes. This study explores the utilization of factor graphs in modeling the autonomous racecar planning problem, presenting an alternate perspective to the traditional optimization-based formulation. We model the planning problem as a probabilistic inference over a factor graph, with factor nodes capturing the joint distribution of motion objectives. By leveraging the duality between optimization and inference, a fast solution to the maximum a posteriori estimation of the factor graph is obtained via least-squares optimization. The localized design thinking inherent in this formulation ensures that motion objectives depend on a small subset of variables. We exploit the locality feature of the factor graph structure to integrate the minimum curvature path and local planning computations into a unified algorithm. This diverges from the conventional separation of global and local planning modules, where curvature minimization occurs at the global level. The evaluation of the proposed framework demonstrated superior performance for cumulative curvature and average speed across the racetrack. Furthermore, the results highlight the computational efficiency of our approach. While acknowledging the structural design advantages and computational efficiency of the proposed methodology, we also address its limitations and outline potential directions for future research.
abstract_zh: 因子图作为二分图模型，通过揭示图节点之间的局部连接来提供结构化表示。本研究探讨了因子图在自动赛车规划问题建模中的应用，为传统的基于优化的公式提供了另一种视角。我们将规划问题建模为因子图上的概率推理，其中因子节点捕获运动目标的联合分布。通过利用优化和推理之间的对偶性，通过最小二乘优化获得因子图最大后验估计的快速解决方案。该公式中固有的局部设计思维确保运动目标依赖于一小部分变量。我们利用因子图结构的局部性特征将最小曲率路径和局部规划计算集成到统一的算法中。这与全局和局部规划模块的传统分离不同，其中曲率最小化发生在全局级别。对所提出的框架的评估表明，赛道上的累积曲率和平均速度具有卓越的性能。此外，结果凸显了我们方法的计算效率。在承认所提出的方法的结构设计优势和计算效率的同时，我们还解决了其局限性并概述了未来研究的潜在方向。

AI.tldr: 本文将因子图用于自动驾驶赛车的路径规划，通过概率推断框架实现高效规划。
AI.motivation: 传统规划方法存在全局与局部规划分离的局限性，难以兼顾路径曲率最小化与计算效率。
AI.method: 构建因子图模型表示运动目标联合分布，利用优化与推断的对偶性，通过最小二乘优化实现最大后验估计，并融合局部路径规划与曲率优化。
AI.result: 在赛道测试中表现出更优的累积曲率和平均速度，同时计算效率显著提升。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过因子图结构设计实现了规划效率与性能的平衡，但需进一步解决动态环境适应性等挑战。

method: 构建因子图模型表示运动目标联合分布，利用优化与推断的对偶性，通过最小二乘优化实现最大后验估计，并融合局部路径规划与曲率优化。
result: 在赛道测试中表现出更优的累积曲率和平均速度，同时计算效率显著提升。
conclusion: 该方法通过因子图结构设计实现了规划效率与性能的平衡，但需进一步解决动态环境适应性等挑战。
search_text: Factor Graph-Based Planning as Inference for Autonomous Vehicle Racing 基于因子图的规划作为自动驾驶赛车的推理 Factor graph, as a bipartite graphical model, offers a structured representation by revealing local connections among graph nodes. This study explores the utilization of factor graphs in modeling the autonomous racecar planning problem, presenting an alternate perspective to the traditional optimization-based formulation. We model the planning problem as a probabilistic inference over a factor graph, with factor nodes capturing the joint distribution of motion objectives. By leveraging the duality between optimization and inference, a fast solution to the maximum a posteriori estimation of the factor graph is obtained via least-squares optimization. The localized design thinking inherent in this formulation ensures that motion objectives depend on a small subset of variables. We exploit the locality feature of the factor graph structure to integrate the minimum curvature path and local planning computations into a unified algorithm. This diverges from the conventional separation of global and local planning modules, where curvature minimization occurs at the global level. The evaluation of the proposed framework demonstrated superior performance for cumulative curvature and average speed across the racetrack. Furthermore, the results highlight the computational efficiency of our approach. While acknowledging the structural design advantages and computational efficiency of the proposed methodology, we also address its limitations and outline potential directions for future research. 因子图作为二分图模型，通过揭示图节点之间的局部连接来提供结构化表示。本研究探讨了因子图在自动赛车规划问题建模中的应用，为传统的基于优化的公式提供了另一种视角。我们将规划问题建模为因子图上的概率推理，其中因子节点捕获运动目标的联合分布。通过利用优化和推理之间的对偶性，通过最小二乘优化获得因子图最大后验估计的快速解决方案。该公式中固有的局部设计思维确保运动目标依赖于一小部分变量。我们利用因子图结构的局部性特征将最小曲率路径和局部规划计算集成到统一的算法中。这与全局和局部规划模块的传统分离不同，其中曲率最小化发生在全局级别。对所提出的框架的评估表明，赛道上的累积曲率和平均速度具有卓越的性能。此外，结果凸显了我们方法的计算效率。在承认所提出的方法的结构设计优势和计算效率的同时，我们还解决了其局限性并概述了未来研究的潜在方向。 本文将因子图用于自动驾驶赛车的路径规划，通过概率推断框架实现高效规划。 Salman Bari,Xiagong Wang,Ahmad Schoha Haidari,Dirk Wollherr cs.RO

authors_text: Hexin Liu,Leibny Paola Garcia Perera,Andy W. H. Khong,Justin Dauwels,Suzy J. Styles,Sanjeev Khudanpur
title: Enhance Language Identification using Dual-mode Model with Knowledge Distillation
title_zh: 使用具有知识蒸馏的双模式模型增强语言识别
abstract: In this paper, we propose to employ a dual-mode framework on the x-vector self-attention (XSA-LID) model with knowledge distillation (KD) to enhance its language identification (LID) performance for both long and short utterances. The dual-mode XSA-LID model is trained by jointly optimizing both the full and short modes with their respective inputs being the full-length speech and its short clip extracted by a specific Boolean mask, and KD is applied to further boost the performance on short utterances. In addition, we investigate the impact of clip-wise linguistic variability and lexical integrity for LID by analyzing the variation of LID performance in terms of the lengths and positions of the mimicked speech clips. We evaluated our approach on the MLS14 data from the NIST 2017 LRE. With the 3~s random-location Boolean mask, our proposed method achieved 19.23%, 21.52% and 8.37% relative improvement in average cost compared with the XSA-LID model on 3s, 10s, and 30s speech, respectively.
summary: In this paper, we propose to employ a dual-mode framework on the x-vector self-attention (XSA-LID) model with knowledge distillation (KD) to enhance its language identification (LID) performance for both long and short utterances. The dual-mode XSA-LID model is trained by jointly optimizing both the full and short modes with their respective inputs being the full-length speech and its short clip extracted by a specific Boolean mask, and KD is applied to further boost the performance on short utterances. In addition, we investigate the impact of clip-wise linguistic variability and lexical integrity for LID by analyzing the variation of LID performance in terms of the lengths and positions of the mimicked speech clips. We evaluated our approach on the MLS14 data from the NIST 2017 LRE. With the 3~s random-location Boolean mask, our proposed method achieved 19.23%, 21.52% and 8.37% relative improvement in average cost compared with the XSA-LID model on 3s, 10s, and 30s speech, respectively.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们建议在具有知识蒸馏（KD）的 x 向量自注意力（XSA-LID）模型上采用双模式框架，以增强其长句和短句的语言识别（LID）性能。双模式 XSA-LID 模型通过联合优化全模式和短模式进行训练，各自的输入是全长语音及其由特定布尔掩码提取的短片段，并应用 KD 来进一步提高短语音的性能。此外，我们通过分析 LID 性能在模仿语音剪辑的长度和位置方面的变化，研究了剪辑方面的语言变异性和词汇完整性对 LID 的影响。我们根据 NIST 2017 LRE 的 MLS14 数据评估了我们的方法。使用 3~s 随机位置布尔掩码，与 XSA-LID 模型相比，我们提出的方法在 3s、10s 和 30s 语音上的平均成本分别实现了 19.23%、21.52% 和 8.37% 的相对改进。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合双模式框架与知识蒸馏的x-vector自注意力模型，以提升长短期语音的语言识别性能。
AI.motivation: 现有模型在短语音语言识别任务中表现不足，需通过双模式训练与知识蒸馏技术增强模型对短时语音的识别能力。
AI.method: 构建双模式XSA-LID模型，联合优化全长度语音与短时片段（通过布尔掩码提取），并应用知识蒸馏进一步提升短语音性能，同时分析语音片段长度与位置对识别效果的影响。
AI.result: 在NIST 2017 LRE的MLS14数据集上，使用3秒随机位置掩码时，相较原始XSA-LID模型，3秒、10秒、30秒语音的平均代价分别降低19.23%、21.52%和8.37%。
AI.conclusion: 双模式框架结合知识蒸馏有效提升了语言识别性能，尤其对短时语音效果显著，语音片段的语言变体性和词汇完整性对识别结果有重要影响。

authors_text: Yi-Ming Zhai,You-Wei Luo
title: Maximizing Conditional Independence for Unsupervised Domain Adaptation
title_zh: 最大化无监督域适应的条件独立性
abstract: Unsupervised domain adaptation studies how to transfer a learner from a labeled source domain to an unlabeled target domain with different distributions. Existing methods mainly focus on matching the marginal distributions of the source and target domains, which probably lead a misalignment of samples from the same class but different domains. In this paper, we deal with this misalignment by achieving the class-conditioned transferring from a new perspective. We aim to maximize the conditional independence of feature and domain given class in the reproducing kernel Hilbert space. The optimization of the conditional independence measure can be viewed as minimizing a surrogate of a certain mutual information between feature and domain. An interpretable empirical estimation of the conditional dependence is deduced and connected with the unconditional case. Besides, we provide an upper bound on the target error by taking the class-conditional distribution into account, which provides a new theoretical insight for most class-conditioned transferring methods. In addition to unsupervised domain adaptation, we extend our method to the multi-source scenario in a natural and elegant way. Extensive experiments on four benchmarks validate the effectiveness of the proposed models in both unsupervised domain adaptation and multiple source domain adaptation.
summary: Unsupervised domain adaptation studies how to transfer a learner from a labeled source domain to an unlabeled target domain with different distributions. Existing methods mainly focus on matching the marginal distributions of the source and target domains, which probably lead a misalignment of samples from the same class but different domains. In this paper, we deal with this misalignment by achieving the class-conditioned transferring from a new perspective. We aim to maximize the conditional independence of feature and domain given class in the reproducing kernel Hilbert space. The optimization of the conditional independence measure can be viewed as minimizing a surrogate of a certain mutual information between feature and domain. An interpretable empirical estimation of the conditional dependence is deduced and connected with the unconditional case. Besides, we provide an upper bound on the target error by taking the class-conditional distribution into account, which provides a new theoretical insight for most class-conditioned transferring methods. In addition to unsupervised domain adaptation, we extend our method to the multi-source scenario in a natural and elegant way. Extensive experiments on four benchmarks validate the effectiveness of the proposed models in both unsupervised domain adaptation and multiple source domain adaptation.
abstract_zh: 无监督域适应研究如何将学习器从标记的源域转移到具有不同分布的未标记的目标域。现有的方法主要集中于匹配源域和目标域的边缘分布，这可能导致来自同一类但不同域的样本不一致。在本文中，我们通过从新的角度实现类条件转移来解决这种错位。我们的目标是在再生内核希尔伯特空间中最大化特征和给定类的域的条件独立性。条件独立性度量的优化可以被视为最小化特征和域之间的某些互信息的代理。推导出条件依赖性的可解释的经验估计并将其与无条件情况联系起来。此外，我们通过考虑类条件分布来提供目标误差的上限，这为大多数类条件转移方法提供了新的理论见解。除了无监督域适应之外，我们还以自然而优雅的方式将我们的方法扩展到多源场景。对四个基准的广泛实验验证了所提出的模型在无监督域适应和多源域适应方面的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无监督域适应方法，通过最大化特征与域在给定类条件下的独立性，解决源域和目标域分布差异导致的样本错位问题。
AI.motivation: 现有域适应方法仅匹配边缘分布，可能造成同类样本在不同域间分布错位，影响迁移效果。
AI.method: 在再生核希尔伯特空间中优化条件独立性度量，通过最小化特征与域的互信息替代损失，推导类条件依赖的可解释估计，并扩展至多源场景。
AI.result: 在四个基准数据集上验证了方法在无监督域适应和多源域适应任务中的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过理论分析和实验验证，为类条件迁移提供了新的理论视角和实用框架。

authors_text: Massimiliano Luca,Luca Pappalardo,Bruno Lepri,Gianni Barlacchi
title: Trajectory Test-Train Overlap in Next-Location Prediction Datasets
title_zh: 下一位置预测数据集中的轨迹测试训练重叠
abstract: Next-location prediction, consisting of forecasting a user's location given their historical trajectories, has important implications in several fields, such as urban planning, geo-marketing, and disease spreading. Several predictors have been proposed in the last few years to address it, including last-generation ones based on deep learning. This paper tests the generalization capability of these predictors on public mobility datasets, stratifying the datasets by whether the trajectories in the test set also appear fully or partially in the training set. We consistently discover a severe problem of trajectory overlapping in all analyzed datasets, highlighting that predictors memorize trajectories while having limited generalization capacities. We thus propose a methodology to rerank the outputs of the next-location predictors based on spatial mobility patterns. With these techniques, we significantly improve the predictors' generalization capability, with a relative improvement on the accuracy up to 96.15% on the trajectories that cannot be memorized (i.e., low overlap with the training set).

Several predictors have been proposed in the last few years to address it, including last-generation ones based on deep learning. This paper tests the generalization capability of these predictors on public mobility datasets, stratifying the datasets by whether the trajectories in the test set also appear fully or partially in the training set. We consistently discover a severe problem of trajectory overlapping in all analyzed datasets, highlighting that predictors memorize trajectories while having limited generalization capacities. We thus propose a methodology to rerank the outputs of the next-location predictors based on spatial mobility patterns. With these techniques, we significantly improve the predictors' generalization capability, with a relative improvement on the accuracy up to 96.15% on the trajectories that cannot be memorized (i.e., low overlap with the training set).
abstract_zh: 下一位置预测包括根据历史轨迹预测用户的位置，这在城市规划、地理营销和疾病传播等多个领域具有重要意义。过去几年，人们提出了几种预测器来解决这个问题，包括基于深度学习的最新一代预测器。本文测试了这些预测器在公共交通数据集上的泛化能力，通过测试集中的轨迹是否完全或部分出现在训练集中对数据集进行分层。我们一致发现所有分析数据集中都存在轨迹重叠的严重问题，这凸显了预测器在记忆轨迹的同时泛化能力有限。因此，我们提出了一种根据空间移动模式对下一个位置预测器的输出进行重新排序的方法。通过这些技术，我们显着提高了预测器的泛化能力，对于无法记忆的轨迹（即与训练集的低重叠），准确率相对提高高达 96.15%。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了下一位置预测数据集中测试集与训练集轨迹的重叠问题，并提出了一种改进预测模型泛化能力的方法。
AI.motivation: 现有预测模型在测试集与训练集轨迹存在重叠时容易过拟合，导致泛化能力不足，需改进方法以提高模型在无重叠数据下的预测准确性。
AI.method: 提出基于空间移动模式的预测结果重排序方法，以增强模型对非记忆轨迹的泛化能力。
AI.result: 在测试集与训练集轨迹重叠较低的数据上，预测准确率相对提升了96.15%。
AI.conclusion: 现有数据集存在严重轨迹重叠问题，所提方法有效提升了预测模型的泛化能力，尤其在低重叠场景下效果显著。

authors_text: Antonio Badillo-Perez,Donato Badillo-Perez,Diego Coyotzi-Molina,Dago Cruz,Rocio Montenegro,Leticia Vazquez,Miguel Xochicale
title: Piloting Diversity and Inclusion Workshops in Artificial Intelligence and Robotics for Children
title_zh: 为儿童试点人工智能和机器人技术的多样性和包容性研讨会
abstract: In this paper, we present preliminary work from a pilot workshop that aimed to promote diversity and inclusion for fundamentals of Artificial Intelligence and Robotics for Children (air4children) in the context of developing countries. Considering the scarcity of funding and the little to none availability of specialised professionals to teach AI and robotics in developing countries, we present resources based on free open-source hardware and software, open educational resources, and alternative education programs. That said, the contribution of this work is the pilot workshop of four lessons that promote diversity and inclusion on teaching AI and Robotics for children to a small gender-balanced sample of 14 children of an average age of 7.64 years old. We conclude that participant, instructors, coordinators and parents engaged well in the pilot workshop noting the various challenges of having the right resources for the workshops in developing countries and posing future work. The resources to reproduce this work are available at https://github.com/air4children/hri2022.
summary: In this paper, we present preliminary work from a pilot workshop that aimed to promote diversity and inclusion for fundamentals of Artificial Intelligence and Robotics for Children (air4children) in the context of developing countries. Considering the scarcity of funding and the little to none availability of specialised professionals to teach AI and robotics in developing countries, we present resources based on free open-source hardware and software, open educational resources, and alternative education programs. That said, the contribution of this work is the pilot workshop of four lessons that promote diversity and inclusion on teaching AI and Robotics for children to a small gender-balanced sample of 14 children of an average age of 7.64 years old. We conclude that participant, instructors, coordinators and parents engaged well in the pilot workshop noting the various challenges of having the right resources for the workshops in developing countries and posing future work. The resources to reproduce this work are available at https://github.com/air4children/hri2022.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们介绍了一个试点研讨会的初步工作，该研讨会旨在促进发展中国家背景下人工智能和儿童机器人 (air4children) 基础知识的多样性和包容性。考虑到发展中国家资金匮乏以及几乎没有专业人士教授人工智能和机器人技术，我们提供基于免费开源硬件和软件、开放教育资源和替代教育计划的资源。也就是说，这项工作的贡献是举办了四节课程的试点研讨会，促进向 14 名平均年龄为 7.64 岁的性别平衡的小样本儿童教授人工智能和机器人技术的多样性和包容性。我们得出的结论是，参与者、讲师、协调员和家长很好地参与了试点研讨会，注意到在发展中国家为研讨会提供适当资源并提出未来工作的各种挑战。重现这项工作的资源可在 https://github.com/air4children/hri2022 上找到。

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了在发展中国家为儿童开展人工智能与机器人基础课程的试点工作坊，旨在通过开源资源促进多样性与包容性教育。
AI.motivation: 发展中国家缺乏资金和专业师资，难以开展AI与机器人教育，需探索低成本、可复制的解决方案以促进教育公平。
AI.method: 设计包含四节课的试点工作坊，使用开源硬件软件、开放教育资源及替代教育方案，面向14名7-8岁性别平衡的儿童群体，并收集多方反馈。
AI.result: 参与者、教师及家长均积极投入，但资源获取困难被明确指出，项目资源已开源至GitHub供复现。
AI.conclusion: 工作坊验证了开源方案的可行性，但需进一步解决资源获取问题，未来将优化课程设计与资源分发机制。

authors_text: Salman Bari,Volker Gabler,Dirk Wollherr
title: MS2MP: A Min-Sum Message Passing Algorithm for Motion Planning
title_zh: MS2MP：用于运动规划的最小和消息传递算法
abstract: Gaussian Process (GP) formulation of continuoustime trajectory offers a fast solution to the motion planning problem via probabilistic inference on factor graph. However, often the solution converges to in-feasible local minima and the planned trajectory is not collision-free. We propose a message passing algorithm that is more sensitive to obstacles with fast convergence time. We leverage the utility of min-sum message passing algorithm that performs local computations at each node to solve the inference problem on factor graph. We first introduce the notion of compound factor node to transform the factor graph to a linearly structured graph. We next develop an algorithm denoted as Min-sum Message Passing algorithm for Motion Planning (MS2MP) that combines numerical optimization with message passing to find collision-free trajectories. MS2MP performs numerical optimization to solve non-linear least square minimization problem at each compound factor node and then exploits the linear structure of factor graph to compute the maximum a posteriori (MAP) estimation of complete graph by passing messages among graph nodes. The decentralized optimization approach of each compound node increases sensitivity towards avoiding obstacles for harder planning problems. We evaluate our algorithm by performing extensive experiments for exemplary motion planning tasks for a robot manipulator. Our evaluation reveals that MS2MP improves existing work in convergence time and success rate.
summary: Gaussian Process (GP) formulation of continuoustime trajectory offers a fast solution to the motion planning problem via probabilistic inference on factor graph. However, often the solution converges to in-feasible local minima and the planned trajectory is not collision-free. We propose a message passing algorithm that is more sensitive to obstacles with fast convergence time. We leverage the utility of min-sum message passing algorithm that performs local computations at each node to solve the inference problem on factor graph. We first introduce the notion of compound factor node to transform the factor graph to a linearly structured graph. We next develop an algorithm denoted as Min-sum Message Passing algorithm for Motion Planning (MS2MP) that combines numerical optimization with message passing to find collision-free trajectories. MS2MP performs numerical optimization to solve non-linear least square minimization problem at each compound factor node and then exploits the linear structure of factor graph to compute the maximum a posteriori (MAP) estimation of complete graph by passing messages among graph nodes. The decentralized optimization approach of each compound node increases sensitivity towards avoiding obstacles for harder planning problems. We evaluate our algorithm by performing extensive experiments for exemplary motion planning tasks for a robot manipulator. Our evaluation reveals that MS2MP improves existing work in convergence time and success rate.
abstract_zh: 连续时间轨迹的高斯过程 (GP) 公式通过因子图上的概率推理提供了运动规划问题的快速解决方案。然而，解决方案通常会收敛到不可行的局部最小值，并且规划的轨迹并不是无碰撞的。我们提出了一种对障碍物更敏感且收敛时间快的消息传递算法。我们利用在每个节点执行本地计算的最小和消息传递算法来解决因子图上的推理问题。我们首先引入复合因子节点的概念，将因子图转换为线性结构图。接下来，我们开发了一种称为运动规划最小和消息传递算法 (MS2MP) 的算法，该算法将数值优化与消息传递相结合，以找到无碰撞轨迹。 MS2MP 在每个复合因子节点执行数值优化来解决非线性最小二乘最小化问题，然后利用因子图的线性结构通过在图节点之间传递消息来计算完整图的最大后验 (MAP) 估计。每个复合节点的分散优化方法提高了避免困难规划问题障碍的灵敏度。我们通过对机器人操纵器的示例性运动规划任务进行大量实验来评估我们的算法。我们的评估表明，MS2MP 在收敛时间和成功率方面改善了现有工作。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为MS2MP的最小和消息传递算法，用于解决运动规划中的轨迹规划问题，以提高收敛速度和避障成功率。
AI.motivation: 高斯过程（GP）在连续时间轨迹规划中存在收敛到不可行局部极小值和轨迹碰撞的问题，现有方法在复杂场景下敏感度不足。
AI.method: 通过引入复合因子节点将因子图转化为线性结构，结合数值优化与消息传递算法，在复合因子节点解决非线性最小二乘问题，并利用线性结构进行最大后验估计。
AI.result: 在机器人机械臂的运动规划任务中，MS2MP在收敛时间和成功率上优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: MS2MP通过去中心化优化和线性结构消息传递，有效提升了复杂场景下的避障能力和规划效率。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为MS2MP的最小和消息传递算法，用于解决运动规划中的轨迹规划问题，以提高收敛速度和避障成功率。
ai_content.motivation: 高斯过程（GP）在连续时间轨迹规划中存在收敛到不可行局部极小值和轨迹碰撞的问题，现有方法在复杂场景下敏感度不足。

search_text: MS2MP: A Min-Sum Message Passing Algorithm for Motion Planning MS2MP：用于运动规划的最小和消息传递算法 Gaussian Process (GP) formulation of continuoustime trajectory offers a fast solution to the motion planning problem via probabilistic inference on factor graph. However, often the solution converges to in-feasible local minima and the planned trajectory is not collision-free. We propose a message passing algorithm that is more sensitive to obstacles with fast convergence time. We leverage the utility of min-sum message passing algorithm that performs local computations at each node to solve the inference problem on factor graph. We first introduce the notion of compound factor node to transform the factor graph to a linearly structured graph. We next develop an algorithm denoted as Min-sum Message Passing algorithm for Motion Planning (MS2MP) that combines numerical optimization with message passing to find collision-free trajectories. MS2MP performs numerical optimization to solve non-linear least square minimization problem at each compound factor node and then exploits the linear structure of factor graph to compute the maximum a posteriori (MAP) estimation of complete graph by passing messages among graph nodes. The decentralized optimization approach of each compound node increases sensitivity towards avoiding obstacles for harder planning problems. We evaluate our algorithm by performing extensive experiments for exemplary motion planning tasks for a robot manipulator. Our evaluation reveals that MS2MP improves existing work in convergence time and success rate. 连续时间轨迹的高斯过程 (GP) 公式通过因子图上的概率推理提供了运动规划问题的快速解决方案。然而，解决方案通常会收敛到不可行的局部最小值，并且规划的轨迹并不是无碰撞的。我们提出了一种对障碍物更敏感且收敛时间快的消息传递算法。我们利用在每个节点执行本地计算的最小和消息传递算法来解决因子图上的推理问题。我们首先引入复合因子节点的概念，将因子图转换为线性结构图。接下来，我们开发了一种称为运动规划最小和消息传递算法 (MS2MP) 的算法，该算法将数值优化与消息传递相结合，以找到无碰撞轨迹。 MS2MP 在每个复合因子节点执行数值优化来解决非线性最小二乘最小化问题，然后利用因子图的线性结构通过在图节点之间传递消息来计算完整图的最大后验 (MAP) 估计。每个复合节点的分散优化方法提高了避免困难规划问题障碍的灵敏度。我们通过对机器人操纵器的示例性运动规划任务进行大量实验来评估我们的算法。我们的评估表明，MS2MP 在收敛时间和成功率方面改善了现有工作。 本文提出了一种名为MS2MP的最小和消息传递算法，用于解决运动规划中的轨迹规划问题，以提高收敛速度和避障成功率。 Salman Bari,Volker Gabler,Dirk Wollherr cs.RO

authors_text: Xinwen Liu,Jing Wang,Cheng Peng,Shekhar S. Chandra,Feng Liu,S. Kevin Zhou
title: Undersampled MRI Reconstruction with Side Information-Guided Normalisation
title_zh: 使用辅助信息引导归一化的欠采样 MRI 重建
abstract: Magnetic resonance (MR) images exhibit various contrasts and appearances based on factors such as different acquisition protocols, views, manufacturers, scanning parameters, etc. This generally accessible appearance-related side information affects deep learning-based undersampled magnetic resonance imaging (MRI) reconstruction frameworks, but has been overlooked in the majority of current works. In this paper, we investigate the use of such side information as normalisation parameters in a convolutional neural network (CNN) to improve undersampled MRI reconstruction. Specifically, a Side Information-Guided Normalisation (SIGN) module, containing only few layers, is proposed to efficiently encode the side information and output the normalisation parameters. We examine the effectiveness of such a module on two popular reconstruction architectures, D5C5 and OUCR. The experimental results on both brain and knee images under various acceleration rates demonstrate that the proposed method improves on its corresponding baseline architectures with a significant margin.
summary: Magnetic resonance (MR) images exhibit various contrasts and appearances based on factors such as different acquisition protocols, views, manufacturers, scanning parameters, etc. This generally accessible appearance-related side information affects deep learning-based undersampled magnetic resonance imaging (MRI) reconstruction frameworks, but has been overlooked in the majority of current works. In this paper, we investigate the use of such side information as normalisation parameters in a convolutional neural network (CNN) to improve undersampled MRI reconstruction. Specifically, a Side Information-Guided Normalisation (SIGN) module, containing only few layers, is proposed to efficiently encode the side information and output the normalisation parameters. We examine the effectiveness of such a module on two popular reconstruction architectures, D5C5 and OUCR. The experimental results on both brain and knee images under various acceleration rates demonstrate that the proposed method improves on its corresponding baseline architectures with a significant margin.
abstract_zh: 磁共振 (MR) 图像根据不同的采集协议、视图、制造商、扫描参数等因素表现出各种对比度和外观。这种通常可访问的与外观相关的辅助信息会影响基于深度学习的欠采样磁共振成像 (MRI) 重建框架，但在当前的大多数工作中都被忽视了。在本文中，我们研究了在卷积神经网络（CNN）中使用诸如归一化参数之类的辅助信息来改善欠采样 MRI 重建。具体来说，提出了仅包含几个层的辅助信息引导归一化（SIGN）模块，以有效地编码辅助信息并输出归一化参数。我们检查了此类模块在两种流行的重建架构（D5C5 和 OUCR）上的有效性。不同加速度下大脑和膝盖图像的实验结果表明，所提出的方法在其相应的基线架构上有显着的改进。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于侧信息引导归一化的欠采样MRI重建方法，通过将外观相关侧信息编码为归一化参数以提升重建效果。
AI.motivation: 现有欠采样MRI重建框架大多忽视了采集协议、设备参数等外观相关侧信息的影响，而这些信息对重建结果具有重要影响。
AI.method: 设计包含少量网络层的SIGN模块，将侧信息编码为归一化参数并集成到D5C5和OUCR两种主流重建架构中。
AI.result: 在脑部和膝部图像的多加速率实验中，SIGN模块显著优于对应基线方法，验证了其有效性。
AI.conclusion: 侧信息引导归一化方法能有效提升欠采样MRI重建质量，为相关研究提供了新的技术思路。

authors_text: Peipei Zhu,Xiao Wang,Yong Luo,Zhenglong Sun,Wei-Shi Zheng,Yaowei Wang,Changwen Chen
title: Unpaired Image Captioning by Image-level Weakly-Supervised Visual Concept Recognition
title_zh: 图像级弱监督视觉概念识别的不成对图像描述
abstract: The goal of unpaired image captioning (UIC) is to describe images without using image-caption pairs in the training phase. Although challenging, we except the task can be accomplished by leveraging a training set of images aligned with visual concepts. Most existing studies use off-the-shelf algorithms to obtain the visual concepts because the Bounding Box (BBox) labels or relationship-triplet labels used for the training are expensive to acquire. In order to resolve the problem in expensive annotations, we propose a novel approach to achieve cost-effective UIC. Specifically, we adopt image-level labels for the optimization of the UIC model in a weakly-supervised manner. For each image, we assume that only the image-level labels are available without specific locations and numbers. The image-level labels are utilized to train a weakly-supervised object recognition model to extract object information (e.g., instance) in an image, and the extracted instances are adopted to infer the relationships among different objects based on an enhanced graph neural network (GNN). The proposed approach achieves comparable or even better performance compared with previous methods without the expensive cost of annotations. Furthermore, we design an unrecognized object (UnO) loss combined with a visual concept reward to improve the alignment of the inferred object and relationship information with the images. It can effectively alleviate the issue encountered by existing UIC models about generating sentences with nonexistent objects. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first attempt to solve the problem of Weakly-Supervised visual concept recognition for UIC (WS-UIC) based only on image-level labels. Extensive experiments have been carried out to demonstrate that the proposed WS-UIC model achieves inspiring results on the COCO dataset while significantly reducing the cost of labeling.
summary: The goal of unpaired image captioning (UIC) is to describe images without using image-caption pairs in the training phase. Although challenging, we except the task can be accomplished by leveraging a training set of images aligned with visual concepts. Most existing studies use off-the-shelf algorithms to obtain the visual concepts because the Bounding Box (BBox) labels or relationship-triplet labels used for the training are expensive to acquire. In order to resolve the problem in expensive annotations, we propose a novel approach to achieve cost-effective UIC. Specifically, we adopt image-level labels for the optimization of the UIC model in a weakly-supervised manner. For each image, we assume that only the image-level labels are available without specific locations and numbers. The image-level labels are utilized to train a weakly-supervised object recognition model to extract object information (e.g., instance) in an image, and the extracted instances are adopted to infer the relationships among different objects based on an enhanced graph neural network (GNN). The proposed approach achieves comparable or even better performance compared with previous methods without the expensive cost of annotations. Furthermore, we design an unrecognized object (UnO) loss combined with a visual concept reward to improve the alignment of the inferred object and relationship information with the images. It can effectively alleviate the issue encountered by existing UIC models about generating sentences with nonexistent objects. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first attempt to solve the problem of Weakly-Supervised visual concept recognition for UIC (WS-UIC) based only on image-level labels. Extensive experiments have been carried out to demonstrate that the proposed WS-UIC model achieves inspiring results on the COCO dataset while significantly reducing the cost of labeling.
abstract_zh: 不成对图像字幕 (UIC) 的目标是在训练阶段不使用图像字幕对来描述图像。尽管具有挑战性，但我们认为该任务可以通过利用与视觉概念一致的图像训练集来完成。大多数现有研究使用现成的算法来获取视觉概念，因为用于训练的边界框（BBox）标签或关系三元组标签的获取成本很高。为了解决昂贵的注释问题，我们提出了一种新的方法来实现具有成本效益的 UIC。具体来说，我们采用图像级标签以弱监督的方式优化 UIC 模型。对于每个图像，我们假设只有图像级标签可用，没有特定位置和数字。利用图像级标签来训练弱监督对象识别模型，以提取图像中的对象信息（例如实例），并采用提取的实例基于增强型图神经网络（GNN）来推断不同对象之间的关系。与以前的方法相比，所提出的方法实现了可比甚至更好的性能，而无需昂贵的注释成本。此外，我们设计了未识别对象（UnO）损失与视觉概念奖励相结合，以改善推断对象和关系信息与图像的对齐。它可以有效缓解现有 UIC 模型在生成不存在对象的句子时遇到的问题。据我们所知，这是首次尝试解决仅基于图像级标签的 UIC 弱监督视觉概念识别（WS-UIC）问题。广泛的实验表明，所提出的 WS-UIC 模型在 COCO 数据集上取得了令人鼓舞的结果，同时显着降低了标记成本。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于图像级弱监督视觉概念识别的无配对图像描述生成方法。
AI.motivation: 现有无配对图像描述方法依赖昂贵的标注数据（如边界框或三元组标签），而图像级标签成本更低但未被充分利用。
AI.method: 采用图像级标签训练弱监督目标识别模型，结合增强图神经网络（GNN）推断对象关系，并设计UnO损失与视觉概念奖励优化生成结果。
AI.result: 在COCO数据集上达到与现有方法相当或更优的性能，显著降低标注成本。
AI.conclusion: 首次基于纯图像级标签实现弱监督视觉概念识别的无配对图像描述，验证了方法的有效性与经济性。

It can effectively alleviate the issue encountered by existing UIC models about generating sentences with nonexistent objects. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first attempt to solve the problem of Weakly-Supervised visual concept recognition for UIC (WS-UIC) based only on image-level labels. Extensive experiments have been carried out to demonstrate that the proposed WS-UIC model achieves inspiring results on the COCO dataset while significantly reducing the cost of labeling. 不成对图像字幕 (UIC) 的目标是在训练阶段不使用图像字幕对来描述图像。尽管具有挑战性，但我们认为该任务可以通过利用与视觉概念一致的图像训练集来完成。大多数现有研究使用现成的算法来获取视觉概念，因为用于训练的边界框（BBox）标签或关系三元组标签的获取成本很高。为了解决昂贵的注释问题，我们提出了一种新的方法来实现具有成本效益的 UIC。具体来说，我们采用图像级标签以弱监督的方式优化 UIC 模型。对于每个图像，我们假设只有图像级标签可用，没有特定位置和数字。利用图像级标签来训练弱监督对象识别模型，以提取图像中的对象信息（例如实例），并采用提取的实例基于增强型图神经网络（GNN）来推断不同对象之间的关系。与以前的方法相比，所提出的方法实现了可比甚至更好的性能，而无需昂贵的注释成本。此外，我们设计了未识别对象（UnO）损失与视觉概念奖励相结合，以改善推断对象和关系信息与图像的对齐。它可以有效缓解现有 UIC 模型在生成不存在对象的句子时遇到的问题。据我们所知，这是首次尝试解决仅基于图像级标签的 UIC 弱监督视觉概念识别（WS-UIC）问题。广泛的实验表明，所提出的 WS-UIC 模型在 COCO 数据集上取得了令人鼓舞的结果，同时显着降低了标记成本。 本文提出一种基于图像级弱监督视觉概念识别的无配对图像描述生成方法。 Peipei Zhu,Xiao Wang,Yong Luo,Zhenglong Sun,Wei-Shi Zheng,Yaowei Wang,Changwen Chen cs.CV,cs.CL

authors_text: Florian Lux,Ngoc Thang Vu
title: Language-Agnostic Meta-Learning for Low-Resource Text-to-Speech with Articulatory Features
title_zh: 用于具有发音特征的低资源文本到语音的与语言无关的元学习
comment: Accepted for the ACL 2022 main conference
comments: Accepted for the ACL 2022 main conference
abstract: While neural text-to-speech systems perform remarkably well in high-resource scenarios, they cannot be applied to the majority of the over 6,000 spoken languages in the world due to a lack of appropriate training data. In this work, we use embeddings derived from articulatory vectors rather than embeddings derived from phoneme identities to learn phoneme representations that hold across languages. In conjunction with language agnostic meta learning, this enables us to fine-tune a high-quality text-to-speech model on just 30 minutes of data in a previously unseen language spoken by a previously unseen speaker.
summary: While neural text-to-speech systems perform remarkably well in high-resource scenarios, they cannot be applied to the majority of the over 6,000 spoken languages in the world due to a lack of appropriate training data. In this work, we use embeddings derived from articulatory vectors rather than embeddings derived from phoneme identities to learn phoneme representations that hold across languages. In conjunction with language agnostic meta learning, this enables us to fine-tune a high-quality text-to-speech model on just 30 minutes of data in a previously unseen language spoken by a previously unseen speaker.
abstract_zh: 虽然神经文本转语音系统在高资源场景中表现非常出色，但由于缺乏适当的训练数据，它们无法应用于世界上 6000 多种口语中的大多数。在这项工作中，我们使用从发音向量派生的嵌入而不是从音素标识派生的嵌入来学习跨语言的音素表示。与语言无关的元学习相结合，这使我们能够根据由以前未见过的说话者所说的以前未见过的语言的仅 30 分钟的数据来微调高质量的文本到语音模型。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种语言无关的元学习方法，利用发音特征解决低资源语言的文本到语音合成问题。
AI.motivation: 现有神经网络文本到语音系统在高资源语言表现优异，但无法覆盖全球6000多种语言，因多数语言缺乏训练数据。
AI.method: 采用发音向量嵌入替代传统音素嵌入，结合语言无关元学习框架，实现跨语言音素表征学习与少量数据微调。
AI.result: 仅需30分钟目标语言数据即可微调出高质量TTS模型，支持新语言与新说话人的语音合成。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为低资源语言语音合成提供有效解决方案，推动多语言语音技术普及应用。

authors_text: Marcos Faundez-Zanuy
title: Speaker recognition by means of a combination of linear and nonlinear predictive models
title_zh: 通过线性和非线性预测模型的组合进行说话人识别
abstract: This paper deals the combination of nonlinear predictive models with classical LPCC parameterization for speaker recognition. It is shown that the combination of both a measure defined over LPCC coefficients and a measure defined over predictive analysis residual signal gives rise to an improvement over the classical method that considers only the LPCC coefficients. If the residual signal is obtained from a linear prediction analysis, the improvement is 2.63% (error rate drops from 6.31% to 3.68%) and if it is computed through a nonlinear predictive neural nets based model, the improvement is 3.68%. An efficient algorithm for reducing the computational burden is also proposed.
summary: This paper deals the combination of nonlinear predictive models with classical LPCC parameterization for speaker recognition. It is shown that the combination of both a measure defined over LPCC coefficients and a measure defined over predictive analysis residual signal gives rise to an improvement over the classical method that considers only the LPCC coefficients. If the residual signal is obtained from a linear prediction analysis, the improvement is 2.63% (error rate drops from 6.31% to 3.68%) and if it is computed through a nonlinear predictive neural nets based model, the improvement is 3.68%. An efficient algorithm for reducing the computational burden is also proposed.
abstract_zh: 本文将非线性预测模型与经典 LPCC 参数化相结合来进行说话人识别。结果表明，对 LPCC 系数定义的测量和对预测分析残差信号定义的测量的组合产生了对仅考虑 LPCC 系数的经典方法的改进。如果残差信号是通过线性预测分析获得的，则改进为 2.63%（错误率从 6.31% 下降到 3.68%），如果通过基于非线性预测神经网络的模型计算，则改进为 3.68%。还提出了一种减少计算负担的有效算法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出结合线性预测残差信号与非线性预测模型改进说话人识别性能
AI.motivation: 传统LPCC参数化方法在说话人识别中存在局限性，需探索更有效的特征提取方式
AI.method: 融合LPCC系数与预测残差信号度量，分别采用线性预测和神经网络非线性模型处理残差信号，并设计高效计算算法
AI.result: 线性模型使错误率下降2.63%（3.68%→6.31%），非线性模型下降3.68%，计算效率显著提升
AI.conclusion: 多模型融合方法有效提升识别准确率，提出的高效算法降低计算复杂度，为说话人识别提供新思路

authors_text: Haofei Zhang,Feng Mao,Mengqi Xue,Gongfan Fang,Zunlei Feng,Jie Song,Mingli Song
title: Knowledge Amalgamation for Object Detection with Transformers
title_zh: 使用 Transformer 进行目标检测的知识融合
comment: This work has been submitted to the IEEE for possible publication
comments: This work has been submitted to the IEEE for possible publication
abstract: Knowledge amalgamation (KA) is a novel deep model reusing task aiming to transfer knowledge from several well-trained teachers to a multi-talented and compact student. Currently, most of these approaches are tailored for convolutional neural networks (CNNs). However, there is a tendency that transformers, with a completely different architecture, are starting to challenge the domination of CNNs in many computer vision tasks. Nevertheless, directly applying the previous KA methods to transformers leads to severe performance degradation. In this work, we explore a more effective KA scheme for transformer-based object detection models. Specifically, considering the architecture characteristics of transformers, we propose to dissolve the KA into two aspects: sequence-level amalgamation (SA) and task-level amalgamation (TA). In particular, a hint is generated within the sequence-level amalgamation by concatenating teacher sequences instead of redundantly aggregating them to a fixed-size one as previous KA works. Besides, the student learns heterogeneous detection tasks through soft targets with efficiency in the task-level amalgamation. Extensive experiments on PASCAL VOC and COCO have unfolded that the sequence-level amalgamation significantly boosts the performance of students, while the previous methods impair the students. Moreover, the transformer-based students excel in learning amalgamated knowledge, as they have mastered heterogeneous detection tasks rapidly and achieved superior or at least comparable performance to those of the teachers in their specializations.
summary: Knowledge amalgamation (KA) is a novel deep model reusing task aiming to transfer knowledge from several well-trained teachers to a multi-talented and compact student. Currently, most of these approaches are tailored for convolutional neural networks (CNNs). However, there is a tendency that transformers, with a completely different architecture, are starting to challenge the domination of CNNs in many computer vision tasks. Nevertheless, directly applying the previous KA methods to transformers leads to severe performance degradation. In this work, we explore a more effective KA scheme for transformer-based object detection models. Specifically, considering the architecture characteristics of transformers, we propose to dissolve the KA into two aspects: sequence-level amalgamation (SA) and task-level amalgamation (TA). In particular, a hint is generated within the sequence-level amalgamation by concatenating teacher sequences instead of redundantly aggregating them to a fixed-size one as previous KA works. Besides, the student learns heterogeneous detection tasks through soft targets with efficiency in the task-level amalgamation. Extensive experiments on PASCAL VOC and COCO have unfolded that the sequence-level amalgamation significantly boosts the performance of students, while the previous methods impair the students. Moreover, the transformer-based students excel in learning amalgamated knowledge, as they have mastered heterogeneous detection tasks rapidly and achieved superior or at least comparable performance to those of the teachers in their specializations.
abstract_zh: 知识融合（KA）是一种新颖的深度模型重用任务，旨在将知识从几位训练有素的教师转移到多才多艺的紧凑学生。目前，大多数这些方法都是为卷积神经网络（CNN）量身定制的。然而，有一种趋势是，具有完全不同架构的 Transformer 开始挑战 CNN 在许多计算机视觉任务中的统治地位。然而，直接将之前的 KA 方法应用于变压器会导致严重的性能下降。在这项工作中，我们为基于变压器的目标检测模型探索了一种更有效的 KA 方案。具体来说，考虑到 Transformer 的架构特征，我们建议将 KA 分解为两个方面：序列级合并（SA）和任务级合并（TA）。特别是，通过连接教师序列在序列级合并中生成提示，而不是像以前的 KA 工作那样将它们冗余地聚合为固定大小的序列。此外，学生通过软目标高效地进行任务级合并来学习异构检测任务。对 PASCAL VOC 和 COCO 的大量实验表明，序列级合并显着提高了学生的表现，而以前的方法会损害学生的表现。此外，基于 Transformer 的学生在学习混合知识方面表现出色，因为他们快速掌握了异构检测任务，并取得了优于或至少与专业教师相当的表现。

AI.tldr: 提出一种针对基于Transformer的目标检测模型的有效知识融合方法，以解决传统方法在Transformer上性能下降的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有知识融合方法多针对CNN设计，直接应用于Transformer时因架构差异导致性能显著下降，需探索适配Transformer特性的新方案。
AI.method: 将知识融合分解为序列级（SA）和任务级（TA）：SA通过拼接教师序列生成提示而非压缩为固定尺寸；TA利用软目标提升异构检测任务学习效率。
AI.result: 在PASCAL VOC和COCO数据集上，序列级融合显著提升学生模型性能，Transformer学生模型在异构任务中表现优于或至少等同于教师模型。
AI.conclusion: Transformer架构更擅长学习融合知识，所提方法通过适配其特性实现了高效的知识迁移，为未来模型设计提供新思路。

tldr: 提出一种针对基于Transformer的目标检测模型的有效知识融合方法，以解决传统方法在Transformer上性能下降的问题。
motivation: 现有知识融合方法多针对CNN设计，直接应用于Transformer时因架构差异导致性能显著下降，需探索适配Transformer特性的新方案。
method: 将知识融合分解为序列级（SA）和任务级（TA）：SA通过拼接教师序列生成提示而非压缩为固定尺寸；TA利用软目标提升异构检测任务学习效率。
result: 在PASCAL VOC和COCO数据集上，序列级融合显著提升学生模型性能，Transformer学生模型在异构任务中表现优于或至少等同于教师模型。
conclusion: Transformer架构更擅长学习融合知识，所提方法通过适配其特性实现了高效的知识迁移，为未来模型设计提供新思路。
search_text: Knowledge Amalgamation for Object Detection with Transformers 使用 Transformer 进行目标检测的知识融合 Knowledge amalgamation (KA) is a novel deep model reusing task aiming to transfer knowledge from several well-trained teachers to a multi-talented and compact student. Currently, most of these approaches are tailored for convolutional neural networks (CNNs). However, there is a tendency that transformers, with a completely different architecture, are starting to challenge the domination of CNNs in many computer vision tasks. Nevertheless, directly applying the previous KA methods to transformers leads to severe performance degradation. In this work, we explore a more effective KA scheme for transformer-based object detection models. Specifically, considering the architecture characteristics of transformers, we propose to dissolve the KA into two aspects: sequence-level amalgamation (SA) and task-level amalgamation (TA). In particular, a hint is generated within the sequence-level amalgamation by concatenating teacher sequences instead of redundantly aggregating them to a fixed-size one as previous KA works. Besides, the student learns heterogeneous detection tasks through soft targets with efficiency in the task-level amalgamation. Extensive experiments on PASCAL VOC and COCO have unfolded that the sequence-level amalgamation significantly boosts the performance of students, while the previous methods impair the students. Moreover, the transformer-based students excel in learning amalgamated knowledge, as they have mastered heterogeneous detection tasks rapidly and achieved superior or at least comparable performance to those of the teachers in their specializations. 知识融合（KA）是一种新颖的深度模型重用任务，旨在将知识从几位训练有素的教师转移到多才多艺的紧凑学生。目前，大多数这些方法都是为卷积神经网络（CNN）量身定制的。然而，有一种趋势是，具有完全不同架构的 Transformer 开始挑战 CNN 在许多计算机视觉任务中的统治地位。然而，直接将之前的 KA 方法应用于变压器会导致严重的性能下降。在这项工作中，我们为基于变压器的目标检测模型探索了一种更有效的 KA 方案。具体来说，考虑到 Transformer 的架构特征，我们建议将 KA 分解为两个方面：序列级合并（SA）和任务级合并（TA）。特别是，通过连接教师序列在序列级合并中生成提示，而不是像以前的 KA 工作那样将它们冗余地聚合为固定大小的序列。此外，学生通过软目标高效地进行任务级合并来学习异构检测任务。对 PASCAL VOC 和 COCO 的大量实验表明，序列级合并显着提高了学生的表现，而以前的方法会损害学生的表现。此外，基于 Transformer 的学生在学习混合知识方面表现出色，因为他们快速掌握了异构检测任务，并取得了优于或至少与专业教师相当的表现。 提出一种针对基于Transformer的目标检测模型的有效知识融合方法，以解决传统方法在Transformer上性能下降的问题。 Haofei Zhang,Feng Mao,Mengqi Xue,Gongfan Fang,Zunlei Feng,Jie Song,Mingli Song cs.CV,cs.AI

authors_text: Zehao Wang,Mingxiao Li,Minye Wu,Marie-Francine Moens,Tinne Tuytelaars
title: Find a Way Forward: a Language-Guided Semantic Map Navigator
title_zh: 找到前进的道路：语言引导的语义地图导航器
abstract: In this paper, we introduce the map-language navigation task where an agent executes natural language instructions and moves to the target position based only on a given 3D semantic map. To tackle the task, we design the instruction-aware Path Proposal and Discrimination model (iPPD). Our approach leverages map information to provide instruction-aware path proposals, i.e., it selects all potential instruction-aligned candidate paths to reduce the solution space. Next, to represent the map observations along a path for a better modality alignment, a novel Path Feature Encoding scheme tailored for semantic maps is proposed. An attention-based Language Driven Discriminator is designed to evaluate path candidates and determine the best path as the final result. Our method can naturally avoid error accumulation compared with single-step greedy decision methods. Comparing to a single-step imitation learning approach, iPPD has performance gains above 17% on navigation success and 0.18 on path matching measurement nDTW in challenging unseen environments.
summary: In this paper, we introduce the map-language navigation task where an agent executes natural language instructions and moves to the target position based only on a given 3D semantic map. To tackle the task, we design the instruction-aware Path Proposal and Discrimination model (iPPD). Our approach leverages map information to provide instruction-aware path proposals, i.e., it selects all potential instruction-aligned candidate paths to reduce the solution space. Next, to represent the map observations along a path for a better modality alignment, a novel Path Feature Encoding scheme tailored for semantic maps is proposed. An attention-based Language Driven Discriminator is designed to evaluate path candidates and determine the best path as the final result. Our method can naturally avoid error accumulation compared with single-step greedy decision methods. Comparing to a single-step imitation learning approach, iPPD has performance gains above 17% on navigation success and 0.18 on path matching measurement nDTW in challenging unseen environments.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们介绍了地图语言导航任务，其中代理执行自然语言指令并仅基于给定的 3D 语义地图移动到目标位置。为了解决这个任务，我们设计了指令感知的路径建议和判别模型（iPPD）。我们的方法利用映射信息来提供指令感知路径建议，即，它选择所有潜在的指令对齐候选路径以减少解决方案空间。接下来，为了表示沿路径的地图观测以获得更好的模态对齐，提出了一种针对语义地图定制的新颖的路径特征编码方案。基于注意力的语言驱动判别器旨在评估候选路径并确定最佳路径作为最终结果。与单步贪心决策方法相比，我们的方法自然可以避免误差累积。与单步模仿学习方法相比，iPPD 在具有挑战性的未知环境中，导航成功率提高了 17% 以上，路径匹配测量 nDTW 提高了 0.18。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于语言指令和3D语义地图的导航任务，设计了iPPD模型以提高导航成功率和路径匹配度。
AI.motivation: 现有单步贪婪决策方法在复杂未知环境中易积累误差，需通过语言指令与语义地图结合实现更鲁棒的导航。
AI.method: 设计了指令感知的路径提案与判别模型(iPPD)，包含路径提案生成、路径特征编码及语言驱动的判别器，通过多模态对齐选择最优路径。
AI.result: 在挑战性未知环境中，iPPD相比单步模仿学习方法导航成功率提升17%，路径匹配指标nDTW提高0.18。
AI.conclusion: iPPD通过语义地图与语言指令的协同利用，有效避免误差积累，在复杂场景中实现更优导航性能。

authors_text: Pengjin Wei,Guohang Yan,Yikang Li,Kun Fang,Xinyu Cai,Jie Yang,Wei Liu
title: CROON: Automatic Multi-LiDAR Calibration and Refinement Method in Road Scene
title_zh: CROON：道路场景中自动多激光雷达标定和细化方法
abstract: Sensor-based environmental perception is a crucial part of the autonomous driving system. In order to get an excellent perception of the surrounding environment, an intelligent system would configure multiple LiDARs (3D Light Detection and Ranging) to cover the distant and near space of the car. The precision of perception relies on the quality of sensor calibration. This research aims at developing an accurate, automatic, and robust calibration strategy for multiple LiDAR systems in the general road scene. We thus propose CROON (automatiC multi-LiDAR CalibratiOn and Refinement method in rOad sceNe), a two-stage method including rough and refinement calibration. The first stage can calibrate the sensor from an arbitrary initial pose, and the second stage is able to precisely calibrate the sensor iteratively. Specifically, CROON utilize the nature characteristics of road scene so that it is independent and easy to apply in large-scale conditions. Experimental results on real-world and simulated data sets demonstrate the reliability and accuracy of our method. All the related data sets and codes are open-sourced on the Github website https://github.com/OpenCalib/LiDAR2LiDAR.
summary: Sensor-based environmental perception is a crucial part of the autonomous driving system. In order to get an excellent perception of the surrounding environment, an intelligent system would configure multiple LiDARs (3D Light Detection and Ranging) to cover the distant and near space of the car. The precision of perception relies on the quality of sensor calibration. This research aims at developing an accurate, automatic, and robust calibration strategy for multiple LiDAR systems in the general road scene. We thus propose CROON (automatiC multi-LiDAR CalibratiOn and Refinement method in rOad sceNe), a two-stage method including rough and refinement calibration. The first stage can calibrate the sensor from an arbitrary initial pose, and the second stage is able to precisely calibrate the sensor iteratively. Specifically, CROON utilize the nature characteristics of road scene so that it is independent and easy to apply in large-scale conditions. Experimental results on real-world and simulated data sets demonstrate the reliability and accuracy of our method. All the related data sets and codes are open-sourced on the Github website https://github.com/OpenCalib/LiDAR2LiDAR.
abstract_zh: 基于传感器的环境感知是自动驾驶系统的重要组成部分。为了获得对周围环境的良好感知，智能系统将配置多个LiDAR（3D光检测和测距）来覆盖汽车的远方和近方空间。感知的精度取决于传感器校准的质量。本研究旨在为一般道路场景中的多个激光雷达系统开发一种准确、自动、鲁棒的校准策略。因此，我们提出了 CROON（道路场景中的自动多激光雷达校准和细化方法），这是一种包括粗略和细化校准的两阶段方法。第一级可以从任意初始姿态校准传感器，第二级能够迭代地精确校准传感器。具体来说，CROON利用了道路场景的自然特征，使其独立且易于在大规模条件下应用。真实世界和模拟数据集的实验结果证明了我们方法的可靠性和准确性。所有相关数据集和代码均在Github网站https://github.com/OpenCalib/LiDAR2LiDAR上开源。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种用于道路场景的自动多LiDAR校准与优化方法CROON，通过两阶段策略实现高精度传感器标定。
AI.motivation: 多LiDAR系统在自动驾驶中需覆盖远近空间，但现有标定方法精度不足且依赖人工干预，影响环境感知可靠性。
AI.method: CROON采用两阶段方法：第一阶段基于任意初始姿态进行粗略标定，第二阶段通过迭代优化实现精准校准，利用道路场景特征提升泛化能力。
AI.result: 在真实与模拟数据集实验中验证了方法可靠性与准确性，代码与数据集已开源。
AI.conclusion: CROON提供了一种自动、鲁棒的多LiDAR标定方案，适用于大规模道路场景部署。

authors_text: Madhu Kiran,Le Thanh Nguyen-Meidine,Rajat Sahay,Rafael Menelau Oliveira E Cruz,Louis-Antoine Blais-Morin,Eric Granger
title: Dynamic Template Selection Through Change Detection for Adaptive Siamese Tracking
title_zh: 通过变化检测进行动态模板选择以实现自适应连体跟踪
abstract: Deep Siamese trackers have recently gained much attention in recent years since they can track visual objects at high speeds. Additionally, adaptive tracking methods, where target samples collected by the tracker are employed for online learning, have achieved state-of-the-art accuracy. However, single object tracking (SOT) remains a challenging task in real-world application due to changes and deformations in a target object's appearance. Learning on all the collected samples may lead to catastrophic forgetting, and thereby corrupt the tracking model. In this paper, SOT is formulated as an online incremental learning problem. A new method is proposed for dynamic sample selection and memory replay, preventing template corruption. In particular, we propose a change detection mechanism to detect gradual changes in object appearance and select the corresponding samples for online adaption. In addition, an entropy-based sample selection strategy is introduced to maintain a diversified auxiliary buffer for memory replay. Our proposed method can be integrated into any object tracking algorithm that leverages online learning for model adaptation. Extensive experiments conducted on the OTB-100, LaSOT, UAV123, and TrackingNet datasets highlight the cost-effectiveness of our method, along with the contribution of its key components. Results indicate that integrating our proposed method into state-of-art adaptive Siamese trackers can increase the potential benefits of a template update strategy, and significantly improve performance.
summary: Deep Siamese trackers have recently gained much attention in recent years since they can track visual objects at high speeds. Additionally, adaptive tracking methods, where target samples collected by the tracker are employed for online learning, have achieved state-of-the-art accuracy. However, single object tracking (SOT) remains a challenging task in real-world application due to changes and deformations in a target object's appearance. Learning on all the collected samples may lead to catastrophic forgetting, and thereby corrupt the tracking model. In this paper, SOT is formulated as an online incremental learning problem. A new method is proposed for dynamic sample selection and memory replay, preventing template corruption. In particular, we propose a change detection mechanism to detect gradual changes in object appearance and select the corresponding samples for online adaption. In addition, an entropy-based sample selection strategy is introduced to maintain a diversified auxiliary buffer for memory replay. Our proposed method can be integrated into any object tracking algorithm that leverages online learning for model adaptation. Extensive experiments conducted on the OTB-100, LaSOT, UAV123, and TrackingNet datasets highlight the cost-effectiveness of our method, along with the contribution of its key components. Results indicate that integrating our proposed method into state-of-art adaptive Siamese trackers can increase the potential benefits of a template update strategy, and significantly improve performance.
abstract_zh: 深连体跟踪器近年来受到了广泛关注，因为它们可以高速跟踪视觉物体。此外，自适应跟踪方法（其中跟踪器收集的目标样本用于在线学习）已经实现了最先进的精度。然而，由于目标对象外观的变化和变形，单对象跟踪（SOT）在现实应用中仍然是一项具有挑战性的任务。对所有收集的样本进行学习可能会导致灾难性的遗忘，从而破坏跟踪模型。在本文中，SOT 被表述为一个在线增量学习问题。提出了一种用于动态样本选择和内存重放的新方法，以防止模板损坏。特别是，我们提出了一种变化检测机制来检测对象外观的逐渐变化并选择相应的样本进行在线适应。此外，引入基于熵的样本选择策略来维护用于内存重放的多样化辅助缓冲区。我们提出的方法可以集成到任何利用在线学习进行模型自适应的对象跟踪算法中。在 OTB-100、LaSOT、UAV123 和 TrackingNet 数据集上进行的大量实验凸显了我们方法的成本效益及其关键组件的贡献。结果表明，将我们提出的方法集成到最先进的自适应暹罗跟踪器中可以增加模板更新策略的潜在好处，并显着提高性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种通过变化检测实现动态模板选择的方法，以解决自适应Siamese跟踪器在在线学习中的模板退化问题。
AI.motivation: 现有自适应跟踪方法在在线学习时使用所有收集的样本进行学习，容易导致灾难性遗忘，从而破坏跟踪模型。单目标跟踪（SOT）在实际应用中因目标外观变化和变形而具有挑战性。
AI.method: 将SOT建模为在线增量学习问题，提出变化检测机制以检测目标外观的渐变变化并选择相应样本进行在线适配，同时引入基于熵的样本选择策略以维护多样化的辅助缓冲区用于记忆回放。
AI.result: 在OTB-100、LaSOT等数据集上的实验表明，该方法具有成本效益，其关键组件有效提升了状态-of-the-art自适应Siamese跟踪器的性能。
AI.conclusion: 动态样本选择与记忆回放机制能有效防止模板退化，显著提高跟踪精度和鲁棒性，且方法可集成到任何基于在线学习的跟踪算法中。

search_text: Dynamic Template Selection Through Change Detection for Adaptive Siamese Tracking 通过变化检测进行动态模板选择以实现自适应连体跟踪 Deep Siamese trackers have recently gained much attention in recent years since they can track visual objects at high speeds. Additionally, adaptive tracking methods, where target samples collected by the tracker are employed for online learning, have achieved state-of-the-art accuracy. However, single object tracking (SOT) remains a challenging task in real-world application due to changes and deformations in a target object's appearance. Learning on all the collected samples may lead to catastrophic forgetting, and thereby corrupt the tracking model. In this paper, SOT is formulated as an online incremental learning problem. A new method is proposed for dynamic sample selection and memory replay, preventing template corruption. In particular, we propose a change detection mechanism to detect gradual changes in object appearance and select the corresponding samples for online adaption. In addition, an entropy-based sample selection strategy is introduced to maintain a diversified auxiliary buffer for memory replay. Our proposed method can be integrated into any object tracking algorithm that leverages online learning for model adaptation. Extensive experiments conducted on the OTB-100, LaSOT, UAV123, and TrackingNet datasets highlight the cost-effectiveness of our method, along with the contribution of its key components. authors_text: Zhixuan Wu,Rui Yang,Lei Zheng,Hui Cheng
title: Safe Learning-Based Feedback Linearization Tracking Control for Nonlinear System with Event-Triggered Model Update
title_zh: 具有事件触发模型更新的非线性系统的基于安全学习的反馈线性化跟踪控制
abstract: Learning-based methods are powerful in handling complex scenarios. However, it is still challenging to use learning-based methods under uncertain environments while stability, safety, and real-time performance of the system are desired to guarantee. In this paper, we propose a learning-based tracking control scheme based on a feedback linearization controller in which uncertain disturbances are approximated online using Gaussian Processes (GPs). Using the predicted distribution of disturbances given by GPs, a Control Lyapunov Function (CLF) and Control Barrier Function (CBF) based Quadratic Program is applied, with which probabilistic stability and safety are guaranteed. In addition, the trajectory is optimized first by Model Predictive Control (MPC) based on the linearized dynamics systems to further reduce the tracking error. We also design an event trigger for GPs updates to improve efficiency while stability and safety of the system are still guaranteed. The effectiveness of the proposed tracking control strategy is illustrated in numerical simulations.
summary: Learning-based methods are powerful in handling complex scenarios. However, it is still challenging to use learning-based methods under uncertain environments while stability, safety, and real-time performance of the system are desired to guarantee. In this paper, we propose a learning-based tracking control scheme based on a feedback linearization controller in which uncertain disturbances are approximated online using Gaussian Processes (GPs). Using the predicted distribution of disturbances given by GPs, a Control Lyapunov Function (CLF) and Control Barrier Function (CBF) based Quadratic Program is applied, with which probabilistic stability and safety are guaranteed. In addition, the trajectory is optimized first by Model Predictive Control (MPC) based on the linearized dynamics systems to further reduce the tracking error. We also design an event trigger for GPs updates to improve efficiency while stability and safety of the system are still guaranteed. The effectiveness of the proposed tracking control strategy is illustrated in numerical simulations.
abstract_zh: 基于学习的方法在处理复杂场景方面非常强大。然而，在不确定的环境下使用基于学习的方法仍然具有挑战性，同时需要保证系统的稳定性、安全性和实时性。在本文中，我们提出了一种基于反馈线性化控制器的基于学习的跟踪控制方案，其中使用高斯过程（GP）在线近似不确定扰动。利用GP给出的扰动预测分布，应用基于控制李亚普诺夫函数（CLF）和控制屏障函数（CBF）的二次规划，保证了概率稳定性和安全性。此外，首先通过基于线性化动力学系统的模型预测控制（MPC）对轨迹进行优化，以进一步减小跟踪误差。我们还设计了GP更新的事件触发器，在提高效率的同时仍然保证系统的稳定性和安全性。数值模拟说明了所提出的跟踪控制策略的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于学习的反馈线性化跟踪控制方法，用于非线性系统的安全控制，并结合事件触发机制优化模型更新效率。
AI.motivation: 学习方法在复杂场景中表现强大，但在不确定环境中难以同时保证系统稳定性、安全性和实时性，亟需解决这一矛盾。
AI.method: 采用高斯过程（GPs）在线逼近不确定扰动，结合控制李雅普诺夫函数（CLF）和控制屏障函数（CBF）的二次规划确保概率稳定性与安全性；通过模型预测控制（MPC）优化轨迹，并设计事件触发机制减少模型更新频率。
AI.result: 数值仿真验证了所提控制策略在保证系统安全稳定的同时，有效降低了跟踪误差并提升了效率。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过融合学习、安全约束与事件触发机制，为非线性系统的实时安全控制提供了有效解决方案。

authors_text: Mike Allenspach,Nicholas Lawrance,Marco Tognon,Roland Siegwart
title: Towards 6DoF Bilateral Teleoperation of an Omnidirectional Aerial Vehicle for Aerial Physical Interaction
title_zh: 用于空中物理交互的全向飞行器的 6DoF 双边遥控
abstract: Bilateral teleoperation offers an intriguing solution towards shared autonomy with aerial vehicles in contact-based inspection and manipulation tasks. Omnidirectional aerial robots allow for full pose operations, making them particularly attractive in such tasks. Naturally, the question arises whether standard bilateral teleoperation methodologies are suitable for use with these vehicles. In this work, a fully decoupled 6DoF bilateral teleoperation framework for aerial physical interaction is designed and tested for the first time. The method is based on the well established rate control, recentering and interaction force feedback policy. However, practical experiments evince the difficulty of performing decoupled motions in a single axis only. As such, this work shows that the trivial extension of standard methods is insufficient for omnidirectional teleoperation, due to the operators physical inability to properly decouple all input DoFs. This suggests that further studies on enhanced haptic feedback are necessary.
summary: Bilateral teleoperation offers an intriguing solution towards shared autonomy with aerial vehicles in contact-based inspection and manipulation tasks. Omnidirectional aerial robots allow for full pose operations, making them particularly attractive in such tasks. Naturally, the question arises whether standard bilateral teleoperation methodologies are suitable for use with these vehicles. In this work, a fully decoupled 6DoF bilateral teleoperation framework for aerial physical interaction is designed and tested for the first time. The method is based on the well established rate control, recentering and interaction force feedback policy. However, practical experiments evince the difficulty of performing decoupled motions in a single axis only. As such, this work shows that the trivial extension of standard methods is insufficient for omnidirectional teleoperation, due to the operators physical inability to properly decouple all input DoFs. This suggests that further studies on enhanced haptic feedback are necessary.
abstract_zh: 双边远程操作为在基于接触的检查和操纵任务中与飞行器共享自主权提供了一个有趣的解决方案。全向空中机器人可以进行全姿势操作，这使得它们在此类任务中特别有吸引力。当然，问题是标准的双边远程操作方法是否适合与这些车辆一起使用。在这项工作中，首次设计并测试了用于空中物理交互的完全解耦的6DoF双边遥操作框架。该方法基于完善的速率控制、居中和交互力反馈策略。然而，实际实验表明仅在单轴上执行解耦运动是困难的。因此，这项工作表明，由于操作员身体上无法正确解耦所有输入自由度，标准方法的简单扩展不足以实现全向远程操作。这表明有必要对增强的触觉反馈进行进一步的研究。

AI.tldr: 本文设计并测试了首个用于全方位空中机器人物理交互的6自由度双边遥操作框架。
AI.motivation: 双边遥操作可实现空中机器人接触式检测与操作任务的共享自主性，但现有方法是否适用于全方位空中机器人尚不明确。
AI.method: 基于速率控制、重置和交互力反馈策略，构建6DoF双边遥操作框架，通过实验验证其可行性。
AI.result: 实验表明单一轴向解耦运动存在操作困难，标准方法直接扩展无法满足全方位遥操作需求。
AI.conclusion: 需进一步研究增强触觉反馈技术以解决多自由度解耦操作难题。

search_text: Towards 6DoF Bilateral Teleoperation of an Omnidirectional Aerial Vehicle for Aerial Physical Interaction 用于空中物理交互的全向飞行器的 6DoF 双边遥控 Bilateral teleoperation offers an intriguing solution towards shared autonomy with aerial vehicles in contact-based inspection and manipulation tasks. Omnidirectional aerial robots allow for full pose operations, making them particularly attractive in such tasks. Naturally, the question arises whether standard bilateral teleoperation methodologies are suitable for use with these vehicles. In this work, a fully decoupled 6DoF bilateral teleoperation framework for aerial physical interaction is designed and tested for the first time. The method is based on the well established rate control, recentering and interaction force feedback policy. However, practical experiments evince the difficulty of performing decoupled motions in a single axis only. As such, this work shows that the trivial extension of standard methods is insufficient for omnidirectional teleoperation, due to the operators physical inability to properly decouple all input DoFs. This suggests that further studies on enhanced haptic feedback are necessary. 双边远程操作为在基于接触的检查和操纵任务中与飞行器共享自主权提供了一个有趣的解决方案。全向空中机器人可以进行全姿势操作，这使得它们在此类任务中特别有吸引力。当然，问题是标准的双边远程操作方法是否适合与这些车辆一起使用。在这项工作中，首次设计并测试了用于空中物理交互的完全解耦的6DoF双边遥操作框架。该方法基于完善的速率控制、居中和交互力反馈策略。然而，实际实验表明仅在单轴上执行解耦运动是困难的。因此，这项工作表明，由于操作员身体上无法正确解耦所有输入自由度，标准方法的简单扩展不足以实现全向远程操作。这表明有必要对增强的触觉反馈进行进一步的研究。 本文设计并测试了首个用于全方位空中机器人物理交互的6自由度双边遥操作框架。 Mike Allenspach,Nicholas Lawrance,Marco Tognon,Roland Siegwart cs.RO

authors_text: Mike Allenspach,Yash Vyas,Matthias Rubio,Roland Siegwart,Marco Tognon
title: Human-State-Aware Controller for a Tethered Aerial Robot Guiding a Human by Physical Interaction
title_zh: 通过物理交互引导人类的系留空中机器人的人类状态感知控制器
abstract: With the rapid development of Aerial Physical Interaction, the possibility to have aerial robots physically interacting with humans is attracting a growing interest. In one of our previous works, we considered one of the first systems in which a human is physically connected to an aerial vehicle by a cable. There, we developed a compliant controller that allows the robot to pull the human toward a desired position using forces only as an indirect communication-channel. However, this controller is based on the robot-state only, which makes the system not adaptable to the human behavior, and in particular to their walking speed. This reduces the effectiveness and comfort of the guidance when the human is still far from the desired point. In this paper, we formally analyze the problem and propose a human-state-aware controller that includes a human`s velocity feedback. We theoretically prove and experimentally show that this method provides a more consistent guiding force which enhances the guiding experience.
summary: With the rapid development of Aerial Physical Interaction, the possibility to have aerial robots physically interacting with humans is attracting a growing interest. In one of our previous works, we considered one of the first systems in which a human is physically connected to an aerial vehicle by a cable. There, we developed a compliant controller that allows the robot to pull the human toward a desired position using forces only as an indirect communication-channel. However, this controller is based on the robot-state only, which makes the system not adaptable to the human behavior, and in particular to their walking speed. This reduces the effectiveness and comfort of the guidance when the human is still far from the desired point. In this paper, we formally analyze the problem and propose a human-state-aware controller that includes a human`s velocity feedback. We theoretically prove and experimentally show that this method provides a more consistent guiding force which enhances the guiding experience.
abstract_zh: 随着空中物理交互的快速发展，空中机器人与人类进行物理交互的可能性越来越引起人们的兴趣。在我们之前的一项工作中，我们考虑了人类通过电缆与飞行器物理连接的第一个系统。在那里，我们开发了一种兼容控制器，允许机器人仅使用力作为间接通信通道将人类拉向所需位置。然而，该控制器仅基于机器人状态，这使得系统无法适应人类行为，特别是步行速度。当人类距离期望点还很远时，这会降低引导的有效性和舒适度。在本文中，我们正式分析了该问题，并提出了一种包含人类速度反馈的人类状态感知控制器。我们从理论上证明并通过实验表明，该方法提供了更一致的引导力，从而增强了引导体验。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合人类状态信息的控制器，通过电缆物理交互引导人类移动。
AI.motivation: 先前基于机器人状态的控制器无法适应人类行走速度等行为特征，导致远距离引导效果不佳。
AI.method: 在控制器中引入人类速度反馈机制，并通过理论证明与实验验证其有效性。
AI.result: 新方法实现了更连贯的引导力，显著提升了引导舒适度与准确性。
AI.conclusion: 融合人类状态信息的控制器能有效增强人机协作的引导体验。

authors_text: Gyeong-Tae Lee,Sang-Min Choi,Byeong-Yun Ko,Yong-Hwa Park
title: HRTF measurement for accurate sound localization cues
title_zh: HRTF 测量可提供准确的声音定位线索
abstract: A new database of head-related transfer functions (HRTFs) for accurate sound source localization is presented through precise measurement and post-processing in terms of improved frequency bandwidth and causality of head-related impulse responses (HRIRs) for accurate spectral cue (SC) and interaural time difference (ITD), respectively. The improvement effects of the proposed methods on binaural sound localization cues were investigated. To achieve sufficient frequency bandwidth with a single source, a one-way sealed speaker module was designed to obtain wide band frequency response based on electro-acoustics, whereas most existing HRTF databases rely on a two-way vented loudspeaker that has multiple sources. The origin transfer function at the head center was obtained by the proposed measurement scheme using a 0 degree on-axis microphone to ensure accurate spectral cue pattern of HRTFs, whereas in the previous measurements with a 90 degree off-axis microphone, the magnitude response of the origin transfer function fluctuated and decreased with increasing frequency, causing erroneous SCs of HRTFs. To prevent discontinuity of ITD due to non-causality of ipsilateral HRTFs, obtained HRIRs were circularly shifted by time delay considering the head radius of the measurement subject. Finally, various sound localization cues such as ITD, interaural level difference (ILD), SC, and horizontal plane directivity (HPD) were derived from the presented HRTFs, and improvements on binaural sound localization cues were examined. As a result, accurate SC patterns of HRTFs were confirmed through the proposed measurement scheme using the 0 degree on-axis microphone, and continuous ITD patterns were obtained due to the non-causality compensation. Source codes and presented HRTF database are available to relevant research groups at GitHub (https://github.com/han-saram/HRTF-HATS-KAIST).

The improvement effects of the proposed methods on binaural sound localization cues were investigated. To achieve sufficient frequency bandwidth with a single source, a one-way sealed speaker module was designed to obtain wide band frequency response based on electro-acoustics, whereas most existing HRTF databases rely on a two-way vented loudspeaker that has multiple sources. The origin transfer function at the head center was obtained by the proposed measurement scheme using a 0 degree on-axis microphone to ensure accurate spectral cue pattern of HRTFs, whereas in the previous measurements with a 90 degree off-axis microphone, the magnitude response of the origin transfer function fluctuated and decreased with increasing frequency, causing erroneous SCs of HRTFs. To prevent discontinuity of ITD due to non-causality of ipsilateral HRTFs, obtained HRIRs were circularly shifted by time delay considering the head radius of the measurement subject. Finally, various sound localization cues such as ITD, interaural level difference (ILD), SC, and horizontal plane directivity (HPD) were derived from the presented HRTFs, and improvements on binaural sound localization cues were examined. As a result, accurate SC patterns of HRTFs were confirmed through the proposed measurement scheme using the 0 degree on-axis microphone, and continuous ITD patterns were obtained due to the non-causality compensation. Source codes and presented HRTF database are available to relevant research groups at GitHub (https://github.com/han-saram/HRTF-HATS-KAIST).
abstract_zh: 通过精确测量和后处理，提出了一个新的头部相关传递函数（HRTF）数据库，用于准确的声源定位，改善了频率带宽和头部相关脉冲响应（HRIR）的因果关系，分别实现了准确的频谱线索（SC）和耳间时间差（ITD）。研究了所提出的方法对双耳声音定位线索的改进效果。为了用单个源获得足够的频率带宽，设计了一种单向密封扬声器模块以获得基于电声学的宽带频率响应，而大多数现有的 HRTF 数据库依赖于具有多个源的双向通风扬声器。所提出的测量方案使用0度同轴麦克风获得了头部中心的原点传递函数，以确保HRTF准确的频谱提示模式，而在之前使用90度离轴麦克风的测量中，原点传递函数的幅度响应随着频率的增加而波动和减小，导致HRTF的错误SC。为了防止由于同侧 HRTF 的非因果性导致 ITD 不连续，考虑到测量对象的头部半径，通过时间延迟对获得的 HRIR 进行循环移位。最后，从所提出的 HRTF 中得出各种声音定位线索，如 ITD、耳间电平差 (ILD)、SC 和水平面指向性 (HPD)，并检查了双耳声音定位线索的改进。结果，通过所提出的使用0度同轴麦克风的测量方案确认了HRTF的准确SC模式，并且由于非因果补偿而获得了连续的ITD模式。相关研究小组可以在 GitHub (https://github.com/han-saram/HRTF-HATS-KAIST) 上获取源代码和提供的 HRTF 数据库。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种改进的头相关传递函数（HRTF）测量方法，通过优化频率带宽和时域因果性，提升双耳听觉定位线索的准确性。
AI.motivation: 现有HRTF数据库依赖双路扬声器导致频率响应波动和非因果性问题，影响频谱线索（SC）和间耳时差（ITD）的准确性，需改进测量方案以提升定位性能。
AI.method: 设计单路密封扬声器模块扩展频率带宽，采用0度轴向麦克风获取稳定原点传递函数，通过时间延迟补偿消除非因果性导致的ITD不连续，并提取SC、ILD、HPD等定位线索。
AI.result: 验证了改进方法可获得准确的SC模式和连续ITD分布，数据库及源代码已开源，为相关研究提供资源。
AI.conclusion: 所提测量方案有效提升了HRTF的频谱和时域特性，为高精度声源定位提供了可靠的数据支持和实现方法。

conclusion: 所提测量方案有效提升了HRTF的频谱和时域特性，为高精度声源定位提供了可靠的数据支持和实现方法。
search_text: HRTF measurement for accurate sound localization cues HRTF 测量可提供准确的声音定位线索 A new database of head-related transfer functions (HRTFs) for accurate sound source localization is presented through precise measurement and post-processing in terms of improved frequency bandwidth and causality of head-related impulse responses (HRIRs) for accurate spectral cue (SC) and interaural time difference (ITD), respectively. The improvement effects of the proposed methods on binaural sound localization cues were investigated. To achieve sufficient frequency bandwidth with a single source, a one-way sealed speaker module was designed to obtain wide band frequency response based on electro-acoustics, whereas most existing HRTF databases rely on a two-way vented loudspeaker that has multiple sources. The origin transfer function at the head center was obtained by the proposed measurement scheme using a 0 degree on-axis microphone to ensure accurate spectral cue pattern of HRTFs, whereas in the previous measurements with a 90 degree off-axis microphone, the magnitude response of the origin transfer function fluctuated and decreased with increasing frequency, causing erroneous SCs of HRTFs. To prevent discontinuity of ITD due to non-causality of ipsilateral HRTFs, obtained HRIRs were circularly shifted by time delay considering the head radius of the measurement subject. Finally, various sound localization cues such as ITD, interaural level difference (ILD), SC, and horizontal plane directivity (HPD) were derived from the presented HRTFs, and improvements on binaural sound localization cues were examined. As a result, accurate SC patterns of HRTFs were confirmed through the proposed measurement scheme using the 0 degree on-axis microphone, and continuous ITD patterns were obtained due to the non-causality compensation. Source codes and presented HRTF database are available to relevant research groups at GitHub (https://github.com/han-saram/HRTF-HATS-KAIST). 通过精确测量和后处理，提出了一个新的头部相关传递函数（HRTF）数据库，用于准确的声源定位，改善了频率带宽和头部相关脉冲响应（HRIR）的因果关系，分别实现了准确的频谱线索（SC）和耳间时间差（ITD）。研究了所提出的方法对双耳声音定位线索的改进效果。为了用单个源获得足够的频率带宽，设计了一种单向密封扬声器模块以获得基于电声学的宽带频率响应，而大多数现有的 HRTF 数据库依赖于具有多个源的双向通风扬声器。所提出的测量方案使用0度同轴麦克风获得了头部中心的原点传递函数，以确保HRTF准确的频谱提示模式，而在之前使用90度离轴麦克风的测量中，原点传递函数的幅度响应随着频率的增加而波动和减小，导致HRTF的错误SC。为了防止由于同侧 HRTF 的非因果性导致 ITD 不连续，考虑到测量对象的头部半径，通过时间延迟对获得的 HRIR 进行循环移位。最后，从所提出的 HRTF 中得出各种声音定位线索，如 ITD、耳间电平差 (ILD)、SC 和水平面指向性 (HPD)，并检查了双耳声音定位线索的改进。结果，通过所提出的使用0度同轴麦克风的测量方案确认了HRTF的准确SC模式，并且由于非因果补偿而获得了连续的ITD模式。相关研究小组可以在 GitHub (https://github.com/han-saram/HRTF-HATS-KAIST) 上获取源代码和提供的 HRTF 数据库。 本文提出一种改进的头相关传递函数（HRTF）测量方法，通过优化频率带宽和时域因果性，提升双耳听觉定位线索的准确性。 Gyeong-Tae Lee,Sang-Min Choi,Byeong-Yun Ko,Yong-Hwa Park eess.AS,cs.SD,eess.SP

authors_text: Nitish Bhardwaj,Dhornala Bharadwaj,Alpana Dubey
title: SingleSketch2Mesh : Generating 3D Mesh model from Sketch
title_zh: SingleSketch2Mesh ：从 Sketch 生成 3D 网格模型
abstract: Sketching is an important activity in any design process. Designers and stakeholders share their ideas through hand-drawn sketches. These sketches are further used to create 3D models. Current methods to generate 3D models from sketches are either manual or tightly coupled with 3D modeling platforms. Therefore, it requires users to have an experience of sketching on such platform. Moreover, most of the existing approaches are based on geometric manipulation and thus cannot be generalized. We propose a novel AI based ensemble approach, SingleSketch2Mesh, for generating 3D models from hand-drawn sketches. Our approach is based on Generative Networks and Encoder-Decoder Architecture to generate 3D mesh model from a hand-drawn sketch. We evaluate our solution with existing solutions. Our approach outperforms existing approaches on both - quantitative and qualitative evaluation criteria.
summary: Sketching is an important activity in any design process. Designers and stakeholders share their ideas through hand-drawn sketches. These sketches are further used to create 3D models. Current methods to generate 3D models from sketches are either manual or tightly coupled with 3D modeling platforms. Therefore, it requires users to have an experience of sketching on such platform. Moreover, most of the existing approaches are based on geometric manipulation and thus cannot be generalized. We propose a novel AI based ensemble approach, SingleSketch2Mesh, for generating 3D models from hand-drawn sketches. Our approach is based on Generative Networks and Encoder-Decoder Architecture to generate 3D mesh model from a hand-drawn sketch. We evaluate our solution with existing solutions. Our approach outperforms existing approaches on both - quantitative and qualitative evaluation criteria.
abstract_zh: 草图绘制是任何设计过程中的一项重要活动。设计师和利益相关者通过手绘草图分享他们的想法。这些草图进一步用于创建 3D 模型。当前从草图生成 3D 模型的方法要么是手动的，要么是与 3D 建模平台紧密结合的。因此，需要用户有在这样的平台上进行素描的体验。此外，大多数现有方法都是基于几何操作，因此不能推广。我们提出了一种新颖的基于 AI 的集成方法 SingleSketch2Mesh，用于从手绘草图生成 3D 模型。我们的方法基于生成网络和编码器-解码器架构，从手绘草图生成 3D 网格模型。我们用现有的解决方案来评估我们的解决方案。我们的方法在定量和定性评估标准方面都优于现有方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于AI的新型方法SingleSketch2Mesh，用于从手绘草图自动生成3D网格模型。
AI.motivation: 现有方法依赖手动操作或特定3D建模平台，且基于几何操作的方法难以推广，缺乏通用性和易用性。
AI.method: 采用生成网络与编码器-解码器架构，结合深度学习技术实现从手绘草图到3D网格模型的端到端生成。
AI.result: 在定量和定性评估中，该方法均优于现有解决方案，验证了其有效性与优越性。
AI.conclusion: SingleSketch2Mesh为从草图生成3D模型提供了更通用、自动化的AI解决方案，具有实际应用价值。
