authors_text: Haoze Wu,Clark Barrett,Mahmood Sharif,Nina Narodytska,Gagandeep Singh
title: Scalable Verification of GNN-based Job Schedulers
title_zh: 基于 GNN 的作业调度程序的可扩展验证
abstract: Recently, Graph Neural Networks (GNNs) have been applied for scheduling jobs over clusters, achieving better performance than hand-crafted heuristics. Despite their impressive performance, concerns remain over whether these GNN-based job schedulers meet users' expectations about other important properties, such as strategy-proofness, sharing incentive, and stability. In this work, we consider formal verification of GNN-based job schedulers. We address several domain-specific challenges such as networks that are deeper and specifications that are richer than those encountered when verifying image and NLP classifiers. We develop vegas, the first general framework for verifying both single-step and multi-step properties of these schedulers based on carefully designed algorithms that combine abstractions, refinements, solvers, and proof transfer. Our experimental results show that vegas achieves significant speed-up when verifying important properties of a state-of-the-art GNN-based scheduler compared to previous methods.
summary: Recently, Graph Neural Networks (GNNs) have been applied for scheduling jobs over clusters, achieving better performance than hand-crafted heuristics. Despite their impressive performance, concerns remain over whether these GNN-based job schedulers meet users' expectations about other important properties, such as strategy-proofness, sharing incentive, and stability. In this work, we consider formal verification of GNN-based job schedulers. We address several domain-specific challenges such as networks that are deeper and specifications that are richer than those encountered when verifying image and NLP classifiers. We develop vegas, the first general framework for verifying both single-step and multi-step properties of these schedulers based on carefully designed algorithms that combine abstractions, refinements, solvers, and proof transfer. Our experimental results show that vegas achieves significant speed-up when verifying important properties of a state-of-the-art GNN-based scheduler compared to previous methods.
abstract_zh: 最近，图神经网络（GNN）已被应用于集群上的作业调度，取得了比手工启发式更好的性能。尽管它们的性能令人印象深刻，但人们仍然担心这些基于 GNN 的作业调度程序是否满足用户对其他重要属性的期望，例如策略证明、共享激励和稳定性。在这项工作中，我们考虑基于 GNN 的作业调度程序的形式验证。我们解决了几个特定领域的挑战，例如比验证图像和 NLP 分类器时遇到的更深的网络和更丰富的规范。我们开发了 vegas，这是第一个通用框架，用于验证这些调度程序的单步和多步属性，该框架基于精心设计的算法，结合了抽象、细化、求解器和证明传输。我们的实验结果表明，与之前的方法相比，vegas 在验证最先进的基于 GNN 的调度器的重要属性时实现了显着的加速。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个可扩展的框架vegas，用于验证基于图神经网络（GNN）的作业调度器的关键属性。
AI.motivation: 尽管GNN在作业调度中表现优异，但其策略证明性、共享激励性和稳定性等关键属性缺乏验证，可能影响实际应用可靠性。
AI.method: 开发vegas框架，结合网络抽象、细化算法、求解器与证明迁移技术，解决深度网络和复杂规范带来的验证挑战。
AI.result: 实验表明vegas在验证先进GNN调度器的关键属性时，相比现有方法实现显著加速。
AI.conclusion: vegas为GNN调度器提供了有效的形式化验证方案，确保其满足关键属性要求，推动安全可靠的应用落地。

authors_text: Chenyang Qiu,Zhaoci Huang,Wenzhe Xu,Huijia Li
title: Fast Community Detection based on Graph Autoencoder Reconstruction
title_zh: 基于图自编码器重构的快速社区检测
comment: To be published in the 7th IEEE International Conference on Big Data Analytics (ICBDA2022). arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2201.04066
comments: To be published in the 7th IEEE International Conference on Big Data Analytics (ICBDA2022). arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2201.04066
abstract: With the rapid development of big data, how to efficiently and accurately discover tight community structures in large-scale networks for knowledge discovery has attracted more and more attention. In this paper, a community detection framework based on Graph AutoEncoder Reconstruction (noted as GAER) is proposed for the first time. GAER is a highly scalable framework which does not require any prior information. We decompose the graph autoencoder-based one-step encoding into the two-stage encoding framework to adapt to the real-world big data system by reducing complexity from the original O(N^2) to O(N). At the same time, based on the advantages of GAER support module plug-and-play configuration and incremental community detection, we further propose a peer awareness based module for real-time large graphs, which can realize the new nodes community detection at a faster speed, and accelerate model inference with the 6.15 times - 14.03 times speed. Finally, we apply the GAER on multiple real-world datasets, including some large-scale networks. The experimental result verified that GAER has achieved the superior performance on almost all networks.
summary: With the rapid development of big data, how to efficiently and accurately discover tight community structures in large-scale networks for knowledge discovery has attracted more and more attention. In this paper, a community detection framework based on Graph AutoEncoder Reconstruction (noted as GAER) is proposed for the first time. GAER is a highly scalable framework which does not require any prior information. We decompose the graph autoencoder-based one-step encoding into the two-stage encoding framework to adapt to the real-world big data system by reducing complexity from the original O(N^2) to O(N). At the same time, based on the advantages of GAER support module plug-and-play configuration and incremental community detection, we further propose a peer awareness based module for real-time large graphs, which can realize the new nodes community detection at a faster speed, and accelerate model inference with the 6.15 times - 14.03 times speed. Finally, we apply the GAER on multiple real-world datasets, including some large-scale networks. The experimental result verified that GAER has achieved the superior performance on almost all networks.
abstract_zh: 随着大数据的快速发展，如何高效、准确地发现大规模网络中的紧密社区结构以进行知识发现越来越受到人们的关注。本文首次提出了一种基于图自编码器重建（Graph AutoEncoder Reconstruction，简称GAER）的社区检测框架。 GAER 是一个高度可扩展的框架，不需要任何先验信息。我们将基于图自动编码器的一步编码分解为两阶段编码框架，通过将复杂度从原始的 O(N^2) 降低到 O(N) 来适应现实世界的大数据系统。同时，基于GAER支持模块即插即用配置和增量社区检测的优势，我们进一步提出了一种基于对等感知的实时大图模块，能够以更快的速度实现新节点社区检测，并以6.15倍~14.03倍的速度加速模型推理。最后，我们将 GAER 应用于多个现实世界数据集，包括一些大型网络。实验结果验证了GAER在几乎所有网络上都取得了优越的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于图自编码器重建的快速社区检测框架GAER，用于大规模网络中的高效社区结构发现。
AI.motivation: 随着大数据发展，如何高效准确地发现大规模网络中的紧密社区结构成为知识发现的关键挑战，传统方法存在复杂度高或需先验信息等局限。
AI.method: 将图自编码器的一阶段编码分解为两阶段框架以降低复杂度（O(N²)→O(N)），并设计可插拔模块与增量检测机制，结合对等感知模块实现新节点快速社区检测。
AI.result: 在多个真实数据集实验验证中，GAER在几乎所有网络中均取得优越性能，模型推理速度提升6.15-14.03倍。
AI.conclusion: GAER通过架构优化与模块化设计有效解决了大规模网络社区检测的效率问题，为实时应用场景提供了可行方案。

search_text: Fast Community Detection based on Graph Autoencoder Reconstruction 基于图自编码器重构的快速社区检测 With the rapid development of big data, how to efficiently and accurately discover tight community structures in large-scale networks for knowledge discovery has attracted more and more attention. In this paper, a community detection framework based on Graph AutoEncoder Reconstruction (noted as GAER) is proposed for the first time. GAER is a highly scalable framework which does not require any prior information. We decompose the graph autoencoder-based one-step encoding into the two-stage encoding framework to adapt to the real-world big data system by reducing complexity from the original O(N^2) to O(N). At the same time, based on the advantages of GAER support module plug-and-play configuration and incremental community detection, we further propose a peer awareness based module for real-time large graphs, which can realize the new nodes community detection at a faster speed, and accelerate model inference with the 6.15 times - 14.03 times speed. Finally, we apply the GAER on multiple real-world datasets, including some large-scale networks. The experimental result verified that GAER has achieved the superior performance on almost all networks. 随着大数据的快速发展，如何高效、准确地发现大规模网络中的紧密社区结构以进行知识发现越来越受到人们的关注。本文首次提出了一种基于图自编码器重建（Graph AutoEncoder Reconstruction，简称GAER）的社区检测框架。 GAER 是一个高度可扩展的框架，不需要任何先验信息。我们将基于图自动编码器的一步编码分解为两阶段编码框架，通过将复杂度从原始的 O(N^2) 降低到 O(N) 来适应现实世界的大数据系统。同时，基于GAER支持模块即插即用配置和增量社区检测的优势，我们进一步提出了一种基于对等感知的实时大图模块，能够以更快的速度实现新节点社区检测，并以6.15倍~14.03倍的速度加速模型推理。最后，我们将 GAER 应用于多个现实世界数据集，包括一些大型网络。实验结果验证了GAER在几乎所有网络上都取得了优越的性能。 本文提出了一种基于图自编码器重建的快速社区检测框架GAER，用于大规模网络中的高效社区结构发现。 Chenyang Qiu,Zhaoci Huang,Wenzhe Xu,Huijia Li cs.SI,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Inimfon I. Akpabio,Serap A. Savari
title: On the Construction of Distribution-Free Prediction Intervals for an Image Regression Problem in Semiconductor Manufacturing
title_zh: 半导体制造中图像回归问题的无分布预测区间的构造
abstract: The high-volume manufacturing of the next generation of semiconductor devices requires advances in measurement signal analysis. Many in the semiconductor manufacturing community have reservations about the adoption of deep learning; they instead prefer other model-based approaches for some image regression problems, and according to the 2021 IEEE International Roadmap for Devices and Systems (IRDS) report on Metrology a SEMI standardization committee may endorse this philosophy. The semiconductor manufacturing community does, however, communicate a need for state-of-the-art statistical analyses to reduce measurement uncertainty. Prediction intervals which characterize the reliability of the predictive performance of regression models can impact decisions, build trust in machine learning, and be applied to other regression models. However, we are not aware of effective and sufficiently simple distribution-free approaches that offer valid coverage for important classes of image data, so we consider the distribution-free conformal prediction and conformalized quantile regression framework.The image regression problem that is the focus of this paper pertains to line edge roughness (LER) estimation from noisy scanning electron microscopy images. LER affects semiconductor device performance and reliability as well as the yield of the manufacturing process; the 2021 IRDS emphasizes the crucial importance of LER by devoting a white paper to it in addition to mentioning or discussing it in the reports of multiple international focus teams. It is not immediately apparent how to effectively use normalized conformal prediction and quantile regression for LER estimation. The modeling techniques we apply appear to be novel for finding distribution-free prediction intervals for image data and will be presented at the 2022 SEMI Advanced Semiconductor Manufacturing Conference.
summary: The high-volume manufacturing of the next generation of semiconductor devices requires advances in measurement signal analysis. Many in the semiconductor manufacturing community have reservations about the adoption of deep learning; they instead prefer other model-based approaches for some image regression problems, and according to the 2021 IEEE International Roadmap for Devices and Systems (IRDS) report on Metrology a SEMI standardization committee may endorse this philosophy. The semiconductor manufacturing community does, however, communicate a need for state-of-the-art statistical analyses to reduce measurement uncertainty. Prediction intervals which characterize the reliability of the predictive performance of regression models can impact decisions, build trust in machine learning, and be applied to other regression models. However, we are not aware of effective and sufficiently simple distribution-free approaches that offer valid coverage for important classes of image data, so we consider the distribution-free conformal prediction and conformalized quantile regression framework.The image regression problem that is the focus of this paper pertains to line edge roughness (LER) estimation from noisy scanning electron microscopy images. LER affects semiconductor device performance and reliability as well as the yield of the manufacturing process; the 2021 IRDS emphasizes the crucial importance of LER by devoting a white paper to it in addition to mentioning or discussing it in the reports of multiple international focus teams. It is not immediately apparent how to effectively use normalized conformal prediction and quantile regression for LER estimation. The modeling techniques we apply appear to be novel for finding distribution-free prediction intervals for image data and will be presented at the 2022 SEMI Advanced Semiconductor Manufacturing Conference.
abstract_zh: 下一代半导体器件的大批量制造需要测量信号分析方面的进步。半导体制造界的许多人对深度学习的采用持保留态度；相反，他们更喜欢其他基于模型的方法来解决某些图像回归问题，并且根据 2021 年 IEEE 国际设备和系统路线图 (IRDS) 计量报告，SEMI 标准化委员会可能会认可这一理念。然而，半导体制造界确实表达了对最先进的统计分析的需求，以减少测量的不确定性。表征回归模型预测性能可靠性的预测区间可以影响决策，建立对机器学习的信任，并应用于其他回归模型。然而，我们不知道有效且足够简单的无分布方法可以为重要类别的图像数据提供有效覆盖，因此我们考虑无分布共形预测和共形分位数回归框架。本文关注的图像回归问题涉及从噪声扫描电子显微镜图像估计线边缘粗糙度（LER）。 LER影响半导体器件的性能和可靠性以及制造过程的良率； 2021 年 IRDS 除了在多个国际焦点小组的报告中提及或讨论之外，还专门撰写了一份白皮书，强​​调了 LER 的至关重要性。如何有效地使用归一化共形预测和分位数回归进行 LER 估计目前还不是很明显。我们应用的建模技术对于寻找图像数据的无分布预测区间来说似乎是新颖的，并将在 2022 年 SEMI 先进半导体制造会议上展示。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在为半导体制造中的图像回归问题（线边粗糙度估计）构建无需分布假设的预测区间方法。
AI.motivation: 半导体制造领域对深度学习持保留态度，更倾向模型驱动方法，但需先进统计方法降低测量不确定性。现有方法难以有效处理图像数据的分布自由预测区间问题。
AI.method: 采用分布自由的符合预测（conformal prediction）和符合量化回归框架，针对扫描电镜图像中的线边粗糙度（LER）估计问题进行建模。
AI.result: 提出适用于图像数据的分布自由预测区间方法，成功应用于LER估计，并将在2022年SEMI先进半导体制造会议展示。
AI.conclusion: 该方法满足半导体制造对可靠统计分析的需求，为图像回归问题提供有效不确定性量化方案，增强机器学习模型可信度。

authors_text: Kunyi Zhang,Chenxing Jiang,Jinghang Li,Sheng Yang,Teng Ma,Chao Xu,Fei Gao
title: DIDO: Deep Inertial Quadrotor Dynamical Odometry
title_zh: DIDO：深度惯性四旋翼飞行器动态里程计
comment: 8 pages, 11 figures, accepted by IROS 2022 with RA-L
comments: 8 pages, 11 figures, accepted by IROS 2022 with RA-L
abstract: In this work, we propose an interoceptive-only state estimation system for a quadrotor with deep neural network processing, where the quadrotor dynamics is considered as a perceptive supplement of the inertial kinematics. To improve the precision of multi-sensor fusion, we train cascaded networks on real-world quadrotor flight data to learn IMU kinematic properties, quadrotor dynamic characteristics, and motion states of the quadrotor along with their uncertainty information, respectively. This encoded information empowers us to address the issues of IMU bias stability, quadrotor dynamics, and multi-sensor calibration during sensor fusion. The above multi-source information is fused into a two-stage Extended Kalman Filter (EKF) framework for better estimation. Experiments have demonstrated the advantages of our proposed work over several conventional and learning-based methods.
summary: In this work, we propose an interoceptive-only state estimation system for a quadrotor with deep neural network processing, where the quadrotor dynamics is considered as a perceptive supplement of the inertial kinematics. To improve the precision of multi-sensor fusion, we train cascaded networks on real-world quadrotor flight data to learn IMU kinematic properties, quadrotor dynamic characteristics, and motion states of the quadrotor along with their uncertainty information, respectively. This encoded information empowers us to address the issues of IMU bias stability, quadrotor dynamics, and multi-sensor calibration during sensor fusion. The above multi-source information is fused into a two-stage Extended Kalman Filter (EKF) framework for better estimation. Experiments have demonstrated the advantages of our proposed work over several conventional and learning-based methods.
abstract_zh: 在这项工作中，我们提出了一种具有深度神经网络处理的四旋翼飞行器的仅内感受状态估计系统，其中四旋翼飞行器动力学被认为是惯性运动学的感知补充。为了提高多传感器融合的精度，我们利用真实的四旋翼飞行数据训练级联网络，以分别学习 IMU 运动学特性、四旋翼飞行器动态特性和四旋翼飞行器的运动状态及其不确定性信息。这些编码信息使我们能够解决传感器融合过程中的 IMU 偏置稳定性、四旋翼动力学和多传感器校准问题。将上述多源信息融合到两级扩展卡尔曼滤波器（EKF）框架中以实现更好的估计。实验证明了我们提出的工作相对于几种传统的和基于学习的方法的优势。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于深度神经网络的四旋翼无人机状态估计系统，结合动力学模型和多传感器融合，提升定位精度。
AI.motivation: 传统方法在处理IMU偏差、动力学模型和传感器校准方面存在不足，需要更精确的多传感器融合方法。
AI.method: 使用级联神经网络处理真实飞行数据，学习IMU特性、动力学参数和运动状态，结合两阶段EKF框架进行信息融合。
AI.result: 实验显示该方法优于传统和基于学习的现有方法，在精度和鲁棒性上有提升。
AI.conclusion: DIDO系统通过深度学习和动力学模型结合，有效解决了多传感器融合中的关键问题，为无人机导航提供了新思路。

search_text: DIDO: Deep Inertial Quadrotor Dynamical Odometry DIDO：深度惯性四旋翼飞行器动态里程计 In this work, we propose an interoceptive-only state estimation system for a quadrotor with deep neural network processing, where the quadrotor dynamics is considered as a perceptive supplement of the inertial kinematics. To improve the precision of multi-sensor fusion, we train cascaded networks on real-world quadrotor flight data to learn IMU kinematic properties, quadrotor dynamic characteristics, and motion states of the quadrotor along with their uncertainty information, respectively. This encoded information empowers us to address the issues of IMU bias stability, quadrotor dynamics, and multi-sensor calibration during sensor fusion. The above multi-source information is fused into a two-stage Extended Kalman Filter (EKF) framework for better estimation. Experiments have demonstrated the advantages of our proposed work over several conventional and learning-based methods. 在这项工作中，我们提出了一种具有深度神经网络处理的四旋翼飞行器的仅内感受状态估计系统，其中四旋翼飞行器动力学被认为是惯性运动学的感知补充。为了提高多传感器融合的精度，我们利用真实的四旋翼飞行数据训练级联网络，以分别学习 IMU 运动学特性、四旋翼飞行器动态特性和四旋翼飞行器的运动状态及其不确定性信息。这些编码信息使我们能够解决传感器融合过程中的 IMU 偏置稳定性、四旋翼动力学和多传感器校准问题。将上述多源信息融合到两级扩展卡尔曼滤波器（EKF）框架中以实现更好的估计。实验证明了我们提出的工作相对于几种传统的和基于学习的方法的优势。 本文提出一种基于深度神经网络的四旋翼无人机状态估计系统，结合动力学模型和多传感器融合，提升定位精度。 Kunyi Zhang,Chenxing Jiang,Jinghang Li,Sheng Yang,Teng Ma,Chao Xu,Fei Gao cs.RO

authors_text: Dongjun Kim,Tae-Sub Yun,Il-Chul Moon,Jang Won Bae
title: Automatic Calibration Framework of Agent-Based Models for Dynamic and Heterogeneous Parameters
title_zh: 基于代理的动态异质参数模型自动标定框架
comment: 3 pages, 6 figures, Autonomous Agents and Multiagent Systems (AAMAS 2022)
comments: 3 pages, 6 figures, Autonomous Agents and Multiagent Systems (AAMAS 2022)
abstract: Agent-based models (ABMs) highlight the importance of simulation validation, such as qualitative face validation and quantitative empirical validation. In particular, we focused on quantitative validation by adjusting simulation input parameters of the ABM. This study introduces an automatic calibration framework that combines the suggested dynamic and heterogeneous calibration methods. Specifically, the dynamic calibration fits the simulation results to the real-world data by automatically capturing suitable simulation time to adjust the simulation parameters. Meanwhile, the heterogeneous calibration reduces the distributional discrepancy between individuals in the simulation and the real world by adjusting agent related parameters cluster-wisely.
summary: Agent-based models (ABMs) highlight the importance of simulation validation, such as qualitative face validation and quantitative empirical validation. In particular, we focused on quantitative validation by adjusting simulation input parameters of the ABM. This study introduces an automatic calibration framework that combines the suggested dynamic and heterogeneous calibration methods. Specifically, the dynamic calibration fits the simulation results to the real-world data by automatically capturing suitable simulation time to adjust the simulation parameters. Meanwhile, the heterogeneous calibration reduces the distributional discrepancy between individuals in the simulation and the real world by adjusting agent related parameters cluster-wisely.
abstract_zh: 基于代理的模型（ABM）强调了模拟验证的重要性，例如定性人脸验证和定量实证验证。特别是，我们通过调整 ABM 的模拟输入参数来进行定量验证。本研究介绍了一种自动校准框架，该框架结合了建议的动态和异构校准方法。具体来说，动态校准通过自动捕获合适的仿真时间来调整仿真参数，使仿真结果与真实数据相匹配。同时，异构校准通过集群方式调整代理相关参数，减少了模拟中个体与现实世界中个体之间的分布差异。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合动态与异质校准方法的自动校准框架，用于提升基于代理模型（ABM）的参数调整与验证效果。
AI.motivation: 传统ABM验证依赖人工调整参数，难以应对动态变化和个体异质性带来的挑战，需更高效的自动校准方法。
AI.method: 动态校准通过自动捕捉关键时间点调整参数，异质校准则按集群调整代理参数，减少模拟与现实数据的分布差异。
AI.result: 框架有效提升了ABM的校准精度，降低了个体层面的分布偏差，增强了模型对真实世界的拟合能力。
AI.conclusion: 该框架为ABM的动态异质参数校准提供了系统性方法，具有实际应用价值。

authors_text: Tao Wang,Ning Xu,Kean Chen,Weiyao Lin
title: End-to-end video instance segmentation via spatial-temporal graph neural networks
title_zh: 通过时空图神经网络进行端到端视频实例分割
abstract: Video instance segmentation is a challenging task that extends image instance segmentation to the video domain. Existing methods either rely only on single-frame information for the detection and segmentation subproblems or handle tracking as a separate post-processing step, which limit their capability to fully leverage and share useful spatial-temporal information for all the subproblems. In this paper, we propose a novel graph-neural-network (GNN) based method to handle the aforementioned limitation. Specifically, graph nodes representing instance features are used for detection and segmentation while graph edges representing instance relations are used for tracking. Both inter and intra-frame information is effectively propagated and shared via graph updates and all the subproblems (i.e. detection, segmentation and tracking) are jointly optimized in an unified framework. The performance of our method shows great improvement on the YoutubeVIS validation dataset compared to existing methods and achieves 35.2% AP with a ResNet-50 backbone, operating at 22 FPS. Code is available at http://github.com/lucaswithai/visgraph.git .
summary: Video instance segmentation is a challenging task that extends image instance segmentation to the video domain. Existing methods either rely only on single-frame information for the detection and segmentation subproblems or handle tracking as a separate post-processing step, which limit their capability to fully leverage and share useful spatial-temporal information for all the subproblems. In this paper, we propose a novel graph-neural-network (GNN) based method to handle the aforementioned limitation. Specifically, graph nodes representing instance features are used for detection and segmentation while graph edges representing instance relations are used for tracking. Both inter and intra-frame information is effectively propagated and shared via graph updates and all the subproblems (i.e. detection, segmentation and tracking) are jointly optimized in an unified framework. The performance of our method shows great improvement on the YoutubeVIS validation dataset compared to existing methods and achieves 35.2% AP with a ResNet-50 backbone, operating at 22 FPS. Code is available at http://github.com/lucaswithai/visgraph.git .
abstract_zh: 视频实例分割是将图像实例分割扩展到视频领域的一项具有挑战性的任务。现有方法要么仅依赖单帧信息来检测和分割子问题，要么将跟踪作为单独的后处理步骤进行处理，这限制了它们充分利用和共享所有子问题的有用时空信息的能力。在本文中，我们提出了一种基于图神经网络（GNN）的新颖方法来解决上述限制。具体来说，表示实例特征的图节点用于检测和分割，而表示实例关系的图边用于跟踪。帧间和帧内信息都通过图更新有效传播和共享，并且所有子问题（即检测、分割和跟踪）在统一框架中联合优化。与现有方法相比，我们方法的性能在 YoutubeVIS 验证数据集上显示出巨大的改进，并在 ResNet-50 主干上实现了 35.2% AP，以 22 FPS 运行。代码可在 http://github.com/lucaswithai/visgraph.git 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于时空图神经网络的端到端视频实例分割方法，旨在更有效地利用时空信息提升分割和跟踪性能。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在处理视频实例分割时，检测、分割与跟踪子问题之间缺乏有效的时空信息共享，限制了整体性能。
AI.method: 采用图神经网络，利用图节点表示实例特征进行检测和分割，图边表示实例间关系用于跟踪，通过图更新机制共享帧内与帧间信息，联合优化所有子任务。
AI.result: 在YouTubeVIS验证集上，使用ResNet-50骨干网络实现35.2%的AP，运行速度达22 FPS，性能优于现有方法，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过有效整合时空信息，显著提升了视频实例分割的性能，验证了统一框架下联合优化的优越性。

authors_text: Shiming Chen,Ziming Hong,Guo-Sen Xie,Wenhan Yang,Qinmu Peng,Kai Wang,Jian Zhao,Xinge You
title: MSDN: Mutually Semantic Distillation Network for Zero-Shot Learning
title_zh: MSDN：零样本学习的相互语义蒸馏网络
abstract: The key challenge of zero-shot learning (ZSL) is how to infer the latent semantic knowledge between visual and attribute features on seen classes, and thus achieving a desirable knowledge transfer to unseen classes. Prior works either simply align the global features of an image with its associated class semantic vector or utilize unidirectional attention to learn the limited latent semantic representations, which could not effectively discover the intrinsic semantic knowledge e.g., attribute semantics) between visual and attribute features. To solve the above dilemma, we propose a Mutually Semantic Distillation Network (MSDN), which progressively distills the intrinsic semantic representations between visual and attribute features for ZSL. MSDN incorporates an attribute$\rightarrow$visual attention sub-net that learns attribute-based visual features, and a visual$\rightarrow$attribute attention sub-net that learns visual-based attribute features. By further introducing a semantic distillation loss, the two mutual attention sub-nets are capable of learning collaboratively and teaching each other throughout the training process. The proposed MSDN yields significant improvements over the strong baselines, leading to new state-of-the-art performances on three popular challenging benchmarks, i.e., CUB, SUN, and AWA2. Our codes have been available at: \url{https://github.com/shiming-chen/MSDN}.
summary: The key challenge of zero-shot learning (ZSL) is how to infer the latent semantic knowledge between visual and attribute features on seen classes, and thus achieving a desirable knowledge transfer to unseen classes. Prior works either simply align the global features of an image with its associated class semantic vector or utilize unidirectional attention to learn the limited latent semantic representations, which could not effectively discover the intrinsic semantic knowledge e.g., attribute semantics) between visual and attribute features. To solve the above dilemma, we propose a Mutually Semantic Distillation Network (MSDN), which progressively distills the intrinsic semantic representations between visual and attribute features for ZSL. MSDN incorporates an attribute$\rightarrow$visual attention sub-net that learns attribute-based visual features, and a visual$\rightarrow$attribute attention sub-net that learns visual-based attribute features. By further introducing a semantic distillation loss, the two mutual attention sub-nets are capable of learning collaboratively and teaching each other throughout the training process. The proposed MSDN yields significant improvements over the strong baselines, leading to new state-of-the-art performances on three popular challenging benchmarks, i.e., CUB, SUN, and AWA2. Our codes have been available at: \url{https://github.com/shiming-chen/MSDN}.
abstract_zh: 零样本学习（ZSL）的关键挑战是如何推断已见类的视觉特征和属性特征之间的潜在语义知识，从而实现向未见类的理想知识迁移。先前的工作要么简单地将图像的全局特征与其相关的类语义向量对齐，要么利用单向注意力来学习有限的潜在语义表示，这无法有效地发现视觉特征和属性特征之间的内在语义知识（例如属性语义）。为了解决上述困境，我们提出了一种相互语义蒸馏网络（MSDN），它逐步蒸馏 ZSL 的视觉特征和属性特征之间的内在语义表示。 MSDN 合并了一个学习基于属性的视觉特征的 attribute$\rightarrow$视觉注意子网，以及一个学习基于视觉的属性特征的视觉$\rightarrow$attribute 注意子网。通过进一步引入语义蒸馏损失，两个相互关注子网能够在整个训练过程中协作学习和互相教学。所提议的 MSDN 在强大的基准基础上产生了显着的改进，从而在三个流行的具有挑战性的基准（即 CUB、SUN 和 AWA2）上实现了新的最先进的性能。我们的代码可在：\url{https://github.com/shiming-chen/MSDN} 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为MSDN的相互语义蒸馏网络，用于解决零样本学习中视觉与属性特征间语义知识传递的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有方法通过全局特征对齐或单向注意力机制学习语义表示，无法有效挖掘视觉与属性特征间的内在语义关联，限制了知识迁移效果。
AI.method: 设计双向注意力子网络（属性→视觉和视觉→属性），结合语义蒸馏损失函数，使两个子网络在训练过程中相互协作学习并教学。
AI.result: 在CUB、SUN和AWA2三个基准数据集上取得优于现有方法的最新性能，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: MSDN通过双向语义蒸馏机制有效提升了零样本学习中跨模态语义对齐能力，为相关研究提供了新思路。

Prior works either simply align the global features of an image with its associated class semantic vector or utilize unidirectional attention to learn the limited latent semantic representations, which could not effectively discover the intrinsic semantic knowledge e.g., attribute semantics) between visual and attribute features. To solve the above dilemma, we propose a Mutually Semantic Distillation Network (MSDN), which progressively distills the intrinsic semantic representations between visual and attribute features for ZSL. MSDN incorporates an attribute$\rightarrow$visual attention sub-net that learns attribute-based visual features, and a visual$\rightarrow$attribute attention sub-net that learns visual-based attribute features. By further introducing a semantic distillation loss, the two mutual attention sub-nets are capable of learning collaboratively and teaching each other throughout the training process. The proposed MSDN yields significant improvements over the strong baselines, leading to new state-of-the-art performances on three popular challenging benchmarks, i.e., CUB, SUN, and AWA2. authors_text: Shengnan An,Yifei Li,Zeqi Lin,Qian Liu,Bei Chen,Qiang Fu,Weizhu Chen,Nanning Zheng,Jian-Guang Lou
title: Input-Tuning: Adapting Unfamiliar Inputs to Frozen Pretrained Models
title_zh: 输入调优：使不熟悉的输入适应冻结的预训练模型
abstract: Recently the prompt-tuning paradigm has attracted significant attention. By only tuning continuous prompts with a frozen pre-trained language model (PLM), prompt-tuning takes a step towards deploying a shared frozen PLM to serve numerous downstream tasks. Although prompt-tuning shows good performance on certain natural language understanding (NLU) tasks, its effectiveness on natural language generation (NLG) tasks is still under-explored. In this paper, we argue that one of the factors hindering the development of prompt-tuning on NLG tasks is the unfamiliar inputs (i.e., inputs are linguistically different from the pretraining corpus). For example, our preliminary exploration reveals a large performance gap between prompt-tuning and fine-tuning when unfamiliar inputs occur frequently in NLG tasks. This motivates us to propose input-tuning, which fine-tunes both the continuous prompts and the input representations, leading to a more effective way to adapt unfamiliar inputs to frozen PLMs. Our proposed input-tuning is conceptually simple and empirically powerful. Experimental results on seven NLG tasks demonstrate that input-tuning is significantly and consistently better than prompt-tuning. Furthermore, on three of these tasks, input-tuning can achieve a comparable or even better performance than fine-tuning.
summary: Recently the prompt-tuning paradigm has attracted significant attention. By only tuning continuous prompts with a frozen pre-trained language model (PLM), prompt-tuning takes a step towards deploying a shared frozen PLM to serve numerous downstream tasks. Although prompt-tuning shows good performance on certain natural language understanding (NLU) tasks, its effectiveness on natural language generation (NLG) tasks is still under-explored. In this paper, we argue that one of the factors hindering the development of prompt-tuning on NLG tasks is the unfamiliar inputs (i.e., inputs are linguistically different from the pretraining corpus). For example, our preliminary exploration reveals a large performance gap between prompt-tuning and fine-tuning when unfamiliar inputs occur frequently in NLG tasks. This motivates us to propose input-tuning, which fine-tunes both the continuous prompts and the input representations, leading to a more effective way to adapt unfamiliar inputs to frozen PLMs. Our proposed input-tuning is conceptually simple and empirically powerful. Experimental results on seven NLG tasks demonstrate that input-tuning is significantly and consistently better than prompt-tuning. Furthermore, on three of these tasks, input-tuning can achieve a comparable or even better performance than fine-tuning.
abstract_zh: 最近，即时调整范式引起了极大的关注。通过仅使用冻结的预训练语言模型 (PLM) 调整连续提示，提示调整朝着部署共享的冻结 PLM 来服务众多下游​​任务迈出了一步。尽管提示调优在某些自然语言理解（NLU）任务上表现出良好的性能，但其在自然语言生成（NLG）任务上的有效性仍待探索。在本文中，我们认为阻碍 NLG 任务即时调优发展的因素之一是不熟悉的输入（即输入在语言上与预训练语料库不同）。例如，我们的初步探索表明，当 NLG 任务中频繁出现不熟悉的输入时，提示调整和微调之间存在很大的性能差距。这促使我们提出输入调整，对连续提示和输入表示进行微调，从而提供一种更有效的方法来使不熟悉的输入适应冻结的 PLM。我们提出的输入调整在概念上很简单，在经验上也很强大。七个 NLG 任务的实验结果表明，输入调优明显且始终优于提示调优。此外，在其中三个任务中，输入调优可以实现与微调相当甚至更好的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Input-Tuning的方法，旨在通过调整连续提示和输入表示，使冻结的预训练语言模型（PLM）能够更好地适应不熟悉的输入，特别是在自然语言生成（NLG）任务中。
AI.motivation: 尽管提示调整（prompt-tuning）在自然语言理解（NLU）任务中表现良好，但其在NLG任务中因输入与预训练语料库语言差异较大而效果受限，导致与微调方法存在显著性能差距。
AI.method: 输入调整（Input-Tuning）通过同时微调连续提示和输入表示，使冻结的PLM能够更有效地适应不熟悉的输入，概念简单且实证有效。
AI.result: 在七个NLG任务的实验中，Input-Tuning显著优于提示调整，并在其中三个任务上达到与微调相当或更好的性能。
AI.conclusion: Input-Tuning为适应冻结PLM的不熟悉输入提供了有效方法，在保持模型冻结的同时提升了NLG任务的性能，成为微调的可行替代方案。
